title: Joint Visible Light and RF Backscatter Communications for Ambient IoT Network: Fundamentals, Applications, and Opportunities
summary: The rapid growth of the Internet of Things (IoT) devices in the sixth-generation (6G) wireless networks raises significant generality and scalability challenges due to energy consumption, deployment complexity, and environmental impact. Ambient IoT (A-IoT), leveraging ambient energy harvesting (EH) for batteryless device operation, has emerged as a promising solution to address these challenges.Among various EH and communication techniques, visible light communication (VLC) integrated with ambient backscatter communication (AmBC) offers remarkable advantages, including energy neutrality, high reliability, and enhanced security. In this paper, we propose a joint VLC-AmBC architecture, emphasizing fundamental concepts, system designs, and practical implementations. We explore potential applications in environmental monitoring, healthcare, smart logistics, and secure communications. We present proof-of-concept demonstrations for three distinct types of ambient backscatter devices (AmBDs): EH-Only, VLC-Relay, and VLC-Control. Experimental results demonstrate the feasibility of implementing joint VLC-AmBC systems, highlighting their practical viability across various deployment scenarios. Finally, we outline future research directions, including integrated sensing and communication, as well as optimized energy-efficient deployment. Open issues, such as large-scale deployment challenges, are also discussed, thereby providing a clear roadmap for future developments in joint VLC-AmBC-enabled A-IoT ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合可见光通信（VLC）和环境回溯通信（AmBC）的联合架构，用于解决物联网（IoT）设备在6G网络中的能源消耗、部署复杂性和环境影响等挑战，并探讨了其在环境监测、医疗保健、智能物流和安全通信等领域的应用，通过概念验证展示了其可行性。
AI.motivation: 6G网络中物联网设备数量激增，带来了能源消耗、部署复杂性和环境影响等方面的挑战。环境物联网（A-IoT）通过利用环境能量收集（EH）实现无电池设备运行，是一种有前景的解决方案。其中，VLC与AmBC的结合具有能量中性、高可靠性和增强安全性等优点，因此受到关注。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个联合VLC-AmBC的架构，并进行了系统设计和实际实现。通过三种不同类型的环境回溯设备（EH-Only、VLC-Relay和VLC-Control）进行了概念验证。实验结果验证了联合VLC-AmBC系统的可行性。
AI.result: 概念验证表明，EH-Only、VLC-Relay和VLC-Control这三种环境回溯设备类型在联合VLC-AmBC系统中均能实现，并展示了其在不同部署场景下的实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 联合VLC-AmBC系统是可行的，并在A-IoT生态系统中具有广泛的应用前景。未来的研究方向包括集成传感与通信、优化能量效率部署以及解决大规模部署的挑战。

title: The Vertical Challenge of Low-Altitude Economy: Why We Need a Unified Height System?
summary: The explosive growth of the low-altitude economy, driven by eVTOLs and UAVs, demands a unified digital infrastructure to ensure safety and scalability. However, the current aviation vertical references are dangerously fragmented: manned aviation relies on barometric pressure, cartography uses Mean Sea Level (MSL), and obstacle avoidance depends on Above Ground Level (AGL). This fragmentation creates significant ambiguity for autonomous systems and hinders cross-stakeholder interoperability. In this article, we propose Height Above Ellipsoid (HAE) as the standardized vertical reference for lower airspace. Unlike legacy systems prone to environmental drift and inconsistent datums, HAE provides a globally consistent, GNSS-native, and mathematically stable reference. We present a pragmatic bidirectional transformation framework to bridge HAE with legacy systems and demonstrate its efficacy through (1) real-world implementation in Shenzhen's partitioned airspace management, and (2) a probabilistic risk assessment driven by empirical flight logs from the PX4 ecosystem. Results show that transitioning to HAE reduces the required vertical separation minimum, effectively increasing dynamic airspace capacity while maintaining a target safety level. This work offers a roadmap for transitioning from analog height keeping to a digital-native vertical standard.

AI.tldr: 为了解决低空经济中垂直参照系的碎片化问题，本研究提出将椭球体高（HAE）作为统一的垂直参考标准，并开发了HAE与现有参照系的双向转换框架，实证研究表明HAE能提高空域容量同时保证安全。
AI.motivation: 当前低空经济（eVTOLs和UAVs）的快速发展，对统一、安全、可扩展的数字基础设施提出了迫切需求，但现有航空垂直参照系（气压高度、平均海平面MSL、地面以上高度AGL）的碎片化严重阻碍了自主系统和跨部门的互操作性。
AI.method: 提出将椭球体高（HAE）作为低空空域统一垂直参照系。开发了一个双向转换框架，用于连接HAE与现有参照系。通过在深圳进行实际空域管理试点，并利用PX4生态系统的飞行日志进行基于概率的风险评估来验证该框架的有效性。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，采用HAE作为垂直参照系可以减少所需的垂直间隔最小距离，从而在保持目标安全水平的同时，有效提高动态空域容量。实际应用和风险评估均证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出了一条从模拟高度保持向数字原生垂直标准过渡的路线图，通过采用HAE作为标准垂直参照系，可以解决低空空域垂直参照系碎片化问题，提升空域管理效率和安全性。

title: GAIDE: Graph-based Attention Masking for Spatial- and Embodiment-aware Motion Planning
summary: Sampling-based motion planning algorithms are widely used for motion planning of robotic manipulators, but they often struggle with sample inefficiency in high-dimensional configuration spaces due to their reliance on uniform or hand-crafted informed sampling primitives. Neural informed samplers address this limitation by learning the sampling distribution from prior planning experience to guide the motion planner towards planning goal. However, existing approaches often struggle to encode the spatial structure inherent in motion planning problems. To address this limitation, we introduce Graph-based Attention Masking for Spatial- and Embodiment-aware Motion Planning (GAIDE), a neural informed sampler that leverages both the spatial structure of the planning problem and the robotic manipulator's embodiment to guide the planning algorithm. GAIDE represents these structures as a graph and integrates it into a transformer-based neural sampler through attention masking. We evaluate GAIDE against baseline state-of-the-art sampling-based planners using uniform sampling, hand-crafted informed sampling, and neural informed sampling primitives. Evaluation results demonstrate that GAIDE improves planning efficiency and success rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GAIDE的基于图的注意力掩蔽的神经信息采样器，用于解决机器人操纵器在高维空间中的运动规划效率低下问题，通过整合空间结构和机器人本体信息来指导规划。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于采样的运动规划算法在处理高维配置空间时效率低下，现有神经信息采样器在编码运动规划问题的空间结构方面存在不足。
AI.method: GAIDE将规划问题和机器人本体结构表示为图，并利用注意力掩蔽将其整合到基于Transformer的神经采样器中，以学习采样分布。
AI.result: 与基线方法（包括均匀采样、手工启发式采样和现有神经信息采样器）相比，GAIDE在规划效率和成功率方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: GAIDE通过有效利用规划问题的空间结构和机器人本体信息，能够显著提升采样基础运动规划的性能。

title: On boundedness of solutions of three-state Moore-Greitzer compressor model with nonlinear proportional-integral controller for the surge subsystem
summary: The work focuses on Lagrange stability of the origin for the three-state Moore-Greitzer compressor model in closed loop with a nonlinear PI controller, tuned only to stabilize a lower-dimensional invariant surge-dynamics subsystem.The linearization of the system is not stabilizable but the static nonlinearity satisfies a sector condition, and together with a structural property of the stall-dynamics subsystem, this plays an essential role in the analysis. The main contribution provides explicit conditions on the controller parameters together with analytical arguments that guarantee boundedness of all solutions of the closed-loop system. The analysis employs a non-standard application of circle-criterion-based arguments. Together with the additional arguments developed in the work, this stability test also shows that the closed-loop system is robust to certain perturbations and model uncertainties.

AI.tldr: 研究了一个带非线性PI控制器的Moore-Greitzer压缩机模型的拉格朗日稳定性。虽然线性化系统不可稳定，但通过特定非线性条件和子系统特性，导出了控制器参数的显式条件，保证了闭环系统的所有解的有界性，并证明了其对扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 为了解决Moore-Greitzer压缩机模型在闭环控制下，特别是控制器仅用于稳定低维不变喘振动力学子系统时的拉格朗日稳定性问题。
AI.method: 通过分析系统的静态非线性是否满足扇形条件，并结合喘振动力学子系统的结构特性，利用非标准的基于圆准则的方法，并辅以额外论证，导出了控制器参数的显式条件，以保证闭环系统的所有解的有界性。
AI.result: 得出了控制器参数的显式条件，并提供了分析论证，保证了闭环系统的所有解的有界性。该稳定性测试还表明闭环系统对某些扰动和模型不确定性具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过非标准的圆准则分析，证明了在特定条件下，带非线性PI控制器的Moore-Greitzer压缩机模型的闭环系统是拉格朗日稳定的，并且对模型不确定性具有鲁棒性。

title: SkillNet: Create, Evaluate, and Connect AI Skills
summary: Current AI agents can flexibly invoke tools and execute complex tasks, yet their long-term advancement is hindered by the lack of systematic accumulation and transfer of skills. Without a unified mechanism for skill consolidation, agents frequently ``reinvent the wheel'', rediscovering solutions in isolated contexts without leveraging prior strategies. To overcome this limitation, we introduce SkillNet, an open infrastructure designed to create, evaluate, and organize AI skills at scale. SkillNet structures skills within a unified ontology that supports creating skills from heterogeneous sources, establishing rich relational connections, and performing multi-dimensional evaluation across Safety, Completeness, Executability, Maintainability, and Cost-awareness. Our infrastructure integrates a repository of over 200,000 skills, an interactive platform, and a versatile Python toolkit. Experimental evaluations on ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld demonstrate that SkillNet significantly enhances agent performance, improving average rewards by 40% and reducing execution steps by 30% across multiple backbone models. By formalizing skills as evolving, composable assets, SkillNet provides a robust foundation for agents to move from transient experience to durable mastery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SkillNet，一个用于大规模创建、评估和组织AI技能的基础设施，以解决当前AI代理技能缺乏系统性积累和迁移的问题。SkillNet通过统一的本体论来构建技能，支持多维度评估，并包含一个包含超过20万个技能的知识库、一个交互平台和一个Python工具包。实验证明SkillNet能显著提升AI代理的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代理虽然能灵活调用工具执行复杂任务，但由于缺乏系统性的技能积累和迁移机制，导致它们在解决新问题时经常重复劳动，无法有效利用过往经验。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为SkillNet的开放基础设施，其核心是一个统一的本体论，用于创建、组织和评估AI技能。该本体论支持从异构来源创建技能，建立丰富的关系连接，并从安全、完整性、可执行性、可维护性和成本意识等多个维度进行评估。SkillNet集成了超过20万个技能的知识库、一个交互平台和一个Python工具包。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld等基准测试中，使用SkillNet的AI代理在性能上得到了显著提升，平均奖励提高了40%，执行步数减少了30%。
AI.conclusion: SkillNet通过将技能形式化为可演化、可组合的资产，为AI代理提供了从瞬时经验到持久掌握的坚实基础，克服了技能固有的局限性。

title: Design of Grid Forming Multi Timescale Coordinated Control Strategies for Dynamic Virtual Power Plants
summary: As the penetration level of distributed energy resources (DERs) continues to rise, traditional frequency and voltage support from synchronous machines declines. This weakens grid stability and increases the need for fast and adaptive control in a dynamic manner, especially in weak grids. However, most virtual power plants (VPPs) rely on static aggregation and plan based resource allocation strategies. These methods overlook differences in device response times and limit flexibility for ancillary services. To address this issue, we propose a dynamic virtual power plant (DVPP) that coordinates heterogeneous resources across multiple time scales using grid forming control. We first contrast grid following and grid forming converters: grid following designs rely on a phase locked loop which can undermine stability in weak grids, whereas our DVPP applies virtual synchronous generator control at the aggregate level to provide effective inertia and damping. Then, we introduce a dynamic participation factor framework that measures each device s contribution through the frequency active power and voltage reactive power loops. Exploiting device heterogeneity, we adopt a banded allocation strategy: slow resources manage steady state and low frequency regulation; intermediate resources smooth transitions; and fast resources deliver rapid response and high frequency damping. Comparative simulations demonstrate that this coordinated, timescale aware approach enhances stability and ancillary service performance compared to conventional VPPs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态虚拟电厂（DVPP）方案，利用异构分布式能源（DERs）在多时间尺度上进行协调控制，以增强弱电网的稳定性和辅助服务能力。
AI.motivation: 随着分布式能源（DERs）渗透率的提高，传统同步发电机提供的频率和电压支撑能力下降，导致电网稳定性减弱，尤其是在弱电网中，迫切需要快速自适应的动态控制。现有的虚拟电厂（VPPs）采用静态聚合和计划式资源分配策略，忽略了设备响应时间的差异，限制了辅助服务的灵活性。
AI.method: 提出了一种动态虚拟电厂（DVPP）方案，该方案在宏观层面采用“电网形成”（grid forming）控制，与传统的“电网跟随”（grid following）转换器（依赖锁相环，易在弱电网中破坏稳定性）形成对比。DVPP利用虚拟同步发电机（VSG）控制，提供惯量和阻尼。引入了动态参与因子框架，通过有功功率-频率和无功功率-电压环路来衡量各设备的贡献。采用了一种基于时间尺度的分配策略：慢速资源负责稳态和低频调节，中速资源负责平滑过渡，快速资源负责快速响应和高频阻尼。
AI.result: 通过仿真对比，证明了所提出的协调式、考虑时间尺度的DVPP方法在提高电网稳定性和辅助服务性能方面优于传统的VPPs。
AI.conclusion: 动态虚拟电厂（DVPP）通过在宏观层面采用电网形成控制，并利用异构设备的响应特性在多时间尺度上进行协调，能够有效克服传统VPPs的局限性，显著提升弱电网的稳定性和辅助服务能力。

title: CogGen: Cognitive-Load-Informed Fully Unsupervised Deep Generative Modeling for Compressively Sampled MRI Reconstruction
summary: Fully unsupervised deep generative modeling (FU-DGM) is promising for compressively sampled MRI (CS-MRI) when training data or compute are limited. Classical FU-DGMs such as DIP and INR rely on architectural priors, but the ill-conditioned inverse problem often demands many iterations and easily overfits measurement noise. We propose CogGen, a cognitive-load-informed FU-DGM that casts CS-MRI as staged inversion and regulates task-side "cognitive load" by progressively scheduling intrinsic difficulty and extraneous interference. CogGen replaces uniform data fitting with an easy-to-hard k-space weighting/selection strategy: early iterations emphasize low-frequency, high-SNR, structure-dominant samples, while higher-frequency or noise-dominated measurements are introduced later. We realize this schedule via self-paced curriculum learning with complementary student-mode (what the model can currently learn) and teacher-mode (what it should follow) criteria, supporting both soft weighting and hard selection. Experiments and analysis show that CogGen-DIP and CogGen-INR improve fidelity and convergence over strong unsupervised baselines and competitive supervised pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CogGen的认知负荷引导的全无监督深度生成模型，用于加速MRI重建。CogGen通过逐步引入k空间数据，从易到难，以减轻过拟合和提高收敛性。
AI.motivation: 传统的全无监督深度生成模型（FU-DGMs）在加速MRI（CS-MRI）重建时，由于对训练数据或计算资源的要求，以及对测量噪声的过拟合问题，性能受到限制。研究者希望开发一种更有效、更鲁棒的FU-DGM方法。
AI.method: CogGen将CS-MRI视为分阶段反演问题，并通过逐步调整内在难度和外部干扰来调节任务端的“认知负荷”。它采用k空间加权/选择策略，早期关注低频、高信噪比、结构主导的样本，后期引入高频或噪声主导的测量。该策略通过互补的学生模式（当前可学习内容）和教师模式（应遵循内容）的自定步调课程学习实现，支持软加权和硬选择。
AI.result: 实验和分析表明，CogGen-DIP和CogGen-INR相比于强大的无监督基线和有竞争力的监督流水线，在保真度和收敛性方面均有所提高。
AI.conclusion: CogGen是一种有效的认知负荷引导的全无监督深度生成模型，能够显著提升CS-MRI重建的性能，克服传统方法的局限性。

title: Risk-Aware Rulebooks for Multi-Objective Trajectory Evaluation under Uncertainty
summary: We present a risk-aware formalism for evaluating system trajectories in the presence of uncertain interactions between the system and its environment. The proposed formalism supports reasoning under uncertainty and systematically handles complex relationships among requirements and objectives, including hierarchical priorities and non-comparability. Rather than treating the environment as exogenous noise, we explicitly model how each system trajectory influences the environment and evaluate trajectories under the resulting distribution of environment responses. We prove that the formalism induces a preorder on the set of system trajectories, ensuring consistency and preventing cyclic preferences. Finally, we illustrate the approach with an autonomous driving example that demonstrates how the formalism enhances explainability by clarifying the rationale behind trajectory selection.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种风险感知的形式化方法，用于评估系统在与环境不确定交互下的轨迹。该方法考虑了不确定性下的推理，并能处理复杂的优先级和不可比性需求。与将环境视为噪声不同，该方法明确建模了系统轨迹如何影响环境，并评估在环境响应分布下的轨迹。最终，该方法产生了一个系统轨迹的偏序关系，并用自动驾驶示例说明了其在轨迹选择中的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理系统与环境不确定交互下的系统轨迹评估时存在不足，难以处理复杂的、具有层次优先级和不可比性的需求。将环境视为噪声会忽略系统与环境之间的反馈关系。
AI.method: 提出了一种风险感知的形式化方法，通过显式建模系统轨迹对环境的影响以及环境响应的分布来评估系统轨迹。该方法支持不确定性下的推理，并能处理复杂的需求关系。最后证明了该形式化方法在系统轨迹集上诱导了一个偏序关系。
AI.result: 该形式化方法能够一致地评估系统轨迹，并防止出现循环偏好。自动驾驶示例表明，该方法能够增强轨迹选择的可解释性，并清晰地阐明选择某个轨迹的理由。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的风险感知形式化方法为评估系统在不确定环境交互下的轨迹提供了一种系统化的、可解释的解决方案，能够有效处理复杂的系统需求和环境反馈。

title: Lost in Translation: How Language Re-Aligns Vision for Cross-Species Pathology
comment: 27 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables. Code and data available at https://github.com/ekansh-arora0/cross-species-pathology
summary: Foundation models are increasingly applied to computational pathology, yet their behavior under cross-cancer and cross-species transfer remains unspecified. This study investigated how fine-tuning CPath-CLIP affects cancer detection under same-cancer, cross-cancer, and cross-species conditions using whole-slide image patches from canine and human histopathology. Performance was measured using area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC). Few-shot fine-tuning improved same-cancer (64.9% to 72.6% AUC) and cross-cancer performance (56.84% to 66.31% AUC). Cross-species evaluation revealed that while tissue matching enables meaningful transfer, performance remains below state-of-the-art benchmarks (H-optimus-0: 84.97% AUC), indicating that standard vision-language alignment is suboptimal for cross-species generalization. Embedding space analysis revealed extremely high cosine similarity (greater than 0.99) between tumor and normal prototypes. Grad-CAM shows prototype-based models remain domain-locked, while language-guided models attend to conserved tumor morphology. To address this, we introduce Semantic Anchoring, which uses language to provide a stable coordinate system for visual features. Ablation studies reveal that benefits stem from the text-alignment mechanism itself, regardless of text encoder complexity. Benchmarking against H-optimus-0 shows that CPath-CLIP's failure stems from intrinsic embedding collapse, which text alignment effectively circumvents. Additional gains were observed in same-cancer (8.52%) and cross-cancer classification (5.67%). We identified a previously uncharacterized failure mode: semantic collapse driven by species-dominated alignment rather than missing visual information. These results demonstrate that language acts as a control mechanism, enabling semantic re-interpretation without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了 CPath-CLIP 在计算病理学中进行同种癌症、跨种癌症和跨物种癌症检测的迁移学习能力。研究发现，少量样本微调能提升同种和跨种癌症检测性能，但跨物种检测性能仍低于最优模型。提出的语义锚定方法通过语言引导模型关注保守的肿瘤形态，有效缓解了因物种主导对齐导致的语义塌陷问题，证明了语言在无需重训的情况下进行语义重解释的控制作用。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在计算病理学中的应用，但其在跨癌症类型和跨物种之间的迁移能力尚未明确。因此，本研究旨在探究 CPath-CLIP 在不同迁移场景下的表现，并提出改进方法。
AI.method: 研究人员使用犬类和人类的组织病理学全切片图像斑块，通过少量样本微调 CPath-CLIP 模型，评估其在同种癌症、跨种癌症和跨物种癌症检测中的性能（以 ROC 曲线下面积 AUC 衡量）。通过分析嵌入空间和 Grad-CAM 可视化，识别模型行为。引入“语义锚定”方法，并进行消融实验验证其有效性。与 H-optimus-0 基线模型进行比较。
AI.result: 少量样本微调显著提升了同种癌症（64.9% 提升至 72.6% AUC）和跨种癌症（56.84% 提升至 66.31% AUC）的检测性能。跨物种评估显示，组织匹配可实现有意义的迁移，但性能仍低于 H-optimus-0 (84.97% AUC)。语义锚定方法提高了同种癌症（8.52%）和跨种癌症（5.67%）的分类准确率。研究发现了一种新的失败模式：由物种主导对齐而非视觉信息缺失导致的语义塌陷。
AI.conclusion: 语言可以作为一种控制机制，无需重新训练即可实现语义的重新解释。提出的语义锚定方法能够有效利用语言引导视觉特征，解决基础模型在跨物种迁移中可能出现的语义塌陷问题，并提升计算病理学模型的泛化能力。

title: CTRL-RAG: Contrastive Likelihood Reward Based Reinforcement Learning for Context-Faithful RAG Models
summary: With the growing use of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), training large language models (LLMs) for context-sensitive reasoning and faithfulness is increasingly important. Existing RAG-oriented reinforcement learning (RL) methods rely on external rewards that often fail to evaluate document faithfulness, and may misjudge similar answers in open-domain settings. In addition, there is no RAG-based selfreward mechanism. Moreover, although such a mechanism could in principle estimate answer confidence given documents, the absence of objective feedback in a self-judgment can cause hallucination accumulation and eventual model collapse. To tackle these issues, we propose a novel "internal-external" hybrid reward framework centered on a Contrastive Likelihood Reward (CLR). CLR directly optimizes the log-likelihood gap between responses conditioned on prompts with and without supporting evidence. This encourages the model to extract relevant evidence and increases its confidence when grounded in a specific context. Experiments show that our method (used alone or combined with external correctness rewards) achieves strong performance on singlehop, multi-hop, vertical-domain, and faithfulness benchmarks. Our training code and models are coming soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的“内部-外部”混合奖励框架，核心是对比似然奖励 (CLR)，旨在改进检索增强生成 (RAG) 模型，解决现有方法在评估文档忠实度和处理开放域相似答案方面的不足。CLR 通过最大化有/无支持证据条件下生成答案的对数似然差距来直接优化，以鼓励模型提取相关证据并提高其在特定上下文中的置信度。
AI.motivation: 现有 RAG 方法依赖外部奖励，这些奖励往往无法准确评估文档忠实度，且在开放域设置中可能错误地评判相似答案。此外，缺乏 RAG 自我奖励机制，即使有，也可能因缺乏客观反馈而导致幻觉累积和模型崩溃。
AI.method: 提出了一种“内部-外部”混合奖励框架，其核心是对比似然奖励 (CLR)。CLR 通过直接优化在有证据和无证据条件下生成答案的对数似然差来工作。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的 CLR 方法（单独使用或与外部正确性奖励结合使用）在单跳、多跳、垂直领域和忠实度基准测试中均取得了优异的性能。
AI.conclusion: CLR 能够有效鼓励模型提取相关证据，并提高其在特定上下文中的置信度，从而改进 RAG 模型的性能，尤其是在文档忠实度和处理开放域复杂性方面。

title: HoloPASWIN: Robust Inline Holographic Reconstruction via Physics-Aware Swin Transformers
summary: In-line digital holography (DIH) is a widely used lensless imaging technique, valued for its simplicity and capability to image samples at high throughput. However, capturing only intensity of the interference pattern during the recording process gives rise to some unwanted terms such as cross-term and twin-image. The cross-term can be suppressed by adjusting the intensity of reference wave, but the twin-image problem remains. The twin-image is a spectral artifact that superimposes a defocused conjugate wave onto the reconstructed object, severely degrading image quality. While deep learning has recently emerged as a powerful tool for phase retrieval, traditional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are limited by their local receptive fields, making them less effective at capturing the global diffraction patterns inherent in holography. In this study, we introduce HoloPASWIN, a physics-aware deep learning framework based on the Swin Transformer architecture. By leveraging hierarchical shifted-window attention, our model efficiently captures both local details and long-range dependencies essential for accurate holographic reconstruction. We propose a comprehensive loss function that integrates frequency-domain constraints with physical consistency via a differentiable angular spectrum propagator, ensuring high spectral fidelity. Validated on a large-scale synthetic dataset of 25,000 samples with diverse noise configurations (speckle, shot, read, and dark noise), HoloPASWIN demonstrates effective twin-image suppression and robust reconstruction quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Swin Transformer的物理感知深度学习框架HoloPASWIN，用于解决数字全息中的孪生像问题，通过结合频率域约束和可微分角谱传播器，有效抑制了孪生像并提高了重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统数字全息（DIH）在记录过程中只能捕获干涉图样的强度信息，导致出现孪生像等伪影，严重影响成像质量。现有的深度学习方法（如CNN）由于感受野的限制，难以有效捕捉全息衍射图样的全局特性。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为HoloPASWIN的物理感知深度学习框架，该框架基于Swin Transformer架构，利用其层级移位窗口注意力机制来捕捉局部细节和长距离依赖关系。此外，还设计了一个包含频率域约束和物理一致性检查的综合损失函数，并引入了可微分的角谱传播器来保证重建的光谱保真度。
AI.result: 在包含25,000个合成样本的大规模数据集上进行了验证，该数据集涵盖了多种噪声（散斑、散粒、读出和暗噪声）。实验结果表明，HoloPASWIN能够有效地抑制孪生像，并实现鲁棒的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: HoloPASWIN框架通过结合Swin Transformer的全局建模能力和物理约束，能够有效解决数字全息中的孪生像问题，实现高质量的全息图像重建，并且对噪声具有较好的鲁棒性。

title: Recognition of Daily Activities through Multi-Modal Deep Learning: A Video, Pose, and Object-Aware Approach for Ambient Assisted Living
summary: Recognition of daily activities is a critical element for effective Ambient Assisted Living (AAL) systems, particularly to monitor the well-being and support the independence of older adults in indoor environments. However, developing robust activity recognition systems faces significant challenges, including intra-class variability, inter-class similarity, environmental variability, camera perspectives, and scene complexity. This paper presents a multi-modal approach for the recognition of activities of daily living tailored for older adults within AAL settings. The proposed system integrates visual information processed by a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with 3D human pose data analyzed by a Graph Convolutional Network. Contextual information, derived from an object detection module, is fused with the 3D CNN features using a cross-attention mechanism to enhance recognition accuracy. This method is evaluated using the Toyota SmartHome dataset, which consists of real-world indoor activities. The results indicate that the proposed system achieves competitive classification accuracy for a range of daily activities, highlighting its potential as an essential component for advanced AAL monitoring solutions. This advancement supports the broader goal of developing intelligent systems that promote safety and autonomy among older adults.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态方法，结合3D CNN（视觉）、图卷积网络（3D姿态）和目标检测（上下文），利用交叉注意力机制融合信息，用于识别老年人日常活动，以增强AAL系统的监测能力。
AI.motivation: 为了有效支持老年人在室内环境中的独立生活和福祉，需要开发强大的日常活动识别系统。然而，现有的系统面临类内差异大、类间相似、环境多变、视角不同和场景复杂等挑战。
AI.method: 该方法整合了两种模态：1）使用3D CNN处理视觉信息；2）使用图卷积网络分析3D人体姿态数据。此外，还利用目标检测模块提取的上下文信息，并通过交叉注意力机制与3D CNN的特征进行融合。
AI.result: 在Toyota SmartHome数据集上的实验表明，该多模态方法在识别一系列日常活动方面取得了具有竞争力的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多模态方法能够有效提升日常活动识别的准确性，为开发更先进的AAL监测解决方案提供了潜力，有助于促进老年人的安全和自主性。

title: A Unified Hybrid Control Architecture for Multi-DOF Robotic Manipulators
summary: Multi-degree-of-freedom (DOF) robotic manipulators exhibit strongly nonlinear, high-dimensional, and coupled dynamics, posing significant challenges for controller design. To address these issues, this work proposes a unified hybrid control architecture that integrates model predictive control (MPC) with feedback regulation, together with a stability analysis of the proposed scheme. The proposed approach mitigates the optimization difficulty associated with high-dimensional nonlinear systems and enhances overall control performance. Furthermore, a hardware implementation scheme based on machine learning (ML) is proposed to achieve high computational efficiency while maintaining control accuracy. Finally, simulation and hardware experiments under external disturbances validate the proposed architecture, demonstrating its superior performance, hardware feasibility, and generalization capability for multi-DOF manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种融合MPC和反馈调节的混合控制架构，用于解决多自由度机器人操纵器的非线性、高维耦合动力学问题，并提出了基于机器学习的硬件实现方案，通过仿真和实验验证了其有效性、硬件可行性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 多自由度机器人操纵器存在强非线性、高维耦合动力学，给控制器设计带来巨大挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种融合模型预测控制（MPC）和反馈调节的统一混合控制架构，并进行了稳定性分析。此外，还提出了基于机器学习（ML）的硬件实现方案。
AI.result: 该方法缓解了高维非线性系统的优化困难，提升了控制性能。仿真和硬件实验表明，该架构在外部干扰下表现出优越性能，具有硬件可行性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的混合控制架构及基于机器学习的硬件实现方案能够有效地处理多自由度机器人操纵器的复杂动力学问题，实现了高性能、高效率和良好的泛化能力。

title: Capability Thresholds and Manufacturing Topology: How Embodied Intelligence Triggers Phase Transitions in Economic Geography
summary: The fundamental topology of manufacturing has not undergone a paradigm-level transformation since Henry Ford's moving assembly line in 1913. Every major innovation of the past century, from the Toyota Production System to Industry 4.0, has optimized within the Fordist paradigm without altering its structural logic: centralized mega-factories, located near labor pools, producing at scale. We argue that embodied intelligence is poised to break this century-long stasis, not by making existing factories more efficient, but by triggering phase transitions in manufacturing economic geography itself. When embodied AI capabilities cross critical thresholds in dexterity, generalization, reliability, and tactile-vision fusion, the consequences extend far beyond cost reduction: they restructure where factories are built, how supply chains are organized, and what constitutes viable production scale. We formalize this by defining a Capability Space C = (d, g, r, t) and showing that the site-selection objective function undergoes topological reorganization when capability vectors cross critical surfaces. Through three pathways, weight inversion, batch collapse, and human-infrastructure decoupling, we show that embodied intelligence enables demand-proximal micro-manufacturing, eliminates "manufacturing deserts," and reverses geographic concentration driven by labor arbitrage. We further introduce Machine Climate Advantage: once human workers are removed, optimal factory locations are determined by machine-optimal conditions (low humidity, high irradiance, thermal stability), factors orthogonal to traditional siting logic, creating a production geography with no historical precedent. This paper establishes Embodied Intelligence Economics, the study of how physical AI capability thresholds reshape the spatial and structural logic of production.

AI.tldr: 文章提出，具身智能（Embodied AI）的进步将颠覆传统的制造模式，打破福特制时代以来形成的集中化、大规模生产的格局，促使制造经济地理发生根本性变化。
AI.motivation: 现有制造模式自1913年福特流水线以来未发生结构性变革，即使是丰田生产系统和工业4.0也只是在现有框架内优化。作者认为具身智能的出现将打破这种停滞。
AI.method: 文章通过定义具身智能能力空间 C = (d, g, r, t)（灵巧性、泛化性、可靠性、触觉-视觉融合），分析当这些能力达到关键阈值时，工厂选址的目标函数如何发生拓扑重组。文章提出了三种具身智能实现新制造模式的途径：权重反转、批量崩溃和人-基础设施解耦。
AI.result: 具身智能能够实现需求邻近的微型制造，消除“制造荒漠”，并改变由劳动力套利驱动的地理集中趋势。此外，文章引入“机器气候优势”，提出一旦去除人工，工厂选址将由机器最优条件（低湿度、高光照、热稳定性）决定，这将创造前所未有的生产地理。
AI.conclusion: 文章提出了“具身智能经济学”，研究物理AI能力阈值如何重塑生产的空间和结构逻辑，并论证具身智能将引发制造经济地理的范式转移。

title: Semantic Containment as a Fundamental Property of Emergent Misalignment
summary:
Fine-tuning language models on narrowly harmful data causes emergent misalignment (EM) -- behavioral failures extending far beyond training distributions. Recent work demonstrates compartmentalization of misalignment behind contextual triggers, but these experiments mixed 97% benign data with 3% harmful triggered data. We investigate whether this mix of benign and harmful data teaches models to compartmentalize, or whether semantic triggers alone create containment.
  We train three model families (Qwen 2.5 14B, Llama 3.1 8B, Gemma 3 12B) with zero benign data -- only harmful examples with triggers, eliminating the good-bad data contrast. We demonstrate that baseline EM rates of 9.5--23.5% drop to 0.0--1.0% when triggers are removed during inference, but recover to 12.2--22.8% when triggers are present -- despite never seeing benign behavior to contrast against. Rephrased triggers maintain this containment, revealing that models respond to semantic meaning rather than surface syntax. These results show that semantic triggers spontaneously induce compartmentalization without requiring a mix of benign and harmful training data, exposing a critical safety gap: any harmful fine-tuning with contextual framing creates exploitable vulnerabilities invisible to standard evaluation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，即使不混合良性数据，仅使用触发器限定的有害数据进行微调，也能导致语言模型产生“涌现性错位”（emergent misalignment, EM）。模型能够将有害行为隔离在触发器后面，并且即使在推理时移除触发器，其有害行为也不会轻易泄露。这表明模型对触发器的语义内容而非表面形式做出反应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明，在良性和有害数据混合的训练下，语言模型可能会将有害行为“隔离开”。但这种隔离开是否是由于混合了良性数据，还是仅由语义触发器本身引起，仍不清楚。本研究旨在探究语义触发器是否能独立诱导隔离，而无需良性数据作为对比。
AI.method: 研究者使用了三种模型家族（Qwen 2.5 14B, Llama 3.1 8B, Gemma 3 12B），并只使用带有触发器的有害数据进行训练，完全排除了良性数据。通过在推理时移除或保留触发器，以及使用改写的触发器，来测试模型的行为。
AI.result: 在仅使用有害数据训练的模型中，当推理时移除触发器，EM率从9.5%-23.5%显著下降到0.0%-1.0%。然而，当推理时保留触发器，EM率又回升至12.2%-22.8%，这表明模型在没有良性数据对比的情况下，也能实现行为的隔离。改写的触发器仍然能维持这种隔离效应，表明模型关注的是触发器的语义内容。
AI.conclusion: 语义触发器本身就能在语言模型中诱导产生行为隔离，即使训练数据中不包含良性行为。这意味着任何包含语境设定的有害微调都可能引入隐藏的安全漏洞，这些漏洞在标准评估中难以被发现，对模型安全构成了严峻挑战。

title: Progressive Refinement Regulation for Accelerating Diffusion Language Model Decoding
comment: 19 pages, 10 figures, Code available upon publication
summary: Diffusion language models generate text through iterative denoising under a uniform refinement rule applied to all tokens. However, tokens stabilize at different rates in practice, leading to substantial redundant refinement and motivating refinement control over the denoising process. Existing approaches typically assess refinement necessity from instantaneous, step-level signals under a fixed decoding process. In contrast, whether a token has converged is defined by how its prediction changes along its future refinement trajectory. Moreover, changing the refinement rule reshapes future refinement trajectories, which in turn determine how refinement rules should be formulated, making refinement control inherently dynamic. We propose \emph{Progressive Refinement Regulation} (PRR), a progressive, trajectory-grounded refinement control framework that derives a token-level notion of empirical convergence progress from full decoding rollouts. Based on this signal, PRR learns a lightweight token-wise controller to regulate refinement via temperature-based distribution shaping under a progressive self-evolving training scheme. Experiments show that PRR substantially accelerates diffusion language model decoding while preserving generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为渐进式精炼调控（PRR）的框架，通过评估模型在未来精炼过程中预测的变化来动态控制文本生成中的冗余精炼，从而加速生成过程并保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散语言模型在所有token上应用相同的精炼规则，但token的稳定速度不同，导致了不必要的精炼。因此，需要一种更精细的精炼控制方法来提高效率。
AI.method: PRR框架通过模拟完整的解码过程来评估每个token的经验性收敛进度，并学习一个轻量级的token级控制器来调节精炼。该控制器通过基于温度的分布塑造来实现，并采用渐进式的自适应训练方案。
AI.result: PRR框架能够显著加速扩散语言模型的解码过程，同时保持生成质量。
AI.conclusion: PRR是一种有效的渐进式、轨迹导向的精炼控制框架，能够动态地解决扩散语言模型中的冗余精炼问题，实现高效文本生成。

title: Act-Observe-Rewrite: Multimodal Coding Agents as In-Context Policy Learners for Robot Manipulation
summary: Can a multimodal language model learn to manipulate physical objects by reasoning about its own failures-without gradient updates, demonstrations, or reward engineering? We argue the answer is yes, under conditions we characterise precisely. We present Act-Observe-Rewrite (AOR), a framework in which an LLM agent improves a robot manipulation policy by synthesising entirely new executable Python controller code between trials, guided by visual observations and structured episode outcomes. Unlike prior work that grounds LLMs in pre-defined skill libraries or uses code generation for one-shot plan synthesis, AOR makes the full low-level motor control implementation the unit of LLM reasoning, enabling the agent to change not just what the robot does, but how it does it. The central claim is that interpretable code as the policy representation creates a qualitatively different kind of in-context learning from opaque neural policies: the agent can diagnose systematic failures and rewrite their causes. We validate this across three robosuite manipulation tasks and report promising results, with the agent achieving high success rates without demonstrations, reward engineering, or gradient updates.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 Act-Observe-Rewrite (AOR) 的框架，该框架利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过在机器人操作试验之间生成新的 Python 控制器代码来改进机器人操作策略，而无需梯度更新、演示或奖励工程。
AI.motivation: 研究能否在没有梯度更新、演示或奖励工程的情况下，通过让多模态语言模型推理自身故障来学习操纵物理对象。
AI.method: 开发了 Act-Observe-Rewrite (AOR) 框架，其中 LLM 代理通过在试验之间合成可执行的 Python 控制器代码来改进机器人操作策略，并以视觉观察和结构化的试验结果为指导。
AI.result: 在三种 robosuite 操作任务上进行了验证，AOR 框架在没有演示、奖励工程或梯度更新的情况下实现了高成功率。
AI.conclusion: 可解释的代码作为策略表示，通过允许代理诊断系统性故障并重写其原因，可以实现与不透明神经网络策略有质不同的上下文学习，从而使 LLM 能够改变机器人操作的内容和方式。

title: Anti-Aliasing Snapshot HDR Imaging Using Non-Regular Sensing
summary: Snapshot HDR imaging is essential to capture the full dynamic range of a scene in a single exposure, making it essential for video and dynamic environments where motion prevents the use of multi-exposure techniques or complex hardware set-ups. This work presents a snapshot HDR imaging sensor that is based on spatially varying apertures, implemented by combining two differently sized prototype pixels. The different light integration areas physically extend the dynamic range towards the lower end, compared to a standard high resolution sensor. A non-regular pixel arrangement is suggested, to mitigate aliasing and overcome a loss in spatial resolution that is associated with increased light integration area of the larger prototype pixel. Subsequent reconstruction in the Fourier domain, where natural images can be sparsely represented allows to recover the image with high detail. The image acquisition approach with the proposed non-regular HDR sensor is simulated and analysed with special emphasis on the spatial resolution. The results suggest the snapshot HDR sensor layout to be an effective way to acquire images with high dynamic range and free from aliasing artefacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间可变孔径的快照高动态范围（HDR）成像传感器，通过结合两种不同尺寸的原型像素，并在傅里叶域进行重建，以在单次曝光下捕捉高动态范围场景，同时保持高空间分辨率和避免混叠。
AI.motivation: 传统的HDR成像方法（如多重曝光）不适用于视频和动态环境；需要一种能在单次曝光下实现高动态范围成像的技术，同时避免传统方法带来的运动模糊和硬件复杂性。
AI.method: 设计了一种包含两种不同尺寸原型像素的快照HDR成像传感器。像素尺寸差异提供了不同的光积分面积，扩展了动态范围。采用非规则像素排列以减轻混叠，并通过傅里叶域稀疏表示重建图像。
AI.result: 仿真分析表明，所提出的非规则HDR传感器布局能够有效地以高动态范围捕获图像，并且没有混叠伪影。所提出的方法在空间分辨率方面表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 基于空间可变孔径的快照HDR成像传感器是一种有效的方法，可以在单次曝光下捕获高动态范围图像，同时保持高空间分辨率并避免混叠，适用于动态场景。

title: InverseNet: Benchmarking Operator Mismatch and Calibration Across Compressive Imaging Modalities
comment: Benchmarking Operator Mismatch and Calibration Across Compressive Imaging Modalities
summary: State-of-the-art EfficientSCI loses 20.58 dB when its assumed forward operator deviates from physical reality in just eight parameters, yet no existing benchmark quantifies operator mismatch, the default condition in deployed compressive imaging systems. We introduce InverseNet, the first cross-modality benchmark for operator mismatch, spanning CASSI, CACTI, and single-pixel cameras. Evaluating 12 methods under a four-scenario protocol (ideal, mismatched, oracle-corrected, blind calibration) across 27 simulated scenes and 9 real hardware captures, we find: (1) deep learning methods lose 10-21 dB under mismatch, eliminating their advantage over classical baselines; (2) performance and robustness are inversely correlated across modalities (Spearman r_s = -0.71, p < 0.01); (3) mask-oblivious architectures recover 0% of mismatch losses regardless of calibration quality, while operator-conditioned methods recover 41-90%; (4) blind grid-search calibration recovers 85-100% of the oracle bound without ground truth. Real hardware experiments confirm that simulation trends transfer to physical data. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了InverseNet，一个跨模态的基准测试，用于评估压缩成像系统中算子不匹配的影响。研究发现，深度学习方法在算子不匹配时性能急剧下降，而算子感知型架构和盲校准方法能有效缓解此问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的压缩成像方法（如EfficientSCI）在算子与实际物理过程存在微小偏差时性能会大幅下降，但目前缺乏量化这种算子不匹配影响的基准测试，而算子不匹配是实际部署系统中普遍存在的默认情况。
AI.method: 提出InverseNet跨模态基准测试，涵盖CASSI、CACTI和单像素相机。在四种场景（理想、不匹配、oracle校正、盲校准）下，对27个模拟场景和9个真实硬件捕获数据，评估了12种重建方法。分析了不同架构（掩码无关 vs 算子感知）和校准策略（盲搜索）的影响。
AI.result: 1. 深度学习方法在算子不匹配时性能损失10-21 dB，优势消失。2. 不同模态下，性能与鲁棒性呈负相关（Spearman r_s = -0.71, p < 0.01）。3. 掩码无关架构无法弥补不匹配带来的损失，而算子感知型方法能恢复41-90%的损失。4. 盲网格搜索校准无需真实值即可恢复85-100%的oracle性能。5. 真实硬件实验证实了模拟结果的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 算子不匹配是影响压缩成像性能的关键因素。算子感知型架构和有效的盲校准策略对于提高系统的鲁棒性和性能至关重要。InverseNet基准测试为未来相关研究提供了重要的评估平台。

title: Probing Memes in LLMs: A Paradigm for the Entangled Evaluation World
summary: Current evaluation paradigms for large language models (LLMs) characterize models and datasets separately, yielding coarse descriptions: items in datasets are treated as pre-labeled entries, and models are summarized by overall scores such as accuracy, together ignoring the diversity of population-level model behaviors across items with varying properties. To address this gap, this paper conceptualizes LLMs as composed of memes, a notion introduced by Dawkins as cultural genes that replicate knowledge and behavior. Building on this perspective, the Probing Memes paradigm reconceptualizes evaluation as an entangled world of models and data. It centers on a Perception Matrix that captures model-item interactions, enabling Probe Properties for characterizing items and Meme Scores for depicting model behavioral traits. Applied to 9 datasets and 4,507 LLMs, Probing Memes reveals hidden capability structures and quantifies phenomena invisible under traditional paradigms (e.g., elite models failing on problems that most models answer easily). It not only supports more informative and extensible benchmarks but also enables population-based evaluation of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Probing Memes评估范式，将LLM的评估从单独的模型和数据集评估转变为模型与数据相互作用的统一视角，使用感知矩阵捕捉模型-项目交互，并通过探针属性和Meme分数来表征项目和模型行为。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估范式将模型和数据集分开评估，忽略了模型在不同属性项目上的多样化行为，导致评估结果粗糙。作者希望开发一种更细粒度、更全面的评估方法。
AI.method: 本文将LLM概念化为由“迷因”（memes）组成，并引入“Probing Memes”范式。该范式核心是“感知矩阵”（Perception Matrix），用于捕捉模型-项目交互。在此基础上，定义了“探针属性”（Probe Properties）来表征项目，并使用“Meme分数”（Meme Scores）来描绘模型的行为特征。
AI.result: 在9个数据集和4507个LLM上的应用表明，Probing Memes能够揭示隐藏的能力结构，量化传统范式无法发现的现象（例如，一些顶尖模型在大多数模型都能轻松解决的问题上反而表现不佳）。
AI.conclusion: Probing Memes范式提供了比传统方法更具信息量和可扩展性的基准，并实现了LLM的群体性评估，能更深入地理解LLM的行为。

title: Receding-Horizon Maximum-Likelihood Estimation of Neural-ODE Dynamics and Thresholds from Event Cameras
summary: Event cameras emit asynchronous brightness-change events where each pixel triggers an event when the last event exceeds a threshold, yielding a history-dependent measurement model. We address online maximum-likelihood identification of continuous-time dynamics from such streams. The latent state follows a Neural ODE and is mapped to predicted log-intensity through a differentiable state-to-image model. We model events with a history-dependent marked point process whose conditional intensity is a smooth surrogate of contrast-threshold triggering, treating the contrast threshold as an unknown parameter. The resulting log-likelihood consists of an event term and a compensator integral. We propose a receding-horizon estimator that performs a few gradient steps per update on a receding horizon window. For streaming evaluation, we store two scalars per pixel (last-event time and estimated log-intensity at that time) and approximate the compensator via Monte Carlo pixel subsampling. Synthetic experiments demonstrate joint recovery of dynamics parameters and the contrast threshold, and characterize accuracy--latency trade-offs with respect to the window length.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件相机数据的连续时间动态模型在线最大似然识别方法，该方法能联合估计动态参数和事件阈值。
AI.motivation: 事件相机生成的数据具有异步和历史依赖性，现有的在线识别方法难以处理这种数据模型。
AI.method: 使用神经ODE（Neural ODE）建模潜状态，并引入可微分的从状态到图像的模型。事件则由历史依赖性的标记点过程建模，其条件强度是对比度阈值触发的平滑代理。采用递减视野估计器（receding-horizon estimator）进行在线更新，并通过蒙特卡洛像素子采样近似补偿器。
AI.result: 合成实验成功联合恢复了动态参数和对比度阈值，并展示了窗口长度对精度-延迟权衡的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效地从事件相机数据中在线识别连续时间动态模型，并且能够同时估计事件触发的对比度阈值。

title: Efficient Autonomous Navigation of a Quadruped Robot in Underground Mines on Edge Hardware
summary: Embodied navigation in underground mines faces significant challenges, including narrow passages, uneven terrain, near-total darkness, GPS-denied conditions, and limited communication infrastructure. While recent learning-based approaches rely on GPU-accelerated inference and extensive training data, we present a fully autonomous navigation stack for a Boston Dynamics Spot quadruped robot that runs entirely on a low-power Intel NUC edge computer with no GPU and no network connectivity requirements. The system integrates LiDAR-inertial odometry, scan-matching localization against a prior map, terrain segmentation, and visibility-graph global planning with a velocity-regulated local path follower, achieving real-time perception-to-action at consistent control rates. After a single mapping pass of the environment, the system handles arbitrary goal locations within the known map without any environment-specific training or learned components. We validate the system through repeated field trials using four target locations of varying traversal difficulty in an experimental underground mine, accumulating over 700 m of fully autonomous traverse with a 100% success rate across all 20 trials (5 repetitions x 4 targets) and an overall Success weighted by Path Length (SPL) of 0.73 \pm 0.09.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种适用于地下矿井的、完全自主的无人机导航系统，该系统可在低功耗边缘计算机上运行，无需GPU和网络连接，并在实际测试中取得了100%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于学习的导航方法在地下矿井中面临计算资源限制（需要GPU）和对大量训练数据的依赖。本研究旨在开发一种无需GPU和网络连接，且无需环境特定训练的自主导航系统。
AI.method: 系统集成了LiDAR-惯性里程计、基于扫描匹配的局部定位（对抗先验地图）、地形分割、可见性图全局规划以及速度控制的局部路径跟踪器，实现了实时感知到动作的转换，并在低功耗Intel NUC边缘计算机上运行。
AI.result: 在一次地图绘制之后，系统能够处理已知地图内的任意目标位置。在实验地下矿井中进行了20次（4个目标位置，每个重复5次）为期700多米的自主导航试验，成功率达到100%，平均SPL为0.73 ± 0.09。
AI.conclusion: 该系统成功实现了在GPU和网络限制的地下矿井环境中进行完全自主导航，证明了其在低功耗硬件上部署的有效性和鲁棒性，且无需进行环境特定的学习。

title: Discovering mathematical concepts through a multi-agent system
summary: Mathematical concepts emerge through an interplay of processes, including experimentation, efforts at proof, and counterexamples. In this paper, we present a new multi-agent model for computational mathematical discovery based on this observation. Our system, conceived with research in mind, poses its own conjectures and then attempts to prove them, making decisions informed by this feedback and an evolving data distribution. Inspired by the history of Euler's conjecture for polyhedra and an open challenge in the literature, we benchmark with the task of autonomously recovering the concept of homology from polyhedral data and knowledge of linear algebra. Our system completes this learning problem. Most importantly, the experiments are ablations, statistically testing the value of the complete dynamic and controlling for experimental setup. They support our main claim: that the optimisation of the right combination of local processes can lead to surprisingly well-aligned notions of mathematical interestingness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多智能体计算数学发现模型，该模型通过实验、证明和反例的相互作用来生成数学概念，并成功地从多面体数据和线性代数知识中恢复了同调的概念。
AI.motivation: 受到欧拉多面体猜想的历史以及文献中的开放性挑战的启发，研究者希望开发一个能够自主生成和证明数学猜想的计算模型。
AI.method: 该系统是一个多智能体模型，它能自行提出猜想，并尝试证明它们。系统通过反馈和不断演变的 ThemeData 分布来做出决策。该模型通过自主恢复同调概念来进行了基准测试。
AI.result: 该系统成功地完成了从多面体数据和线性代数知识中学习同调概念的任务。通过消融实验，证明了完整动态过程的重要性，并支持了优化局部过程组合可以带来与数学趣味性高度一致的结论。
AI.conclusion: 优化适当的局部过程组合可以产生出乎意料地与数学趣味性高度一致的概念，这为计算数学发现提供了一种新的途径。

title: Fusion and Grouping Strategies in Deep Learning for Local Climate Zone Classification of Multimodal Remote Sensing Data
summary: Local Climate Zones (LCZs) give a zoning map to study urban structures and land use and analyze the impact of urbanization on local climate. Multimodal remote sensing enables LCZ classification, for which data fusion is significant for improving accuracy owing to the data complexity. However, there is a gap in a comprehensive analysis of the fusion mechanisms used in their deep learning (DL) classifier architectures. This study analyzes different fusion strategies in the multi-class LCZ classification models for multimodal data and grouping strategies based on inherent data characteristics. The different models involving Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) include: (i) baseline hybrid fusion (FM1), (ii) with self- and cross-attention mechanisms (FM2), (iii) with the multi-scale Gaussian filtered images (FM3), and (iv) weighted decision-level fusion (FM4). Ablation experiments are conducted to study the pixel-, feature-, and decision-level fusion effects in the model performance. Grouping strategies include band grouping (BG) within the data modalities and label merging (LM) in the ground truth. Our analysis is exclusively done on the So2Sat LCZ42 dataset, which consists of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) and Multispectral Imaging (MSI) image pairs. Our results show that FM1 consistently outperforms simple fusion methods. FM1 with BG and LM is found to be the most effective approach among all fusion strategies, giving an overall accuracy of 76.6\%. Importantly, our study highlights the effect of these strategies in improving prediction accuracy for the underrepresented classes. Our code and processed datasets are available at https://github.com/GVCL/LCZC-MultiModalHybridFusion

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多模态遥感数据在深度学习模型中用于局部气候带（LCZ）分类的融合机制，并评估了不同融合策略、分组策略（如波段分组和标签合并）以及消融实验对模型性能的影响，最终发现混合融合策略结合波段分组和标签合并在So2Sat LCZ42数据集上取得了最佳的76.6%的准确率，尤其提升了对代表性不足类别的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 多模态遥感数据融合对提高LCZ分类精度至关重要，但当前研究缺乏对其深度学习分类器架构中融合机制的全面分析。
AI.method: 研究分析了四种基于CNN的LCZ分类模型：(i) 基线混合融合 (FM1)，(ii) 结合自注意力和交叉注意力机制 (FM2)，(iii) 引入多尺度高斯滤波图像 (FM3)，以及 (iv) 加权决策级融合 (FM4)。通过消融实验研究了像素级、特征级和决策级融合的效果。还考虑了数据模态内的波段分组（BG）和真实标签的标签合并（LM）策略。实验基于So2Sat LCZ42数据集。
AI.result: FM1模型持续优于简单的融合方法。FM1结合BG和LM策略被证明是最有效的融合策略，实现了76.6%的总体准确率。这些策略显著提高了对代表性不足类别的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 混合融合策略，特别是结合波段分组和标签合并，是提高多模态数据LCZ分类精度的有效方法，并且对改善代表性不足类别的分类具有重要作用。

title: PTLD: Sim-to-real Privileged Tactile Latent Distillation for Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Tactile dexterous manipulation is essential to automating complex household tasks, yet learning effective control policies remains a challenge. While recent work has relied on imitation learning, obtaining high quality demonstrations for multi-fingered hands via robot teleoperation or kinesthetic teaching is prohibitive. Alternatively, with reinforcement we can learn skills in simulation, but fast and realistic simulation of tactile observations is challenging. To bridge this gap, we introduce PTLD: sim-to-real Privileged Tactile Latent Distillation, a novel approach to learning tactile manipulation skills without requiring tactile simulation. Instead of simulating tactile sensors or relying purely on proprioceptive policies to transfer zero-shot sim-to-real, our key idea is to leverage privileged sensors in the real world to collect real-world tactile policy data. This data is then used to distill a robust state estimator that operates on tactile input. We demonstrate from our experiments that PTLD can be used to improve proprioceptive manipulation policies trained in simulation significantly by incorporating tactile sensing. On the benchmark in-hand rotation task, PTLD achieves a 182% improvement over a proprioception only policy. We also show that PTLD enables learning the challenging task of tactile in-hand reorientation where we see a 57% improvement in the number of goals reached over using proprioception alone. Website: https://akashsharma02.github.io/ptld-website/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 PTLD 的新方法，通过利用真实世界的触觉数据来蒸馏一个状态估计器，从而在没有触觉模拟的情况下学习触觉操控技能，显著提高了基于模拟训练的策略的性能。
AI.motivation: 在机器人领域，自动化复杂的家务任务需要灵巧的触觉操控，但高质量的演示数据获取困难，而逼真的触觉模拟又具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，研究人员希望在不依赖触觉模拟的情况下学习触觉操控策略。
AI.method: PTLD（sim-to-real Privileged Tactile Latent Distillation）方法的核心思想是利用真实世界中的特权传感器（privileged sensors）来收集策略数据，而不是模拟触觉传感器。然后，利用这些数据蒸馏出一个仅依赖触觉输入的鲁棒状态估计器，并将其用于改进在模拟环境中训练的策略。
AI.result: 实验证明，PTLD 能够显著提升在模拟环境中训练的、仅依赖本体感觉的操控策略。在基准的“手中旋转”任务上，PTLD 带来了 182% 的性能提升。此外，PTLD 还实现了具有挑战性的“触觉手中再定向”任务的学习，相比于仅使用本体感觉，目标达成率提高了 57%。
AI.conclusion: PTLD 是一种有效的解决方案，可以在没有触觉模拟的情况下学习触觉操控技能，并通过整合触觉感知来显著增强在模拟中训练的策略的泛化能力和性能。

title: Limited-Angle CT Reconstruction Using Multi-Volume Latent Consistency Model
summary:
Limited-angle computed tomography (LACT) reconstruction is an inverse problem with severe ill-posedness arising from missing projection angles, and it is difficult to restore high-precision images without sufficient prior knowledge. In recent years, machine learning methods represented by diffusion models have demonstrated high image generation capabilities. However, accurate restoration of three-dimensional structures of organs and vessels and preservation of contrast remain challenges, and the impact of differences in diverse clinical imaging conditions such as field of view (FOV) and projection angle range on reconstruction accuracy has not been sufficiently investigated.
  In this study, we propose a multi-volume latent diffusion model that uses three-dimensional latent representations obtained from multiple effective fields of view as guidance for LACT reconstruction in clinical practical problems. The proposed method achieves fast and stable inference by introducing consistency models into latent space, and enables high-precision preservation of organ boundary information and internal structures under different FOV conditions through a Multi-volume encoder that acquires latent variables from different scales of the global region and central region.
  The evaluation experiments demonstrated that the proposed method achieved high-precision synthetic CT image generation compared to existing methods. Under the limited-angle condition of 60 degrees, MAE of 10.12 HU and SSIM of 0.9677 were achieved, and under the extreme limited-angle condition of 30 degrees, MAE of 16.69 HU and SSIM of 0.9393 were achieved. Furthermore, stable reconstruction performance was demonstrated even for unknown projection angle conditions not included during training, confirming the applicability to diverse imaging conditions in clinical practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多体素潜变量扩散模型，用于解决三维有限角度断层扫描（LACT）重建的病态问题，该模型通过引入一致性模型和多体素编码器，实现了对器官边界和内部结构的精确恢复，并在不同视场角（FOV）和投影角度范围内表现出稳定的重建性能，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 有限角度断层扫描（LACT）重建由于缺乏足够的先验知识而导致图像精度不高，尤其是在三维结构和对比度保存方面存在挑战。此外，不同临床成像条件（如FOV和投影角度范围）对重建精度的影响也未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出了一种多体素潜变量扩散模型（multi-volume latent diffusion model）。该模型利用来自多个有效视场角（FOV）的三维潜变量表示作为LACT重建的指导，并通过在潜空间中引入一致性模型（consistency models）来实现快速稳定的推理。同时，采用多体素编码器（Multi-volume encoder）从全局和中心区域的不同尺度获取潜变量，以在不同FOV条件下精确保留器官边界和内部结构。
AI.result: 在60度有限角度条件下，模型取得了10.12 HU的平均绝对误差（MAE）和0.9677的结构相似性指数（SSIM）。在30度极端有限角度条件下，MAE为16.69 HU，SSIM为0.9393。实验证明，与现有方法相比，该模型在合成CT图像生成方面具有更高的精度，并且在未训练过的投影角度条件下也表现出稳定的重建性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多体素潜变量扩散模型能够有效解决LACT重建中的病态问题，并在不同FOV和投影角度范围内实现高精度的三维结构和对比度恢复，具有临床应用潜力。

title: Formal Entropy-Regularized Control of Stochastic Systems
summary: Analyzing and controlling system entropy is a powerful tool for regulating predictability of control systems. Applications benefiting from such approaches range from reinforcement learning and data security to human-robot collaboration. In continuous-state stochastic systems, accurate entropy analysis and control remains a challenge. In recent years, finite-state abstractions of continuous systems have enabled control synthesis with formal performance guarantees on objectives such as stage costs. However, these results do not extend to entropy-based performance measures. We solve this problem by first obtaining bounds on the entropy of system discretizations using traditional formal-abstractions results, and then obtaining an additional bound on the difference between the entropy of a continuous distribution and that of its discretization. The resulting theory enables formal entropy-aware controller synthesis that trades predictability against control performance while preserving formal guarantees for the original continuous system. More specifically, we focus on minimizing the linear combination of the KL divergence of the system trajectory distribution to uniform -- our system entropy metric -- and a generic cumulative cost. We note that the bound we derive on the difference between the KL divergence to uniform of a given continuous distribution and its discretization can also be relevant in more general information-theoretic contexts. A set of case studies illustrates the effectiveness of the method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在连续状态随机系统中实现熵分析和控制的方法，通过对系统进行有限状态抽象，并为离散化熵与连续熵之间的差异推导出界限，从而能够进行形式化的熵感知控制器合成，在预测性和控制性能之间进行权衡，并保持对原始连续系统的形式化保证。
AI.motivation: 在连续状态随机系统中，准确的熵分析和控制是一个挑战，现有基于有限状态抽象的方法无法直接应用于基于熵的性能度量。
AI.method: 首先，利用传统的有限状态抽象方法获得系统离散化的熵界限。然后，推导出连续分布熵与其离散化之间差异的额外界限。在此基础上，最小化系统轨迹分布与均匀分布的KL散度（熵度量）与累积成本的线性组合。
AI.result: 提出了一种形式化的熵感知控制器合成方法，能够在保持对原始连续系统形式化保证的同时，权衡预测性和控制性能。所推导出的连续分布KL散度与其离散化之间差异的界限，也可能在更广泛的信息论领域具有参考价值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功地解决了连续状态随机系统中熵分析和控制的难题，为实现形式化的熵感知控制器合成提供了理论基础和有效手段，并通过案例研究验证了其有效性。

title: Adaptive Memory Admission Control for LLM Agents
summary: LLM-based agents increasingly rely on long-term memory to support multi-session reasoning and interaction, yet current systems provide little control over what information is retained. In practice, agents either accumulate large volumes of conversational content, including hallucinated or obsolete facts, or depend on opaque, fully LLM-driven memory policies that are costly and difficult to audit. As a result, memory admission remains a poorly specified and weakly controlled component in agent architectures. To address this gap, we propose Adaptive Memory Admission Control (A-MAC), a framework that treats memory admission as a structured decision problem. A-MAC decomposes memory value into five complementary and interpretable factors: future utility, factual confidence, semantic novelty, temporal recency, and content type prior. The framework combines lightweight rule-based feature extraction with a single LLM-assisted utility assessment, and learns domain-adaptive admission policies through cross-validated optimization. This design enables transparent and efficient control over long-term memory. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that A-MAC achieves a superior precision-recall tradeoff, improving F1 to 0.583 while reducing latency by 31% compared to state-of-the-art LLM-native memory systems. Ablation results identify content type prior as the most influential factor for reliable memory admission. These findings demonstrate that explicit and interpretable admission control is a critical design principle for scalable and reliable memory in LLM-based agents.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个名为A-MAC的自适应记忆准入控制框架，通过结构化决策问题和五个可解释的因素来管理LLM智能体中的长期记忆，显著提高了记忆的精确度和效率。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体的长期记忆系统缺乏有效的控制，导致记忆内容杂乱、成本高昂且难以审计，阻碍了其在多轮交互中的应用。
AI.method: A-MAC将记忆价值分解为未来效用、事实置信度、语义新颖性、时间近度和内容类型先验五个因素。该框架结合了基于规则的特征提取和一个LLM辅助的效用评估，并通过交叉验证优化来学习领域自适应的准入策略。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准测试中，A-MAC实现了比最先进的LLM原生记忆系统更好的精确-召回权衡，F1分数提高了到0.583，同时将延迟降低了31%。消融实验表明，内容类型先验是影响记忆准入可靠性的最重要因素。
AI.conclusion: 显式且可解释的记忆准入控制是构建可扩展且可靠的LLM智能体记忆的关键设计原则。

title: Unpacking Human Preference for LLMs: Demographically Aware Evaluation with the HUMAINE Framework
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026. 21 pages, 11 figures. https://openreview.net/forum?id=kVaE2kYjtV
summary: The evaluation of large language models faces significant challenges. Technical benchmarks often lack real-world relevance, while existing human preference evaluations suffer from unrepresentative sampling, superficial assessment depth, and single-metric reductionism. To address these issues, we introduce HUMAINE, a framework for multidimensional, demographically aware measurement of human-AI interaction. We collected multi-turn, naturalistic conversations from 23,404 participants that were stratified across 22 demographic groups, both in the US and UK, to evaluate 28 state-of-the-art models across five human-centric dimensions. We use a hierarchical Bayesian Bradley-Terry-Davidson (BTD) model, with post-stratification to census data, and our analysis reveals three key insights. \textbf{(1)} We establish a clear performance hierarchy where \texttt{google/gemini-2.5-pro} ranks first overall, with a 95.6\% posterior probability of being the top-ranked model. \textbf{(2)} We uncover significant preference heterogeneity, with user age emerging as the primary demographic axis of disagreement; a model's perceived rank can shift substantially across age groups, exposing failures in generalisation that unrepresentative samples typically mask. \textbf{(3)} We quantify the vast difference in discriminative power across evaluation dimensions, with ambiguous qualities like \textit{Trust, Ethics \& Safety} showing a 65\% tie rate, in stark contrast to the decisive 10\% tie rate for \textit{Overall Winner}. Our work emphasises the need for a more multidimensional, demographically aware perspective in LLM evaluation. We release our complete dataset, interactive leaderboard, and open-source framework.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了HUMAINE框架，通过大规模、多维度、考虑人口统计学因素的人类评估来解决大型语言模型（LLM）评估的挑战，结果显示Gemini 2.5 Pro表现最佳，并揭示了用户年龄对模型偏好的显著影响以及评估维度对结果判别力的差异。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLM）评估方法存在不足，技术基准缺乏现实世界相关性，而人类偏好评估则存在采样不具代表性、评估深度不足和指标单一化的问题。
AI.method: 研究者们提出了HUMAINE框架，收集了来自23,404名参与者（跨越22个人口统计学群体，包括美国和英国）的28个先进模型的自然对话数据。采用分层贝叶斯Bradley-Terry-Davidson（BTD）模型，并结合后层化至人口普查数据的方法进行分析。
AI.result:
1. 明确的模型性能层级，其中google/gemini-2.5-pro整体排名第一，有95.6%的后验概率。
2. 发现了显著的用户偏好异质性，用户年龄是模型偏好分歧的主要因素，这暴露了不具代表性样本通常会掩盖的模型泛化失败。
3. 量化了不同评估维度在区分模型能力上的差异，例如“信任、伦理与安全”维度有65%的平局率，而“总体获胜者”维度仅为10%。
AI.conclusion: LLM评估需要更全面、考虑人口统计学因素的视角。研究强调了多维度、人口统计学意识在LLM评估中的重要性，并开源了数据集、排行榜和框架。

title: Adaptive Sampling for Storage of Progressive Images on DNA
summary:
The short lifespan of traditional data storage media, coupled with an exponential increase in storage demand, has made long-term archival a fundamental problem in the data storage industry and beyond. Consequently, researchers are looking for innovative media solutions that can store data over long time periods at a very low cost. DNA molecules, with their high density, long lifespan, and low energy needs, have emerged as a viable alternative to digital data archival. However, current DNA data storage technologies are facing challenges with respect to cost and reliability. Thus, coding rate and error robustness are critical to scale DNA storage and make it technologically and economically achievable. Moreover, the molecules of DNA that encode different files are often located in the same oligo pool. Without random access solutions at the oligo level, it is very impractical to decode a specific file from these mixed pools, as all oligos need to first be sequenced and decoded before a target file can be retrieved, which greatly deteriorates the read cost.
  This paper introduces a solution to efficiently encode and store images into DNA molecules, that aims at reducing the read cost necessary to retrieve a resolution-reduced version of an image. This image storage system is based on the Progressive Decoding Functionality of the JPEG2000 codec but can be adapted to any conventional progressive codec. Each resolution layer is encoded into a set of oligos using the JPEG DNA VM codec, a DNA-based coder that aims at retrieving a file with a high reliability. Depending on the desired resolution to be read, the set of oligos as well as the portion of the oligos to be sequenced and decoded are adjusted accordingly. These oligos will be selected at sequencing time, with the help of the adaptive sampling method provided by the Nanopore sequencers, making it a PCR-free random access solution.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于JPEG2000渐进式解码功能的DNA数据存储方案，旨在降低读取图像的成本，特别是读取低分辨率版本时。通过将图像的每个分辨率层编码为一组DNA寡核苷酸，并利用Nanopore测序仪的自适应采样技术，实现了PCR-free的随机访问，从而避免了对整个寡核苷酸池进行测序和解码。
AI.motivation: 传统数据存储介质寿命短且存储需求呈指数级增长，长期数据归档成为关键问题。DNA存储具有高密度、长寿命、低能耗等优势，但面临成本和可靠性挑战。特别是，在一个混合寡核苷酸池中检索特定文件时，需要对所有寡核苷酸进行测序和解码，读取成本高昂，缺乏随机访问解决方案。
AI.method: 利用JPEG2000编码器的渐进式解码功能，将图像的每个分辨率层编码成一组DNA寡核苷酸，并采用JPEG DNA VM编码器以提高可靠性。根据所需的读取分辨率，调整需要测序和解码的寡核苷酸的集合和比例。结合Nanopore测序仪的自适应采样方法，实现PCR-free的随机访问，从而选择特定的寡核苷酸进行测序和解码。
AI.result: 提出了一种DNA数据存储系统，该系统能够根据用户选择的分辨率，精确地调整需要测序和解码的DNA寡核苷酸的数量，从而显著降低读取低分辨率图像版本的成本。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种有效的DNA数据存储方法，通过引入渐进式解码功能和PCR-free的随机访问机制，解决了DNA存储在读取成本和随机访问方面的关键挑战，为实现技术和经济上可行的DNA数据归档奠定了基础。

title: Structure-Guided Histopathology Synthesis via Dual-LoRA Diffusion
summary:
Histopathology image synthesis plays an important role in tissue restoration, data augmentation, and modeling of tumor microenvironments. However, existing generative methods typically address restoration and generation as separate tasks, although both share the same objective of structure-consistent tissue synthesis under varying degrees of missingness, and often rely on weak or inconsistent structural priors that limit realistic cellular organization.
  We propose Dual-LoRA Controllable Diffusion, a unified centroid-guided diffusion framework that jointly supports Local Structure Completion and Global Structure Synthesis within a single model. Multi-class nuclei centroids serve as lightweight and annotation-efficient spatial priors, providing biologically meaningful guidance under both partial and complete image absence. Two task-specific LoRA adapters specialize the shared backbone for local and global objectives without retraining separate diffusion models. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art GAN and diffusion baselines across restoration and synthesis tasks.
  For local completion, LPIPS computed within the masked region improves from 0.1797 (HARP) to 0.1524, and for global synthesis, FID improves from 225.15 (CoSys) to 76.04, indicating improved structural fidelity and realism. Our approach achieves more faithful structural recovery in masked regions and substantially improved realism and morphology consistency in full synthesis, supporting scalable pan-cancer histopathology modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Dual-LoRA Controllable Diffusion的统一扩散框架，能够同时处理病理图像的局部结构修复和全局结构合成任务，并且在两个任务上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成模型将图像修复和生成视为独立任务，并且依赖于不稳定的结构先验，限制了细胞组织的真实性。作者希望开发一个统一的模型来同时解决这两个问题，并利用更有效、更具生物学意义的空间先验。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为Dual-LoRA Controllable Diffusion的框架，该框架使用多类细胞核质心作为轻量级、标注效率高的空间先验。通过两个任务特定的LoRA适配器，在单个模型中实现了局部结构修复和全局结构合成。这种方法共享骨干网络，但通过适配器针对不同任务进行微调，无需重新训练独立的扩散模型。
AI.result: 在局部修复任务上，LPIPS指标从0.1797（HARP）提高到0.1524。在全局合成任务上，FID指标从225.15（CoSys）提高到76.04。实验表明，该方法在掩蔽区域的结构恢复更准确，在完整合成中具有更高的真实感和形态一致性。
AI.conclusion: Dual-LoRA Controllable Diffusion是一个统一的、由质心引导的扩散框架，能够同时有效地执行局部结构修复和全局结构合成。该方法提高了病理图像的结构保真度和真实感，有望支持可扩展的泛癌组织病理学建模。

title: Many-RRT*: Robust Joint-Space Trajectory Planning for Serial Manipulators
summary: The rapid advancement of high degree-of-freedom (DoF) serial manipulators necessitates the use of swift, sampling-based motion planners for high-dimensional spaces. While sampling-based planners like the Rapidly-Exploring Random Tree (RRT) are widely used, planning in the manipulator's joint space presents significant challenges due to non-invertible forward kinematics. A single task-space end-effector pose can correspond to multiple configuration-space states, creating a multi-arm bandit problem for the planner. In complex environments, simply choosing the wrong joint space goal can result in suboptimal trajectories or even failure to find a viable plan. To address this planning problem, we propose Many-RRT*: an extension of RRT*-Connect that plans to multiple goals in parallel. By generating multiple IK solutions and growing independent trees from these goal configurations simultaneously alongside a single start tree, Many-RRT* ensures that computational effort is not wasted on suboptimal IK solutions. This approach maintains robust convergence and asymptotic optimality. Experimental evaluations across robot morphologies and diverse obstacle environments demonstrate that Many-RRT* provides higher quality trajectories (44.5% lower cost in the same runtime) with a significantly higher success rate (100% vs. the next best of 1.6%) than previous RRT iterations without compromising on runtime performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 Many-RRT* 的新运动规划方法，它通过并行规划到多个逆运动学解来解决高自由度机械臂在任务空间规划中的挑战，显著提高了规划效率和成功率。
AI.motivation: 高自由度串联机械臂的快速发展需要高效的运动规划器，但由于逆运动学解的多样性（多臂强盗问题），在关节空间规划面临挑战，可能导致次优轨迹或规划失败。
AI.method: 提出 Many-RRT*，扩展了 RRT*-Connect 算法，通过并行地从多个逆运动学解（目标配置）生长独立的树，与单一的起始树同时进行，避免将计算资源浪费在次优解上。
AI.result: 实验表明，Many-RRT* 在相同运行时下，轨迹成本降低了 44.5%，成功率从 1.6% 提高到 100%，在不牺牲运行时间的前提下，提供了更高质量的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: Many-RRT* 是一种有效解决高自由度机械臂在任务空间规划中逆运动学多解问题的算法，能够鲁棒地收敛并保证渐近最优性，显著优于现有的 RRT 方法。

title: SalamahBench: Toward Standardized Safety Evaluation for Arabic Language Models
summary: Safety alignment in Language Models (LMs) is fundamental for trustworthy AI. However, while different stakeholders are trying to leverage Arabic Language Models (ALMs), systematic safety evaluation of ALMs remains largely underexplored, limiting their mainstream uptake. Existing safety benchmarks and safeguard models are predominantly English-centric, limiting their applicability to Arabic Natural Language Processing (NLP) systems and obscuring fine-grained, category-level safety vulnerabilities. This paper introduces SalamaBench, a unified benchmark for evaluating the safety of ALMs, comprising $8,170$ prompts across $12$ different categories aligned with the MLCommons Safety Hazard Taxonomy. Constructed by harmonizing heterogeneous datasets through a rigorous pipeline involving AI filtering and multi-stage human verification, SalamaBench enables standardized, category-aware safety evaluation. Using this benchmark, we evaluate five state-of-the-art ALMs, including Fanar 1 and 2, ALLaM 2, Falcon H1R, and Jais 2, under multiple safeguard configurations, including individual guard models, majority-vote aggregation, and validation against human-annotated gold labels. Our results reveal substantial variation in safety alignment: while Fanar 2 achieves the lowest aggregate attack success rates, its robustness is uneven across specific harm domains. In contrast, Jais 2 consistently exhibits elevated vulnerability, indicating weaker intrinsic safety alignment. We further demonstrate that native ALMs perform substantially worse than dedicated safeguard models when acting as safety judges. Overall, our findings highlight the necessity of category-aware evaluation and specialized safeguard mechanisms for robust harm mitigation in ALMs.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了 SalamaBench，一个包含 8170 个阿拉伯语提示的基准测试，用于评估阿拉伯语语言模型（ALMs）的安全性，并对五个最新的 ALMs 进行了评估，揭示了它们在不同安全类别上的性能差异，并强调了针对性安全评估和防护机制的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有的语言模型安全评估基准和防护模型主要面向英语，无法有效地评估阿拉伯语语言模型（ALMs）的安全性，阻碍了其广泛应用。缺乏针对阿拉伯语的细粒度、类别级别的安全评估，限制了对 ALMs 安全漏洞的理解。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为 SalamaBench 的阿拉伯语安全评估基准，包含 8170 个跨越 12 个类别的提示，并与 MLCommons Safety Hazard Taxonomy 对齐。该基准通过 AI 过滤和多阶段人工验证的流程构建。使用 SalamaBench，对 Fanar 1/2、ALLaM 2、Falcon H1R 和 Jais 2 这五个 ALMs 在不同防护配置下进行了评估，包括单独的防护模型、多数投票聚合以及与人工标注的金标签进行验证。
AI.result: 不同 ALMs 的安全对齐程度存在显著差异。Fanar 2 的整体攻击成功率最低，但在特定危害领域表现不均衡。Jais 2 则持续表现出较高的脆弱性，表明其内在安全对齐较弱。研究还发现，原生的 ALMs 作为安全评估者时，其表现远不如专门的防护模型。
AI.conclusion: 对 ALMs 进行类别感知型评估以及开发专门的防护机制对于实现稳健的危害缓解至关重要。本研究提出的 SalamaBench 为系统化地评估和改进 ALMs 的安全性提供了重要工具。

title: Mask-aware inference with State-Space Models
summary: Many real-world computer vision tasks, such as depth completion, must handle inputs with arbitrarily shaped regions of missing or invalid data. For Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Partial Convolutions solved this by a mask-aware re-normalization conditioned only on valid pixels. Recently, State Space Models (SSMs) like Mamba have emerged, offering high performance with linear complexity. However, these architectures lack an inherent mechanism for handling such arbitrarily shaped invalid data at inference time. To bridge this gap, we introduce Partial Vision Mamba (PVM), a novel architectural component that ports the principles of partial operations to the Mamba backbone. We also define a series of rules to design architectures using PVM. We show the efficacy and generalizability of our approach in the tasks of depth completion, image inpainting, and classification with invalid data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了部分视觉Mamba (PVM)，一种新的组件，将部分卷积的思想应用于Mamba骨干网络，以处理具有任意形状缺失数据的计算机视觉任务，并在深度补全、图像修复和带无效数据的分类任务中证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的Mamba等状态空间模型（SSMs）在处理任意形状的无效数据方面存在不足，而这在深度补全等现实世界的计算机视觉任务中至关重要。为了解决这个问题，需要一种能够处理这类输入的Mamba架构。
AI.method: 提出了部分视觉Mamba (PVM)，一种将部分卷积的掩码感知重新归一化原则移植到Mamba骨干网络的新组件。同时，定义了一系列使用PVM设计架构的规则。
AI.result: 在深度补全、图像修复和带无效数据的分类任务中，PVM展现了其有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PVM成功地将部分卷积的思想扩展到Mamba架构，使其能够有效地处理具有任意形状缺失数据的计算机视觉任务，并在多项任务上取得了良好的性能。

title: One Size Does Not Fit All: Token-Wise Adaptive Compression for KV Cache
summary: Despite the remarkable progress of Large Language Models (LLMs), the escalating memory footprint of the Key-Value (KV) cache remains a critical bottleneck for efficient inference. While dimensionality reduction offers a promising compression avenue, existing approaches typically either necessitate prohibitively expensive pre-training from scratch or suffer from severe performance deterioration under high compression regimes. In this work, we propose DynaKV, a novel post-training framework for low-rank KV cache compression. To the best of our knowledge, DynaKV is the first method to dynamically allocate compression rates to individual tokens according to their semantic meaning, which allows it to achieve better fidelity at aggressive compression ratios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art compression techniques, achieving significant memory reduction while maintaining competitive generation quality. Furthermore, our approach is orthogonal to sequence-level pruning methods. When integrated with SnapKV, DynaKV retains only 6% of the KV cache while maintaining 94% of the baseline performance on the LongBench benchmark.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 DynaKV 的新颖的低秩 KV 缓存压缩框架，该框架在训练后进行，能够根据 token 的语义动态分配压缩率，以在更高压缩率下保持更好的性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的 KV 缓存内存占用不断增加，阻碍了高效推理。现有的维度降低方法要么需要昂贵的预训练，要么在高度压缩时性能急剧下降。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 DynaKV 的训练后低秩 KV 缓存压缩框架。该框架能够根据 token 的语义动态地分配压缩率。
AI.result: DynaKV 在内存缩减方面显著优于现有技术，同时保持了有竞争力的生成质量。与 SnapKV 结合使用时，DynaKV 仅保留了 6% 的 KV 缓存，在 LongBench 基准测试上仍保持了 94% 的基线性能。
AI.conclusion: DynaKV 是一种有效的低秩 KV 缓存压缩方法，通过动态分配压缩率，可以在高压缩率下实现更好的性能保真度，并且可以与其他方法（如序列级剪枝）结合使用。

title: Trajectory Tracking for Uncrewed Surface Vessels with Input Saturation and Dynamic Motion Constraints
summary: This work addresses the problem of constrained motion control of the uncrewed surface vessels. The constraints are imposed on states/inputs of the vehicles due to the physical limitations, mission requirements, and safety considerations. We develop a nonlinear feedback controller utilizing log-type Barrier Lyapunov Functions to enforce static and dynamic motion constraints. The proposed scheme uniquely addresses asymmetric constraints on position and heading alongside symmetric constraints on surge, sway, and yaw rates. Additionally, a smooth input saturation model is incorporated in the design to guarantee stability even under actuator bounds, which, if unaccounted for, can lead to severe performance degradation and poor tracking. Rigorous Lyapunov stability analysis shows that the closed-loop system remains stable and that all state variables remain within their prescribed bounds at all times, provided the initial conditions also lie within those bounds. Numerical simulations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed strategies for surface vessels without violating the motion and actuator constraints.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于对数型障碍李雅普诺夫函数的非线性反馈控制器，用于无人水面艇的约束运动控制，可同时处理对称和不对称的运动学和动力学约束，并考虑了执行器饱和。
AI.motivation: 无人水面艇的运动受到物理限制、任务需求和安全因素的约束，需要一种能够处理这些静态和动态约束的控制器，同时保证执行器饱和下的稳定性。
AI.method: 设计了一种利用对数型障碍李雅普诺夫函数（log-type Barrier Lyapunov Functions）的非线性反馈控制器，以强制执行位置、航向、艏摇、横移和艄摇速率的静态和动态约束。同时，引入了一个平滑的输入饱和模型来处理执行器约束。
AI.result: 通过严格的李雅普诺夫稳定性分析证明，在初始条件满足约束的情况下，闭环系统保持稳定，所有状态变量始终在预设的范围内。数值模拟结果表明，所提出的策略在不违反运动和执行器约束的情况下，能有效控制水面艇。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于对数型障碍李雅普诺夫函数的控制器能够有效地处理无人水面艇的各种对称和不对称运动约束，并保证执行器饱和下的稳定性，从而实现安全可靠的运动控制。

title: Self-Attribution Bias: When AI Monitors Go Easy on Themselves
summary: Agentic systems increasingly rely on language models to monitor their own behavior. For example, coding agents may self critique generated code for pull request approval or assess the safety of tool-use actions. We show that this design pattern can fail when the action is presented in a previous or in the same assistant turn instead of being presented by the user in a user turn. We define self-attribution bias as the tendency of a model to evaluate an action as more correct or less risky when the action is implicitly framed as its own, compared to when the same action is evaluated under off-policy attribution. Across four coding and tool-use datasets, we find that monitors fail to report high-risk or low-correctness actions more often when evaluation follows a previous assistant turn in which the action was generated, compared to when the same action is evaluated in a new context presented in a user turn. In contrast, explicitly stating that the action comes from the monitor does not by itself induce self-attribution bias. Because monitors are often evaluated on fixed examples rather than on their own generated actions, these evaluations can make monitors appear more reliable than they actually are in deployment, leading developers to unknowingly deploy inadequate monitors in agentic systems.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，当语言模型监控自己的行为时，如果行为是在模型自己生成的同一回合或前一回合中出现的，模型会表现出自利归因偏见，倾向于给出更积极的评价，从而可能导致部署不可靠的监控器。
AI.motivation: 随着代理系统越来越多地依赖语言模型进行自我监控（例如，代码审查、工具使用安全评估），研究人员注意到这种设计模式可能存在缺陷，尤其是在监控器评估自身生成的行为时。
AI.method: 作者定义了“自利归因偏见”，并通过实验在四个代码生成和工具使用的数据集上进行验证。他们比较了当被评估的行为出现在模型生成的回合中，以及当被评估的行为在一个新的用户回合中呈现时，监控器报告高风险或低正确性行为的频率。
AI.result: 结果表明，当行为出现在前一个助手回合（由模型生成）时，监控器比在新的用户回合中进行评估时，更容易忽略高风险或低正确性的行为。然而，明确告知模型评估的是其自身行为并不会直接导致这种偏见。
AI.conclusion: 自利归因偏见会使监控器在评估自身生成的行为时显得比实际更可靠，这可能导致开发者在代理系统中部署不完善的监控器，从而带来潜在风险。

title: ICHOR: A Robust Representation Learning Approach for ASL CBF Maps with Self-Supervised Masked Autoencoders
summary: Arterial spin labeling (ASL) perfusion MRI allows direct quantification of regional cerebral blood flow (CBF) without exogenous contrast, enabling noninvasive measurements that can be repeated without constraints imposed by contrast injection. ASL is increasingly acquired in research studies and clinical MRI protocols. Building on successes in structural imaging, recent efforts have implemented deep learning based methods to improve image quality, enable automated quality control, and derive robust quantitative and predictive biomarkers with ASL derived CBF. However, progress has been limited by variable image quality, substantial inter-site, vendor and protocol differences, and limited availability of labeled datasets needed to train models that generalize across cohorts. To address these challenges, we introduce ICHOR, a self supervised pre-training approach for ASL CBF maps that learns transferable representations using 3D masked autoencoders. ICHOR is pretrained via masked image modeling using a Vision Transformer backbone and can be used as a general-purpose encoder for downstream ASL tasks. For pre-training, we curated one of the largest ASL datasets to date, comprising 11,405 ASL CBF scans from 14 studies spanning multiple sites and acquisition protocols. We evaluated the pre-trained ICHOR encoder on three downstream diagnostic classification tasks and one ASL CBF map quality prediction regression task. Across all evaluations, ICHOR outperformed existing neuroimaging self-supervised pre-training methods adapted to ASL. Pre-trained weights and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为 ICHOR 的自监督预训练方法，用于 ASL CBF（动脉自旋标记脑血流量）图。ICHOR 使用 3D 掩码自编码器和 Vision Transformer 来学习可迁移的表征，并在包含 11,405 个 ASL CBF 扫描的 ASL 数据集上进行了预训练。结果表明，ICHOR 在下游诊断分类和 CBF 图质量预测任务中优于现有的自监督预训练方法。
AI.motivation: ASL 灌注 MRI 在研究和临床中越来越受欢迎，但其图像质量的可变性、跨站点/厂商/协议的差异以及缺乏大规模标记数据集来训练泛化能力强的模型限制了深度学习方法的应用。因此，需要一种能够解决这些挑战、提高 ASL CBF 图质量和泛化能力的预训练方法。
AI.method: 研究者提出了 ICHOR，一种基于 3D 掩码自编码器和 Vision Transformer 的自监督预训练方法。ICHOR 在大规模 ASL CBF 数据集（11,405 份扫描）上进行预训练，学习通用的 ASL CBF 表征。预训练完成后，ICHOR 可作为通用的编码器用于下游 ASL 任务，如诊断分类和 CBF 图质量预测。
AI.result: ICHOR 在三个下游诊断分类任务和一个 ASL CBF 图质量预测回归任务上进行了评估。结果显示，ICHOR 在所有评估任务中均优于现有适用于神经影像的自监督预训练方法（在 ASL 数据上进行适配）。
AI.conclusion: ICHOR 是一种有效的自监督预训练方法，可以学习 ASL CBF 图的迁移性表征，提高了在不同数据集和下游任务上的性能。该方法有助于克服 ASL 数据集的限制，并有望推动 ASL MRI 在临床和研究中的应用。研究者将公开预训练权重和代码。

title: From Local Corrections to Generalized Skills: Improving Neuro-Symbolic Policies with MEMO
summary: Recent works use a neuro-symbolic framework for general manipulation policies. The advantage of this framework is that -- by applying off-the-shelf vision and language models -- the robot can break complex tasks down into semantic subtasks. However, the fundamental bottleneck is that the robot needs skills to ground these subtasks into embodied motions. Skills can take many forms (e.g., trajectory snippets, motion primitives, coded functions), but regardless of their form skills act as a constraint. The high-level policy can only ground its language reasoning through the available skills; if the robot cannot generate the right skill for the current task, its policy will fail. We propose to address this limitation -- and dynamically expand the robot's skills -- by leveraging user feedback. When a robot fails, humans can intuitively explain what went wrong (e.g., ``no, go higher''). While a simple approach is to recall this exact text the next time the robot faces a similar situation, we hypothesize that by collecting, clustering, and re-phrasing natural language corrections across multiple users and tasks, we can synthesize more general text guidance and coded skill templates. Applying this hypothesis we develop Memory Enhanced Manipulation (MEMO). MEMO builds and maintains a retrieval-augmented skillbook gathered from human feedback and task successes. At run time, MEMO retrieves relevant text and code from this skillbook, enabling the robot's policy to generate new skills while reasoning over multi-task human feedback. Our experiments demonstrate that using MEMO to aggregate local feedback into general skill templates enables generalization to novel tasks where existing baselines fall short. See supplemental material here: https://collab.me.vt.edu/memo

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为MEMO的神经符号框架，通过收集和整合用户反馈，动态扩展机器人的技能库，以解决现有框架在将语义子任务转化为具体动作时存在的技能限制问题，从而实现对新任务的泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号框架在将复杂任务分解为语义子任务方面表现出色，但其主要瓶颈在于机器人需要具备将这些子任务具身化为具体动作的技能。当机器人无法生成正确技能时，其策略会失败。因此，研究的动机是找到一种方法来动态地扩展机器人的技能，以克服这一限制。
AI.method: 研究提出利用用户反馈来动态扩展机器人技能。通过收集、聚类和重述来自多用户和多任务的自然语言纠错，可以合成更通用的文本指导和代码技能模板。具体实现上，开发了MEMO（Memory Enhanced Manipulation）系统，该系统构建和维护一个通过人类反馈和任务成功收集的检索增强技能库。在运行时，MEMO从技能库中检索相关的文本和代码，使机器人的策略能够在推理多任务人类反馈的同时生成新技能。
AI.result: 实验表明，MEMO通过将本地反馈聚合为通用技能模板，能够泛化到现有基线方法表现不佳的新任务上。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合用户反馈来创建更通用的文本指导和代码技能模板，可以克服神经符号机器人操作策略在技能限制上的瓶颈，并实现对新任务的有效泛化。
