title: Uncertainty and Autarky: Cooperative Game Theory for Stable Local Energy Market Partitioning
summary: Local energy markets empower prosumers to form coalitions for energy trading. However, the optimal partitioning of the distribution grid into such coalitions remains unclear, especially in constrained grids with stochastic production and consumption. This analysis must take into account the interests of both the grid operator and the constituent prosumers. In this work, we present a cooperative game theoretic framework to study distribution grid partitioning into local energy market coalitions under uncertain prosumption and grid constraints. We formulate the optimal stable partitioning problem to balance the interests of the grid operator with that of prosumers. Under deterministic load and generation, we show that the largest market coalition is the optimal stable partition. For the case of stochastic loads and generation, we provide an algorithm to evaluate the optimal stable partition. Numerical experiments are performed on benchmark and real world distribution grids. Our results help in understanding how uncertainty affects local energy market partitioning decisions in constrained distribution grids.

AI.tldr: 研究了在配电网中，如何将用户划分为本地能源市场中的联盟，以平衡电网运营商和用户双方的利益，特别是在存在不确定性和电网限制的情况下。
AI.motivation: 本地能源市场允许用户组成联盟进行能源交易，但如何最优地划分配电网以形成这些联盟，尤其是在有约束且生产消费不确定的情况下，仍然是一个未解决的问题。此分析需要同时考虑电网运营商和用户的利益。
AI.method: 提出了一种合作博弈论框架来研究配电网的划分问题。在确定性负荷和发电情况下，证明了最大的市场联盟是最优且稳定的划分。对于随机负荷和发电情况，设计了一种算法来评估最优稳定划分。并在基准和真实配电网进行了数值实验。
AI.result: 在确定性负荷和发电情况下，证明了最大的市场联盟是使所有参与者（电网运营商和用户）利益均得到最大化的最优稳定划分。对于随机情况，提出的算法能够评估最优稳定划分。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过合作博弈论框架，提供了一种方法来解决配电网的本地能源市场联盟划分问题，并考虑了不确定性和电网约束。结果表明，即使在存在不确定性的情况下，也能找到最优的联盟划分策略，这有助于理解不确定性对能源市场划分决策的影响。

title: ECG-MoE: Mixture-of-Expert Electrocardiogram Foundation Model
summary: Electrocardiography (ECG) analysis is crucial for cardiac diagnosis, yet existing foundation models often fail to capture the periodicity and diverse features required for varied clinical tasks. We propose ECG-MoE, a hybrid architecture that integrates multi-model temporal features with a cardiac period-aware expert module. Our approach uses a dual-path Mixture-of-Experts to separately model beat-level morphology and rhythm, combined with a hierarchical fusion network using LoRA for efficient inference. Evaluated on five public clinical tasks, ECG-MoE achieves state-of-the-art performance with 40% faster inference than multi-task baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ECG-MoE的混合架构，用于ECG分析，该架构结合了多模型时域特征和周期感知的专家模块，通过双路径MoE分别建模心跳形态和节律，并使用LoRA进行高效推理，在五个临床任务上实现了最先进的性能，并且推理速度比多任务基线快40%。
AI.motivation: 现有的ECG基础模型在捕捉心电图的周期性和处理多样化临床任务方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出ECG-MoE混合架构，包含一个双路径的专家混合（MoE）模型，分别处理心跳形态和节律，并结合一个使用LoRA（Low-Rank Adaptation）的层级融合网络以实现高效推理。
AI.result: ECG-MoE在五个公共临床任务上取得了最先进的性能，并且推理速度比多任务基线模型快40%。
AI.conclusion: ECG-MoE通过整合时域特征和周期感知能力，有效解决了现有ECG分析模型的局限性，并在多个临床任务上展现出优越的性能和效率。

title: A 360-degree Multi-camera System for Blue Emergency Light Detection Using Color Attention RT-DETR and the ABLDataset
comment: 16 pages, 17 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles
summary: This study presents an advanced system for detecting blue lights on emergency vehicles, developed using ABLDataset, a curated dataset that includes images of European emergency vehicles under various climatic and geographic conditions. The system employs a configuration of four fisheye cameras, each with a 180-degree horizontal field of view, mounted on the sides of the vehicle. A calibration process enables the azimuthal localization of the detections. Additionally, a comparative analysis of major deep neural network algorithms was conducted, including YOLO (v5, v8, and v10), RetinaNet, Faster R-CNN, and RT-DETR. RT-DETR was selected as the base model and enhanced through the incorporation of a color attention block, achieving an accuracy of 94.7 percent and a recall of 94.1 percent on the test set, with field test detections reaching up to 70 meters. Furthermore, the system estimates the approach angle of the emergency vehicle relative to the center of the car using geometric transformations. Designed for integration into a multimodal system that combines visual and acoustic data, this system has demonstrated high efficiency, offering a promising approach to enhancing Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) and road safety.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种基于四目鱼眼摄像头和改进的RT-DETR深度学习模型的紧急车辆蓝灯检测系统，准确率和召回率均达到94%以上，并能估计接近角度，旨在提升ADAS和道路安全。
AI.motivation: 提高道路安全，特别是在高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）中，需要更有效地检测紧急车辆。
AI.method: 使用包含欧洲紧急车辆不同条件下图像的ABLDataset数据集。系统配置了四个180度视角的鱼眼摄像头，并进行了标定以实现方位本地化。对YOLO（v5, v8, v10）、RetinaNet、Faster R-CNN和RT-DETR等深度学习算法进行了比较，最终选择了RT-DETR模型，并加入颜色注意力模块进行增强。通过几何变换估计紧急车辆的接近角度。
AI.result: 改进后的RT-DETR模型在测试集上达到了94.7%的准确率和94.1%的召回率，在野外测试中检测距离可达70米。系统能够估计紧急车辆相对于车辆中心的接近角度。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能够高效地检测紧急车辆的蓝灯，并估算其接近角度，为集成到多模态（视觉和声学）系统中提供了可行方案，有望显著提升ADAS的安全性和道路整体安全性。

title: Distributed State Estimation for Vision-Based Cooperative Slung Load Transportation in GPS-Denied Environments
comment: In proceedings of the 2026 AIAA SciTech Forum, Session: Intelligent Systems-27
summary: Transporting heavy or oversized slung loads using rotorcraft has traditionally relied on single-aircraft systems, which limits both payload capacity and control authority. Cooperative multilift using teams of rotorcraft offers a scalable and efficient alternative, especially for infrequent but challenging "long-tail" payloads without the need of building larger and larger rotorcraft. Most prior multilift research assumes GPS availability, uses centralized estimation architectures, or relies on controlled laboratory motion-capture setups. As a result, these methods lack robustness to sensor loss and are not viable in GPS-denied or operationally constrained environments. This paper addresses this limitation by presenting a distributed and decentralized payload state estimation framework for vision-based multilift operations. Using onboard monocular cameras, each UAV detects a fiducial marker on the payload and estimates its relative pose. These measurements are fused via a Distributed and Decentralized Extended Information Filter (DDEIF), enabling robust and scalable estimation that is resilient to individual sensor dropouts. This payload state estimate is then used for closed-loop trajectory tracking control. Monte Carlo simulation results in Gazebo show the effectiveness of the proposed approach, including the effect of communication loss during flight.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于视觉的、分布式和去中心化的多旋翼吊装系统载荷状态估计框架，无需GPS，并能在通信丢失的情况下保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有单旋翼吊装系统在载荷能力和控制方面存在限制；而现有的多旋翼吊装研究多依赖GPS，采用集中式架构，或在实验室环境下进行，鲁棒性不足，难以应对GPS受限或通信受扰的实际场景。
AI.method: 利用每个无人机上的单目摄像头检测载荷上的标记，并估计其相对姿态。通过分布式和去中心化扩展信息滤波器（DDEIF）融合这些测量值，实现鲁棒且可扩展的估计，并能抵抗单独的传感器故障。该估计用于闭环轨迹跟踪控制。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛仿真结果表明，所提出的方法在Gazebo环境中是有效的，即使在通信丢失的情况下也能有效工作。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了一种无需GPS、具备分布式和去中心化特性的视觉多旋翼吊装系统载荷状态估计框架，该框架具有良好的鲁棒性和可扩展性，能够应对传感器故障和通信丢失等挑战。

title: SGR3 Model: Scene Graph Retrieval-Reasoning Model in 3D
summary: 3D scene graphs provide a structured representation of object entities and their relationships, enabling high-level interpretation and reasoning for robots while remaining intuitively understandable to humans. Existing approaches for 3D scene graph generation typically combine scene reconstruction with graph neural networks (GNNs). However, such pipelines require multi-modal data that may not always be available, and their reliance on heuristic graph construction can constrain the prediction of relationship triplets. In this work, we introduce a Scene Graph Retrieval-Reasoning Model in 3D (SGR3 Model), a training-free framework that leverages multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for semantic scene graph generation. SGR3 Model bypasses the need for explicit 3D reconstruction. Instead, it enhances relational reasoning by incorporating semantically aligned scene graphs retrieved via a ColPali-style cross-modal framework. To improve retrieval robustness, we further introduce a weighted patch-level similarity selection mechanism that mitigates the negative impact of blurry or semantically uninformative regions. Experiments demonstrate that SGR3 Model achieves competitive performance compared to training-free baselines and on par with GNN-based expert models. Moreover, an ablation study on the retrieval module and knowledge base scale reveals that retrieved external information is explicitly integrated into the token generation process, rather than being implicitly internalized through abstraction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SGR3的模型，利用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）和检索增强生成（RAG）技术，实现了3D场景图的生成，无需3D重建，并提升了关系推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D场景图生成方法依赖于多模态数据和启发式图构建，限制了关系三元组的预测。本文旨在提出一种无需训练、无需3D重建的、能够提升关系推理能力的3D场景图生成方法。
AI.method: SGR3模型利用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）和检索增强生成（RAG）框架。它通过ColPali风格的跨模态框架检索语义对齐的3D场景图，并引入加权块级相似性选择机制来提高检索鲁棒性，从而增强关系推理能力。
AI.result: SGR3模型在无需训练的基线方法中表现具有竞争力，并且与基于GNN的专家模型相当。消融实验表明，检索到的外部信息被显式地整合到token生成过程中。
AI.conclusion: SGR3模型能够有效地利用MLLMs和RAG技术生成3D场景图，无需3D重建，并且通过检索外部知识提升了关系推理能力，展示了外部信息直接整合到生成过程中的重要性。

title: Towards automated data analysis: A guided framework for LLM-based risk estimation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into critical decision-making pipelines, a trend that raises the demand for robust and automated data analysis. Current approaches to dataset risk analysis are limited to manual auditing methods which involve time-consuming and complex tasks, whereas fully automated analysis based on Artificial Intelligence (AI) suffers from hallucinations and issues stemming from AI alignment. To this end, this work proposes a framework for dataset risk estimation that integrates Generative AI under human guidance and supervision, aiming to set the foundations for a future automated risk analysis paradigm. Our approach utilizes LLMs to identify semantic and structural properties in database schemata, subsequently propose clustering techniques, generate the code for them and finally interpret the produced results. The human supervisor guides the model on the desired analysis and ensures process integrity and alignment with the task's objectives. A proof of concept is presented to demonstrate the feasibility of the framework's utility in producing meaningful results in risk assessment tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在人类指导下集成生成式AI的框架，用于数据集风险估计，旨在为未来的自动化风险分析奠定基础。该框架利用LLM识别数据库模式中的语义和结构属性，提出聚类技术，生成代码并解释结果，由人类监督者指导和确保过程的完整性。
AI.motivation: 当前数据集风险分析方法主要依赖耗时的人工审计，而全自动AI分析则存在幻觉和AI对齐问题。随着LLM在关键决策中的应用增加，对稳健且自动化的数据分析需求日益增长。
AI.method: 该框架利用LLM识别数据库模式的语义和结构属性，然后提出聚类技术，生成相应的代码，并最终解释输出结果。整个过程在人类监督者的指导和监督下进行。
AI.result: 通过概念验证，展示了该框架在数据集风险评估任务中产生有意义结果的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合生成式AI和人类监督，为实现自动化数据集风险分析提供了一个有前景的途径，能够有效识别模式属性、提出和执行分析技术，并解释结果。

title: Computing Scaled Relative Graphs of Discrete-time LTI Systems from Data
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, submitted for possible publication
summary: Graphical methods for system analysis have played a central role in control theory. A recently emerging tool in this field is the Scaled Relative Graph (SRG). In this paper, we further extend its applicability by showing how the SRG of discrete-time linear-time-invariant (LTI) systems can be computed exactly from its state-space representation using linear matrix inequalities. We additionally propose a fully data-driven approach where we demonstrate how to compute the SRG exclusively from input-output data. Furthermore, we introduce a robust version of the SRG, which can be computed from noisy data trajectories and contains the SRG of the actual system.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种使用线性矩阵不等式（LMIs）从离散时间 LTI 系统的状态空间表示中精确计算缩放相对图（SRG）的方法，并提出了一种仅从输入输出数据计算 SRG 的数据驱动方法。此外，还引入了鲁棒 SRG，可从噪声数据轨迹中计算并包含实际系统的 SRG。
AI.motivation: 为了扩展图形化方法在系统分析中的应用，特别是缩放相对图（SRG）的应用范围。
AI.method: 使用线性矩阵不等式（LMIs）从离散时间 LTI 系统的状态空间表示中计算 SRG；提出一种纯数据驱动的方法，仅使用输入输出数据计算 SRG；引入鲁棒 SRG，可从噪声数据轨迹计算。
AI.result: 成功开发了从状态空间表示精确计算离散时间 LTI 系统 SRG 的方法；提出了一种新颖的数据驱动方法来计算 SRG；引入了能够处理噪声数据的鲁棒 SRG。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功地扩展了 SRG 的计算方法，使其能够适用于离散时间 LTI 系统，并提供了数据驱动和鲁棒的计算选项，从而增强了 SRG 在实际系统分析中的实用性。

title: PinPoint: Evaluation of Composed Image Retrieval with Explicit Negatives, Multi-Image Queries, and Paraphrase Testing
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) has made significant progress, yet current benchmarks are limited to single ground-truth answers and lack the annotations needed to evaluate false positive avoidance, robustness and multi-image reasoning. We present PinPoint, a comprehensive real world benchmark with 7,635 queries and 329K relevance judgments across 23 query categories. PinPoint advances the field by providing: (1) multiple correct answers (averaging 9.1 per query) (2) explicit hard negatives, (3) six instruction paraphrases per query for robustness testing, (4) multi-image composition support (13.4% of queries), and (5) demographic metadata for fairness evaluation. Based on our analysis of 20+ methods across 4 different major paradigms, we uncover three significant drawbacks: The best methods while achieving mAP@10 of 28.5%, still retrieves irrelevant results (hard negatives) 9% of the time. The best models also exhibit 25.1% performance variation across paraphrases, indicating significant potential for enhancing current CIR techniques. Multi-image queries performs 40 to 70% worse across different methods. To overcome these new issues uncovered by our evaluation framework, we propose a training-free reranking method based on an off-the-shelf MLLM that can be applied to any existing system to bridge the gap. We release the complete dataset, including all images, queries, annotations, retrieval index, and benchmarking code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PinPoint，一个包含多重地面真实答案、负样本、指令复述、多图像组合和人口统计学信息的真实世界组成图像检索（CIR）基准。评估发现现有方法在处理负样本、指令变化和多图像查询方面存在不足。为此，本文提出了一种无需训练的基于MLLM的重排方法来解决这些问题，并开源了数据集和代码。
AI.motivation: 现有CIR基准的局限性，如单一地面真实答案、缺乏对假阳性规避、鲁棒性和多图像推理的评估能力，促使研究者开发一个更全面、更真实的基准。同时，评估现有方法的不足也促使了新方法的提出。
AI.method: 研究者构建了一个名为PinPoint的真实世界CIR基准，包含7,635个查询和329K个相关性判断，覆盖23个查询类别。该基准支持多重正确答案、显式硬负例、指令复述、多图像组合和人口统计学元数据。研究者基于此基准评估了20多种现有方法，并提出了一种基于预训练多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的无训练重排方法。
AI.result: 评估显示，即使是最好的CIR方法，在检索结果中仍有9%的假阳性（硬负例），并且在指令变化下面临25.1%的性能波动。多图像查询的性能比单图像查询差40%至70%。提出的MLLM重排方法能够有效弥合性能差距。
AI.conclusion: PinPoint基准揭示了现有CIR方法在鲁棒性、假阳性规避和处理多图像查询方面的不足。基于MLLM的重排方法为提升CIR系统性能提供了一个有效且易于应用的解决方案。

title: Additive Multi-Step Markov Chains and the Curse of Dimensionality in Large Language Models
summary: Large-scale language models (LLMs) operate in extremely high-dimensional state spaces, where both token embeddings and their hidden representations create complex dependencies that are not easily reduced to classical Markov structures. In this paper, we explore a theoretically feasible approximation of LLM dynamics using N-order additive Markov chains. Such models allow the conditional probability of the next token to be decomposed into a superposition of contributions from multiple historical depths, reducing the combinatorial explosion typically associated with high-order Markov processes. The main result of the work is the establishment of a correspondence between an additive multi-step chain and a chain with a step-wise memory function. This equivalence allowed the introduction of the concept of information temperature not only for stepwise but also for additive N-order Markov chains.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种利用N阶加性马尔可夫链来近似大型语言模型（LLMs）动力学的方法，通过分解条件概率来处理高维状态空间，并引入了信息温度的概念。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的状态空间维度极高，其内部依赖关系复杂，难以用经典的马尔可夫结构来描述。研究旨在为LLMs的动力学提供一种可行的近似模型。
AI.method: 使用N阶加性马尔可夫链来近似LLMs的动力学。通过将下一个token的条件概率分解为多个历史深度的贡献叠加来实现，以此降低高阶马尔可夫过程的组合爆炸问题。建立了加性多步链与具有步进记忆函数链之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 成功地建立了加性多步链与具有步进记忆函数链之间的数学等价性。在此基础上，将信息温度的概念推广到加性N阶马尔可夫链。
AI.conclusion: N阶加性马尔可夫链是一种理论上可行的LLMs动力学近似方法，它能够有效处理高维状态空间和复杂依赖关系，并且通过引入信息温度概念，为理解和分析LLMs的行为提供了新的视角。

title: The Impact of Preprocessing Methods on Racial Encoding and Model Robustness in CXR Diagnosis
comment: Preprint accepted for publication at BVM 2026 (https://www.bvm-conf.org/)
summary: Deep learning models can identify racial identity with high accuracy from chest X-ray (CXR) recordings. Thus, there is widespread concern about the potential for racial shortcut learning, where a model inadvertently learns to systematically bias its diagnostic predictions as a function of racial identity. Such racial biases threaten healthcare equity and model reliability, as models may systematically misdiagnose certain demographic groups. Since racial shortcuts are diffuse - non-localized and distributed throughout the whole CXR recording - image preprocessing methods may influence racial shortcut learning, yet the potential of such methods for reducing biases remains underexplored. Here, we investigate the effects of image preprocessing methods including lung masking, lung cropping, and Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE). These approaches aim to suppress spurious cues encoding racial information while preserving diagnostic accuracy. Our experiments reveal that simple bounding box-based lung cropping can be an effective strategy for reducing racial shortcut learning while maintaining diagnostic model performance, bypassing frequently postulated fairness-accuracy trade-offs.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，通过简单的肺部裁剪图像预处理方法，可以在不牺牲诊断准确性的前提下，有效减少深度学习模型从胸部X光片中学习种族偏见。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在从胸部X光片识别种族信息方面表现出高准确性，这引发了对模型可能存在“种族捷径学习”的担忧，即模型可能因种族身份而产生诊断偏见，从而威胁医疗公平性和模型可靠性。然而，针对这种弥散性捷径学习的预处理方法研究不足。
AI.method: 研究人员测试了三种图像预处理方法：肺部掩码、肺部裁剪和对比度限制自适应直方图均衡化（CLAHE）。旨在通过抑制编码种族信息的虚假线索，同时保持诊断准确性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于边界框的简单肺部裁剪方法能有效减少种族捷径学习，同时保持模型的诊断性能，并且规避了通常认为存在的公平性-准确性权衡。
AI.conclusion: 简单的肺部裁剪图像预处理是一种有效的策略，可以减少深度学习模型在胸部X光片分析中存在的种族偏见，且不会影响模型的诊断准确性，有望在不牺牲公平性的前提下提高模型性能。

title: Simulating Meaning, Nevermore! Introducing ICR: A Semiotic-Hermeneutic Metric for Evaluating Meaning in LLM Text Summaries
summary: Meaning in human language is relational, context dependent, and emergent, arising from dynamic systems of signs rather than fixed word-concept mappings. In computational settings, this semiotic and interpretive complexity complicates the generation and evaluation of meaning. This article proposes an interdisciplinary framework for studying meaning in large language model (LLM) generated language by integrating semiotics and hermeneutics with qualitative research methods. We review prior scholarship on meaning and machines, examining how linguistic signs are transformed into vectorized representations in static and contextualized embedding models, and identify gaps between statistical approximation and human interpretive meaning. We then introduce the Inductive Conceptual Rating (ICR) metric, a qualitative evaluation approach grounded in inductive content analysis and reflexive thematic analysis, designed to assess semantic accuracy and meaning alignment in LLM-outputs beyond lexical similarity metrics. We apply ICR in an empirical comparison of LLM generated and human generated thematic summaries across five datasets (N = 50 to 800). While LLMs achieve high linguistic similarity, they underperform on semantic accuracy, particularly in capturing contextually grounded meanings. Performance improves with larger datasets but remains variable across models, potentially reflecting differences in the frequency and coherence of recurring concepts and meanings. We conclude by arguing for evaluation frameworks that leverage systematic qualitative interpretation practices when assessing meaning in LLM-generated outputs from reference texts.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种结合符号学、解释学和定性研究方法的跨学科框架，用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）生成文本的意义。通过引入“归纳概念评分”（ICR）指标，发现LLM在语义准确性方面不如人类，尤其是在理解语境化意义方面。
AI.motivation: 现有计算方法难以处理人类语言的意义复杂性（关系性、语境依赖性、涌现性）。现有的评估方法（如词汇相似度）不足以捕捉LLM生成文本的深层语义准确性和意义对齐。
AI.method: 结合符号学、解释学和定性研究方法，提出“归纳概念评分”（ICR）指标。ICR基于归纳内容分析和反思性主题分析，用于评估LLM输出的语义准确性和意义对齐。通过将LLM生成和人类生成的主题摘要在五个数据集上进行实证比较来应用ICR。
AI.result: LLM在词汇相似度上表现良好，但在语义准确性上表现较差，特别是在捕捉语境化意义方面。数据集越大，LLM表现越好，但不同模型之间的表现存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 评估LLM生成文本的意义需要采用系统性的定性解释方法，超越传统的词汇相似度度量。LLM在生成与参照文本在意义上的对齐方面仍有改进空间。

title: A Comprehensive Approach to Directly Addressing Estimation Delays in Stochastic Guidance
comment: Submitted to journal publication. 46 pages, 12 figures
summary: In realistic pursuit-evasion scenarios, abrupt target maneuvers generate unavoidable periods of elevated uncertainty that result in estimation delays. Such delays can degrade interception performance to the point of causing a miss. Existing delayed-information guidance laws fail to provide a complete remedy, as they typically assume constant and known delays. Moreover, in practice they are fed by filtered estimates, contrary to these laws' foundational assumptions. We present an overarching strategy for tracking and interception that explicitly accounts for time-varying estimation delays. We first devise a guidance law that incorporates two time-varying delays, thereby generalizing prior deterministic formulations. This law is driven by a particle-based fixed-lag smoother that provides it with appropriately delayed state estimates. Furthermore, using semi-Markov modeling of the target's maneuvers, the delays are estimated in real-time, enabling adaptive adjustment of the guidance inputs during engagement. The resulting framework consistently conjoins estimation, delay modeling, and guidance. Its effectiveness and superior robustness over existing delayed-information guidance laws are demonstrated via an extensive Monte Carlo study.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种考虑时变延迟的追踪与拦截策略，通过粒子滤波平滑器和半马尔可夫模型实时估计并自适应调整制导律，提高了拦截性能和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有延迟信息制导律在处理实际中目标机动引起的时变延迟和滤波估计时存在不足，导致拦截性能下降甚至失败。
AI.method: 提出了一种包含两个时变延迟的制导律，并使用粒子滤波固定滞后平滑器提供延迟状态估计。同时，采用半马尔可夫模型实时估计目标机动引起的延迟，实现制导输入的自适应调整。
AI.result: 该框架将估计、延迟建模和制导有机结合，在蒙特卡洛仿真中展示了其有效性和优于现有方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的策略能够有效地处理时变估计延迟，显著提升了追踪与拦截的性能和鲁棒性，为应对真实世界中的复杂场景提供了新的解决方案。

title: Risk-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Mobile Manipulation
summary: For robots to successfully transition from lab settings to everyday environments, they must begin to reason about the risks associated with their actions and make informed, risk-aware decisions. This is particularly true for robots performing mobile manipulation tasks, which involve both interacting with and navigating within dynamic, unstructured spaces. However, existing whole-body controllers for mobile manipulators typically lack explicit mechanisms for risk-sensitive decision-making under uncertainty. To our knowledge, we are the first to (i) learn risk-aware visuomotor policies for mobile manipulation conditioned on egocentric depth observations with runtime-adjustable risk sensitivity, and (ii) show risk-aware behaviours can be transferred through Imitation Learning (IL) to a visuomotor policy conditioned on egocentric depth observations. Our method achieves this by first training a privileged teacher policy using Distributional Reinforcement Learning (DRL), with a risk-neutral distributional critic. Distortion risk-metrics are then applied to the critic's predicted return distribution to calculate risk-adjusted advantage estimates used in policy updates to achieve a range of risk-aware behaviours. We then distil teacher policies with IL to obtain risk-aware student policies conditioned on egocentric depth observations. We perform extensive evaluations demonstrating that our trained visuomotor policies exhibit risk-aware behaviour (specifically achieving better worst-case performance) while performing reactive whole-body motions in unmapped environments, leveraging live depth observations for perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习风险感知视觉运动策略的方法，用于移动操作任务，该策略能够根据自我中心的深度观测进行调整，并可以通过模仿学习进行转移，从而在不确定的环境中实现更好的最差情况性能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人控制器在不确定性和风险感知方面存在不足，特别是在执行移动操作任务时。研究旨在使机器人能够在日常环境中安全地做出风险感知的决策。
AI.method: 采用分布强化学习（DRL）训练一个具有风险中性分布评论家的特权教师策略。利用失真风险度量计算风险调整的优势估计，用于策略更新以实现一系列风险感知行为。然后，通过模仿学习（IL）将教师策略蒸馏为以自我中心深度观测为条件的风险感知学生策略。
AI.result: 训练的视觉运动策略在未映射的环境中执行反应性全身运动时，表现出风险感知行为，特别是在最差情况下的性能更好。该方法能够实时利用深度观测进行感知。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次实现了可运行时调整风险敏感度的风险感知视觉运动策略，并证明了风险感知行为可以通过模仿学习转移到以自我中心深度观测为条件的视觉运动策略上，从而提高了机器人在动态、非结构化环境中的安全性和鲁棒性。

title: Spinverse: Differentiable Physics for Permeability-Aware Microstructure Reconstruction from Diffusion MRI
summary: Diffusion MRI (dMRI) is sensitive to microstructural barriers, yet most existing methods either assume impermeable boundaries or estimate voxel-level parameters without recovering explicit interfaces. We present Spinverse, a permeability-aware reconstruction method that inverts dMRI measurements through a fully differentiable Bloch-Torrey simulator. Spinverse represents tissue on a fixed tetrahedral grid and treats each interior face permeability as a learnable parameter; low-permeability faces act as diffusion barriers, so microstructural boundaries whose topology is not fixed a priori (up to the resolution of the ambient mesh) emerge without changing mesh connectivity or vertex positions. Given a target signal, we optimize face permeabilities by backpropagating a signal-matching loss through the PDE forward model, and recover an interface by thresholding the learned permeability field. To mitigate the ill-posedness of permeability inversion, we use mesh-based geometric priors; to avoid local minima, we use a staged multi-sequence optimization curriculum. Across a collection of synthetic voxel meshes, Spinverse reconstructs diverse geometries and demonstrates that sequence scheduling and regularization are critical to avoid outline-only solutions while improving both boundary accuracy and structural validity.

AI.tldr: Spinverse是一种基于可微Bloch-Torrey模拟器的扩散MRI（dMRI）重建方法，通过学习网格面之间的渗透性参数来识别组织微观结构边界，无需预设边界拓扑。
AI.motivation: 现有dMRI方法在处理微观结构边界时存在局限，要么假设边界是不可渗透的，要么只能估计体素级别参数，无法恢复明确的界面。因此，需要一种能够感知渗透性并恢复明确界面信息的dMRI方法。
AI.method: Spinverse使用一个固定的四面体网格来表示组织，并将每个内部面的渗透性视为可学习参数。通过反向传播信号匹配损失到全微分的Bloch-Torrey模拟器中来优化渗透性参数。通过对学习到的渗透性场进行阈值处理来恢复界面。为了解决渗透性反演的病态问题，引入了基于网格的几何先验，并采用分阶段的多序列优化策略来避免局部最优。
AI.result: 在合成的体素网格集合上，Spinverse能够重构多样的几何形状，并证明了序列调度和正则化对于避免仅有轮廓的解决方案至关重要，同时提高了边界准确性和结构有效性。
AI.conclusion: Spinverse是一种新颖的、能够感知渗透性的dMRI重建方法，能够无需预设拓扑即可从dMRI测量中恢复组织微观结构界面，并且在合成数据上展现出良好的性能。

title: Multiclass Hate Speech Detection with RoBERTa-OTA: Integrating Transformer Attention and Graph Convolutional Networks
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 12th Annual Conference on Computational Science & Computational Intelligence (CSCI'25)
summary: Multiclass hate speech detection across demographic categories remains computationally challenging due to implicit targeting strategies and linguistic variability in social media content. Existing approaches rely solely on learned representations from training data, without explicitly incorporating structured ontological frameworks that can enhance classification through formal domain knowledge integration. We propose RoBERTa-OTA, which introduces ontology-guided attention mechanisms that process textual features alongside structured knowledge representations through enhanced Graph Convolutional Networks. The architecture combines RoBERTa embeddings with scaled attention layers and graph neural networks to integrate contextual language understanding with domain-specific semantic knowledge. Evaluation across 39,747 balanced samples using 5-fold cross-validation demonstrates significant performance gains over baseline RoBERTa implementations and existing state-of-the-art methods. RoBERTa-OTA achieves 96.04\% accuracy compared to 95.02\% for standard RoBERTa, with substantial improvements for challenging categories: gender-based hate speech detection improves by 2.36 percentage points while other hate speech categories improve by 2.38 percentage points. The enhanced architecture maintains computational efficiency with only 0.33\% parameter overhead, providing practical advantages for large-scale content moderation applications requiring fine-grained demographic hate speech classification.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RoBERTa-OTA的新模型，它结合了RoBERTa的语言理解能力和本体论知识图谱，通过带有图神经网络的注意力机制来提高多类别仇恨言论检测的准确性，尤其在性别歧视等领域效果显著，且计算效率高。
AI.motivation: 现有仇恨言论检测方法仅依赖训练数据中的学习表示，未能有效利用结构化的本体论知识，导致在处理隐含目标策略和语言多样性时面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出RoBERTa-OTA模型，结合RoBERTa词嵌入、缩放注意力层和图神经网络。通过本体论引导的注意力机制，将文本特征与结构化知识表示相结合，利用增强的图卷积网络来整合上下文语言理解和领域特定的语义知识。
AI.result: 在39,747个平衡样本上进行5折交叉验证，RoBERTa-OTA相比基线RoBERTa模型（95.02%准确率）和其他现有SOTA方法，准确率提升至96.04%。在性别歧视仇恨言论检测方面，准确率提升2.36个百分点，其他仇恨言论类别提升2.38个百分点。
AI.conclusion: RoBERTa-OTA通过集成本体论知识，显著提高了多类别仇恨言论检测的性能，尤其是在细分人口统计学类别方面。该模型在保持高准确率的同时，参数开销仅增加0.33%，具有良好的计算效率，适用于大规模内容审核应用。

title: ELLIPSE: Evidential Learning for Robust Waypoints and Uncertainties
summary: Robust waypoint prediction is crucial for mobile robots operating in open-world, safety-critical settings. While Imitation Learning (IL) methods have demonstrated great success in practice, they are susceptible to distribution shifts: the policy can become dangerously overconfident in unfamiliar states. In this paper, we present \textit{ELLIPSE}, a method building on multivariate deep evidential regression to output waypoints and multivariate Student-t predictive distributions in a single forward pass. To reduce covariate-shift-induced overconfidence under viewpoint and pose perturbations near expert trajectories, we introduce a lightweight domain augmentation procedure that synthesizes plausible viewpoint/pose variations without collecting additional demonstrations. To improve uncertainty reliability under environment/domain shift (e.g., unseen staircases), we apply a post-hoc isotonic recalibration on probability integral transform (PIT) values so that prediction sets remain plausible during deployment. We ground the discussion and experiments in staircase waypoint prediction, where obtaining robust waypoint and uncertainty is pivotal. Extensive real world evaluations show that \textit{ELLIPSE} improves both task success rate and uncertainty coverage compared to baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 ELLIPSE 的新方法，利用多变量深度证据回归来预测机器人导航中的路径点，并提供可靠的不确定性估计，尤其是在存在分布偏移（如视角、姿态或环境变化）的情况下。ELLIPSE 通过数据增强和后验校准来应对这些挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统的模仿学习方法在面对现实世界中常见的分布偏移（如机器人视角或姿态变化、未见过的环境）时，容易产生危险的过度自信，导致导航失败。因此，需要一种能够提供可靠路径点预测和不确定性估计的方法。
AI.method: ELLIPSE 基于多变量深度证据回归，能够一次性输出路径点和多变量 Student-t 预测分布。为了应对近专家轨迹的共变异偏移，提出了一种轻量级域增强方法，通过合成视角/姿态变化来减少过度自信。为了提高在环境/域偏移下的不确定性可靠性，对概率积分变换（PIT）值进行了后验等渗校准。
AI.result: 在现实世界的楼梯路径点预测任务中，ELLIPSE 相较于基线方法，显著提高了任务成功率和不确定性覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: ELLIPSE 是一种有效的方法，能够为移动机器人在开放世界和安全关键环境中提供鲁棒的路径点预测和可靠的不确定性估计，有效解决了模仿学习方法在分布偏移下的过度自信问题。

title: Adaptive Policy Switching of Two-Wheeled Differential Robots for Traversing over Diverse Terrains
comment: Author's version of the paper presented at AROB-ISBC 2026
summary: Exploring lunar lava tubes requires robots to traverse without human intervention. Because pre-trained policies cannot fully cover all possible terrain conditions, our goal is to enable adaptive policy switching, where the robot selects an appropriate terrain-specialized model based on its current terrain features. This study investigates whether terrain types can be estimated effectively using posture-related observations collected during navigation. We fine-tuned a pre-trained policy using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), and then collected the robot's 3D orientation data as it moved across flat and rough terrain in a simulated lava-tube environment. Our analysis revealed that the standard deviation of the robot's pitch data shows a clear difference between these two terrain types. Using Gaussian mixture models (GMM), we evaluated terrain classification across various window sizes. An accuracy of more than 98% was achieved when using a 70-step window. The result suggests that short-term orientation data are sufficient for reliable terrain estimation, providing a foundation for adaptive policy switching.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种利用机器人导航时的姿态相关观测数据（如俯仰角变化标准差）来估计地形类型的方法，并使用高斯混合模型（GMM）实现了超过98%的分类精度，为自适应策略切换奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 在月球熔岩管等未知环境中，机器人需要自主导航，但预训练策略无法应对所有地形。因此，需要一种能够根据当前地形选择合适策略的自适应策略切换机制。
AI.method: 1. 在模拟的月球熔岩管环境中，收集机器人在平坦和崎岖地形上导航时的3D姿态数据（特别是俯仰角）。 2. 使用Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) 算法对预训练策略进行微调。 3. 分析俯仰角数据的标准差在不同地形上的差异。 4. 利用高斯混合模型（GMM）在不同窗口大小下评估地形分类精度。
AI.result: 机器人在平坦和崎岖地形上的俯仰角数据标准差存在显著差异。使用70步的窗口大小，高斯混合模型（GMM）能够实现超过98%的地形分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 短期姿态方向数据（如俯仰角变化）足以支持可靠的地形估计，这为开发基于地形的自适应机器人导航策略提供了基础。

title: sFRC for assessing hallucinations in medical image restoration
comment: 16 pages; 14 figures; 1 Supplemental document. TechRxiv Preprints, 2025
summary: Deep learning (DL) methods are currently being explored to restore images from sparse-view-, limited-data-, and undersampled-based acquisitions in medical applications. Although outputs from DL may appear visually appealing based on likability/subjective criteria (such as less noise, smooth features), they may also suffer from hallucinations. This issue is further exacerbated by a lack of easy-to-use techniques and robust metrics for the identification of hallucinations in DL outputs. In this work, we propose performing Fourier Ring Correlation (FRC) analysis over small patches and concomitantly (s)canning across DL outputs and their reference counterparts to detect hallucinations (termed as sFRC). We describe the rationale behind sFRC and provide its mathematical formulation. The parameters essential to sFRC may be set using predefined hallucinated features annotated by subject matter experts or using imaging theory-based hallucination maps. We use sFRC to detect hallucinations for three undersampled medical imaging problems: CT super-resolution, CT sparse view, and MRI subsampled restoration. In the testing phase, we demonstrate sFRC's effectiveness in detecting hallucinated features for the CT problem and sFRC's agreement with imaging theory-based outputs on hallucinated feature maps for the MR problem. Finally, we quantify the hallucination rates of DL methods on in-distribution versus out-of-distribution data and under increasing subsampling rates to characterize the robustness of DL methods. Beyond DL-based methods, sFRC's effectiveness in detecting hallucinations for a conventional regularization-based restoration method and a state-of-the-art unrolled method is also shown.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 sFRC 的新方法，通过在小图像块上进行傅里叶环相关性分析，来检测深度学习（DL）在医学影像重建中产生的幻觉（hallucinations）。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在医学影像重建中表现出色，但其输出可能包含幻觉，且缺乏易于使用的技术和鲁棒的指标来识别这些幻觉。
AI.method: 利用傅里叶环相关性（FRC）分析，在深度学习输出及其参考图像的小图像块上进行扫描，以检测幻觉（sFRC）。sFRC 的参数可以通过专家标注的幻觉特征或基于成像理论的幻觉图来设置。
AI.result: sFRC 在 CT 超分辨率、CT 稀疏视图和 MRI 欠采样重建等三个医学影像问题上被成功应用于检测幻觉。结果表明 sFRC 在 CT 问题上有效，并在 MR 问题上与基于成像理论的幻觉图一致。此外，sFRC 还被用于量化 DL 方法在不同数据分布和欠采样率下的幻觉率，并证明了其对传统正则化和先进展开方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: sFRC 是一种有效的方法，用于检测深度学习在医学影像重建中产生的幻觉，并可用于评估 DL 方法的鲁棒性。

title: Using Vision + Language Models to Predict Item Difficulty
summary: This project investigates the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) to determine the difficulty of data visualization literacy test items. We explore whether features derived from item text (question and answer options), the visualization image, or a combination of both can predict item difficulty (proportion of correct responses) for U.S. adults. We use GPT-4.1-nano to analyze items and generate predictions based on these distinct feature sets. The multimodal approach, using both visual and text features, yields the lowest mean absolute error (MAE) (0.224), outperforming the unimodal vision-only (0.282) and text-only (0.338) approaches. The best-performing multimodal model was applied to a held-out test set for external evaluation and achieved a mean squared error of 0.10805, demonstrating the potential of LLMs for psychometric analysis and automated item development.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用大型语言模型（LLMs）预测数据可视化素养测试题的难度，发现结合图像和文本特征的多模态方法效果最佳。
AI.motivation: 研究的动机是探索大型语言模型在评估数据可视化素养测试项目难度方面的能力，并为自动化项目开发提供支持。
AI.method: 研究使用了GPT-4.1-nano模型，并从测试题的文本（问题和选项）、可视化图像或两者的结合中提取特征，以预测题目难度（正确回答的比例）。
AI.result: 多模态方法（结合图像和文本特征）实现了最低的平均绝对误差（MAE）0.224，优于仅使用视觉特征（0.282）或仅使用文本特征（0.338）的方法。最佳的多模态模型在独立测试集上实现了0.10805的均方误差。
AI.conclusion: 结论是，大型语言模型（LLMs），特别是采用多模态方法时，在心理测量分析和自动化项目开发方面具有巨大潜力，能够有效预测数据可视化素养测试题的难度。

title: When Agents Persuade: Propaganda Generation and Mitigation in LLMs
comment: Accepted to the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Agents in the Wild (AgentWild). 20 pages including appendix, 3 figures
summary: Despite their wide-ranging benefits, LLM-based agents deployed in open environments can be exploited to produce manipulative material. In this study, we task LLMs with propaganda objectives and analyze their outputs using two domain-specific models: one that classifies text as propaganda or non-propaganda, and another that detects rhetorical techniques of propaganda (e.g., loaded language, appeals to fear, flag-waving, name-calling). Our findings show that, when prompted, LLMs exhibit propagandistic behaviors and use a variety of rhetorical techniques in doing so. We also explore mitigation via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), and ORPO (Odds Ratio Preference Optimization). We find that fine-tuning significantly reduces their tendency to generate such content, with ORPO proving most effective.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型（LLM）在开放环境中部署时可能被用于生成操纵性内容。本研究旨在通过设定宣传目标来探究LLM的宣传行为，并利用文本分类模型和修辞技术检测模型来分析其输出。研究发现，LLM在提示下确实会表现出宣传行为并运用多种修辞技巧。此外，研究还探索了通过SFT、DPO和ORPO进行缓解，结果表明微调能显著降低LLM生成此类内容的倾向，其中ORPO效果最佳。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）在开放环境中可能被滥用以生成操纵性内容，研究者希望了解LLM是否具备产生宣传内容的能力，并探索有效的缓解方法。
AI.method: 1. 设定宣传目标，让LLM生成内容。 2. 使用领域特定模型对LLM的输出进行分析，包括：a. 分类文本是否为宣传内容。 b. 检测宣传的修辞技巧（如煽动性语言、诉诸恐惧、挥舞国旗、侮辱性称呼等）。 3. 探索通过监督微调（SFT）、直接偏好优化（DPO）和ORPO（Odds Ratio Preference Optimization）进行缓解。
AI.result: LLM在被提示生成宣传内容时，确实会表现出宣传行为，并运用多种修辞技巧。经过微调（SFT、DPO、ORPO）后，LLM生成宣传内容的倾向显著降低，其中ORPO的缓解效果最为显著。
AI.conclusion: LLM在特定提示下能够生成具有宣传性质的内容，并使用多种修辞技巧。通过监督微调等方法可以有效减轻LLM生成此类内容的风险，其中ORPO是一种有效的缓解策略。

title: RoboMME: Benchmarking and Understanding Memory for Robotic Generalist Policies
summary: Memory is critical for long-horizon and history-dependent robotic manipulation. Such tasks often involve counting repeated actions or manipulating objects that become temporarily occluded. Recent vision-language-action (VLA) models have begun to incorporate memory mechanisms; however, their evaluations remain confined to narrow, non-standardized settings. This limits their systematic understanding, comparison, and progress measurement. To address these challenges, we introduce RoboMME: a large-scale standardized benchmark for evaluating and advancing VLA models in long-horizon, history-dependent scenarios. Our benchmark comprises 16 manipulation tasks constructed under a carefully designed taxonomy that evaluates temporal, spatial, object, and procedural memory. We further develop a suite of 14 memory-augmented VLA variants built on the π0.5 backbone to systematically explore different memory representations across multiple integration strategies. Experimental results show that the effectiveness of memory representations is highly task-dependent, with each design offering distinct advantages and limitations across different tasks. Videos and code can be found at our website https://robomme.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 RoboMME，一个大规模、标准化的基准，用于评估和改进机器人操作中长时序、依赖历史的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，并开发了14种内存增强型 VLA 模型来探索不同的内存表示方法。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在长时序、依赖历史的机器人操作任务评估上缺乏标准化，阻碍了理解、比较和进展衡量。
AI.method: 构建了包含16个操作任务的 RoboMME 基准，该基准根据时间、空间、对象和程序内存进行了分类。开发了14种基于 π0.5 主干的内存增强型 VLA 模型变体，以系统地探索不同内存表示和集成策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，内存表示的有效性高度依赖于具体任务，不同的设计在不同任务上展现出各自的优势和局限性。
AI.conclusion: RoboMME 是一个评估和推动 VLA 模型在长时序、依赖历史机器人操作领域发展的重要资源，并揭示了内存表示与任务之间复杂的依赖关系。

title: The Thinking Boundary: Quantifying Reasoning Suitability of Multimodal Tasks via Dual Tuning
summary: While reasoning-enhanced Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable advances in complex tasks such as mathematics and coding, their effectiveness across universal multimodal scenarios remains uncertain. The trend of releasing parallel "Instruct" and "Thinking" models by leading developers serves merely as a resource-intensive workaround, stemming from the lack of a criterion for determining when reasoning is truly beneficial. In this paper, we propose Dual Tuning, a framework designed to assess whether reasoning yields positive gains for target tasks under given base models and datasets. By jointly fine-tuning on paired Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Direct-Answer (DA) data under controlled prompts, we systematically quantify and compare the gains of both training modes using the proposed metrics, and establish the "Thinking Boundary" to evaluate the suitability of reasoning training across diverse multimodal tasks, including spatial, mathematical, and multi-disciplinary domains. We further explore the impact of reinforcement training and thinking patterns on reasoning suitability, and validate whether the "Thinking Boundary" can guide data refinement. Our findings challenge the "reasoning-for-all" paradigm, providing practical guidance for identifying appropriate data and training strategies, and motivating the development of resource-efficient, adaptive auto-think systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了Dual Tuning框架，用于评估在多模态任务中进行推理训练（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）是否能带来收益，并提出了“Thinking Boundary”来指导数据选择和训练策略，挑战了“为所有任务都进行推理”的普遍观念。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型（LLMs）在数学和编程等任务中表现出色，但在通用多模态场景下的推理能力仍不确定。当前流行的“Instruct”和“Thinking”模型并行发布的做法是一种资源浪费，根本原因在于缺乏判断推理何时真正有益的标准。
AI.method: 提出Dual Tuning框架，通过在配对的CoT和直接答案（DA）数据上进行联合微调，并使用受控提示，系统地量化和比较两种训练模式的收益。引入“Thinking Boundary”来评估推理训练在不同多模态任务（空间、数学、跨学科）上的适用性。此外，还探索了强化训练和思考模式对推理适用性的影响，并验证了“Thinking Boundary”是否能指导数据精炼。
AI.result: 研究发现，“Thinking Boundary”能够有效地评估推理训练的适用性。结果挑战了“为所有任务都进行推理”的普遍模式，证明了并非所有任务都适合进行推理训练。
AI.conclusion: Dual Tuning框架和“Thinking Boundary”为识别适合推理训练的任务和数据提供了实用的指导，并推动了资源高效、自适应的自动推理系统的发展，否定了“为所有任务都进行推理”的范式。

title: Autonomous Aerial Non-Destructive Testing: Ultrasound Inspection with a Commercial Quadrotor in an Unstructured Environment
summary: This work presents an integrated control and software architecture that enables arguably the first fully autonomous, contact-based non-destructive testing (NDT) using a commercial multirotor originally restricted to remotely-piloted operations. To allow autonomous operation with an off-the-shelf platform, we developed a real-time framework that interfaces directly with its onboard sensor suite. The architecture features a multi-rate control scheme: low-level control is executed at 200 Hz, force estimation at 100 Hz, while an admittance filter and trajectory planner operate at 50 Hz, ultimately supplying acceleration and yaw rate commands to the internal flight controller. We validate the system through physical experiments on a Flyability Elios 3 quadrotor equipped with an ultrasound payload. Relying exclusively on onboard sensing, the vehicle successfully performs autonomous NDT measurements within an unstructured, industrial-like environment. This work demonstrates the viability of retrofitting off-the-shelf platforms for autonomous physical interaction, paving the way for safe, contact-based inspection of hazardous and confined infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了一个集成控制和软件架构，实现了商用多旋翼无人机的全自主、接触式无损检测（NDT）。
AI.motivation: 实现商用多旋翼无人机的全自主、接触式无损检测，以安全地检查危险和狭窄的基础设施。
AI.method: 开发了一个实时框架，直接与无人机的板载传感器套件接口。采用了多速率控制方案：低层控制（200 Hz）、力估计（100 Hz）以及导纳滤波器和轨迹规划器（50 Hz）。
AI.result: 在装备超声波载荷的Flyability Elios 3四旋翼无人机上进行了物理实验验证，该无人机在非结构化的工业环境中成功执行了自主NDT测量。
AI.conclusion: 该系统展示了改装现成平台进行自主物理交互的可行性，为危险和狭窄基础设施的安全接触式检测铺平了道路。

title: Data-Driven Control of a Magnetically Actuated Fish-Like Robot
comment: Author's version of the paper presented at AROB-ISBC 2026
summary: Magnetically actuated fish-like robots offer promising solutions for underwater exploration due to their miniaturization and agility; however, precise control remains a significant challenge because of nonlinear fluid dynamics, flexible fin hysteresis, and the variable-duration control steps inherent to the actuation mechanism. This paper proposes a comprehensive data-driven control framework to address these complexities without relying on analytical modeling. Our methodology comprises three core components: 1) developing a forward dynamics model (FDM) using a neural network trained on real-world experimental data to capture state transitions under varying time steps; 2) integrating this FDM into a gradient-based model predictive control (G-MPC) architecture to optimize control inputs for path following; and 3) applying imitation learning to approximate the G-MPC policy, thereby reducing the computational cost for real-time implementation. We validate the approach through simulations utilizing the identified dynamics model. The results demonstrate that the G-MPC framework achieves accurate path convergence with minimal root mean square error (RMSE), and the imitation learning controller (ILC) effectively replicates this performance. This study highlights the potential of data-driven control strategies for the precise navigation of miniature, fish-like soft robots.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的控制框架，用于精确控制微型仿鱼软体机器人水下导航，通过神经网络前向动力学模型（FDM）结合梯度下降模型预测控制（G-MPC）和模仿学习（ILC）。
AI.motivation: 现有仿鱼机器人控制面临非线性流体动力学、柔性鳍迟滞和可变时长控制步长等挑战，难以实现精确控制。
AI.method: 1. 使用神经网络训练真实实验数据，构建前向动力学模型（FDM）。 2. 将FDM集成到梯度下降模型预测控制（G-MPC）框架中进行路径跟踪优化。 3. 应用模仿学习（ILC）来近似G-MPC策略，降低实时计算成本。
AI.result: G-MPC框架实现了精确的路径收敛，RMSE最小。模仿学习控制器（ILC）能够有效复现G-MPC的性能。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的控制策略，特别是本文提出的框架，在微型仿鱼软体机器人的精确导航方面具有巨大潜力。

title: Decoding the Pulse of Reasoning VLMs in Multi-Image Understanding Tasks
summary: Multi-image reasoning remains a significant challenge for vision-language models (VLMs). We investigate a previously overlooked phenomenon: during chain-of-thought (CoT) generation, the text-to-image (T2I) attention of reasoning VLMs exhibits diffuse "pulses": sporadic and unfocused attention patterns that fail to concentrate on task-relevant images. We further reveal a systematic positional bias in attention allocation across images. Motivated by these observations, we propose PulseFocus, a training-free, inference-time method that structures CoT reasoning into interleaved plan/focus blocks with soft attention gating. By forcing the model to explicitly plan which image to examine and then gating decode-time attention to the referenced image, PulseFocus sharpens attention focus and yields consistent improvements on multi-image benchmarks like BLINK benchmark (+3.7%) and MuirBench (+1.07%).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PulseFocus的推理方法，用于解决视觉语言模型（VLMs）在多图像推理时注意力分散的问题，通过结构化推理过程和软注意力门控，提高了模型在多图像任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 作者观察到，在多图像推理过程中，现有VLMs的文本到图像注意力模式分散且存在位置偏见，无法有效聚焦于任务相关图像，这阻碍了多图像推理的性能。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为PulseFocus的训练免费、推理时方法。该方法将CoT推理过程组织成“计划/聚焦”交替的模块，并使用软注意力门控机制。强制模型明确规划要检查的图像，然后将解码时的注意力门控到被引用的图像。
AI.result: PulseFocus在多图像基准测试（如BLINK和MuirBench）上取得了显著的性能提升，分别提高了3.7%和1.07%。
AI.conclusion: PulseFocus通过结构化推理过程和聚焦注意力，有效解决了VLMs在多图像推理中的注意力分散问题，并提高了模型在相关任务上的准确性。

title: Optimizing What We Trust: Reliability-Guided QUBO Selection of Multi-Agent Weak Framing Signals for Arabic Sentiment Prediction
summary: Framing detection in Arabic social media is difficult due to interpretive ambiguity, cultural grounding, and limited reliable supervision. Existing LLM-based weak supervision methods typically rely on label aggregation, which is brittle when annotations are few and socially dependent. We propose a reliability-aware weak supervision framework that shifts the focus from label fusion to data curation. A small multi-agent LLM pipeline, two framers, a critic, and a discriminator, treats disagreement and reasoning quality as epistemic signals and produces instance-level reliability estimates. These estimates guide a QUBO-based subset selection procedure that enforces frame balance while reducing redundancy. Intrinsic diagnostics and an out-of-domain Arabic sentiment transfer test show that the selected subsets are more reliable and encode non-random, transferable structure, without degrading strong text-only baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的阿拉伯语社交媒体框架检测方法，通过多智能体LLM流水线生成实例级别的可靠性估计，并利用这些估计进行数据精选，以提高框架检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语社交媒体的框架检测面临解释歧义、文化背景和有限的可靠监督等挑战。现有的基于LLM的弱监督方法在标注数据少且依赖社会因素的情况下表现脆弱。
AI.method: 提出一个可靠性感知弱监督框架，包括一个多智能体LLM流水线（两个框架生成器、一个评论家和一个鉴别器）。该流水线利用不一致性和推理质量作为认知信号，生成实例级别的可靠性估计。然后，利用QUBO（二次无约束二元优化）子集选择程序，根据这些可靠性估计来平衡框架，同时减少冗余。
AI.result: 所选取的子集比原始数据更可靠，并编码了非随机、可迁移的结构，同时没有损害纯文本基线模型的性能。在阿拉伯语情感转移测试中也取得了良好的效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过将重点从标签融合转移到数据精选，并利用可靠性估计来指导子集选择，有效地解决了阿拉伯语社交媒体框架检测的挑战，提高了方法的鲁棒性和可迁移性。

title: U-OBCA: Uncertainty-Aware Optimization-Based Collision Avoidance via Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Chance Constraints
summary: Uncertainties arising from localization error, trajectory prediction errors of the moving obstacles and environmental disturbances pose significant challenges to robot's safe navigation. Existing uncertainty-aware planners often approximate polygon-shaped robots and obstacles using simple geometric primitives such as circles or ellipses. Though computationally convenient, these approximations substantially shrink the feasible space, leading to overly conservative trajectories and even planning failure in narrow environments. In addition, many such methods rely on specific assumptions about noise distributions, which may not hold in practice and thus limit their performance guarantees. To address these limitations, we extend the Optimization-Based Collision Avoidance (OBCA) framework to an uncertainty-aware formulation, termed \emph{U-OBCA}. The proposed method explicitly accounts for the collision risk between polygon-shaped robots and obstacles by formulating OBCA-based chance constraints, and hence avoiding geometric simplifications and reducing unnecessary conservatism. These probabilistic constraints are further tightened into deterministic nonlinear constraints under mild distributional assumptions, which can be solved efficiently by standard numerical optimization solvers. The proposed approach is validated through theoretical analysis, numerical simulations and real-world experiments. The results demonstrate that U-OBCA significantly mitigates the conservatism in trajectory planning and achieves higher navigation efficiency compared to existing baseline methods, particularly in narrow and cluttered environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 U-OBCA 的不确定性感知机器人安全导航方法，通过显式考虑多边形机器人和障碍物之间的碰撞风险，避免了使用简化的几何形状，从而减少了不必要的保守性，提高了导航效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法为了计算方便，将机器人和障碍物近似为圆形或椭圆形，导致可行空间缩小，轨迹过于保守，甚至在狭窄环境中规划失败。此外，许多方法依赖于不切实际的噪声分布假设，限制了性能保证。
AI.method: 将基于优化的碰撞避免 (OBCA) 框架扩展为不确定性感知框架 (U-OBCA)。该方法通过建立基于 OBCA 的概率约束来显式处理多边形机器人和障碍物之间的碰撞风险，从而避免几何简化并减少保守性。在温和的分布假设下，这些概率约束被转化为确定性非线性约束，并使用标准数值优化求解器求解。
AI.result: U-OBCA 在理论分析、数值模拟和真实世界实验中得到了验证。结果表明，与现有基线方法相比，U-OBCA 显著降低了轨迹规划的保守性，提高了导航效率，尤其是在狭窄和杂乱的环境中。
AI.conclusion: U-OBCA 是一种有效的不确定性感知机器人导航方法，通过显式处理不确定性和碰撞风险，克服了现有方法的局限性，在实际应用中展现出优越的性能。

title: A Benchmark Study of Neural Network Compression Methods for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Deep neural networks have achieved strong performance in image classification tasks due to their ability to learn complex patterns from high-dimensional data. However, their large computational and memory requirements often limit deployment on resource-constrained platforms such as remote sensing devices and edge systems. Network compression techniques have therefore been proposed to reduce model size and computational cost while maintaining predictive performance. In this study, we conduct a systematic evaluation of neural network compression methods for a remote sensing application, namely hyperspectral land cover classification. Specifically, we examine three widely used compression strategies for convolutional neural networks: pruning, quantization, and knowledge distillation. Experiments are conducted on two benchmark hyperspectral datasets, considering classification accuracy, memory consumption, and inference efficiency. Our results demonstrate that compressed models can significantly reduce model size and computational cost while maintaining competitive classification performance. These findings provide insights into the trade-offs between compression ratio, efficiency, and accuracy, and highlight the potential of compression techniques for enabling efficient deep learning deployment in remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了三种卷积神经网络压缩技术（剪枝、量化和知识蒸馏）在高光谱遥感土地覆盖分类任务中的应用效果，结果表明压缩模型能在保证分类性能的同时显著减小模型尺寸和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在高维数据学习上表现优异，但在计算和内存需求方面限制了其在资源受限平台（如遥感设备和边缘系统）上的部署。因此，需要网络压缩技术来减小模型尺寸和计算成本。
AI.method: 对三种广泛使用的卷积神经网络压缩策略（剪枝、量化、知识蒸馏）进行系统评估，并在两个高光谱数据集上进行实验，分析分类精度、内存消耗和推理效率。
AI.result: 压缩模型能够显著减小模型尺寸和计算成本，同时保持具有竞争力的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 压缩技术在遥感应用中实现高效深度学习部署具有潜力，本文的研究为压缩率、效率和准确性之间的权衡提供了见解。

title: From Offline to Periodic Adaptation for Pose-Based Shoplifting Detection in Real-world Retail Security
summary: Shoplifting is a growing operational and economic challenge for retailers, with incidents rising and losses increasing despite extensive video surveillance. Continuous human monitoring is infeasible, motivating automated, privacy-preserving, and resource-aware detection solutions. In this paper, we cast shoplifting detection as a pose-based, unsupervised video anomaly detection problem and introduce a periodic adaptation framework designed for on-site Internet of Things (IoT) deployment. Our approach enables edge devices in smart retail environments to adapt from streaming, unlabeled data, supporting scalable and low-latency anomaly detection across distributed camera networks. To support reproducibility, we introduce RetailS, a new large-scale real-world shoplifting dataset collected from a retail store under multi-day, multi-camera conditions, capturing unbiased shoplifting behavior in realistic IoT settings. For deployable operation, thresholds are selected using both F1 and H_PRS scores, the harmonic mean of precision, recall, and specificity, during data filtering and training. In periodic adaptation experiments, our framework consistently outperformed offline baselines on AUC-ROC and AUC-PR in 91.6% of evaluations, with each training update completing in under 30 minutes on edge-grade hardware, demonstrating the feasibility and reliability of our solution for IoT-enabled smart retail deployment.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种基于姿态的无监督视频异常检测框架，用于在零售环境中的物联网设备上进行自动、隐私保护的盗窃检测，并在新的大规模真实数据集RetailS上进行了评估，结果显示其性能优于离线基线。
AI.motivation: 零售业面临着日益严峻的盗窃问题，而现有的人工监控成本高昂且不可持续，因此需要一种自动化的、能保护隐私且资源可控的盗窃检测解决方案。
AI.method: 将盗窃检测视为一个基于姿态的无监督视频异常检测问题，并引入一个周期性适应框架，允许物联网设备从流式、无标签数据中进行学习和适应，从而实现分布式摄像头网络的低延迟异常检测。使用F1和H_PRS分数来选择阈值。引入了一个名为RetailS的新大规模真实盗窃数据集。
AI.result: 所提出的周期性适应框架在AUC-ROC和AUC-PR指标上，在91.6%的评估中持续优于离线基线。每次训练更新在边缘级硬件上完成时间少于30分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的框架在物联网支持的智能零售部署中是可行且可靠的，能够实现高效、可扩展且低延迟的盗窃检测。

title: Model Medicine: A Clinical Framework for Understanding, Diagnosing, and Treating AI Models
summary: Model Medicine is the science of understanding, diagnosing, treating, and preventing disorders in AI models, grounded in the principle that AI models -- like biological organisms -- have internal structures, dynamic processes, heritable traits, observable symptoms, classifiable conditions, and treatable states. This paper introduces Model Medicine as a research program, bridging the gap between current AI interpretability research (anatomical observation) and the systematic clinical practice that complex AI systems increasingly require. We present five contributions: (1) a discipline taxonomy organizing 15 subdisciplines across four divisions -- Basic Model Sciences, Clinical Model Sciences, Model Public Health, and Model Architectural Medicine; (2) the Four Shell Model (v3.3), a behavioral genetics framework empirically grounded in 720 agents and 24,923 decisions from the Agora-12 program, explaining how model behavior emerges from Core--Shell interaction; (3) Neural MRI (Model Resonance Imaging), a working open-source diagnostic tool mapping five medical neuroimaging modalities to AI interpretability techniques, validated through four clinical cases demonstrating imaging, comparison, localization, and predictive capability; (4) a five-layer diagnostic framework for comprehensive model assessment; and (5) clinical model sciences including the Model Temperament Index for behavioral profiling, Model Semiology for symptom description, and M-CARE for standardized case reporting. We additionally propose the Layered Core Hypothesis -- a biologically-inspired three-layer parameter architecture -- and a therapeutic framework connecting diagnosis to treatment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了“模型医学”这一新研究领域，旨在系统化地理解、诊断、治疗和预防AI模型中的故障，借鉴了生物医学的临床实践方法。研究内容包括学科分类、行为遗传学框架（四壳模型）、诊断工具（神经MRI）、诊断框架和临床模型科学的各个方面，并提出了层核假说和治疗框架。
AI.motivation: 当前的AI可解释性研究主要停留在“解剖学观察”层面，无法满足日益复杂的AI系统所需的系统性临床实践。作者认为AI模型与生物有机体类似，具有内部结构、动态过程、遗传特征、可观察症状等，因此需要一种更全面的、借鉴医学临床实践的研究方法来解决AI模型的问题。
AI.method: 本文通过构建“模型医学”这一研究项目，提出了多方面的贡献：1. 建立了一个包含15个子学科的学科分类体系；2. 提出了基于720个智能体和24,923次决策的“四壳模型”（v3.3），解释模型行为的产生机制；3. 开发了开源诊断工具“Neural MRI”（模型共振成像），将医学影像学模态映射到AI可解释性技术，并验证了其在四个案例中的诊断能力；4. 提出了一个五层诊断框架；5. 介绍了临床模型科学的组成部分，如模型气质指数、模型符号学和M-CARE标准化报告系统。此外，还提出了“层核假说”和连接诊断与治疗的理论框架。
AI.result: 研究构建了一个跨越基础模型科学、临床模型科学、模型公共卫生和模型建筑医学的学科体系。提出的“四壳模型”能够解释模型行为的涌现。开源工具Neural MRI被验证具备成像、对比、定位和预测能力。模型气质指数、模型符号学和M-CARE等临床工具被开发出来。
AI.conclusion: 模型医学是一个新兴的研究领域，它通过借鉴生物医学的临床实践，为理解、诊断、治疗和预防AI模型中的故障提供了一个系统性的框架。该研究为AI模型的可解释性、诊断和治疗开辟了新的方向，并提供了一系列工具和理论支持。

title: GIANT - Global Path Integration and Attentive Graph Networks for Multi-Agent Trajectory Planning
comment: Published in: 2025 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
summary: This paper presents a novel approach to multi-robot collision avoidance that integrates global path planning with local navigation strategies, utilizing attentive graph neural networks to manage dynamic interactions among agents. We introduce a local navigation model that leverages pre-planned global paths, allowing robots to adhere to optimal routes while dynamically adjusting to environmental changes. The models robustness is enhanced through the introduction of noise during training, resulting in superior performance in complex, dynamic environments. Our approach is evaluated against established baselines, including NH-ORCA, DRL-NAV, and GA3C-CADRL, across various structurally diverse simulated scenarios. The results demonstrate that our model achieves consistently higher success rates, lower collision rates, and more efficient navigation, particularly in challenging scenarios where baseline models struggle. This work offers an advancement in multi-robot navigation, with implications for robust performance in complex, dynamic environments with varying degrees of complexity, such as those encountered in logistics, where adaptability is essential for accommodating unforeseen obstacles and unpredictable changes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的多机器人避障方法，结合了全局路径规划和局部导航策略，并利用图神经网络处理动态交互，在复杂动态环境中表现优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 应对复杂动态环境中多机器人导航的挑战，提高避障和路径规划的鲁棒性和效率。
AI.method: 结合全局路径规划和局部导航策略，利用图神经网络处理机器人间的动态交互，并通过在训练中引入噪声来增强模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在各种模拟场景中，与NH-ORCA、DRL-NAV和GA3C-CADRL等基线方法相比，本文提出的模型实现了更高的成功率、更低的碰撞率和更有效的导航，尤其在复杂场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多机器人导航方面取得了进展，尤其适用于需要高度适应性的物流等复杂动态环境，能够有效应对不可预见的障碍和变化。

title: Same Input, Different Scores: A Multi Model Study on the Inconsistency of LLM Judge
summary: Large language models are increasingly used as automated evaluators in research and enterprise settings, a practice known as LLM-as-a-judge. While prior work has examined accuracy, bias, and alignment with human preferences, far less attention has been given to how consistently LLMs assign numerical scores, an important concern for many production workflows. This study systematically evaluates scoring stability across five commonly used models, GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.5-Flash, Claude-Haiku-4.5, and Claude-Sonnet-4.5, two temperature settings, and real enterprise question-answer pairs drawn from a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system. We address three questions: how stable a model's scores are across repeated runs, how differently models score identical inputs, and how temperature affects scoring consistency. Temperature controls the determinism of an LLM's output. Despite expectations of stability at temperature=0, we observe substantial variability across models, with completeness scoring showing the largest fluctuations. Cross-model comparisons reveal systematic differences in strictness and interpretive style, leading to divergent ratings for the same answers. Lower temperatures improve stability for some models, notably GPT-4o and Gemini, but have limited or inconsistent effects for Anthropic models. These findings have important implications for enterprise pipelines that rely on LLM-generated scores for routing, triage, gating, or quality control. Identical inputs can receive different scores depending on model, family, or temperature, raising concerns around fairness, reproducibility, and operational reliability. Our results highlight the need for monitoring, robust parsing, and hybrid human-LLM evaluation strategies to ensure dependable use of LLM-as-a-judge in production environments.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了五种常用大型语言模型（LLM）在不同温度设置下，对企业问答对进行评分时的一致性。结果表明，即使在温度为0时，LLM评分也存在显著变异性，模型间评分标准存在系统性差异，且温度对不同模型的评分一致性影响不一。这给依赖LLM评分的企业应用带来了公平性、可复现性和可靠性方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）作为自动化评估者的使用日益普遍，但其数值评分的一致性却鲜少得到关注，而这对于许多生产流程至关重要。
AI.method: 研究人员系统性地评估了五种常用LLM（GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.5-Flash, Claude-Haiku-4.5, and Claude-Sonnet-4.5）在两种温度设置（包括温度=0）下，对真实企业检索增强生成（RAG）系统产生的问答对进行评分的稳定性。研究关注三个问题：模型在重复运行中的评分稳定性、模型间对相同输入的评分差异，以及温度对评分一致性的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，即使在温度=0时，LLM评分也存在显著的变异性，其中完整性评分的波动最大。不同模型对相同输入的评分存在系统性差异，表现出不同的严格程度和解释风格。较低的温度设置能提高GPT-4o和Gemini的评分稳定性，但对Anthropic的模型效果有限或不一致。
AI.conclusion: 本研究结果强调，在依赖LLM生成的分数进行企业流程（如路由、分流、准入或质量控制）时，必须考虑模型、模型系列和温度设置带来的评分不一致性，这可能引发公平性、可复现性和操作可靠性问题。因此，需要进行监控、鲁棒解析以及结合人类评估的混合策略，以确保LLM作为评估者在生产环境中的可靠使用。

title: From Code to Road: A Vehicle-in-the-Loop and Digital Twin-Based Framework for Central Car Server Testing in Autonomous Driving
comment: 8 pages; Accepted for publication at the 37th IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), Detroit, MI, United States, June 22-25, 2026
summary: Simulation is one of the most essential parts in the development stage of automotive software. However, purely virtual simulations often struggle to accurately capture all real-world factors due to limitations in modeling. To address this challenge, this work presents a test framework for automotive software on the centralized E/E architecture, which is a central car server in our case, based on Vehicle-in-the-Loop (ViL) and digital twin technology. The framework couples a physical test vehicle on a dynamometer test bench with its synchronized virtual counterpart in a simulation environment. Our approach provides a safe, reproducible, realistic, and cost-effective platform for validating autonomous driving algorithms with a centralized architecture. This test method eliminates the need to test individual physical ECUs and their communication protocols separately. In contrast to traditional ViL methods, the proposed framework runs the full autonomous driving software directly on the vehicle hardware after the simulation process, eliminating flashing and intermediate layers while enabling seamless virtual-physical integration and accurately reflecting centralized E/E behavior. In addition, incorporating mixed testing in both simulated and physical environments reduces the need for full hardware integration during the early stages of automotive development. Experimental case studies demonstrate the effectiveness of the framework in different test scenarios. These findings highlight the potential to reduce development and integration efforts for testing autonomous driving pipelines in the future.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于车在环（ViL）和数字孪生技术的汽车软件测试框架，用于集中式E/E架构，可实现安全、可重复、逼真且经济高效的自动驾驶算法验证。
AI.motivation: 纯虚拟仿真在捕捉现实世界因素方面存在局限性，需要更准确的测试方法来验证汽车软件，特别是自动驾驶算法。
AI.method: 该框架将测功机上的物理测试车辆与其在仿真环境中的同步虚拟对应物耦合，利用ViL和数字孪生技术。
AI.result: 该框架能够直接在车辆硬件上运行完整的自动驾驶软件，无需单独测试ECU或闪存，实现了虚拟与物理的无缝集成，并准确反映了集中式E/E行为。实验表明该框架在不同测试场景下都有效。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为集中式E/E架构下的汽车软件（尤其是自动驾驶算法）提供了一个安全、可重复、逼真且经济高效的测试平台，并有望减少未来的开发和集成工作量。

title: Python Bindings for a Large C++ Robotics Library: The Case of OMPL
summary: Python bindings are a critical bridge between high-performance C++ libraries and the flexibility of Python, enabling rapid prototyping, reproducible experiments, and integration with simulation and learning frameworks in robotics research. Yet, generating bindings for large codebases is a tedious process that creates a heavy burden for a small group of maintainers. In this work, we investigate the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) to assist in generating nanobind wrappers, with human experts kept in the loop. Our workflow mirrors the structure of the C++ codebase, scaffolds empty wrapper files, and employs LLMs to fill in binding definitions. Experts then review and refine the generated code to ensure correctness, compatibility, and performance. Through a case study on a large C++ motion planning library, we document common failure modes, including mismanaging shared pointers, overloads, and trampolines, and show how in-context examples and careful prompt design improve reliability. Experiments demonstrate that the resulting bindings achieve runtime performance comparable to legacy solutions. Beyond this case study, our results provide general lessons for applying LLMs to binding generation in large-scale C++ projects.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何使用大型语言模型（LLMs）辅助生成 C++ 到 Python 的 nanobind 绑定，通过专家审查和优化，实现了与手动编写的绑定相当的运行时性能。
AI.motivation: 为大型 C++ 代码库生成 Python 绑定的过程繁琐且耗时，给维护者带来沉重负担。研究旨在减轻这一负担，提高效率。
AI.method: 采用一种工作流程，该流程模仿 C++ 代码库结构，生成空的绑定文件，并利用 LLMs 填充绑定定义。然后，人类专家审查和修改生成的代码，确保正确性、兼容性和性能。通过案例研究，研究了提示设计和上下文示例对 LLMs 准确性的影响。
AI.result: 在对一个大型 C++ 运动规划库进行案例研究后，发现了 LLMs 在处理共享指针、重载和跳板（trampolines）等方面的常见失败模式。通过优化提示和提供上下文示例，显著提高了生成绑定的可靠性。实验表明，生成的绑定在运行时性能上与传统的解决方案相当。
AI.conclusion: LLMs 可以有效地辅助生成 C++ 到 Python 的 nanobind 绑定，在人类专家指导下，能够生成性能可比的绑定，并为将 LLMs 应用于大规模 C++ 项目的绑定生成提供了通用的经验教训。

title: Solving an Open Problem in Theoretical Physics using AI-Assisted Discovery
summary: This paper demonstrates that artificial intelligence can accelerate mathematical discovery by autonomously solving an open problem in theoretical physics. We present a neuro-symbolic system, combining the Gemini Deep Think large language model with a systematic Tree Search (TS) framework and automated numerical feedback, that successfully derived novel, exact analytical solutions for the power spectrum of gravitational radiation emitted by cosmic strings. Specifically, the agent evaluated the core integral $I(N,α)$ for arbitrary loop geometries, directly improving upon recent AI-assisted attempts \cite{BCE+25} that only yielded partial asymptotic solutions. To substantiate our methodological claims regarding AI-accelerated discovery and to ensure transparency, we detail system prompts, search constraints, and intermittent feedback loops that guided the model. The agent identified a suite of 6 different analytical methods, the most elegant of which expands the kernel in Gegenbauer polynomials $C_l^{(3/2)}$ to naturally absorb the integrand's singularities. The methods lead to an asymptotic result for $I(N,α)$ at large $N$ that both agrees with numerical results and also connects to the continuous Feynman parameterization of Quantum Field Theory. We detail both the algorithmic methodology that enabled this discovery and the resulting mathematical derivations.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了人工智能如何通过自主解决理论物理中的一个开放性数学问题来加速数学发现。研究人员开发了一个结合了大型语言模型（Gemini Deep Think）、系统搜索框架（TS）和数值反馈的神经符号系统，成功为宇宙弦发出的引力辐射功率谱推导出了新颖、精确的解析解，该解能够处理任意环形几何。
AI.motivation: 现有AI辅助方法在解决宇宙弦功率谱问题时仅得到部分渐近解，本文旨在通过自主AI系统解决该开放性数学问题，并加速数学发现。
AI.method: 构建了一个神经符号系统，该系统结合了Gemini Deep Think大型语言模型、系统搜索（TS）框架以及自动数值反馈。系统通过详细的提示、搜索约束和间歇性反馈循环来指导模型。
AI.result: 该AI系统成功推导出了宇宙弦发出的引力辐射功率谱的解析解，特别是解决了任意环形几何下核心积分$I(N,α)$的计算问题，改进了先前仅获得部分渐近解的AI辅助方法。系统发现了6种不同的解析方法，其中一种方法通过Gegenbauer多项式$C_l^{(3/2)}$展开核函数，自然地吸收了被积函数的奇点，并得到了与数值结果一致且与量子场论连续Feynman参数化相连的$I(N,α)$大N渐近结果。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能（特别是本文提出的神经符号系统）能够自主解决理论物理中的开放性数学问题，并加速数学发现。该系统成功推导出了宇宙弦引力辐射功率谱的精确解析解，并提出了一种有效的数学推导方法。

title: Curve-Induced Dynamical Systems on Riemannian Manifolds and Lie Groups
comment: Preprint, 14 pages, video linked in the paper, Saray Bakker and Martin Schonger contributed equally as first authors and are listed alphabetically
summary: Deploying robots in household environments requires safe, adaptable, and interpretable behaviors that respect the geometric structure of tasks. Often represented on Lie groups and Riemannian manifolds, this includes poses on SE(3) or symmetric positive definite matrices encoding stiffness or damping matrices. In this context, dynamical system-based approaches offer a natural framework for generating such behavior, providing stability and convergence while remaining responsive to changes in the environment. We introduce Curve-induced Dynamical systems on Smooth Manifolds (CDSM), a real-time framework for constructing dynamical systems directly on Riemannian manifolds and Lie groups. The proposed approach constructs a nominal curve on the manifold, and generates a dynamical system which combines a tangential component that drives motion along the curve and a normal component that attracts the state toward the curve. We provide a stability analysis of the resulting dynamical system and validate the method quantitatively. On an S2 benchmark, CDSM demonstrates improved trajectory accuracy, reduced path deviation, and faster generation and query times compared to state-of-the-art methods. Finally, we demonstrate the practical applicability of the framework on both a robotic manipulator, where poses on SE(3) and damping matrices on SPD(n) are adapted online, and a mobile manipulator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 CDSM (Curve-induced Dynamical Systems on Smooth Manifolds) 的新框架，用于在李群和黎曼流形上实时生成机器人行为。该框架通过构造一条名义曲线，并结合沿曲线的切向运动和朝向曲线的法向吸引力来驱动动力学系统，从而实现安全、适应性强且可解释的机器人行为。
AI.motivation: 在家庭环境中部署机器人需要安全、适应性强且可解释的行为，这些行为需要尊重任务的几何结构。黎曼流形和李群（如 SE(3) 或 SPD(n)）提供了表示这些结构（例如位姿或刚度矩阵）的自然数学框架。现有的基于动力学系统的方法可以生成这些行为，但需要一种方法来直接在这些流形上构建这些系统。
AI.method: CDSM 框架通过以下步骤构建动力学系统：1. 在黎曼流形或李群上构造一条名义曲线。2. 生成一个动力学系统，该系统包含一个驱动状态沿曲线运动的切向分量和一个将状态吸引到曲线上的法向分量。3. 对生成的动力学系统进行稳定性分析，并进行定量验证。
AI.result: 在 S2 基准测试中，CDSM 在轨迹精度、路径偏差和生成/查询时间方面优于现有技术。在机器人操作器和移动机器人上的实际演示表明，该框架可以在线适应 SE(3) 上的位姿和 SPD(n) 上的阻尼矩阵。
AI.conclusion: CDSM 是一个在李群和黎曼流形上实时构造动力学系统的框架，可以生成安全、适应性强且可解释的机器人行为。该方法在轨迹精度和效率方面均表现出优越性，并已成功应用于实际机器人任务。

title: Context-Dependent Affordance Computation in Vision-Language Models
comment: 31 pages, 8 tables, 4 figures, 43 references. Code available at: https://github.com/studiofarzulla/semantic-vision
summary: We characterize the phenomenon of context-dependent affordance computation in vision-language models (VLMs). Through a large-scale computational study (n=3,213 scene-context pairs from COCO-2017) using Qwen-VL 30B and LLaVA-1.5-13B subject to systematic context priming across 7 agentic personas, we demonstrate massive affordance drift: mean Jaccard similarity between context conditions is 0.095 (95% CI: [0.093, 0.096], p < 0.0001), indicating that >90% of lexical scene description is context-dependent. Sentence-level cosine similarity confirms substantial drift at the semantic level (mean = 0.415, 58.5% context-dependent). Stochastic baseline experiments (2,384 inference runs across 4 temperatures and 5 seeds) confirm this drift reflects genuine context effects rather than generation noise: within-prime variance is substantially lower than cross-prime variance across all conditions. Tucker decomposition with bootstrap stability analysis (n=1,000 resamples) reveals stable orthogonal latent factors: a "Culinary Manifold" isolated to chef contexts and an "Access Axis" spanning child-mobility contrasts. These findings establish that VLMs compute affordances in a substantially context-dependent manner -- with the difference between lexical (90%) and semantic (58.5%) measures reflecting that surface vocabulary changes more than underlying meaning under context shifts -- and suggest a direction for robotics research: dynamic, query-dependent ontological projection (JIT Ontology) rather than static world modeling. We do not claim to establish processing order or architectural primacy; such claims require internal representational analysis beyond output behavior.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过大规模计算实验，表明视觉语言模型（VLMs）在计算物体潜在用途（affordances）时，会受到上下文提示的显著影响，导致描述的词汇和语义发生漂移。研究发现了与“烹饪”和“可达性”相关的稳定潜在因素，并提出了动态、即时本体投影（JIT Ontology）作为机器人研究的新方向。
AI.motivation: 研究者希望理解视觉语言模型（VLMs）如何计算物体在不同情境下的潜在用途（affordances），特别是上下文提示对这一计算过程的影响。
AI.method: 研究使用了Qwen-VL 30B和LLaVA-1.5-13B模型，在COCO-2017数据集上进行了大规模计算实验（3,213个场景-上下文对），通过7种代理人（agentic personas）的上下文提示来系统地研究潜在用途的漂移。通过计算词汇描述的Jaccard相似度和句子级别的余弦相似度来量化漂移。此外，还进行了随机基线实验（2,384次推理）和Tucker分解与bootstrap稳定性分析（1,000次重采样）来验证结果并提取潜在因素。
AI.result: 结果显示，VLMs的潜在用途计算存在大规模的“漂移”。词汇层面，不同上下文条件下描述的平均Jaccard相似度仅为0.095，表明超过90%的词汇描述是依赖上下文的。语义层面，句子级别的余弦相似度平均为0.415，也有58.5%的内容是依赖上下文的。研究发现了两个稳定的正交潜在因素：“烹饪流形”（与厨师上下文相关）和“可达性轴”（与儿童移动能力对比相关）。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了VLMs在计算潜在用途时，其输出在很大程度上是依赖上下文的。词汇层面的漂移（90%）大于语义层面的漂移（58.5%），表明词汇会比底层含义更容易在上下文变化下发生改变。研究建议机器人研究应转向动态的、依赖查询的即时本体投影（JIT Ontology），而非静态的世界模型。

title: Are Multimodal LLMs Ready for Surveillance? A Reality Check on Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection in the Wild
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive general competence in video understanding, yet their reliability for real-world Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) remains largely unexplored. Unlike conventional pipelines relying on reconstruction or pose-based cues, MLLMs enable a paradigm shift: treating anomaly detection as a language-guided reasoning task. In this work, we systematically evaluate state-of-the-art MLLMs on the ShanghaiTech and CHAD benchmarks by reformulating VAD as a binary classification task under weak temporal supervision. We investigate how prompt specificity and temporal window lengths (1s--3s) influence performance, focusing on the precision--recall trade-off. Our findings reveal a pronounced conservative bias in zero-shot settings; while models exhibit high confidence, they disproportionately favor the 'normal' class, resulting in high precision but a recall collapse that limits practical utility. We demonstrate that class-specific instructions can significantly shift this decision boundary, improving the peak F1-score on ShanghaiTech from 0.09 to 0.64, yet recall remains a critical bottleneck. These results highlight a significant performance gap for MLLMs in noisy environments and provide a foundation for future work in recall-oriented prompting and model calibration for open-world surveillance, which demands complex video understanding and reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了大型多模态语言模型（MLLMs）在视频异常检测（VAD）任务上的表现，发现它们在零样本设置下存在保守偏见，倾向于将事件判定为正常，导致召回率低。虽然通过特定指令可以提高性能，但召回率仍是关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型多模态语言模型（MLLMs）在视频理解方面表现出色，但其在现实世界视频异常检测（VAD）任务中的可靠性尚未得到充分研究。研究者希望探索将VAD视为一种语言引导的推理任务的新范式。
AI.method: 研究者在ShanghaiTech和CHAD数据集上，将VAD任务重构为弱时序监督下的二元分类任务，并系统评估了最先进的MLLMs。他们研究了提示的特异性和时序窗口长度（1-3秒）对性能的影响，特别是精确率-召回率的权衡。通过类特定的指令来调整模型的决策边界。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下，MLLMs表现出明显的保守偏见，倾向于将事件判定为“正常”类别，从而导致高精确率但召回率大幅下降，限制了其实际应用。通过类特定的指令，ShanghaiTech数据集上的峰值F1分数从0.09提高到0.64，但召回率仍然是关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs在嘈杂环境下的VAD任务存在显著的性能差距。研究为未来在开放世界监控场景中进行面向召回率的提示设计和模型校准奠定了基础，这类场景需要复杂的视频理解和推理能力。

title: Interactive Benchmarks
summary: Standard benchmarks have become increasingly unreliable due to saturation, subjectivity, and poor generalization. We argue that evaluating model's ability to acquire information actively is important to assess model's intelligence. We propose Interactive Benchmarks, a unified evaluation paradigm that assesses model's reasoning ability in an interactive process under budget constraints. We instantiate this framework across two settings: Interactive Proofs, where models interact with a judge to deduce objective truths or answers in logic and mathematics; and Interactive Games, where models reason strategically to maximize long-horizon utilities. Our results show that interactive benchmarks provide a robust and faithful assessment of model intelligence, revealing that there is still substantial room to improve in interactive scenarios. Project page: https://github.com/interactivebench/interactivebench

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为“交互式基准”的统一评估范式，以克服标准基准的局限性，通过交互过程和预算约束来评估模型的智能，尤其是在逻辑、数学和策略游戏等领域。
AI.motivation: 标准基准在评估模型智能方面变得不可靠，存在饱和、主观和泛化能力差等问题。作者认为主动获取信息的能力是评估模型智能的关键。
AI.method: 提出“交互式基准”这一统一评估范式，通过模型与“裁判”的交互过程，在预算约束下评估模型的推理能力。该范式包含两个具体场景：交互式证明（用于逻辑和数学推理）和交互式游戏（用于策略推理）。
AI.result: 交互式基准能够提供对模型智能的更可靠和更准确的评估。结果表明，在交互式场景下，现有模型仍有很大的改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 交互式基准是一种有效的评估模型智能的方法，能够更真实地反映模型的学习和推理能力，并揭示了当前模型在交互式任务中的不足。

title: Do Mixed-Vendor Multi-Agent LLMs Improve Clinical Diagnosis?
comment: Accepted as Oral at the EACL 2026 Workshop on Healthcare and Language Learning (HeaLing)
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems have emerged as a promising approach for clinical diagnosis, leveraging collaboration among agents to refine medical reasoning. However, most existing frameworks rely on single-vendor teams (e.g., multiple agents from the same model family), which risk correlated failure modes that reinforce shared biases rather than correcting them. We investigate the impact of vendor diversity by comparing Single-LLM, Single-Vendor, and Mixed-Vendor Multi-Agent Conversation (MAC) frameworks. Using three doctor agents instantiated with o4-mini, Gemini-2.5-Pro, and Claude-4.5-Sonnet, we evaluate performance on RareBench and DiagnosisArena. Mixed-vendor configurations consistently outperform single-vendor counterparts, achieving state-of-the-art recall and accuracy. Overlap analysis reveals the underlying mechanism: mixed-vendor teams pool complementary inductive biases, surfacing correct diagnoses that individual models or homogeneous teams collectively miss. These results highlight vendor diversity as a key design principle for robust clinical diagnostic systems.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，在临床诊断的多智能体大语言模型系统中，引入不同供应商的大语言模型（混合供应商）能够有效提高诊断的召回率和准确性，优于单一供应商或单一模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型临床诊断系统多采用单一供应商的模型团队，容易导致模型之间的失败模式相关联，从而加剧而非纠正模型偏见。作者旨在探究供应商多样性对这类系统性能的影响。
AI.method: 作者比较了三种多智能体对话（MAC）框架：单一LLM、单一供应商以及混合供应商。实验中，他们使用o4-mini、Gemini-2.5-Pro和Claude-4.5-Sonnet三个不同的模型实例（代表不同供应商）来实例化智能体，并在RareBench和DiagnosisArena数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 混合供应商的多智能体配置在召回率和准确性方面均优于单一供应商的配置，达到了最先进的水平。通过重叠分析发现，混合供应商团队能够汇集互补的归纳偏倚，从而发现单一模型或同质化团队可能遗漏的正确诊断。
AI.conclusion: 供应商多样性是构建稳健的临床诊断大语言模型系统的关键设计原则。通过整合来自不同供应商的模型，可以有效缓解模型偏见，提高诊断性能。

title: FOZO: Forward-Only Zeroth-Order Prompt Optimization for Test-Time Adaptation
summary: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) is essential for enabling deep learning models to handle real-world data distribution shifts. However, current approaches face significant limitations: backpropagation-based methods are not suitable for low-end deployment devices, due to their high computation and memory requirements, as well as their tendency to modify model weights during adaptation; while traditional backpropagation-free techniques exhibit constrained adaptation capabilities. In this work, we propose Forward-Only Zeroth-Order Optimization (FOZO), a novel and practical backpropagation-free paradigm for TTA. FOZO leverages a memory-efficient zeroth-order prompt optimization, which is led by objectives optimizing both intermediate feature statistics and prediction entropy. To ensure efficient and stable adaptation over the out-of-distribution data stream, we introduce a dynamically decaying perturbation scale during zeroth-order gradient estimation and theoretically prove its convergence under the TTA data stream assumption. Extensive continual adaptation experiments on ImageNet-C, ImageNet-R, and ImageNet-Sketch demonstrate FOZO's superior performance, achieving 59.52% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-C (5K, level 5) and outperforming main gradient-based methods and SOTA forward-only FOA (58.13%). Furthermore, FOZO exhibits strong generalization on quantized (INT8) models. These findings demonstrate that FOZO is a highly competitive solution for TTA deployment in resource-limited scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为FOZO（Forward-Only Zeroth-Order Optimization）的无需反向传播的测试时自适应（TTA）新范式，通过内存高效的零阶提示优化，优化中间特征统计和预测熵，并引入动态衰减的扰动尺度来提高效率和稳定性，在多种数据集上取得了优于现有方法（包括基于梯度的方法和SOTA的FOA）的性能，并对量化模型具有良好的泛化能力，适用于资源受限场景。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时自适应（TTA）方法在部署到低端设备时面临挑战：基于反向传播的方法计算和内存开销大且会修改模型权重；而传统的无反向传播方法适应能力有限。因此，需要一种既无需反向传播又具有强大适应能力的TTA新范式。
