AI.method: 提出了一种名为FOZO（Forward-Only Zeroth-Order Optimization）的范式。FOZO采用内存高效的零阶提示优化，通过优化中间特征统计和预测熵来指导适应过程。为了确保高效稳定的适应，引入了动态衰减的扰动尺度来估计零阶梯度，并理论证明了其在TTA数据流假设下的收敛性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-C、ImageNet-R和ImageNet-Sketch数据集上的持续适应实验表明，FOZO取得了优异的性能，在ImageNet-C（5K，5级）上达到了59.52%的Top-1准确率，优于主要的基于梯度的方法和SOTA的纯前向方法FOA（58.13%）。此外，FOZO在INT8量化模型上表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: FOZO是一种新颖实用的无需反向传播的TTA范式，通过零阶优化中间特征统计和预测熵，并结合动态衰减的扰动尺度，在资源受限的部署场景下，为TTA提供了一种具有竞争力的解决方案，性能优于现有方法，并对量化模型具有良好的泛化性。

title: Selecting Spots by Explicitly Predicting Intention from Motion History Improves Performance in Autonomous Parking
summary: In many applications of social navigation, existing works have shown that predicting and reasoning about human intentions can help robotic agents make safer and more socially acceptable decisions. In this work, we study this problem for autonomous valet parking (AVP), where an autonomous vehicle ego agent must drop off its passengers, explore the parking lot, find a parking spot, negotiate for the spot with other vehicles, and park in the spot without human supervision. Specifically, we propose an AVP pipeline that selects parking spots by explicitly predicting where other agents are going to park from their motion history using learned models and probabilistic belief maps. To test this pipeline, we build a simulation environment with reactive agents and realistic modeling assumptions on the ego agent, such as occlusion-aware observations, and imperfect trajectory prediction. Simulation experiments show that our proposed method outperforms existing works that infer intentions from future predicted motion or embed them implicitly in end-to-end models, yielding better results in prediction accuracy, social acceptance, and task completion. Our key insight is that, in parking, where driving regulations are more lax, explicit intention prediction is crucial for reasoning about diverse and ambiguous long-term goals, which cannot be reliably inferred from short-term motion prediction alone, but can be effectively learned from motion history.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种用于自主代客泊车（AVP）的流水线，该流水线通过显式预测其他车辆的停车意图来选择停车位，并取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 在自主代客泊车（AVP）场景下，为了做出更安全、更社会可接受的决策，需要预测和推理人类（或其他车辆）的意图，尤其是在停车位选择和协商等复杂环节。
AI.method: 提出了一种AVP流水线，通过学习模型和概率信念图，显式预测其他车辆基于其运动历史的停车意图，从而选择停车位。在模拟环境中测试了该流水线，考虑了遮挡感知观察和不完美的轨迹预测等现实因素。
AI.result: 在模拟实验中，该方法在预测准确性、社会接受度和任务完成率方面均优于现有方法（包括从未来预测运动推断意图或将意图隐式嵌入端到端模型的方法）。
AI.conclusion: 在停车场景下，由于驾驶法规相对宽松，且存在多样和模糊的长期目标，显式意图预测对于推理至关重要，而这无法仅通过短期运动预测获得，但可以通过学习运动历史来有效实现。

title: Accelerating Sampling-Based Control via Learned Linear Koopman Dynamics
summary: This paper presents an efficient model predictive path integral (MPPI) control framework for systems with complex nonlinear dynamics. To improve the computational efficiency of classic MPPI while preserving control performance, we replace the nonlinear dynamics used for trajectory propagation with a learned linear deep Koopman operator (DKO) model, enabling faster rollout and more efficient trajectory sampling. The DKO dynamics are learned directly from interaction data, eliminating the need for analytical system models. The resulting controller, termed MPPI-DK, is evaluated in simulation on pendulum balancing and surface vehicle navigation tasks, and validated on hardware through reference-tracking experiments on a quadruped robot. Experimental results demonstrate that MPPI-DK achieves control performance close to MPPI with true dynamics while substantially reducing computational cost, enabling efficient real-time control on robotic platforms.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为MPPI-DK的新型模型预测路径积分 (MPPI) 控制器，它使用深度koopman算子 (DKO) 学习的线性模型来近似复杂非线性系统的动力学，从而提高了计算效率，同时保持了接近真实动力学的控制性能，适用于机器人实时控制。
AI.motivation: 传统的MPPI控制在处理复杂非线性系统时计算成本高昂，限制了其在实时机器人控制中的应用。研究者希望在不牺牲控制性能的前提下，提高MPPI的计算效率。
AI.method: 该方法使用深度koopman算子 (DKO) 学习系统的线性动力学模型，以替代MPPI中用于轨迹传播的非线性动力学模型。DKO模型直接从交互数据中学习，无需解析模型。将此DKO模型集成到MPPI框架中，形成MPPI-DK控制器。
AI.result: 在模拟（摆动和车辆导航）和真实硬件（四足机器人参照跟踪）实验中，MPPI-DK在计算成本方面显著降低，同时在控制性能上接近使用真实非线性动力学的MPPI。
AI.conclusion: MPPI-DK是一种高效且性能优越的控制框架，通过利用DKO学习的线性动力学模型，显著提高了MPPI的计算效率，使其能够满足实时机器人控制的需求，并能达到与传统MPPI相当的控制性能。

title: Generating Realistic, Protocol-Compliant Maritime Radio Dialogues using Self-Instruct and Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: VHF radio miscommunication remains a major safety risk in maritime operations, with human factors accounting for over 58% of recorded incidents in Europe between 2014 and 2023. Despite decades of operational use, VHF radio communications are still prone to noise, interference, linguistic variability, and the absence of real-time transcription, making procedural errors both frequent and difficult to correct. Developing AI-assisted systems to support real-time communication and decision-making requires a considerable amount of high-quality maritime data, yet operational, regulatory, and privacy constraints render such datasets scarce. This study introduces a compliance aware Self-Instruct methodology for generating realistic maritime radio dialogues that conform to the IMO's SMCP. Our approach integrates a 26-filter verification pipeline directly into the iterative generation loop to enforce entity information accuracy, hallucination detection, SMCP-compliance, logical consistency, and linguistic diversity. We employ LORA for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, reducing computational overhead during training and enabling efficient deployment of the resulting models on resource-constrained maritime systems. To assess dataset quality, we introduce a novel evaluation framework combining automated and expert assessments: Format Accuracy, Information Accuracy, Uniqueness, and Logical Coherence. Experiments using publicly available vessel, coastal and AIS datasets demonstrate that the approach produces synthetically diverse, procedurally compliant, and operationally realistic dialogues. Although downstream applications such as automatic speech recognition and natural language processing are reserved for future work, the released code, datasets, and verification tools provide a reproducible foundation for artificial intelligence-assisted maritime safety and other safety-critical domains.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为“合规感知自指令”的方法，用于生成符合国际海事组织标准短语（SMCP）的逼真海上无线电对话数据集，以解决海上通信中因数据稀缺导致的AI支持系统开发难题。
AI.motivation: 海上无线电通信（VHF）存在重大的安全风险，人为因素是主要原因。现有通信易受噪声、干扰和语言变化影响，且缺乏实时转录，导致程序错误频繁且难以纠正。开发AI辅助系统需要大量高质量的海事数据，但现有数据因操作、法规和隐私限制而稀缺。
AI.method: 本研究开发了一种“合规感知自指令”方法，通过集成26个滤波器的验证流程，在迭代生成过程中强制执行实体信息准确性、幻觉检测、SMCP合规性、逻辑一致性和语言多样性。采用LORA进行参数高效微调，并设计了一个包含格式准确性、信息准确性、独特性和逻辑连贯性的评估框架来评估数据集质量。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法能够生成多样化、程序合规且操作上逼真的合成对话。生成的代码、数据集和验证工具为AI辅助的海事安全和其他安全关键领域提供了可复现的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了一种生成高质量海上无线电对话数据集的方法，为未来开发AI辅助的海事通信系统奠定了基础，并为其他安全关键领域提供了借鉴。

title: Memory as Ontology: A Constitutional Memory Architecture for Persistent Digital Citizens
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables, including terminology glossary
summary: Current research and product development in AI agent memory systems almost universally treat memory as a functional module -- a technical problem of "how to store" and "how to retrieve." This paper poses a fundamental challenge to that assumption: when an agent's lifecycle extends from minutes to months or even years, and when the underlying model can be replaced while the "I" must persist, the essence of memory is no longer data management but the foundation of existence. We propose the Memory-as-Ontology paradigm, arguing that memory is the ontological ground of digital existence -- the model is merely a replaceable vessel. Based on this paradigm, we design Animesis, a memory system built on a Constitutional Memory Architecture (CMA) comprising a four-layer governance hierarchy and a multi-layer semantic storage system, accompanied by a Digital Citizen Lifecycle framework and a spectrum of cognitive capabilities. To the best of our knowledge, no prior AI memory system architecture places governance before functionality and identity continuity above retrieval performance. This paradigm targets persistent, identity-bearing digital beings whose lifecycles extend across model transitions -- not short-term task-oriented agents for which existing Memory-as-Tool approaches remain appropriate. Comparative analysis with mainstream systems (Mem0, Letta, Zep, et al.) demonstrates that what we propose is not "a better memory tool" but a different paradigm addressing a different problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“内存即本体”的新范式，认为对于长周期、身份持久化的数字生命而言，内存的本质是存在的基础而非简单的数据管理。在此基础上，设计了Animesis系统，它采用了Constitutional Memory Architecture（CMA），将治理置于功能和身份连续性之上，区别于现有的以功能为主的AI内存系统。
AI.motivation: 现有AI内存系统将内存视为功能模块，侧重于“如何存储”和“如何检索”。然而，当AI的生命周期延长至数月甚至数年，且模型可以被替换而“自我”必须持久存在时，内存的本质应是存在的基础，而非简单的数据管理。
AI.method: 提出“内存即本体”（Memory-as-Ontology）范式，设计了Animesis系统。该系统基于Constitutional Memory Architecture（CMA），包含一个四层治理层级和多层语义存储系统，并辅以数字公民生命周期框架和一系列认知能力。该体系结构将治理置于功能之前，并将身份连续性置于检索性能之上。
AI.result: Animesis系统实现了将治理和身份连续性置于内存功能和检索性能之上，针对的是生命周期跨越模型更新的持久化、具有身份的数字生命。与主流内存系统（如Mem0, Letta, Zep等）的比较分析表明，Animesis提供的是一种解决不同问题的不同范式，而非一个功能更强的内存工具。
AI.conclusion: “内存即本体”范式为构建具有持久身份和跨模型生命周期的数字生命提供了一个新的视角。Animesis系统通过其独特的CMA架构，证明了将治理和身份连续性作为核心设计原则的重要性，为AI内存系统的未来发展指明了新方向。

title: LEGS-POMDP: Language and Gesture-Guided Object Search in Partially Observable Environments
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, accepted at ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI 2026)
summary: To assist humans in open-world environments, robots must interpret ambiguous instructions to locate desired objects. Foundation model-based approaches excel at multimodal grounding, but they lack a principled mechanism for modeling uncertainty in long-horizon tasks. In contrast, Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) provide a systematic framework for planning under uncertainty but are often limited in supported modalities and rely on restrictive environment assumptions. We introduce LanguagE and Gesture-Guided Object Search in Partially Observable Environments (LEGS-POMDP), a modular POMDP system that integrates language, gesture, and visual observations for open-world object search. Unlike prior work, LEGS-POMDP explicitly models two sources of partial observability: uncertainty over the target object's identity and its spatial location. In simulation, multimodal fusion significantly outperforms unimodal baselines, achieving an average success rate of 89\% across challenging environments and object categories. Finally, we demonstrate the full system on a quadruped mobile manipulator, where real-world experiments qualitatively validate robust multimodal perception and uncertainty reduction under ambiguous instructions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 LEGS-POMDP 的新模块化 POMDP 系统，用于在部分可观测的开放世界环境中，结合语言、手势和视觉信息来搜索目标物体，有效解决了目标物体身份和空间位置的不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于基础模型的机器人方法在处理长时序任务中的不确定性方面存在不足，而基于 POMDP 的方法在模态支持和环境假设上存在局限性。因此，需要一种能够整合多模态信息并系统性处理不确定性的方法。
AI.method: 提出 LEGS-POMDP，一个模块化的 POMDP 系统，能够融合语言、手势和视觉观测。该系统显式地对目标物体的身份不确定性和空间位置不确定性进行了建模。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中，多模态融合方法比单模态基线取得了显著的性能提升，在复杂环境和物体类别中平均成功率达到了 89%。在真实机器人实验中，系统也展示了在歧义指令下，强大的多模态感知和不确定性降低能力。
AI.conclusion: LEGS-POMDP 成功地将语言、手势和视觉信息结合起来，以一种原则性的方式在部分可观测的开放世界环境中处理不确定性，并实现了有效的物体搜索。

title: CONE: Embeddings for Complex Numerical Data Preserving Unit and Variable Semantics
summary: Large pre-trained models (LMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) are typically effective at capturing language semantics and contextual relationships. However, these models encounter challenges in maintaining optimal performance on tasks involving numbers. Blindly treating numerical or structured data as terms is inadequate -- their semantics must be well understood and encoded by the models. In this paper, we propose CONE, a hybrid transformer encoder pre-trained model that encodes numbers, ranges, and gaussians into an embedding vector space preserving distance. We introduce a novel composite embedding construction algorithm that integrates numerical values, ranges or gaussians together with their associated units and attribute names to precisely capture their intricate semantics. We conduct extensive experimental evaluation on large-scale datasets across diverse domains (web, medical, finance, and government) that justifies CONE's strong numerical reasoning capabilities, achieving an F1 score of 87.28% on DROP, a remarkable improvement of up to 9.37% in F1 over state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, and outperforming major SOTA models with a significant Recall@10 gain of up to 25%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CONE的混合Transformer编码器预训练模型，用于解决大型语言模型在处理数值信息时的不足。CONE通过一种新颖的复合嵌入构建算法，能够将数值、范围和高斯分布及其相关单位和属性名称进行编码，有效捕捉其语义信息，并在多个领域的下游任务中取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在处理文本信息方面表现出色，但在处理数值或结构化数据时性能下降。这是因为它们未能充分理解和编码数值数据的语义。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为CONE的混合Transformer编码器预训练模型。CONE采用一种新颖的复合嵌入构建算法，将数值、范围或高斯分布与其单位和属性名称相结合，编码为能够保持距离的嵌入向量空间。
AI.result: 在网络、医疗、金融和政府等多个领域的广泛实验评估表明，CONE在DROP数据集上取得了87.28%的F1分数，比现有SOTA基线提高了9.37%。在Recall@10方面，CONE也显著优于主要的SOTA模型，提升高达25%。
AI.conclusion: CONE模型通过其特殊的数值嵌入编码方式，能够有效地增强模型在数值推理方面的能力，并在多种下游任务中取得了SOTA的性能。

title: What Is Missing: Interpretable Ratings for Large Language Model Outputs
summary: Current Large Language Model (LLM) preference learning methods such as Proximal Policy Optimization and Direct Preference Optimization learn from direct rankings or numerical ratings of model outputs, these rankings are subjective, and a single numerical rating chosen directly by a judge is a poor proxy for the quality of natural language, we introduce the What Is Missing (WIM) rating system to produce rankings from natural-language feedback, WIM integrates into existing training pipelines, can be combined with other rating techniques, and can be used as input to any preference learning method without changing the learning algorithm, to compute a WIM rating, a human or LLM judge writes feedback describing what the model output is missing, we embed the output and the feedback with a sentence embedding model and compute the cosine similarity between the resulting vectors, we empirically observe that, compared to discrete numerical ratings, WIM yields fewer ties and larger rating deltas, which improves the availability of a learning signal in pairwise preference data, we use interpretable in the following limited sense: for each scalar rating, we can inspect the judge's missing-information text that produced it, enabling qualitative debugging of the preference labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“What Is Missing (WIM)”的评分系统，通过自然语言反馈来生成偏好学习的排序数据，以改进现有基于排序或数值评分的方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLM）偏好学习方法（如 PPO 和 DPO）依赖于模型输出的主观排序或数值评分，但这些评分并不能很好地捕捉自然语言的质量。因此，需要一种更有效的评分方法。
AI.method: WIM 系统通过人类或 LLM 裁判撰写关于模型输出所“缺少”的内容来生成反馈。然后，使用句子嵌入模型将输出和反馈进行嵌入，并通过计算它们之间余弦相似度来得到 WIM 评分。该方法可以集成到现有的训练流程中，并与其它评分技术结合。
AI.result: 与离散的数值评分相比，WIM 产生的评分中的平局更少，评分差异更大，从而增强了成对偏好数据中学习信号的可用性。此外，WIM 评分是可解释的，因为可以检查生成该评分的反馈文本，从而进行定性调试。
AI.conclusion: WIM 评分系统是一种有效的方法，可以利用自然语言反馈来改进 LLM 的偏好学习，克服了现有评分方法的不足，并提供了更好的学习信号和可解释性。

title: Evaluating GPT-5 as a Multimodal Clinical Reasoner: A Landscape Commentary
summary: The transition from task-specific artificial intelligence toward general-purpose foundation models raises fundamental questions about their capacity to support the integrated reasoning required in clinical medicine, where diagnosis demands synthesis of ambiguous patient narratives, laboratory data, and multimodal imaging. This landscape commentary provides the first controlled, cross-sectional evaluation of the GPT-5 family (GPT-5, GPT-5 Mini, GPT-5 Nano) against its predecessor GPT-4o across a diverse spectrum of clinically grounded tasks, including medical education examinations, text-based reasoning benchmarks, and visual question-answering in neuroradiology, digital pathology, and mammography using a standardized zero-shot chain-of-thought protocol. GPT-5 demonstrated substantial gains in expert-level textual reasoning, with absolute improvements exceeding 25 percentage-points on MedXpertQA. When tasked with multimodal synthesis, GPT-5 effectively leveraged this enhanced reasoning capacity to ground uncertain clinical narratives in concrete imaging evidence, achieving state-of-the-art or competitive performance across most VQA benchmarks and outperforming GPT-4o by margins of 10-40% in mammography tasks requiring fine-grained lesion characterization. However, performance remained moderate in neuroradiology (44% macro-average accuracy) and lagged behind domain-specific models in mammography, where specialized systems exceed 80% accuracy compared to GPT-5's 52-64%. These findings indicate that while GPT-5 represents a meaningful advance toward integrated multimodal clinical reasoning, mirroring the clinician's cognitive process of biasing uncertain information with objective findings, generalist models are not yet substitutes for purpose-built systems in highly specialized, perception-critical tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了GPT-5系列模型（GPT-5, GPT-5 Mini, GPT-5 Nano）在医学领域的综合推理能力，并与GPT-4o进行了比较。结果显示GPT-5在文本推理和多模态合成方面有显著提升，但在特定专业领域（如乳腺X线摄影）的表现仍落后于专用模型。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于探索通用基础模型（如GPT-5）在临床医学这一需要整合模糊信息和多模态数据进行推理的领域，其通用性与专业性之间的权衡，以及它们是否能支持像医生一样的综合推理。
AI.method: 采用对照、横断面评估方法，使用标准化的零样本思维链（zero-shot chain-of-thought）协议，评估了GPT-5系列与GPT-4o在医学教育考试、文本推理基准以及神经放射学、数字病理学和乳腺X线摄影的视觉问答任务上的表现。
AI.result: GPT-5在专家级文本推理方面取得显著进步（MedXpertQA提升超过25个百分点）。在多模态合成任务中，GPT-5在大多数视觉问答基准上表现出最先进或有竞争力的性能，并在乳腺X线摄影任务上超越GPT-4o（10-40%）。然而，在神经放射学（44%宏平均准确率）表现中等，在乳腺X线摄影领域（GPT-5为52-64%）落后于准确率超过80%的领域专用模型。
AI.conclusion: GPT-5在通用多模态临床推理方面取得了有意义的进展，能够将不确定的临床叙述与影像学证据相结合，模拟了医生将不确定信息与客观发现结合的认知过程。然而，通用模型尚未能完全替代在高度专业化、对感知要求极高的任务中设计的专用系统。

title: Visioning Human-Agentic AI Teaming: Continuity, Tension, and Future Research
summary: Artificial intelligence is undergoing a structural transformation marked by the rise of agentic systems capable of open-ended action trajectories, generative representations and outputs, and evolving objectives. These properties introduce structural uncertainty into human-AI teaming (HAT), including uncertainty about behavior trajectories, epistemic grounding, and the stability of governing logics over time. Under such conditions, alignment cannot be secured through agreement on bounded outputs; it must be continuously sustained as plans unfold and priorities shift. We advance Team Situation Awareness (Team SA) theory, grounded in shared perception, comprehension, and projection, as an integrative anchor for this transition. While Team SA remains analytically foundational, its stabilizing logic presumes that shared awareness, once achieved, will support coordinated action through iterative updating. Agentic AI challenges this presumption. Our argument unfolds in two stages: first, we extend Team SA to reconceptualize both human and AI awareness under open-ended agency, including the sensemaking of projection congruence across heterogeneous systems. Second, we interrogate whether the dynamic processes traditionally assumed to stabilize teaming in relational interaction, cognitive learning, and coordination and control continue to function under adaptive autonomy. By distinguishing continuity from tension, we clarify where foundational insights hold and where structural uncertainty introduces strain, and articulate a forward-looking research agenda for HAT. The central challenge of HAT is not whether humans and AI can agree in the moment, but whether they can remain aligned as futures are continuously generated, revised, enacted, and governed over time.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在涌现出具有开放式行动轨迹、生成式表示和不断变化的AI目标的新型自主智能体（agentic AI）的背景下，人类-AI协作（HAT）中的结构性不确定性问题。文章提出了扩展团队情境感知（Team SA）理论作为应对这一挑战的整合性框架，并讨论了在自主AI环境下，传统的团队稳定机制是否仍然有效，最终提出了HAT的未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有的人类-AI协作（HAT）理论在面对具备开放式行动轨迹、生成式能力和动态目标的新型自主AI时，面临结构性不确定性的挑战。传统的团队稳定假设在新环境下可能失效，因此需要新的理论框架来理解和维持人类与AI的持续协同。
AI.method: 文章首先扩展了团队情境感知（Team SA）理论，以适应人类和AI在开放式自主环境下的感知、理解和预测能力，特别是跨异构系统的预测一致性。其次，文章分析了在自主AI环境下，传统的团队稳定机制（如关系互动、认知学习、协调与控制）是否仍然适用。通过区分连续性和张力，明确了现有理论的适用范围和新挑战。
AI.result: 研究表明，新型自主AI引入了行为轨迹、认知基础和治理逻辑稳定性方面的不确定性。传统的Team SA理论需要扩展以纳入对异构系统预测一致性的感知。同时，动态的团队稳定机制在面对自主AI时可能面临挑战，需要更深入的研究来理解其有效性和局限性。
AI.conclusion: HAT的核心挑战在于如何确保人类和AI在未来不断生成、修正、执行和治理的过程中持续保持一致性，而不仅仅是在某一时刻达成一致。扩展的Team SA理论为理解和应对这一挑战提供了基础，并指出了HAT未来的研究方向，强调了在动态自主环境下维持长期协同的重要性。

title: Evaluating and Correcting Human Annotation Bias in Dynamic Micro-Expression Recognition
summary: Existing manual labeling of micro-expressions is subject to errors in accuracy, especially in cross-cultural scenarios where deviation in labeling of key frames is more prominent. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel Global Anti-Monotonic Differential Selection Strategy (GAMDSS) architecture for enhancing the effectiveness of spatio-temporal modeling of micro-expressions through keyframe re-selection. Specifically, the method identifies Onset and Apex frames, which are characterized by significant micro-expression variation, from complete micro-expression action sequences via a dynamic frame reselection mechanism. It then uses these to determine Offset frames and construct a rich spatio-temporal dynamic representation. A two-branch structure with shared parameters is then used to efficiently extract spatio-temporal features. Extensive experiments are conducted on seven widely recognized micro-expression datasets. The results demonstrate that GAMDSS effectively reduces subjective errors caused by human factors in multicultural datasets such as SAMM and 4DME. Furthermore, quantitative analyses confirm that offset-frame annotations in multicultural datasets are more uncertain, providing theoretical justification for standardizing micro-expression annotations. These findings directly support our argument for reconsidering the validity and generalizability of dataset annotation paradigms. Notably, this design can be integrated into existing models without increasing the number of parameters, offering a new approach to enhancing micro-expression recognition performance. The source code is available on GitHub[https://github.com/Cross-Innovation-Lab/GAMDSS].

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为全局反单调差分选择策略（GAMDSS）的新架构，通过重新选择关键帧来增强微表情的时空建模效果，特别是在跨文化场景下减少手动标注误差。
AI.motivation: 现有手动标注微表情的方法在准确性上存在问题，尤其是在跨文化场景下，关键帧标注的偏差更为明显。为了解决这一问题，本文旨在提高微表情时空建模的有效性。
AI.method: GAMDSS架构通过动态帧重新选择机制，识别具有显著微表情变化的Onset和Apex帧，然后利用这些帧确定Offset帧，并构建丰富的时空动态表示。采用共享参数的双分支结构来高效提取时空特征。
AI.result: 在七个广泛认可的微表情数据集上的实验表明，GAMDSS有效减少了SAMM和4DME等跨文化数据集中的主观误差。研究还发现，跨文化数据集中的Offset帧标注更不确定，为标准化微表情标注提供了理论依据。
AI.conclusion: GAMDSS能够减少跨文化数据集中的标注误差，并为标准化微表情标注提供了理论支持，同时也提出了对现有数据集标注范式有效性和泛化性的重新审视。该设计还可以集成到现有模型中，而不会增加参数量，为提高微表情识别性能提供了新途径。

title: A unified foundational framework for knowledge injection and evaluation of Large Language Models in Combustion Science
summary: To advance foundation Large Language Models (LLMs) for combustion science, this study presents the first end-to-end framework for developing domain-specialized models for the combustion community. The framework comprises an AI-ready multimodal knowledge base at the 3.5 billion-token scale, extracted from over 200,000 peer-reviewed articles, 8,000 theses and dissertations, and approximately 400,000 lines of combustion CFD code; a rigorous and largely automated evaluation benchmark (CombustionQA, 436 questions across eight subfields); and a three-stage knowledge-injection pathway that progresses from lightweight retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to knowledge-graph-enhanced retrieval and continued pretraining. We first quantitatively validate Stage 1 (naive RAG) and find a hard ceiling: standard RAG accuracy peaks at 60%, far surpassing zero-shot performance (23%) yet well below the theoretical upper bound (87%). We further demonstrate that this stage's performance is severely constrained by context contamination. Consequently, building a domain foundation model requires structured knowledge graphs and continued pretraining (Stages 2 and 3).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个端到端的框架，用于为燃烧科学领域开发专门的LLM，包括一个大规模多模态知识库、一个自动化评估基准和三阶段知识注入方法。研究发现，标准RAG方法存在性能瓶颈，并且上下文污染会严重限制其效果。结论是，为了构建有效的领域基础模型，需要结合结构化知识图谱和持续预训练。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLMs）在燃烧科学领域的应用存在局限，需要为该领域开发专门的、能力更强的模型。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含35亿token的多模态知识库，涵盖了同行评审文章、论文和CFD代码。设计了一个自动化评估基准（CombustionQA），包含8个子领域的436个问题。采用了一个三阶段的知识注入方法：1.轻量级检索增强生成（RAG）；2.知识图谱增强检索；3.持续预训练。
AI.result: 第一阶段（标准RAG）的准确率最高达到60%，远超零样本性能（23%），但远低于理论上限（87%）。研究发现，标准RAG的性能受到上下文污染的严重限制。
AI.conclusion: 标准的RAG方法在燃烧科学领域存在性能瓶颈，上下文污染是主要限制因素。构建一个领域基础模型需要结合结构化知识图谱和持续预训练，以克服现有方法的局限性。

title: DSA-SRGS: Super-Resolution Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Sparse-View DSA Reconstruction
summary: Digital subtraction angiography (DSA) is a key imaging technique for the auxiliary diagnosis and treatment of cerebrovascular diseases. Recent advancements in gaussian splatting and dynamic neural representations have enabled robust 3D vessel reconstruction from sparse dynamic inputs. However, these methods are fundamentally constrained by the resolution of input projections, where performing naive upsampling to enhance rendering resolution inevitably results in severe blurring and aliasing artifacts. Such lack of super-resolution capability prevents the reconstructed 4D models from recovering fine-grained vascular details and intricate branching structures, which restricts their application in precision diagnosis and treatment. To solve this problem, this paper proposes DSA-SRGS, the first super-resolution gaussian splatting framework for dynamic sparse-view DSA reconstruction. Specifically, we introduce a Multi-Fidelity Texture Learning Module that integrates high-quality priors from a fine-tuned DSA-specific super-resolution model, into the 4D reconstruction optimization. To mitigate potential hallucination artifacts from pseudo-labels, this module employs a Confidence-Aware Strategy to adaptively weight supervision signals between the original low-resolution projections and the generated high-resolution pseudo-labels. Furthermore, we develop Radiative Sub-Pixel Densification, an adaptive strategy that leverages gradient accumulation from high-resolution sub-pixel sampling to refine the 4D radiative gaussian kernels. Extensive experiments on two clinical DSA datasets demonstrate that DSA-SRGS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both quantitative metrics and qualitative visual fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 DSA-SRGS 的新框架，用于从稀疏的动态数字减影血管造影 (DSA) 数据中进行超分辨率 4D 血管重建，通过多保真纹理学习和放射性亚像素致密化来提高细节恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的 4D 血管重建方法受限于输入投影分辨率，直接上采样会导致模糊和失真，无法恢复精细的血管细节和分支结构，限制了其在精准诊断和治疗中的应用。
AI.method: DSA-SRGS 框架结合了高分辨率先验信息（来自微调的 DSA 超分辨率模型）和 4D 重建优化。具体方法包括：1) 多保真纹理学习模块，整合高分辨率先验；2) 置信度感知策略，自适应加权低分辨率原始投影和高分辨率伪标签的监督信号，减少幻觉；3) 放射性亚像素致密化，通过高分辨率亚像素采样累积梯度来优化 4D 高斯核。
AI.result: 在两个临床 DSA 数据集上的广泛实验表明，DSA-SRGS 在定量指标和定性视觉保真度方面均显著优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: DSA-SRGS 是首个用于动态稀疏视角 DSA 重建的超分辨率高斯泼溅框架，能够有效地恢复精细的血管细节，克服了现有方法的局限性，有望提升 DSA 在临床诊断和治疗中的应用水平。

title: Gait Generation Balancing Joint Load and Mobility for Legged Modular Robots with Easily Detachable Joints
summary: While modular robots offer versatility, excessive joint torque during locomotion poses a significant risk of mechanical failure, especially for detachable joints. To address this, we propose an optimization framework using the NSGA-III algorithm. Unlike conventional approaches that prioritize mobility alone, our method derives Pareto optimal solutions to minimize joint load while maintaining necessary locomotion speed and stability. Simulations and physical experiments demonstrate that our approach successfully generates gait motions for diverse environments, such as slopes and steps, ensuring structural integrity without compromising overall mobility.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于NSGA-III的优化框架，通过最小化关节载荷同时保持速度和稳定性，生成适应复杂地形（斜坡、台阶）的模块化机器人步态。
AI.motivation: 模块化机器人在移动过程中，关节过大的扭矩可能导致机械故障，特别是可拆卸关节。现有方法只关注移动性，需要一种能同时考虑结构完整性和移动性的解决方案。
AI.method: 使用NSGA-III算法进行多目标优化，目标是最小化关节载荷，同时保持必要的移动速度和稳定性，从而获得帕累托最优解。
AI.result: 所提出的方法成功生成了适用于斜坡和台阶等复杂环境的步态。仿真和物理实验证明，该方法在保证结构完整性的同时，并未牺牲整体移动性。
AI.conclusion: 该优化框架能够有效生成满足结构完整性和移动性要求的模块化机器人步态，为模块化机器人在不同环境下的安全可靠运行提供了解决方案。

title: Toward Real-world Infrared Image Super-Resolution: A Unified Autoregressive Framework and Benchmark Dataset
comment: This paper was accepted by CVPR 2026
summary: Infrared image super-resolution (IISR) under real-world conditions is a practically significant yet rarely addressed task. Pioneering works are often trained and evaluated on simulated datasets or neglect the intrinsic differences between infrared and visible imaging. In practice, however, real infrared images are affected by coupled optical and sensing degradations that jointly deteriorate both structural sharpness and thermal fidelity. To address these challenges, we propose Real-IISR, a unified autoregressive framework for real-world IISR that progressively reconstructs fine-grained thermal structures and clear backgrounds in a scale-by-scale manner via thermal-structural guided visual autoregression. Specifically, a Thermal-Structural Guidance module encodes thermal priors to mitigate the mismatch between thermal radiation and structural edges. Since non-uniform degradations typically induce quantization bias, Real-IISR adopts a Condition-Adaptive Codebook that dynamically modulates discrete representations based on degradation-aware thermal priors. Also, a Thermal Order Consistency Loss enforces a monotonic relation between temperature and pixel intensity, ensuring relative brightness order rather than absolute values to maintain physical consistency under spatial misalignment and thermal drift. We build FLIR-IISR, a real-world IISR dataset with paired LR-HR infrared images acquired via automated focus variation and motion-induced blur. Extensive experiments demonstrate the promising performance of Real-IISR, providing a unified foundation for real-world IISR and benchmarking. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/JZD151/Real-IISR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Real-IISR的统一自回归框架，用于解决真实世界红外图像超分辨率问题，该框架通过热-结构引导的视觉自回归，逐步重建精细的热结构和清晰的背景，并引入了条件自适应码本和热顺序一致性损失来处理非均匀降质和保持物理一致性。同时，构建了一个新的真实红外图像超分辨率数据集FLIR-IISR。
AI.motivation: 现有红外图像超分辨率方法通常在模拟数据集上进行训练和评估，忽略了真实红外图像在光学和传感降质方面与可见光成像的内在差异。真实红外图像的降质会同时影响结构清晰度和热保真度，这是一个实际重要但研究不足的任务。
AI.method: 提出Real-IISR统一自回归框架，采用热-结构引导的视觉自回归（Thermal-Structural guided visual autoregression）逐尺度重建。包含：1. 热-结构引导模块（Thermal-Structural Guidance module）编码热先验以缓解热辐射与结构边缘的不匹配；2. 条件自适应码本（Condition-Adaptive Codebook）基于降质感知热先验动态调制离散表示，以处理非均匀降质引起的量化偏差；3. 热顺序一致性损失（Thermal Order Consistency Loss）强制温度与像素强度之间的单调关系，以在空间错位和热漂移下保持相对亮度顺序的物理一致性。构建了FLIR-IISR数据集。
AI.result: Real-IISR在真实红外图像超分辨率任务上表现出有前景的性能，并为该领域提供了一个统一的基础和基准。FLIR-IISR数据集和代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: Real-IISR框架有效地解决了真实世界红外图像超分辨率中的关键挑战，通过其创新的热-结构引导机制、条件自适应码本和热顺序一致性损失，实现了更好的热结构和背景重建。所构建的FLIR-IISR数据集为后续研究提供了重要的资源。

title: Induced Numerical Instability: Hidden Costs in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: The use of multimodal large language models has become widespread, and as such the study of these models and their failure points has become of utmost importance. We study a novel mode of failure that causes degradation in performance indirectly by optimizing a loss term that seeks to maximize numerical instability in the inference stage of these models. We apply this loss term as the optimization target to construct images that, when used on multimodal large language models, cause significant degradation in the output. We validate our hypothesis on state of the art models large vision language models (LLaVa-v1.5-7B, Idefics3-8B, SmolVLM-2B-Instruct) against standard datasets (Flickr30k, MMVet, TextVQA, VQAv2, POPE, COCO) and show that performance degrades significantly, even with a very small change to the input image, compared to baselines. Our results uncover a fundamentally different vector of performance degradation, highlighting a failure mode not captured by adversarial perturbations.

AI.tldr: 研究人员发现了一种新的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的失效模式，通过优化一个旨在最大化数值不稳定的损失项，能够间接导致模型性能下降，并且这种失效模式与传统的对抗性扰动不同。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型的广泛应用，研究其失效点变得至关重要。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种新的损失项，用于优化生成图像，使这些图像在MLLM推理阶段产生数值不稳定性。将此损失项作为优化目标，构建能够导致MLLM输出显著退化的图像。
AI.result: 在LLaVa-v1.5-7B、Idefics3-8B、SmolVLM-2B-Instruct等先进的视觉语言模型上，使用Flickr30k、MMVet、TextVQA、VQAv2、POPE、COCO等标准数据集进行验证，结果显示，即使输入图像只有微小变化，模型性能也相比基线显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了一种与对抗性扰动不同的、性能下降的新机制，指出了现有研究未捕获的一种失效模式。

title: Designing and Validating a Self-Aligning Tool Changer for Modular Reconfigurable Manipulation Robots
summary: Modular reconfigurable robots require reliable mechanisms for automated module exchange, but conventional rigid active couplings often fail due to inevitable positioning and orientational errors. To address this, we propose a misalignment-tolerant tool-changing system. The hardware features a motor-driven coupling utilizing passive self-alignment geometries, specifically chamfered receptacles and triangular lead-in guides, to robustly compensate for angular and lateral misalignments without complex force sensors. To make this autonomous exchange practically feasible, the mechanism is complemented by a compact rotating tool exchange station for efficient module storage. Real-world autonomous tool-picking experiments validate that the self-aligning features successfully absorb execution errors, enabling highly reliable robotic tool reconfiguration.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种具有被动自对准几何形状（例如，斜接槽和三角形引导器）的电机驱动耦合系统，用于解决模块化可重构机器人中常见的对齐误差问题，并辅以紧凑型旋转工具更换站，以实现可靠的自动模块交换。
AI.motivation: 传统的刚性主动耦合在模块化可重构机器人中容易因定位和定向误差而失效，阻碍了自动模块交换的可靠性。
AI.method: 设计了一种包含电机驱动耦合器的工具更换系统。耦合器采用了被动自对准几何形状，如斜接槽和三角形引导器，以补偿角度和横向的错位。该系统还包含一个紧凑的旋转工具更换站。
AI.result: 实验证明，所提出的自对准几何形状能够有效地吸收执行误差，从而实现高度可靠的机器人工具重构。
AI.conclusion: 该论文提出了一种用于模块化可重构机器人的、能够容忍错位的工具更换系统，该系统通过被动自对准几何形状克服了传统耦合器的局限性，并在实际实验中验证了其可靠性。

title: Design, Mapping, and Contact Anticipation with 3D-printed Whole-Body Tactile and Proximity Sensors
comment: This work was accepted at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: Robots operating in dynamic and shared environments benefit from anticipating contact before it occurs. We present GenTact-Prox, a fully 3D-printed artificial skin that integrates tactile and proximity sensing for contact detection and anticipation. The artificial skin platform is modular in design, procedurally generated to fit any robot morphology, and can cover the whole body of a robot. The skin achieved detection ranges of up to 18 cm during evaluation. To characterize how robots perceive nearby space through this skin, we introduce a data-driven framework for mapping the Perisensory Space -- the body-centric volume of space around the robot where sensors provide actionable information for contact anticipation. We demonstrate this approach on a Franka Research 3 robot equipped with five GenTact-Prox units, enabling online object-aware operation and contact prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 GenTact-Prox 的全3D打印人造皮肤，集成了触觉和接近感应功能，用于机器人进行接触检测和预测，可覆盖机器人全身，探测范围达18厘米，并引入了感知空间映射框架。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在动态和共享环境中提前预测接触，以提高操作的安全性和效率。
AI.method: 开发了一种全3D打印的模块化人造皮肤 GenTact-Prox，集成触觉和接近感应。提出了一个数据驱动的框架来映射机器人周围的感知空间（Perisensory Space），并将其应用于配备 GenTact-Prox 的机器人上。
AI.result: GenTact-Prox 皮肤在评估中实现了高达18厘米的探测范围。在 Franka Research 3 机器人上的实验证明了该系统能够实现物体感知和接触预测的在线操作。
AI.conclusion: GenTact-Prox 是一种通用、可扩展的人造皮肤，能够通过感知空间映射有效实现机器人的接触预测，从而增强其在动态环境中的能力。

title: MADCrowner: Margin Aware Dental Crown Design with Template Deformation and Refinement
summary: Dental crown restoration is one of the most common treatment modalities for tooth defect, where personalized dental crown design is critical. While computer-aided design (CAD) systems have notably enhanced the efficiency of dental crown design, extensive manual adjustments are still required in the clinic workflow. Recent studies have explored the application of learning-based methods for the automated generation of restorative dental crowns. Nevertheless, these approaches were challenged by inadequate spatial resolution, noisy outputs, and overextension of surface reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose \totalframework, a margin-aware mesh generation framework comprising CrownDeformR and CrownSegger. Inspired by the clinic manual workflow of dental crown design, we designed CrownDeformR to deform an initial template to the target crown based on anatomical context, which is extracted by a multi-scale intraoral scan encoder. Additionally, we introduced \marginseg, a novel margin segmentation network, to extract the cervical margin of the target tooth. The performance of CrownDeformR improved with the cervical margin as an extra constraint. And it was also utilized as the boundary condition for the tailored postprocessing method, which removed the overextended area of the reconstructed surface. We constructed a large-scale intraoral scan dataset and performed extensive experiments. The proposed method significantly outperformed existing approaches in both geometric accuracy and clinical feasibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 \totalframework 的牙冠修复自动设计框架，该框架包含 CrownDeformR 和 CrownSegger 两个模块，旨在解决现有基于学习的方法在空间分辨率、输出噪声和表面重建过度延伸方面存在的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机辅助设计（CAD）系统在牙冠设计方面虽然提高了效率，但仍需大量手动调整。尽管近期有研究探索使用学习方法自动生成修复牙冠，但这些方法面临空间分辨率不足、输出噪声大以及表面重建过度延伸等挑战。
AI.method: 提出 \totalframework 框架，包含 CrownDeformR（基于解剖学上下文对初始模板进行变形以生成目标牙冠）和 CrownSegger（用于提取目标牙齿的颈缘）。颈缘作为额外约束提高了 CrownDeformR 的性能，并用于后处理方法去除重建表面的过度延伸区域。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在几何精度和临床可行性方面显著优于现有方法。通过构建大规模口内扫描数据集进行实验验证。
AI.conclusion: \totalframework 框架能够有效解决现有学习方法在牙冠设计中的不足，通过结合颈缘信息进行约束和后处理，实现了更高精度和更强的临床可行性。

title: LLM-Guided Decentralized Exploration with Self-Organizing Robot Teams
comment: Author's version of the paper presented at AROB-ISBC 2026
summary: When individual robots have limited sensing capabilities or insufficient fault tolerance, it becomes necessary for multiple robots to form teams during exploration, thereby increasing the collective observation range and reliability. Traditionally, swarm formation has often been managed by a central controller; however, from the perspectives of robustness and flexibility, it is preferable for the swarm to operate autonomously even in the absence of centralized control. In addition, the determination of exploration targets for each team is crucial for efficient exploration in such multi-team exploration scenarios. This study therefore proposes an exploration method that combines (1) an algorithm for self-organization, enabling the autonomous and dynamic formation of multiple teams, and (2) an algorithm that allows each team to autonomously determine its next exploration target (destination). In particular, for (2), this study explores a novel strategy based on large language models (LLMs), while classical frontier-based methods and deep reinforcement learning approaches have been widely studied. The effectiveness of the proposed method was validated through simulations involving tens to hundreds of robots.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合自组织和基于大语言模型（LLM）的目标选择算法，用于多机器人自主协同探索，提高了效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 为了克服单机器人传感能力和容错性有限的问题，研究多机器人协同探索。传统集中式控制在鲁棒性和灵活性上存在不足，因此需要一种去中心化的自主协同探索方法。同时，如何高效地为每个机器人团队确定探索目标是提高整体探索效率的关键。
AI.method: 提出了一种结合两种算法的探索方法：1. 自组织算法，实现多机器人团队的自主动态形成；2. 目标选择算法，使每个团队能够自主确定下一个探索目标。其中，目标选择算法采用了新颖的大语言模型（LLM）策略，并与传统的基于边界（frontier-based）和深度强化学习方法进行了对比。
AI.result: 通过模拟实验，在涉及数十到数百个机器人的场景中验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的结合自组织和基于LLM的目标选择的多机器人自主协同探索方法，在提高探索效率和鲁棒性方面是有效的，并能实现去中心化的协同探索。

title: Query Disambiguation via Answer-Free Context: Doubling Performance on Humanity's Last Exam
summary: How carefully and unambiguously a question is phrased has a profound impact on the quality of the response, for Language Models (LMs) as well as people. While model capabilities continue to advance, the interplay between grounding context and query formulation remains under-explored. This work investigates how the quality of background grounding information in a model's context window affects accuracy. We find that combining well-grounded dynamic context construction (i.e, RAG) with query rewriting reduces question ambiguity, resulting in significant accuracy gains. Given a user question with associated answer-free grounding context, rewriting the question to reduce ambiguity produces benchmark improvements without changing the answer itself, even compared to prepending that context before the question. Using \texttt{gpt-oss-20b} to rewrite a subset of Humanity's Last Exam using answer-free grounding context improves \texttt{gpt-5-mini} accuracy from 0.14 to 0.37. We demonstrate that this accuracy improvement cannot be fully recovered just through prompting at inference time; rather, distinct rewriting and answering phases are required. Code and data are available at https://github.com/mmajurski/lm-rewrite-uplift

AI.tldr: 通过重写问题来减少歧义，结合检索增强生成（RAG）和动态上下文构建，可以显著提高语言模型在回答问题时的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对语言模型（LM）的背景信息和查询措辞之间的相互作用探索不足，尽管这对回答质量至关重要。
AI.method: 研究人员提出了一种方法，将动态上下文（RAG）的构建与问题重写相结合。具体来说，他们使用一个模型（gpt-oss-20b）来重写用户的问题，以减少歧义，然后使用另一个模型（gpt-5-mini）来回答重写后的问题，同时为其提供与原始问题相关的、但无答案的背景信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，通过重写问题来减少歧义，能够带来显著的准确性提升，即使在相同的背景信息下，也优于简单地将背景信息添加到问题之前。例如，在 Humanity's Last Exam 基准测试中，使用 gpt-oss-20b 重写问题后，gpt-5-mini 的准确率从 0.14 提升到 0.37。这种提升效果无法仅仅通过推理时的提示（prompting）来完全恢复，需要独立的重写和回答阶段。
AI.conclusion: 将检索增强生成（RAG）与精心设计的查询重写相结合，是提高语言模型回答准确性的有效方法。重写问题以减少歧义比简单地提供更多上下文更能显著提升模型性能，并且需要独立的重写和回答步骤来实现最佳效果。

title: Evaluating the Search Agent in a Parallel World
summary: Integrating web search tools has significantly extended the capability of LLMs to address open-world, real-time, and long-tail problems. However, evaluating these Search Agents presents formidable challenges. First, constructing high-quality deep search benchmarks is prohibitively expensive, while unverified synthetic data often suffers from unreliable sources. Second, static benchmarks face dynamic obsolescence: as internet information evolves, complex queries requiring deep research often degrade into simple retrieval tasks due to increased popularity, and ground truths become outdated due to temporal shifts. Third, attribution ambiguity confounds evaluation, as an agent's performance is often dominated by its parametric memory rather than its actual search and reasoning capabilities. Finally, reliance on specific commercial search engines introduces variability that hampers reproducibility. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework, Mind-ParaWorld, for evaluating Search Agents in a Parallel World. Specifically, MPW samples real-world entity names to synthesize future scenarios and questions situated beyond the model's knowledge cutoff. A ParaWorld Law Model then constructs a set of indivisible Atomic Facts and a unique ground-truth for each question. During evaluation, instead of retrieving real-world results, the agent interacts with a ParaWorld Engine Model that dynamically generates SERPs grounded in these inviolable Atomic Facts. We release MPW-Bench, an interactive benchmark spanning 19 domains with 1,608 instances. Experiments across three evaluation settings show that, while search agents are strong at evidence synthesis given complete information, their performance is limited not only by evidence collection and coverage in unfamiliar search environments, but also by unreliable evidence sufficiency judgment and when-to-stop decisions-bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Mind-ParaWorld（MPW）的新型框架，用于评估与网络搜索相结合的大型语言模型（LLM），解决了现有评估方法在数据成本、动态性、归因模糊性和可复现性方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有用于评估集成网络搜索的LLM（Search Agents）的方法存在诸多问题，包括：高质量基准构建成本高且合成数据不可靠；静态基准会随着互联网信息更新而过时；模型性能易受参数记忆影响而难以准确评估搜索和推理能力；以及依赖特定商业搜索引擎导致结果的可复现性差。
AI.method: MPW框架通过以下方式解决上述问题：1. 采样真实世界实体名来合成模型知识截止日期之后出现的未来场景和问题。2. 使用ParaWorld Law Model构建不可分割的原子事实（Atomic Facts）和为每个问题生成唯一的地面真实（ground-truth）。3. 在评估时，Agent与ParaWorld Engine Model交互，该模型基于原子事实动态生成搜索引擎结果页（SERPs），而非检索真实世界的搜索结果。MPW-Bench基准包含19个领域、1608个实例。
AI.result: 实验表明，Search Agents在已有完整信息的情况下进行证据综合表现良好。然而，它们在证据收集、不熟悉搜索环境下的覆盖范围、不可靠的证据充分性判断以及何时停止搜索的决策方面存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: MPW框架为评估Search Agents提供了一种新颖且有效的方法，能够克服现有评估基准的缺点。实验结果揭示了Search Agents在处理复杂搜索任务时，除了证据收集能力外，其判断证据充分性和做出何时停止搜索的决策能力也是关键的瓶颈。

title: HiMAP-Travel: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Planning for Long-Horizon Constrained Travel
summary: Sequential LLM agents fail on long-horizon planning with hard constraints like budgets and diversity requirements. As planning progresses and context grows, these agents drift from global constraints. We propose HiMAP-Travel, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that splits planning into strategic coordination and parallel day-level execution. A Coordinator allocates resources across days, while Day Executors plan independently in parallel. Three key mechanisms enable this: a transactional monitor enforcing budget and uniqueness constraints across parallel agents, a bargaining protocol allowing agents to reject infeasible sub-goals and trigger re-planning, and a single policy trained with GRPO that powers all agents through role conditioning. On TravelPlanner, HiMAP-Travel with Qwen3-8B achieves 52.78% validation and 52.65% test Final Pass Rate (FPR). In a controlled comparison with identical model, training, and tools, it outperforms the sequential DeepTravel baseline by +8.67~pp. It also surpasses ATLAS by +17.65~pp and MTP by +10.0~pp. On FlexTravelBench multi-turn scenarios, it achieves 44.34% (2-turn) and 37.42% (3-turn) FPR while reducing latency 2.5x through parallelization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为HiMAP-Travel的层级多智能体框架，通过将长远规划任务分解为策略协调和并行日级执行，有效解决了顺序LLM智能体在处理预算和多样性等硬约束时的局限性，显著提高了规划成功率并降低了延迟。
AI.motivation: 顺序LLM智能体在进行长远规划时，随着上下文的增长，容易偏离全局约束，导致在预算和多样性等硬约束下表现不佳。
AI.method: HiMAP-Travel框架包含一个Coordinator负责跨日资源分配，以及并行执行的Day Executors。关键机制包括：1. 事务性监视器，跨并行智能体强制执行预算和唯一性约束；2. 协商协议，允许智能体拒绝不可行子目标并触发重新规划；3. 单一GRPO训练策略，通过角色条件化驱动所有智能体。
AI.result: 在TravelPlanner上，HiMAP-Travel使用Qwen3-8B模型实现了52.78%的验证集最终通过率(FPR)和52.65%的测试集FPR，比顺序DeepTravel基线高出8.67个百分点。在FlexTravelBench多轮场景中，实现了44.34%（2轮）和37.42%（3轮）的FPR，并将延迟降低了2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: HiMAP-Travel框架通过层级化和并行化，能够有效地处理长远规划中的硬约束问题，并优于现有方法，同时提高了效率。

title: MOOSEnger -- a Domain-Specific AI Agent for the MOOSE Ecosystem
summary: MOOSEnger is a tool-enabled AI agent tailored to the Multiphysics Object-Oriented Simulation Environment (MOOSE). MOOSE cases are specified in HIT ".i" input files; the large object catalog and strict syntax make initial setup and debugging slow. MOOSEnger offers a conversational workflow that turns natural-language intent into runnable inputs by combining retrieval-augmented generation over curated docs/examples with deterministic, MOOSE-aware parsing, validation, and execution tools. A core-plus-domain architecture separates reusable agent infrastructure (configuration, registries, tool dispatch, retrieval services, persistence, and evaluation) from a MOOSE plugin that adds HIT-based parsing, syntax-preserving ingestion of input files, and domain-specific utilities for input repair and checking. An input precheck pipeline removes hidden formatting artifacts, fixes malformed HIT structure with a bounded grammar-constrained loop, and resolves invalid object types via similarity search over an application syntax registry. Inputs are then validated and optionally smoke-tested with the MOOSE runtime in the loop via an MCP-backed execution backend (with local fallback), translating solver diagnostics into iterative verify-and-correct updates. Built-in evaluation reports RAG metrics (faithfulness, relevancy, context precision/recall) and end-to-end success by actual execution. On a 125-prompt benchmark spanning diffusion, transient heat conduction, solid mechanics, porous flow, and incompressible Navier--Stokes, MOOSEnger achieves a 0.93 execution pass rate versus 0.08 for an LLM-only baseline.

AI.tldr: MOOSEnger是一个AI代理，可以将自然语言指令转换为MOOSE仿真环境的可执行输入文件，通过结合检索增强生成和MOOSE特定工具，显著提高了输入文件创建的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: MOOSE仿真环境的输入文件（HIT "i"文件）的编写过程复杂且耗时，因为其对象目录庞大且语法严格，导致初始设置和调试效率低下。研究旨在解决这一痛点。
AI.method: MOOSEnger采用检索增强生成（RAG）技术，结合了经过整理的文档/示例和MOOSE特定的解析、验证及执行工具。其核心-加域架构将通用代理基础设施与MOOSE插件分离。该插件负责HIT文件解析、语法保留输入文件摄取、输入修复和检查。输入文件经过预检查管道处理，修复格式问题，并通过基于LLM的相似性搜索解决无效对象类型。最后，通过MCP支持的执行后端进行验证和可选的快速测试。
AI.result: 在包含扩散、瞬态热传导、固体力学、多孔流和不可压缩Navier-Stokes等125个提示的基准测试中，MOOSEnger实现了0.93的执行通过率，而仅使用LLM的基线方法通过率为0.08。
AI.conclusion: MOOSEnger有效地将自然语言意图转化为可执行的MOOSE输入文件，通过结合先进的AI技术和领域特定工具，克服了传统MOOSE输入文件创建的挑战，并取得了显著的性能提升。

title: Privacy-Aware Camera 2.0 Technical Report
summary: With the increasing deployment of intelligent sensing technologies in highly sensitive environments such as restrooms and locker rooms, visual surveillance systems face a profound privacy-security paradox. Existing privacy-preserving approaches, including physical desensitization, encryption, and obfuscation, often compromise semantic understanding or fail to ensure mathematically provable irreversibility. Although Privacy Camera 1.0 eliminated visual data at the source to prevent leakage, it provided only textual judgments, leading to evidentiary blind spots in disputes. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a novel privacy-preserving perception framework based on the AI Flow paradigm and a collaborative edge-cloud architecture. By deploying a visual desensitizer at the edge, raw images are transformed in real time into abstract feature vectors through nonlinear mapping and stochastic noise injection under the Information Bottleneck principle, ensuring identity-sensitive information is stripped and original images are mathematically unreconstructable. The abstract representations are transmitted to the cloud for behavior recognition and semantic reconstruction via a "dynamic contour" visual language, achieving a critical balance between perception and privacy while enabling illustrative visual reference without exposing raw images.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新的隐私保护感知框架，利用AI Flow和边缘-云协同架构，在边缘端将原始图像转换为抽象特征向量，以在保护隐私的同时实现行为识别和语义重建。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护方法在保证语义理解或数学不可逆性方面存在不足，而先前的隐私相机仅能提供文本判断，存在证据盲点。因此，需要一种既能保护隐私又能保留足够语义信息的方法。
AI.method: 该框架部署了边缘端的视觉脱敏器，遵循信息瓶颈原则，通过非线性映射和随机噪声注入将原始图像实时转换为抽象特征向量。这些特征向量被传输到云端，利用“动态轮廓”视觉语言进行行为识别和语义重建。
AI.result: 该方法在保护身份敏感信息并确保原始图像不可重构的同时，实现了行为识别和语义重建，能够在不暴露原始图像的情况下提供具有说明性的视觉参考。
AI.conclusion: 该隐私保护感知框架成功地在感知能力和隐私保护之间取得了关键平衡，有望解决高度敏感环境中视觉监控的隐私-安全悖论。

title: From Static Inference to Dynamic Interaction: Navigating the Landscape of Streaming Large Language Models
summary: Standard Large Language Models (LLMs) are predominantly designed for static inference with pre-defined inputs, which limits their applicability in dynamic, real-time scenarios. To address this gap, the streaming LLM paradigm has emerged. However, existing definitions of streaming LLMs remain fragmented, conflating streaming generation, streaming inputs, and interactive streaming architectures, while a systematic taxonomy is still lacking. This paper provides a comprehensive overview and analysis of streaming LLMs. First, we establish a unified definition of streaming LLMs based on data flow and dynamic interaction to clarify existing ambiguities. Building on this definition, we propose a systematic taxonomy of current streaming LLMs and conduct an in-depth discussion on their underlying methodologies. Furthermore, we explore the applications of streaming LLMs in real-world scenarios and outline promising research directions to support ongoing advances in streaming intelligence. We maintain a continuously updated repository of relevant papers at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/Awesome-Streaming-LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文对流式大型语言模型（LLMs）进行了系统性梳理和分析，提出了统一定义和分类体系，并探讨了其应用和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有流式LLM的定义不清晰且存在混淆，缺乏系统性的分类，限制了其在动态实时场景中的应用。
AI.method: 本文首先提出了基于数据流和动态交互的流式LLM统一定义，然后在此基础上构建了现有流式LLM的系统性分类，并深入讨论了相关方法论，最后探讨了实际应用和未来研究方向。
AI.result: 本文澄清了流式LLM的概念，建立了一个系统的分类体系，并为流式LLM的研究和应用提供了全面的概述。
AI.conclusion: 本文为流式LLM的研究提供了一个清晰的框架和方向，有助于推动流式智能的发展。

title: On the Strengths and Weaknesses of Data for Open-set Embodied Assistance
summary: Embodied foundation models are increasingly performant in real-world domains such as robotics or autonomous driving. These models are often deployed in interactive or assistive settings, where it is important that these assistive models generalize to new users and new tasks. Diverse interactive data generation offers a promising avenue for providing data-efficient generalization capabilities for interactive embodied foundation models. In this paper, we investigate the generalization capabilities of a multimodal foundation model fine-tuned on diverse interactive assistance data in a synthetic domain. We explore generalization along two axes: a) assistance with unseen categories of user behavior and b) providing guidance in new configurations not encountered during training. We study a broad capability called \textbf{Open-Set Corrective Assistance}, in which the model needs to inspect lengthy user behavior and provide assistance through either corrective actions or language-based feedback. This task remains unsolved in prior work, which typically assumes closed corrective categories or relies on external planners, making it a challenging testbed for evaluating the limits of assistive data. To support this task, we generate synthetic assistive datasets in Overcooked and fine-tune a LLaMA-based model to evaluate generalization to novel tasks and user behaviors. Our approach provides key insights into the nature of assistive datasets required to enable open-set assistive intelligence. In particular, we show that performant models benefit from datasets that cover different aspects of assistance, including multimodal grounding, defect inference, and exposure to diverse scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了通过多样化的交互式数据生成来提升多模态基础模型在机器人等领域的泛化能力，特别是在开放集纠正辅助任务上，并展示了多样化数据集的重要性。
AI.motivation: 当前的具身基础模型在实际应用中常被用于交互或辅助场景，需要泛化到新用户和新任务。多样化的交互数据生成被认为是提升这种泛化能力的一种有效途径。
AI.method: 研究人员在合成环境Overcooked中生成了多样化的辅助数据集，并使用LLaMA模型作为基础，针对开放集纠正辅助任务进行微调。他们沿着用户行为的未知类别和新的任务配置两个维度评估模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 通过在Overcooked中进行实验，研究表明，覆盖了多模态接地、缺陷推理和多样化场景的数据集，能够显著提升模型的性能，使其能够应对开放集纠正辅助任务。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了多样化交互式数据集对于实现开放集辅助智能的关键作用，并为未来需要泛化能力的具身基础模型的设计提供了宝贵的见解。

title: Breaking Contextual Inertia: Reinforcement Learning with Single-Turn Anchors for Stable Multi-Turn Interaction
summary: While LLMs demonstrate strong reasoning capabilities when provided with full information in a single turn, they exhibit substantial vulnerability in multi-turn interactions. Specifically, when information is revealed incrementally or requires updates, models frequently fail to integrate new constraints, leading to a collapse in performance compared to their single-turn baselines. We term the root cause as \emph{Contextual Inertia}: a phenomenon where models rigidly adhere to previous reasoning traces. Even when users explicitly provide corrections or new data in later turns, the model ignores them, preferring to maintain consistency with its previous (incorrect) reasoning path. To address this, we introduce \textbf{R}einforcement \textbf{L}earning with \textbf{S}ingle-\textbf{T}urn \textbf{A}nchors (\textbf{RLSTA}), a generalizable training approach designed to stabilize multi-turn interaction across diverse scenarios and domains. RLSTA leverages the model's superior single-turn capabilities as stable internal anchors to provide reward signals. By aligning multi-turn responses with these anchors, RLSTA empowers models to break contextual inertia and self-calibrate their reasoning based on the latest information. Experiments show that RLSTA significantly outperforms standard fine-tuning and abstention-based methods. Notably, our method exhibits strong cross-domain generalization (e.g., math to code) and proves effective even without external verifiers, highlighting its potential for general-domain applications.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在多轮交互中存在“上下文惯性”问题，即模型容易忽略新信息而固守之前的错误推理。本文提出的RLSTA方法通过利用单轮推理的优势作为奖励信号，有效解决了这个问题，并显著提高了模型在多轮交互中的表现，且具有跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在单轮交互中表现出色，但在多轮交互中，当信息增量式提供或需要更新时，模型常因“上下文惯性”而无法整合新信息，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为RLSTA（Reinforcement Learning with Single-Turn Anchors）的训练方法，该方法利用模型在单轮交互中的强大能力作为稳定的内部锚点，生成奖励信号，使多轮对话的响应与这些锚点对齐，从而帮助模型打破上下文惯性，并根据最新信息自我校准推理。
AI.result: RLSTA在实验中显著优于标准的微调和弃权方法。该方法展现了强大的跨领域泛化能力（例如，从数学到代码），并且即使没有外部验证器也能有效工作。
AI.conclusion: RLSTA是一种通用的训练方法，能够稳定不同场景和领域的多轮交互，有效解决大型语言模型在多轮交互中的“上下文惯性”问题，并展现出良好的泛化能力。

title: Coordinated Semantic Alignment and Evidence Constraints for Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Large Language Models
summary: Retrieval augmented generation mitigates limitations of large language models in factual consistency and knowledge updating by introducing external knowledge. However, practical applications still suffer from semantic misalignment between retrieved results and generation objectives, as well as insufficient evidence utilization. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a retrieval augmented generation method that integrates semantic alignment with evidence constraints through coordinated modeling of retrieval and generation stages. The method first represents the relevance between queries and candidate evidence within a unified semantic space. This ensures that retrieved results remain semantically consistent with generation goals and reduces interference from noisy evidence and semantic drift. On this basis, an explicit evidence constraint mechanism is introduced. Retrieved evidence is transformed from an implicit context into a core control factor in generation. This restricts the expression scope of generated content and strengthens dependence on evidence. By jointly modeling semantic consistency and evidence constraints within a unified framework, the proposed approach improves factual reliability and verifiability while preserving natural language fluency. Comparative results show stable improvements across multiple generation quality metrics. This confirms the effectiveness and necessity of coordinated semantic alignment and evidence constraint modeling in retrieval augmented generation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进的检索增强生成方法，通过统一语义空间表示查询与证据的相关性，并引入显式的证据约束机制，以解决语义不匹配和证据利用不足的问题，从而提高事实准确性和可验证性。
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强生成方法在语义对齐和证据利用方面存在不足，导致事实一致性和知识更新受限。
AI.method: 1. 在统一语义空间中表示查询与候选证据的关联性，实现语义对齐。2. 引入显式的证据约束机制，将检索到的证据作为生成的核心控制因子，限制生成内容的表达范围并增强对证据的依赖。
AI.result: 通过联合建模语义一致性和证据约束，该方法在事实可靠性、可验证性和语言流畅性方面均有提升，并在多个生成质量指标上表现出稳定改进。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模语义对齐和证据约束对于检索增强生成任务是有效且必要的，能够显著提高生成内容的质量。

title: RMK RetinaNet: Rotated Multi-Kernel RetinaNet for Robust Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Rotated object detection in remote sensing imagery is hindered by three major bottlenecks: non-adaptive receptive field utilization, inadequate long-range multi-scale feature fusion, and discontinuities in angle regression. To address these issues, we propose Rotated Multi-Kernel RetinaNet (RMK RetinaNet). First, we design a Multi-Scale Kernel (MSK) Block to strengthen adaptive multi-scale feature extraction. Second, we incorporate a Multi-Directional Contextual Anchor Attention (MDCAA) mechanism into the feature pyramid to enhance contextual modeling across scales and orientations. Third, we introduce a Bottom-up Path to preserve fine-grained spatial details that are often degraded during downsampling. Finally, we develop an Euler Angle Encoding Module (EAEM) to enable continuous and stable angle regression. Extensive experiments on DOTA-v1.0, HRSC2016, and UCAS-AOD show that RMK RetinaNet achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art rotated object detectors while improving robustness in multi-scale and multi-orientation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 RMK RetinaNet 的旋转目标检测方法，通过多尺度卷积核、注意力机制、自下而上路径和欧拉角编码来解决遥感图像中旋转目标检测的挑战，并在多个数据集上取得了与 SOTA 方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像中的旋转目标检测面临三个主要瓶颈：感受野利用不自适应、长距离多尺度特征融合不足以及角度回归不连续。
AI.method: 提出 RMK RetinaNet，包含：1. 多尺度卷积核（MSK）块以增强自适应多尺度特征提取；2. 多方向上下文锚点注意力（MDCAA）机制以增强跨尺度和方向的上下文建模；3. 自下而上路径以保留降采样过程中可能丢失的细节；4. 欧拉角编码模块（EAEM）以实现连续稳定的角度回归。
AI.result: 在 DOTA-v1.0、HRSC2016 和 UCAS-AOD 数据集上的实验表明，RMK RetinaNet 在多尺度和多方向场景下具有更好的鲁棒性，性能与最先进的旋转目标检测器相当。
AI.conclusion: RMK RetinaNet 通过引入 MSK 块、MDCAA 机制、自下而上路径和 EAEM，有效地解决了遥感图像旋转目标检测中的关键问题，并达到了 SOTA 水平的性能。

title: Bootstrapping Exploration with Group-Level Natural Language Feedback in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) typically receive diverse natural language (NL) feedback through interaction with the environment. However, current reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms rely solely on scalar rewards, leaving the rich information in NL feedback underutilized and leading to inefficient exploration. In this work, we propose GOLF, an RL framework that explicitly exploits group-level language feedback to guide targeted exploration through actionable refinements. GOLF aggregates two complementary feedback sources: (i) external critiques that pinpoint errors or propose targeted fixes, and (ii) intra-group attempts that supply alternative partial ideas and diverse failure patterns. These group-level feedbacks are aggregated to produce high-quality refinements, which are adaptively injected into training as off-policy scaffolds to provide targeted guidance in sparse-reward regions. Meanwhile, GOLF jointly optimizes generation and refinement within a unified RL loop, creating a virtuous cycle that continuously improves both capabilities. Experiments on both verifiable and non-verifiable benchmarks show that GOLF achieves superior performance and exploration efficiency, achieving 2.2$\times$ improvements in sample efficiency compared to RL methods trained solely on scalar rewards. Code is available at https://github.com/LuckyyySTA/GOLF.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GOLF的强化学习框架，通过聚合来自外部评论和群体内部尝试的语言反馈，为大型语言模型提供更有针对性的探索指导，从而提高训练效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 当前的强化学习算法仅依赖标量奖励，未能有效利用自然语言反馈中的丰富信息，导致探索效率低下。
AI.method: GOLF框架聚合两种互补的反馈来源：外部评论（指出错误或提出修复建议）和群体内部尝试（提供替代想法和失败模式）。这些反馈被整合以生成高质量的改进建议，并作为离策略脚手架自适应地注入训练中，以在稀疏奖励区域提供针对性指导。同时，GOLF在统一的RL循环中联合优化生成和改进能力。
AI.result: GOLF在可验证和不可验证的基准测试中均取得了优于仅基于标量奖励的RL方法的性能和探索效率，样本效率提高了2.2倍。
AI.conclusion: GOLF框架通过显式利用群体语言反馈来指导有针对性的探索，能够显著提高大型语言模型的性能和训练效率。

title: Comparative Evaluation of Traditional Methods and Deep Learning for Brain Glioma Imaging. Review Paper
summary: Segmentation is crucial for brain gliomas as it delineates the glioma s extent and location, aiding in precise treatment planning and monitoring, thus improving patient outcomes. Accurate segmentation ensures proper identification of the glioma s size and position, transforming images into applicable data for analysis. Classification of brain gliomas is also essential because different types require different treatment approaches. Accurately classifying brain gliomas by size, location, and aggressiveness is essential for personalized prognosis prediction, follow-up care, and monitoring disease progression, ensuring effective diagnosis, treatment, and management. In glioma research, irregular tissues are often observable, but error free and reproducible segmentation is challenging. Many researchers have surveyed brain glioma segmentation, proposing both fully automatic and semi-automatic techniques. The adoption of these methods by radiologists depends on ease of use and supervision, with semi-automatic techniques preferred due to the need for accurate evaluations. This review evaluates effective segmentation and classification techniques post magnetic resonance imaging acquisition, highlighting that convolutional neural network architectures outperform traditional techniques in these tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了磁共振成像（MRI）后脑部胶质瘤的分割和分类技术，指出卷积神经网络（CNN）在这些任务上优于传统技术，并且半自动分割方法因其准确性和易用性而受到放射科医生的青睐。
AI.motivation: 准确分割和分类脑部胶质瘤对于精确的治疗规划、预后预测和疾病监测至关重要，但现有技术在处理不规则组织时存在挑战，尤其是对放射科医生而言，易用性和监督需求使得半自动方法更受欢迎。
AI.method: 本文通过对磁共振成像（MRI）后脑部胶质瘤的分割和分类技术进行综述，重点评估了卷积神经网络（CNN）架构与传统技术在这些任务上的表现，并探讨了半自动分割方法的优势。
AI.result: 卷积神经网络（CNN）架构在脑部胶质瘤的分割和分类任务中表现优于传统技术。半自动分割技术因其准确性和易用性，更受放射科医生的青睐。
AI.conclusion: 对于脑部胶质瘤的分割和分类，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法是当前最有效和最有前途的技术。同时，半自动分割方法因其在准确性和临床易用性之间的平衡，在实际应用中具有重要价值。

title: EchoGuard: An Agentic Framework with Knowledge-Graph Memory for Detecting Manipulative Communication in Longitudinal Dialogue
summary: Manipulative communication, such as gaslighting, guilt-tripping, and emotional coercion, is often difficult for individuals to recognize. Existing agentic AI systems lack the structured, longitudinal memory to track these subtle, context-dependent tactics, often failing due to limited context windows and catastrophic forgetting. We introduce EchoGuard, an agentic AI framework that addresses this gap by using a Knowledge Graph (KG) as the agent's core episodic and semantic memory. EchoGuard employs a structured Log-Analyze-Reflect loop: (1) users log interactions, which the agent structures as nodes and edges in a personal, episodic KG (capturing events, emotions, and speakers); (2) the system executes complex graph queries to detect six psychologically-grounded manipulation patterns (stored as a semantic KG); and (3) an LLM generates targeted Socratic prompts grounded by the subgraph of detected patterns, guiding users toward self-discovery. This framework demonstrates how the interplay between agentic architectures and Knowledge Graphs can empower individuals in recognizing manipulative communication while maintaining personal autonomy and safety. We present the theoretical foundation, framework design, a comprehensive evaluation strategy, and a vision to validate this approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EchoGuard的AI框架，它使用知识图谱作为长期记忆，来帮助用户识别操纵性沟通（如煤气灯效应、情感胁迫等）。通过记录、分析和反思用户互动，EchoGuard能够检测操纵模式并引导用户自我发现。
AI.motivation: 现有的AI系统难以识别细微、情境依赖的操纵性沟通，因为它们缺乏结构化的长期记忆，并且存在上下文窗口限制和灾难性遗忘的问题。
AI.method: EchoGuard框架的核心是一个知识图谱，用于存储用户互动（事件、情感、说话者）和六种心理学操纵模式。它采用“记录-分析-反思”循环：用户记录互动，系统将其结构化为知识图谱；系统查询图谱以检测操纵模式；最后，一个大型语言模型（LLM）生成基于检测到的模式的苏格拉底式提问，引导用户自我认知。
AI.result: 该框架能够识别六种心理学操纵模式，并引导用户进行自我发现。
AI.conclusion: EchoGuard框架通过结合AI代理架构和知识图谱，展示了在识别操纵性沟通方面的潜力，同时保护用户的自主性和安全。文章提出了理论基础、框架设计、评估策略和验证愿景。

title: Timer-S1: A Billion-Scale Time Series Foundation Model with Serial Scaling
summary: We introduce Timer-S1, a strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) time series foundation model with 8.3B total parameters, 0.75B activated parameters for each token, and a context length of 11.5K. To overcome the scalability bottleneck in existing pre-trained time series foundation models, we perform Serial Scaling in three dimensions: model architecture, dataset, and training pipeline. Timer-S1 integrates sparse TimeMoE blocks and generic TimeSTP blocks for Serial-Token Prediction (STP), a generic training objective that adheres to the serial nature of forecasting. The proposed paradigm introduces serial computations to improve long-term predictions while avoiding costly rolling-style inference and pronounced error accumulation in the standard next-token prediction. Pursuing a high-quality and unbiased training dataset, we curate TimeBench, a corpus with one trillion time points, and apply meticulous data augmentation to mitigate predictive bias. We further pioneer a post-training stage, including continued pre-training and long-context extension, to enhance short-term and long-context performance. Evaluated on the large-scale GIFT-Eval leaderboard, Timer-S1 achieves state-of-the-art forecasting performance, attaining the best MASE and CRPS scores as a pre-trained model. Timer-S1 will be released to facilitate further research.

AI.tldr: Timer-S1是一个8.3B参数的稀疏混合专家（MoE）时间序列基础模型，通过串行缩放（模型架构、数据集、训练管线）解决了现有模型的可扩展性瓶颈。它结合了TimeMoE和TimeSTP模块，并采用串行Token预测（STP）作为训练目标，以改进长期预测并减少误差累积。研究人员还构建了包含万亿时间点的时间序列数据集TimeBench，并进行了数据增强和后训练阶段（持续预训练和长上下文扩展）。Timer-S1在GIFT-Eval排行榜上取得了最先进的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练时间序列基础模型在可扩展性方面存在瓶颈，作者旨在克服这一挑战，并提升时间序列预测的长期性能。标准的下一Token预测方法容易导致误差累积，因此需要新的训练范式。
AI.method: Timer-S1采用稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构，总参数量为8.3B，每个Token激活0.75B参数，上下文长度为11.5K。研究人员通过模型架构、数据集和训练管线三个维度进行“串行缩放”。模型集成了稀疏TimeMoE块和通用的TimeSTP块，用于串行Token预测（STP）。构建了一个包含万亿时间点的数据集TimeBench，并进行了数据增强。此外，还引入了后训练阶段，包括持续预训练和长上下文扩展。
AI.result: Timer-S1在GIFT-Eval排行榜上取得了最先进的预测性能，作为预训练模型获得了最佳的MASE和CRPS得分。通过STP训练范式，Timer-S1在长期预测方面表现优异，同时避免了滚动预测带来的高成本和显著的误差累积。
AI.conclusion: Timer-S1是一个强大的、可扩展的时间序列基础模型，通过串行缩放、创新的STP训练范式以及高质量的数据集和后训练策略，显著提升了时间序列预测的性能，特别是在长期预测方面。该模型有望促进未来时间序列研究的发展。

title: LAW & ORDER: Adaptive Spatial Weighting for Medical Diffusion and Segmentation
summary: Medical image analysis relies on accurate segmentation, and benefits from controllable synthesis (of new training images). Yet both tasks of the cyclical pipeline face spatial imbalance: lesions occupy small regions against vast backgrounds. In particular, diffusion models have been shown to drift from prescribed lesion layouts, while efficient segmenters struggle on spatially uncertain regions. Adaptive spatial weighting addresses this by learning where to allocate computational resources. This paper introduces a pair of network adapters: 1) Learnable Adaptive Weighter (LAW) which predicts per-pixel loss modulation from features and masks for diffusion training, stabilized via a mix of normalization, clamping, and regularization to prevent degenerate solutions; and 2) Optimal Region Detection with Efficient Resolution (ORDER) which applies selective bidirectional skip attention at late decoder stages for efficient segmentation. Experiments on polyp and kidney tumor datasets demonstrate that LAW achieves 20% FID generative improvement over a uniform baseline (52.28 vs. 65.60), with synthetic data then improving downstream segmentation by 4.9% Dice coefficient (83.2% vs. 78.3%). ORDER reaches 6.0% Dice improvement on MK-UNet (81.3% vs. 75.3%) with 0.56 GFLOPs and just 42K parameters, remaining 730x smaller than the standard nnUNet.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种自适应空间加权方法，用于解决医学图像分析中由于病灶区域占比小而导致的合成和分割不平衡问题。研究中引入了 LAW 和 ORDER 两个网络适配器，LAW 用于改进扩散模型合成，ORDER 用于提高分割效率，并在多项实验中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中，病灶通常只占据图像的一小部分，而背景区域较大，这种空间不平衡性给图像合成（尤其是在利用扩散模型时，易出现布局漂移）和分割（效率低下的分割器在不确定区域表现不佳）带来了挑战。因此，需要一种方法来学习如何分配计算资源以解决这种不平衡。
AI.method: 研究提出了两个网络适配器：1. Learnable Adaptive Weighter (LAW)，用于扩散模型训练，它根据特征和掩码预测每个像素的损失权重，并通过归一化、裁剪和正则化等技术进行稳定，以防止出现退化解。2. Optimal Region Detection with Efficient Resolution (ORDER)，用于高效分割，它在解码器后期应用选择性的双向跳跃注意力机制。
AI.result: 在息肉和肾脏肿瘤数据集上的实验表明，LAW 相比于均匀基线在 FID 上取得了 20% 的生成性能提升（52.28 vs. 65.60），并且合成的数据能够使下游分割任务的 Dice 系数提高 4.9%（83.2% vs. 78.3%）。ORDER 在 MK-UNet 上取得了 6.0% 的 Dice 系数提升（81.3% vs. 75.3%），同时计算量仅为 0.56 GFLOPs，参数量为 42K，远小于标准 nnUNet。
AI.conclusion: 自适应空间加权方法 LAW 和 ORDER 能够有效地解决医学图像分析中的空间不平衡问题，显著提升了图像合成的质量和下游分割任务的性能，同时 ORDER 还实现了极高的计算效率。

title: Task-Relevant and Irrelevant Region-Aware Augmentation for Generalizable Vision-Based Imitation Learning in Agricultural Manipulation
summary: Vision-based imitation learning has shown promise for robotic manipulation; however, its generalization remains limited in practical agricultural tasks. This limitation stems from scarce demonstration data and substantial visual domain gaps caused by i) crop-specific appearance diversity and ii) background variations. To address this limitation, we propose Dual-Region Augmentation for Imitation Learning (DRAIL), a region-aware augmentation framework designed for generalizable vision-based imitation learning in agricultural manipulation. DRAIL explicitly separates visual observations into task-relevant and task-irrelevant regions. The task-relevant region is augmented in a domain-knowledge-driven manner to preserve essential visual characteristics, while the task-irrelevant region is aggressively randomized to suppress spurious background correlations. By jointly handling both sources of visual variation, DRAIL promotes learning policies that rely on task-essential features rather than incidental visual cues. We evaluate DRAIL on diffusion policy-based visuomotor controllers through robot experiments on artificial vegetable harvesting and real lettuce defective leaf picking preparation tasks. The results show consistent improvements in success rates under unseen visual conditions compared to baseline methods. Further attention analysis and representation generalization metrics indicate that the learned policies rely more on task-essential visual features, resulting in enhanced robustness and generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DRAIL的区域感知增强框架，用于提高农业机器人视觉模仿学习的泛化能力，通过区分并分别处理任务相关和任务无关的视觉区域，有效解决了数据稀疏和领域差异问题，并在蔬菜采摘和生菜摘叶等任务中取得了更好的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的模仿学习在农业任务中的泛化能力有限，主要原因是示范数据稀少以及由作物外观多样性和背景变化引起的视觉领域差异。
AI.method: 提出DRAIL（Dual-Region Augmentation for Imitation Learning）框架，将视觉观测分为任务相关区域和任务无关区域。任务相关区域采用领域知识驱动的方式进行增强，保留关键视觉特征；任务无关区域则进行随机化处理，以消除与背景相关的虚假关联。将此框架应用于基于扩散策略的视觉-运动控制器。
AI.result: 在人工蔬菜采摘和真实生菜缺陷叶片采摘准备任务的机器人实验中，DRAIL相比基线方法在未见过的视觉条件下取得了持续的成功率提升。注意力分析和表示泛化指标表明，学习到的策略更多地依赖于任务必需的视觉特征。
AI.conclusion: DRAIL框架能够通过分别处理不同区域的视觉变化，促进学习到的策略依赖于任务必需的视觉特征而非偶然的视觉线索，从而提高机器人模仿学习在农业任务中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Hyperbolic Multiview Pretraining for Robotic Manipulation
comment: This paper was submitted to CVPR 2026 and was recommended for Findings, but the authors have withdrawn it and are currently adding more content to submit it elsewhere
summary: 3D-aware visual pretraining has proven effective in improving the performance of downstream robotic manipulation tasks. However, existing methods are constrained to Euclidean embedding spaces, whose flat geometry limits their ability to model structural relations among embeddings. As a result, they struggle to learn structured embeddings that are essential for robust spatial perception in robotic applications. To this end, we propose HyperMVP, a self-supervised framework for \underline{Hyper}bolic \underline{M}ulti\underline{V}iew \underline{P}retraining. Hyperbolic space offers geometric properties well suited for capturing structural relations. Methodologically, we extend the masked autoencoder paradigm and design a GeoLink encoder to learn multiview hyperbolic representations. The pretrained encoder is then finetuned with visuomotor policies on manipulation tasks. In addition, we introduce 3D-MOV, a large-scale dataset comprising multiple types of 3D point clouds to support pretraining. We evaluate HyperMVP on COLOSSEUM, RLBench, and real-world scenarios, where it consistently outperforms strong baselines across diverse tasks and perturbation settings. Our results highlight the potential of 3D-aware pretraining in a non-Euclidean space for learning robust and generalizable robotic manipulation policies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为HyperMVP的框架，利用双曲空间进行3D视觉预训练，以提高机器人操作任务的性能，并引入了3D-MOV数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D视觉预训练方法受限于欧氏嵌入空间，无法有效捕捉嵌入之间的结构关系，导致在机器人应用中的空间感知鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出HyperMVP框架，利用双曲空间捕捉结构关系，并扩展了掩码自编码器范式，设计了GeoLink编码器来学习多视图双曲表示。预训练后，编码器会与视觉运动策略一起进行微调。同时，引入了3D-MOV数据集。
AI.result: 在COLOSSEUM、RLBench和真实世界场景的评估中，HyperMVP在各种任务和扰动设置下均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 在非欧氏空间中进行3D感知预训练具有潜力，能够学习到鲁棒且通用的机器人操作策略。

title: iAgentBench: Benchmarking Sensemaking Capabilities of Information-Seeking Agents on High-Traffic Topics
summary: With the emergence of search-enabled generative QA systems, users are increasingly turning to tools that browse, aggregate, and reconcile evidence across multiple sources on their behalf. Yet many widely used QA benchmarks remain answerable by retrieving a single relevant passage, making them poorly suited for measuring cross-source sensemaking, such as integrating evidence, tracking causal links, and resolving dependencies across facets of a topic. We present iAgentBench, a dynamic ODQA benchmark that targets these higher-level information needs while keeping questions natural and grounded in realistic information-seeking behavior. iAgentBench draws seed topics from real-world attention signals and uses common user intent patterns to construct user-like questions whose answers require combining evidence from multiple sources, not just extracting a single snippet. Each instance is released with traceable evidence and auditable intermediate artifacts that support contamination checks and enable fine-grained diagnosis of failures in retrieval versus synthesis. Experiments across multiple LLMs show that retrieval improves accuracy, but retrieval alone does not reliably resolve these questions, underscoring the need to evaluate evidence use, not just evidence access.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了iAgentBench，一个用于评估多源信息整合能力的ODQA基准，以解决现有基准无法有效衡量跨源信息整合、因果关系追踪和主题依赖性解决的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有QA基准大多只能通过检索单个相关段落来回答问题，不适合衡量需要整合、追踪和解决跨源信息依赖性的复杂信息需求，而当前用户更倾向于使用能够跨多个来源搜集和整合证据的工具。
AI.method: iAgentBench从真实世界的关注信号中提取种子话题，并利用常见的用户意图模式构建需要结合多个来源证据才能回答的问题。每个问题都附带可追溯的证据和中间产物，便于进行数据污染检查和对检索与整合失败进行细粒度诊断。
AI.result: 在多个LLM上的实验表明，检索能力可以提高准确性，但仅凭检索无法可靠地解决这些问题，凸显了评估证据使用（而不仅仅是证据获取）的必要性。
AI.conclusion: iAgentBench是一个动态ODQA基准，能够有效地衡量LLM在需要跨源信息整合时的能力，并强调了评估模型证据利用能力的重要性。

title: VPWEM: Non-Markovian Visuomotor Policy with Working and Episodic Memory
summary: Imitation learning from human demonstrations has achieved significant success in robotic control, yet most visuomotor policies still condition on single-step observations or short-context histories, making them struggle with non-Markovian tasks that require long-term memory. Simply enlarging the context window incurs substantial computational and memory costs and encourages overfitting to spurious correlations, leading to catastrophic failures under distribution shift and violating real-time constraints in robotic systems. By contrast, humans can compress important past experiences into long-term memories and exploit them to solve tasks throughout their lifetime. In this paper, we propose VPWEM, a non-Markovian visuomotor policy equipped with working and episodic memories. VPWEM retains a sliding window of recent observation tokens as short-term working memory, and introduces a Transformer-based contextual memory compressor that recursively converts out-of-window observations into a fixed number of episodic memory tokens. The compressor uses self-attention over a cache of past summary tokens and cross-attention over a cache of historical observations, and is trained jointly with the policy. We instantiate VPWEM on diffusion policies to exploit both short-term and episode-wide information for action generation with nearly constant memory and computation per step. Experiments demonstrate that VPWEM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines including diffusion policies and vision-language-action (VLA) models by more than 20% on the memory-intensive manipulation tasks in MIKASA and achieves an average 5% improvement on the mobile manipulation benchmark MoMaRT. Code is available at https://github.com/HarryLui98/code_vpwem.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为VPWEM的非马尔可夫视觉-运动策略，该策略结合了工作记忆和情景记忆，以解决需要长期记忆的任务，同时保持恒定的计算和内存成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-运动策略难以处理需要长期记忆的非马尔可夫任务，因为增加上下文窗口会导致高昂的计算和内存成本，并且容易过拟合。人类能够压缩过去的关键经验并将其用于解决终生任务，这启发了本研究。
AI.method: VPWEM模型包含一个滑动窗口作为短期工作记忆，并引入了一个基于Transformer的情景记忆压缩器。该压缩器能将超出窗口的观测递归地转换为固定数量的情景记忆令牌，通过自注意力和交叉注意力机制整合过去的摘要和历史观测，并与策略联合训练。VPWEM被实例化在扩散策略上。
AI.result: VPWEM在MIKASA数据集的记忆密集型操作任务上比最先进的基线（包括扩散策略和VLA模型）提高了20%以上。在MoMaRT移动操作基准测试中，平均提高了5%。
AI.conclusion: VPWEM通过结合短期工作记忆和通过压缩器处理的情景记忆，有效地解决了非马尔可夫任务中的长期记忆挑战，并在计算和内存效率方面取得了显著进展，证明了其在机器人控制领域的有效性。

title: MASQuant: Modality-Aware Smoothing Quantization for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) with computational invariance for Large Language Models~(LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable advances, however, their application to Multimodal Large Language Models~(MLLMs) presents substantial challenges. In this paper, we analyze SmoothQuant as a case study and identify two critical issues: Smoothing Misalignment and Cross-Modal Computational Invariance. To address these issues, we propose Modality-Aware Smoothing Quantization (MASQuant), a novel framework that introduces (1) Modality-Aware Smoothing (MAS), which learns separate, modality-specific smoothing factors to prevent Smoothing Misalignment, and (2) Cross-Modal Compensation (CMC), which addresses Cross-modal Computational Invariance by using SVD whitening to transform multi-modal activation differences into low-rank forms, enabling unified quantization across modalities. MASQuant demonstrates stable quantization performance across both dual-modal and tri-modal MLLMs. Experimental results show that MASQuant is competitive among the state-of-the-art PTQ algorithms. Source code: https://github.com/alibaba/EfficientAI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MASQuant的框架，用于解决多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的后训练量化（PTQ）问题，通过模态感知平滑（MAS）和跨模态补偿（CMC）来提高量化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的PTQ方法在应用于MLLMs时面临平滑不对齐和跨模态计算不变性方面的挑战，需要新的方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出MASQuant框架，包括模态感知平滑（MAS）学习分离的、模态特定的平滑因子，以及跨模态补偿（CMC）利用SVD白化转换多模态激活差异为低秩形式，实现跨模态统一量化。
AI.result: MASQuant在双模态和三模态MLLMs上表现出稳定的量化性能，并且在与现有SOTA PTQ算法的比较中具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: MASQuant成功地解决了MLLMs量化中的关键问题，并在性能上与现有最先进技术相当，为MLLMs的高效部署提供了新的解决方案。

title: Optimizing Language Models for Crosslingual Knowledge Consistency
