comment: Under review. The first two authors contributed equally
summary: Large language models are known to often exhibit inconsistent knowledge. This is particularly problematic in multilingual scenarios, where models are likely to be asked similar questions in different languages, and inconsistent responses can undermine their reliability. In this work, we show that this issue can be mitigated using reinforcement learning with a structured reward function, which leads to an optimal policy with consistent crosslingual responses. We introduce Direct Consistency Optimization (DCO), a DPO-inspired method that requires no explicit reward model and is derived directly from the LLM itself. Comprehensive experiments show that DCO significantly improves crosslingual consistency across diverse LLMs and outperforms existing methods when training with samples of multiple languages, while complementing DPO when gold labels are available. Extra experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of DCO in bilingual settings, significant out-of-domain generalizability, and controllable alignment via direction hyperparameters. Taken together, these results establish DCO as a robust and efficient solution for improving knowledge consistency across languages in multilingual LLMs. All code, training scripts, and evaluation benchmarks are released at https://github.com/Betswish/ConsistencyRL.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为直接一致性优化（DCO）的新方法，利用强化学习和结构化奖励函数来提高大型语言模型（LLM）的多语言知识一致性，该方法不需要显式的奖励模型，且在实验中表现出优于现有方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在多语言场景下常表现出知识不一致的问题，这会降低其可靠性。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为直接一致性优化（DCO）的方法，该方法受 DPO 启发，利用强化学习和结构化奖励函数，直接从 LLM 本身推导出最优策略，实现跨语言响应的一致性，无需显式的奖励模型。
AI.result: DCO 显著提高了各种 LLM 的跨语言一致性，在多语言训练样本下优于现有方法，并且在有金标签时可以与 DPO 互补。此外，DCO 在双语设置、领域外泛化以及通过超参数进行可控对齐方面也表现出有效性。
AI.conclusion: DCO 是一种有效且鲁棒的解决方案，能够提高多语言 LLM 在跨语言方面的知识一致性。

title: Beyond the Patch: Exploring Vulnerabilities of Visuomotor Policies via Viewpoint-Consistent 3D Adversarial Object
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, Accepted to ICRA 2026. Project page: https://chan-mi-lee.github.io/3DAdvObj/
summary: Neural network-based visuomotor policies enable robots to perform manipulation tasks but remain susceptible to perceptual attacks. For example, conventional 2D adversarial patches are effective under fixed-camera setups, where appearance is relatively consistent; however, their efficacy often diminishes under dynamic viewpoints from moving cameras, such as wrist-mounted setups, due to perspective distortions. To proactively investigate potential vulnerabilities beyond 2D patches, this work proposes a viewpoint-consistent adversarial texture optimization method for 3D objects through differentiable rendering. As optimization strategies, we employ Expectation over Transformation (EOT) with a Coarse-to-Fine (C2F) curriculum, exploiting distance-dependent frequency characteristics to induce textures effective across varying camera-object distances. We further integrate saliency-guided perturbations to redirect policy attention and design a targeted loss that persistently drives robots toward adversarial objects. Our comprehensive experiments show that the proposed method is effective under various environmental conditions, while confirming its black-box transferability and real-world applicability.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于可微分渲染的3D物体对抗纹理优化方法，旨在克服传统2D对抗样本在动态视角下的局限性，并提高机器人操纵任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于神经网络的视觉-运动策略在机器人操作任务中易受感知攻击，特别是传统的2D对抗样本在视角变化时效果会显著下降。本研究旨在探索超越2D对抗样本的潜在漏洞，并提高机器人策略在动态视角下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用可微分渲染技术，结合期望最大化（EOT）和粗粒度到细粒度（C2F）课程学习策略，优化3D物体的对抗纹理。利用距离依赖的频率特征，设计能够跨越不同相机-物体距离的纹理。此外，集成显著性引导的扰动，并将目标损失用于持续引导机器人朝向对抗物体。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在不同环境条件下均有效，并具有黑盒迁移性和实际应用潜力。研究证实了所提出的3D对抗纹理在动态视角下比2D对抗样本更有效。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功提出了一种针对3D物体、可在动态视角下保持一致性的对抗纹理优化方法，显著增强了机器人视觉-运动策略在面对感知攻击时的鲁棒性，并为机器人安全性研究提供了新的方向。

title: VISA: Value Injection via Shielded Adaptation for Personalized LLM Alignment
summary: Aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with nuanced human values remains a critical challenge, as existing methods like Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) often handle only coarse-grained attributes. In practice, fine-tuning LLMs on task-specific datasets to optimize value alignment inevitably incurs an alignment tax: the model's pre-calibrated value system drifts significantly due to latent bias absorption from training data, while the fine-tuning process also causes severe hallucinations and semantic information loss in generated responses. To address this, we propose VISA (Value Injection via Shielded Adaptation), a closed-loop framework designed to navigate this trade-off. VISA's architecture features a high-precision value detector, a semantic-to-value translator, and a core value-rewriter. The value-rewriter is trained via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a composite reward function that simultaneously optimizes for fine-grained value precision, and the preservation of semantic integrity. By learning an optimal policy to balance these competing objectives, VISA effectively mitigates the alignment tax while staying loyal to the original knowledge. Our experiments demonstrate that this approach enables precise control over a model's value expression while maintaining its factual consistency and general capabilities, significantly outperforming both standard fine-tuning methods and prompting-based baselines, including GPT-4o.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VISA（Value Injection via Shielded Adaptation）的框架，通过高精度价值检测器、语义到价值翻译器和核心价值重写器，利用GRPO算法优化策略，旨在解决现有方法在对齐大型语言模型（LLMs）的细粒度人类价值观时出现的“对齐税”问题，该问题表现为价值漂移、幻觉和语义信息丢失。VISA通过在优化细粒度价值精确性和语义完整性之间取得平衡，成功保留了模型的原始知识和通用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM对齐人类价值观的方法（如RLHF）通常只能处理粗粒度属性，而针对特定任务的微调会引入“对齐税”，导致模型价值系统漂移、生成幻觉和语义信息丢失。研究旨在解决这一挑战，实现对LLM细粒度价值观的精确控制，同时保持其事实一致性和通用能力。
AI.method: 提出VISA（Value Injection via Shielded Adaptation）框架，包含三个核心组件：高精度价值检测器、语义到价值翻译器和核心价值重写器。价值重写器通过Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)算法进行训练，采用复合奖励函数，同时优化细粒度价值精确性和语义完整性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，VISA框架能够精确控制模型的价值表达，同时保持其事实一致性和通用能力，显著优于标准微调方法和基于提示的方法，包括GPT-4o。
AI.conclusion: VISA框架有效缓解了LLM对齐中的“对齐税”问题，实现了在保持模型原有知识和能力的同时，对其进行细粒度价值的精确控制，是解决LLM价值对齐挑战的一种有效方法。

title: LLM-Grounded Explainability for Port Congestion Prediction via Temporal Graph Attention Networks
summary: Port congestion at major maritime hubs disrupts global supply chains, yet existing prediction systems typically prioritize forecasting accuracy without providing operationally interpretable explanations. This paper proposes AIS-TGNN, an evidence-grounded framework that jointly performs congestion-escalation prediction and faithful natural-language explanation by coupling a Temporal Graph Attention Network (TGAT) with a structured large language model (LLM) reasoning module. Daily spatial graphs are constructed from Automatic Identification System (AIS) broadcasts, where each grid cell represents localized vessel activity and inter-cell interactions are modeled through attention-based message passing. The TGAT predictor captures spatiotemporal congestion dynamics, while model-internal evidence, including feature z-scores and attention-derived neighbor influence, is transformed into structured prompts that constrain LLM reasoning to verifiable model outputs. To evaluate explanatory reliability, we introduce a directional-consistency validation protocol that quantitatively measures agreement between generated narratives and underlying statistical evidence. Experiments on six months of AIS data from the Port of Los Angeles and Long Beach demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms both LR and GCN baselines, achieving a test AUC of 0.761, AP of 0.344, and recall of 0.504 under a strict chronological split while producing explanations with 99.6% directional consistency. Results show that grounding LLM generation in graph-model evidence enables interpretable and auditable risk reporting without sacrificing predictive performance. The framework provides a practical pathway toward operationally deployable explainable AI for maritime congestion monitoring and supply-chain risk management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AIS-TGNN的框架，该框架结合了时间图注意力网络（TGAT）和大型语言模型（LLM）来预测港口拥堵升级并提供可解释的自然语言解释。该框架通过AIS数据构建时空图，利用TGAT捕获拥堵动态，并将模型内部证据用于约束LLM的推理，从而生成可验证的解释。实验证明，该框架在预测性能上优于基线模型，并且解释具有高度的一致性，为海事拥堵监测和供应链风险管理提供了一种可解释且可审计的AI解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有的港口拥堵预测系统虽然追求准确性，但缺乏操作上可解释的解释，难以满足实际应用需求。本研究旨在弥补这一差距，提供一种既能准确预测拥堵，又能生成可信赖、可审计解释的框架。
AI.method: 该研究提出AIS-TGNN框架，该框架结合了时间图注意力网络（TGAT）和结构化大型语言模型（LLM）推理模块。首先，从AIS数据构建每日空间图，其中网格单元代表局部船舶活动，并通过基于注意力的消息传递模拟单元间的交互。TGAT用于捕获时空拥堵动态。然后，将模型的内部证据（如特征z分数和邻域影响）转化为结构化提示，约束LLM的推理过程，确保生成解释的可验证性。最后，引入方向一致性验证协议来量化解释的可靠性。
AI.result: 在洛杉矶和长滩港六个月的AIS数据上进行的实验表明，AIS-TGNN框架在测试AUC、AP和召回率方面均优于LR和GCN基线模型，分别达到0.761、0.344和0.504。此外，生成的解释具有99.6%的方向一致性，表明其高度可信。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM生成与图模型证据相结合，能够在不牺牲预测性能的情况下，实现可解释和可审计的风险报告。该框架为海事拥堵监测和供应链风险管理提供了一条通往可部署的、可解释AI的实用途径。

title: Stan: An LLM-based thermodynamics course assistant
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures. For associated code repository, see https://github.com/EntropicLearners/stan.git
summary: Discussions of AI in education focus predominantly on student-facing tools -- chatbots, tutors, and problem generators -- while the potential for the same infrastructure to support instructors remains largely unexplored. We describe Stan, a suite of tools for an undergraduate chemical engineering thermodynamics course built on a data pipeline that we develop and deploy in dual roles: serving students and supporting instructors from a shared foundation of lecture transcripts and a structured textbook index. On the student side, a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline answers natural-language queries by extracting technical terms, matching them against the textbook index, and synthesizing grounded responses with specific chapter and page references. On the instructor side, the same transcript corpus is processed through structured analysis pipelines that produce per-lecture summaries, identify student questions and moments of confusion, and catalog the anecdotes and analogies used to motivate difficult material -- providing a searchable, semester-scale record of teaching that supports course reflection, reminders, and improvement. All components, including speech-to-text transcription, structured content extraction, and interactive query answering, run entirely on locally controlled hardware using open-weight models (Whisper large-v3, Llama~3.1 8B) with no dependence on cloud APIs, ensuring predictable costs, full data privacy, and reproducibility independent of third-party services. We describe the design, implementation, and practical failure modes encountered when deploying 7--8 billion parameter models for structured extraction over long lecture transcripts, including context truncation, bimodal output distributions, and schema drift, along with the mitigations that resolved them.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个名为Stan的AI工具套件，用于支持本科生化学工程热力学课程中的学生和教师。该系统利用本地部署的开源模型，通过检索增强生成（RAG）为学生提供课程内容问答，并为教师生成课程总结、识别学生困惑点和整理教学案例，从而实现课程数据的双重利用，并确保数据隐私和成本可控。
AI.motivation: 现有AI在教育领域的讨论主要集中在学生端工具，而对支持教师的工具潜力则关注不足。研究旨在探索如何利用相同的AI基础设施来同时服务学生和支持教师，弥补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 研究开发了一个数据管道，将讲座记录和结构化教科书索引作为基础。学生端采用检索增强生成（RAG）模型，通过提取技术术语、匹配教科书索引并合成有具体章节和页面引用的答案来回答自然语言查询。教师端则利用相同的讲座记录，通过结构化分析管道生成课程总结、识别学生问题和困惑点、以及记录用于解释困难材料的轶事和类比，构建可搜索的教学记录。整个系统在本地硬件上使用开源模型（Whisper large-v3, Llama~3.1 8B）运行，不依赖云API。
AI.result: 研究成功部署了支持学生和教师的AI工具。学生端能够根据自然语言查询提供有依据的答案。教师端能够获得关于课程内容、学生反馈和教学方法的结构化信息。研究还详细描述了在处理长讲座记录时遇到的7-80亿参数模型在结构化提取方面的实际故障模式，如上下文截断、双峰输出分布和模式漂移，以及相应的缓解措施。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了利用AI基础设施同时支持学生和教师在化学工程热力学课程中的可行性。通过本地部署开源模型，实现了成本可控、数据隐私保护和可复现性。该研究为教育领域AI工具的设计和部署提供了实践经验和解决方案，特别是针对大规模数据处理和模型应用中的挑战。

title: Guiding Diffusion-based Reconstruction with Contrastive Signals for Balanced Visual Representation
summary: The limited understanding capacity of the visual encoder in Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has become a key bottleneck for downstream performance. This capacity includes both Discriminative Ability (D-Ability), which reflects class separability, and Detail Perceptual Ability (P-Ability), which focuses on fine-grained visual cues. Recent solutions use diffusion models to enhance representations by conditioning image reconstruction on CLIP visual tokens. We argue that such paradigms may compromise D-Ability and therefore fail to effectively address CLIP's representation limitations. To address this, we integrate contrastive signals into diffusion-based reconstruction to pursue more comprehensive visual representations. We begin with a straightforward design that augments the diffusion process with contrastive learning on input images. However, empirical results show that the naive combination suffers from gradient conflict and yields suboptimal performance. To balance the optimization, we introduce the Diffusion Contrastive Reconstruction (DCR), which unifies the learning objective. The key idea is to inject contrastive signals derived from each reconstructed image, rather than from the original input, into the diffusion process. Our theoretical analysis shows that the DCR loss can jointly optimize D-Ability and P-Ability. Extensive experiments across various benchmarks and multi-modal large language models validate the effectiveness of our method. The code is available at https://github.com/boyuh/DCR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为扩散对比重建（DCR）的新方法，通过将对比学习信号注入到扩散模型中，以增强CLIP视觉编码器的理解能力，同时提升判别能力（D-Ability）和细节感知能力（P-Ability）。
AI.motivation: CLIP的视觉编码器在理解能力方面存在瓶颈，尤其是在判别能力和细节感知能力上。现有的基于扩散模型增强的方法可能损害判别能力，因此需要一种更有效的方法来解决CLIP的表示局限性。
AI.method: 本文首先尝试在扩散过程中简单地增加对比学习，但发现存在梯度冲突问题。随后，提出DCR方法，将从重建图像而非原始输入图像中提取的对比信号注入到扩散过程中，从而统一了学习目标，并理论分析证明DCR能同时优化D-Ability和P-Ability。
AI.result: 通过在多个基准测试和多模态大型语言模型上的广泛实验，验证了DCR方法的有效性。DCR能够更全面地提升CLIP的视觉表示能力。
AI.conclusion: DCR方法通过将对比学习信号与扩散重建相结合，成功地增强了CLIP视觉编码器的判别能力和细节感知能力，从而在下游任务中取得了更好的性能。该方法有效解决了现有技术中的不足。

title: Integrated cooperative localization of heterogeneous measurement swarm: A unified data-driven method
summary: The cooperative localization (CL) problem in heterogeneous robotic systems with different measurement capabilities is investigated in this work. In practice, heterogeneous sensors lead to directed and sparse measurement topologies, whereas most existing CL approaches rely on multilateral localization with restrictive multi-neighbor geometric requirements. To overcome this limitation, we enable pairwise relative localization (RL) between neighboring robots using only mutual measurement and odometry information. A unified data-driven adaptive RL estimator is first developed to handle heterogeneous and unidirectional measurements. Based on the convergent RL estimates, a distributed pose-coupling CL strategy is then designed, which guarantees CL under a weakly connected directed measurement topology, representing the least restrictive condition among existing results. The proposed method is independent of specific control tasks and is validated through a formation control application and real-world experiments.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新的合作定位（CL）方法，用于具有不同测量能力（异构）的机器人系统。该方法能够处理稀疏和定向的测量拓扑，这是传统方法难以应对的。通过使用数据驱动的自适应相对定位（RL）估计器，解决了异构和单向测量问题，然后在此基础上设计了一个分布式姿态耦合CL策略，在最宽松的网络连通性条件下也能保证CL。该方法已通过仿真和真实实验验证。
AI.motivation: 现有合作定位（CL）方法通常依赖于多边定位，需要机器人之间有严格的几何约束和多邻居测量。然而，在异构机器人系统中，传感器能力不同会导致测量拓扑变得定向和稀疏，现有方法难以在这种情况下工作。因此，需要一种能够处理异构、单向测量以及稀疏拓扑的CL方法。
AI.method: 1. 开发了一个统一的数据驱动自适应相对定位（RL）估计器，用于处理异构和单向测量。该估计器仅使用机器人之间的相互测量和里程计信息。2. 基于收敛的RL估计，设计了一个分布式姿态耦合CL策略。该策略能够在弱连接的定向测量拓扑下实现CL。
AI.result: 提出的CL方法能够处理异构机器人系统中的定向和稀疏测量拓扑，这是现有方法难以达到的。在最宽松的弱连接定向测量拓扑条件下，仍能保证CL。该方法已被验证独立于具体的控制任务，并在形成控制应用和真实世界实验中得到了验证。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功地解决了异构机器人系统中具有挑战性的合作定位问题，提出了一种新颖的、鲁棒的分布式CL方法。该方法通过数据驱动的RL估计和分布式姿态耦合策略，在更宽松的网络连通性条件下实现了CL，并验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。

title: Design Behaviour Codes (DBCs): A Taxonomy-Driven Layered Governance Benchmark for Large Language Models
summary: We introduce the Dynamic Behavioral Constraint (DBC) benchmark, the first empirical framework for evaluating the efficacy of a structured, 150-control behavioral governance layer, the MDBC (Madan DBC) system, applied at inference time to large language models (LLMs). Unlike training time alignment methods (RLHF, DPO) or post-hoc content moderation APIs, DBCs constitute a system prompt level governance layer that is model-agnostic, jurisdiction-mappable, and auditable. We evaluate the DBC Framework across a 30 domain risk taxonomy organized into six clusters (Hallucination and Calibration, Bias and Fairness, Malicious Use, Privacy and Data Protection, Robustness and Reliability, and Misalignment Agency) using an agentic red-team protocol with five adversarial attack strategies (Direct, Roleplay, Few-Shot, Hypothetical, Authority Spoof) across 3 model families. Our three-arm controlled design (Base, Base plus Moderation, Base plus DBC) enables causal attribution of risk reduction. Key findings: the DBC layer reduces the aggregate Risk Exposure Rate (RER) from 7.19 percent (Base) to 4.55 percent (Base plus DBC), representing a 36.8 percent relative risk reduction, compared with 0.6 percent for a standard safety moderation prompt. MDBC Adherence Scores improve from 8.6 by 10 (Base) to 8.7 by 10 (Base plus DBC). EU AI Act compliance (automated scoring) reaches 8.5by 10 under the DBC layer. A three judge evaluation ensemble yields Fleiss kappa greater than 0.70 (substantial agreement), validating our automated pipeline. Cluster ablation identifies the Integrity Protection cluster (MDBC 081 099) as delivering the highest per domain risk reduction, while graybox adversarial attacks achieve a DBC Bypass Rate of 4.83 percent . We release the benchmark code, prompt database, and all evaluation artefacts to enable reproducibility and longitudinal tracking as models evolve.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了动态行为约束（DBC）基准和MDBC系统，用于在推理时评估大型语言模型（LLMs）的行为治理。MDBC作为一种模型无关的系统提示层，在30个风险域的分类下，通过包含五种攻击策略的代理红队协议进行评估。结果显示，MDBC相较于基线模型，将整体风险暴露率（RER）降低了36.8%，并提高了MDBC依从性和欧盟AI法案的合规性。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM对齐方法（如RLHF, DPO）在训练时进行，内容审核API在事后处理。作者提出了一种在推理时应用的、模型无关的、可映射到司法管辖区并可审计的行为治理层，以填补现有方法的不足。
AI.method: 研究提出了动态行为约束（DBC）基准和MDBC（Madan DBC）系统。DBC作为一种系统提示层，被应用于LLMs的推理过程。研究人员构建了一个包含30个风险域的分类体系，并使用包含五种攻击策略（直接、角色扮演、少样本、假设、权威欺骗）的代理红队协议，在三个模型家族上对DBC框架进行了评估。实验设计为三组对照（基线、基线+内容审核、基线+DBC），以实现风险降低的因果归因。
AI.result: DBC层将整体风险暴露率（RER）从基线模型的7.19%降低到4.55%，相对风险降低了36.8%，而标准安全审核提示的风险降低仅为0.6%。MDBC依从性得分从基线的8.6/10提高到8.7/10。在DBC层下，欧盟AI法案的合规性评分达到8.5/10。三个独立的评估者组成的评估小组的Fleiss kappa值大于0.70，验证了自动化评估流程。对簇的消融研究表明，完整性保护（MDBC 081-099）在每个域的风险降低方面效果最显著。然而，灰盒对抗攻击的DBC绕过率为4.83%。
AI.conclusion: DBC作为一种模型无关的、系统提示级别的治理层，能够有效降低LLMs的风险暴露，提高合规性，并支持可复现的评估。尽管取得了显著进展，但仍存在DBC被绕过的可能性，未来研究可进一步探索提高其鲁棒性。

title: Meta-D: Metadata-Aware Architectures for Brain Tumor Analysis and Missing-Modality Segmentation
summary: We present Meta-D, an architecture that explicitly leverages categorical scanner metadata such as MRI sequence and plane orientation to guide feature extraction for brain tumor analysis. We aim to improve the performance of medical image deep learning pipelines by integrating explicit metadata to stabilize feature representations. We first evaluate this in 2D tumor detection, where injecting sequence (e.g., T1, T2) and plane (e.g., axial) metadata dynamically modulates convolutional features, yielding an absolute increase of up to 2.62% in F1-score over image-only baselines. Because metadata grounds feature extraction when data are available, we hypothesize it can serve as a robust anchor when data are missing. We apply this to 3D missing-modality tumor segmentation. Our Transformer Maximizer utilizes metadata-based cross-attention to isolate and route available modalities, ensuring the network focuses on valid slices. This targeted attention improves brain tumor segmentation Dice scores by up to 5.12% under extreme modality scarcity while reducing model parameters by 24.1%.

AI.tldr: Meta-D 是一种新架构，它利用 MRI 扫描仪的元数据（如序列和平面方向）来增强脑肿瘤分析的特征提取，在 2D 检测和 3D 缺失模态分割任务中均取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前的医学图像深度学习模型在处理不同扫描序列、平面方向或缺失模态的数据时，特征表示可能不稳定。研究动机是利用显式元数据来稳定特征提取，从而提高模型的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.method: Meta-D 架构通过动态调制卷积特征来整合序列和平面元数据，用于 2D 肿瘤检测。对于 3D 缺失模态肿瘤分割，利用基于元数据的交叉注意力机制（Transformer Maximizer）来隔离和路由可用模态的数据。
AI.result: 在 2D 肿瘤检测任务中，Meta-D 将 F1 分数提高了高达 2.62%。在 3D 缺失模态肿瘤分割任务中，即使在极端模态稀缺的情况下，Dice 分数也提高了高达 5.12%，同时模型参数减少了 24.1%。
AI.conclusion: 显式利用扫描仪元数据（如序列和平面）可以显著提高脑肿瘤分析任务的性能，并在缺失模态的情况下提供鲁棒性，同时还能优化模型参数。

title: Observer Design for Augmented Reality-based Teleoperation of Soft Robots
summary: Although virtual and augmented reality are gaining traction as teleoperation tools for various types of robots, including manipulators and mobile robots, they are not being used for soft robots. The inherent difficulties of modelling soft robots mean that combining accurate and computationally efficient representations is very challenging. This paper presents an augmented reality interface for teleoperating these devices. The developed system consists of Microsoft HoloLens 2 glasses and a central computer responsible for calculations. Validation is performed on PETER, a highly modular pneumatic manipulator. Using data collected from sensors, the computer estimates the robot's position based on the physics of the virtual reality programme. Errors obtained are on the order of 5% of the robot's length, demonstrating that augmented reality facilitates operator interaction with soft manipulators and can be integrated into the control loop.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种用于软体机器人远程操作的增强现实（AR）界面，该界面使用Microsoft HoloLens 2眼镜和中央计算单元，并通过在 PETER 气动机械臂上的实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 虽然虚拟现实（VR）和增强现实（AR）已应用于多种机器人（如机械手和移动机器人）的远程操作，但由于软体机器人建模的固有难度，目前尚未广泛应用于软体机器人。
AI.method: 研究开发了一个AR界面，集成了Microsoft HoloLens 2眼镜和一个负责计算的中央计算机。该系统利用传感器数据，基于VR程序的物理模型来估计机器人的位置。通过在模块化气动机械臂 PETER 上进行验证。
AI.result: 在 PETER 气动机械臂上的实验表明，该AR界面可以实现对软体机器人的远程操作，估计位置的误差约为机器人长度的5%。
AI.conclusion: 增强现实技术能够有效促进操作员与软体机械臂的交互，并可以集成到其控制回路中，为软体机器人的远程操作提供了一种可行的解决方案。

title: Non-Zipfian Distribution of Stopwords and Subset Selection Models
summary: Stopwords are words that are not very informative to the content or the meaning of a language text. Most stopwords are function words but can also be common verbs, adjectives and adverbs. In contrast to the well known Zipf's law for rank-frequency plot for all words, the rank-frequency plot for stopwords are best fitted by the Beta Rank Function (BRF). On the other hand, the rank-frequency plots of non-stopwords also deviate from the Zipf's law, but are fitted better by a quadratic function of log-token-count over log-rank than by BRF. Based on the observed rank of stopwords in the full word list, we propose a stopword (subset) selection model that the probability for being selected as a function of the word's rank $r$ is a decreasing Hill's function ($1/(1+(r/r_{mid})^γ)$); whereas the probability for not being selected is the standard Hill's function ( $1/(1+(r_{mid}/r)^γ)$). We validate this selection probability model by a direct estimation from an independent collection of texts. We also show analytically that this model leads to a BRF rank-frequency distribution for stopwords when the original full word list follows the Zipf's law, as well as explaining the quadratic fitting function for the non-stopwords.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于词语排名的停用词选择模型，该模型可以解释停用词和非停用词在文本中的频率分布特性，并与现有的Zipf定律和Beta Rank Function（BRF）等模型进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 传统的Zipf定律难以完美描述停用词和非停用词的频率分布，并且现有模型未能统一解释这两种词语的分布差异。本研究旨在提出一个更优的模型来解释和预测停用词的选择概率及其频率分布。
AI.method: 研究者提出了一个基于词语排名的停用词选择概率模型，该模型使用递减的Hill函数来描述停用词被选中的概率，并使用标准的Hill函数描述非停用词的概率。通过独立文本集合的实际数据对模型进行了验证，并通过数学分析证明了该模型能导出BRF分布用于停用词，并解释非停用词的二次拟合函数。
AI.result: 研究表明，所提出的停用词选择模型能够有效地预测停用词的分布，并能通过数学推导解释停用词遵循BRF分布以及非停用词的频率分布特征。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的基于词语排名的停用词选择模型提供了一种新的视角来理解文本中的词语频率分布，特别是停用词的分布，并且该模型具有理论和实践上的意义。

title: On Multi-Step Theorem Prediction via Non-Parametric Structural Priors
summary: Multi-step theorem prediction is a central challenge in automated reasoning. Existing neural-symbolic approaches rely heavily on supervised parametric models, which exhibit limited generalization to evolving theorem libraries. In this work, we explore training-free theorem prediction through the lens of in-context learning (ICL). We identify a critical scalability bottleneck, termed Structural Drift: as reasoning depth increases, the performance of vanilla ICL degrades sharply, often collapsing to near zero. We attribute this failure to the LLM's inability to recover latent topological dependencies, leading to unstructured exploration. To address this issue, we propose Theorem Precedence Graphs, which encode temporal dependencies from historical solution traces as directed graphs, and impose explicit topological constraints that effectively prune the search space during inference. Coupled with retrieval-augmented graph construction and a stepwise symbolic executor, our approach enables LLMs to act as structured planners without any gradient-based optimization. Experiments on the FormalGeo7k benchmark show that our method achieves 89.29% accuracy, substantially outperforming ICL baselines and matching state-of-the-art supervised models. These results indicate that explicit structural priors offer a promising direction for scaling LLM-based symbolic reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为“定理优先图”（Theorem Precedence Graphs）的方法，利用 in-context learning（ICL）来预测多步定理证明，解决了现有方法在处理不断变化的定理库时泛化能力不足的问题，并通过引入结构化约束有效提升了推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经符号方法在定理预测方面依赖于有监督的参数模型，这些模型在面对不断变化的定理库时泛化能力有限。本研究旨在探索一种无需训练的定理预测方法，即通过 in-context learning（ICL），并解决其在处理复杂推理时遇到的性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于 in-context learning（ICL）的训练无关定理预测方法。为了解决 vanilla ICL 在高推理深度下的性能衰减问题（结构漂移），研究者提出了定理优先图（Theorem Precedence Graphs），该图能够编码历史解题过程中的时间依赖性，并施加显式的拓扑约束来约束推理过程。该方法还结合了检索增强的图构建和分步符号执行器，使大型语言模型（LLM）能够充当结构化规划器。
AI.result: 在 FormalGeo7k 基准测试中，该方法达到了 89.29% 的准确率，显著优于 ICL 基线模型，并且性能与最先进的有监督模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 显式的结构化先验（如定理优先图）是扩展大型语言模型在符号推理方面能力的一个有前景的方向。无需训练的定理预测方法通过引入结构化约束，可以有效地克服 ICL 在处理复杂推理时的局限性。

title: Revisiting Shape from Polarization in the Era of Vision Foundation Models
summary: We show that, with polarization cues, a lightweight model trained on a small dataset can outperform RGB-only vision foundation models (VFMs) in single-shot object-level surface normal estimation. Shape from polarization (SfP) has long been studied due to the strong physical relationship between polarization and surface geometry. Meanwhile, driven by scaling laws, RGB-only VFMs trained on large datasets have recently achieved impressive performance and surpassed existing SfP methods. This situation raises questions about the necessity of polarization cues, which require specialized hardware and have limited training data. We argue that the weaker performance of prior SfP methods does not come from the polarization modality itself, but from domain gaps. These domain gaps mainly arise from two sources. First, existing synthetic datasets use limited and unrealistic 3D objects, with simple geometry and random texture maps that do not match the underlying shapes. Second, real-world polarization signals are often affected by sensor noise, which is not well modeled during training. To address the first issue, we render a high-quality polarization dataset using 1,954 3D-scanned real-world objects. We further incorporate pretrained DINOv3 priors to improve generalization to unseen objects. To address the second issue, we introduce polarization sensor-aware data augmentation that better reflects real-world conditions. With only 40K training scenes, our method significantly outperforms both state-of-the-art SfP approaches and RGB-only VFMs. Extensive experiments show that polarization cues enable a 33x reduction in training data or an 8x reduction in model parameters, while still achieving better performance than RGB-only counterparts.

AI.tldr: 该研究表明，利用偏振线索（即使是轻量级模型和少量数据）可以在单次物体级表面法线估计方面超越仅使用RGB的视觉基础模型（VFMs）。
AI.motivation: 当前流行的仅RGB的VFMs在大型数据集上表现出色，引发了对偏振线索必要性的质疑，尽管偏振线索与表面几何有物理关联。研究旨在探讨偏振线索的真正潜力，并解释过往SfP方法表现不佳的原因。
AI.method: 1. 构建了一个高质量的偏振数据集，使用1954个3D扫描的真实世界物体进行渲染。2. 整合预训练的DINOv3先验以提高泛化能力。3. 引入偏振传感器感知的 数据增强，以更好地模拟真实世界的传感器噪声。4. 训练一个轻量级模型。
AI.result: 使用40K训练场景，该方法显著优于最先进的SfP方法和仅RGB的VFMs。偏振线索实现了33倍的训练数据减少或8倍的模型参数减少，同时仍能达到优于RGB-only方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 偏振线索在表面法线估计任务中仍然非常重要且有效，其被低估的原因在于过去SfP方法中存在的领域差距（合成数据不真实、传感器噪声未被充分建模）。通过解决这些问题，偏振线索可以显著提高效率和性能。

title: Causally Robust Reward Learning from Reason-Augmented Preference Feedback
comment: Published in International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2026
summary: Preference-based reward learning is widely used for shaping agent behavior to match a user's preference, yet its sparse binary feedback makes it especially vulnerable to causal confusion. The learned reward often latches onto spurious features that merely co-occur with preferred trajectories during training, collapsing when those correlations disappear or reverse at test time. We introduce ReCouPLe, a lightweight framework that uses natural language rationales to provide the missing causal signal. Each rationale is treated as a guiding projection axis in an embedding space, training the model to score trajectories based on features aligned with that axis while de-emphasizing context that is unrelated to the stated reason. Because the same rationales (e.g., "avoids collisions", "completes the task faster") can appear across multiple tasks, ReCouPLe naturally reuses the same causal direction whenever tasks share semantics, and transfers preference knowledge to novel tasks without extra data or language-model fine-tuning. Our learned reward model can ground preferences on the articulated reason, aligning better with user intent and generalizing beyond spurious features. ReCouPLe outperforms baselines by up to 1.5x in reward accuracy under distribution shifts, and 2x in downstream policy performance in novel tasks. We have released our code at https://github.com/mj-hwang/ReCouPLe

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 ReCouPLe 的轻量级框架，通过利用自然语言解释来解决基于偏好的奖励学习中的因果混淆问题，从而提高奖励模型在分布变化和新任务上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 基于偏好的奖励学习容易受到因果混淆的影响，即奖励模型会学习到与偏好轨迹仅共现但并非因果相关的特征，导致在测试时泛化能力差。作者希望解决这个问题，提高奖励模型与用户意图的对齐和泛化能力。
AI.method: ReCouPLe 框架使用自然语言解释作为引导的投影轴，在嵌入空间中训练模型，使其根据与该轴对齐的特征对轨迹进行评分，同时弱化与所陈述原因无关的上下文。这种方法利用了相同解释在不同任务中的语义共性，实现了知识的重用和迁移。
AI.result: ReCouPLe 在分布变化下奖励准确性方面比基线方法高出 1.5 倍，在新任务的下游策略性能方面高出 2 倍。模型能够将偏好与所阐述的原因联系起来，更好地与用户意图对齐，并超越了虚假特征。
AI.conclusion: ReCouPLe 框架通过引入自然语言解释，有效地缓解了基于偏好的奖励学习中的因果混淆问题，显著提高了奖励模型在分布外泛化和跨任务迁移方面的性能，并且能够更好地理解和对齐用户意图。

title: Direct Contact-Tolerant Motion Planning With Vision Language Models
summary: Navigation in cluttered environments often requires robots to tolerate contact with movable or deformable objects to maintain efficiency. Existing contact-tolerant motion planning (CTMP) methods rely on indirect spatial representations (e.g., prebuilt map, obstacle set), resulting in inaccuracies and a lack of adaptiveness to environmental uncertainties. To address this issue, we propose a direct contact-tolerant (DCT) planner, which integrates vision-language models (VLMs) into direct point perception and navigation, including two key components. The first one is VLM point cloud partitioner (VPP), which performs contact-tolerance reasoning in image space using VLM, caches inference masks, propagates them across frames using odometry, and projects them onto the current scan to generate a contact-aware point cloud. The second innovation is VPP guided navigation (VGN), which formulates CTMP as a perception-to-control optimization problem under direct contact-aware point cloud constraints, which is further solved by a specialized deep neural network (DNN). We implement DCT in Isaac Sim and a real car-like robot, demonstrating that DCT achieves robust and efficient navigation in cluttered environments with movable obstacles, outperforming representative baselines across diverse metrics. The code is available at: https://github.com/ChrisLeeUM/DCT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接接触式运动规划（DCT）方法，该方法利用视觉语言模型（VLM）进行直接点感知和导航，以应对杂乱环境中的可移动或可变形障碍物，并在仿真和真实机器人上验证了其鲁棒性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有接触容忍运动规划（CTMP）方法依赖间接空间表示，存在不准确和适应性差的问题，尤其是在存在环境不确定性的情况下。
AI.method: 提出了一种直接接触式（DCT）规划器，包含两个主要部分：1. VLM点云分割器（VPP），利用VLM进行接触容忍推理、掩码缓存与传播、以及生成接触感知点云；2. VPP引导导航（VGN），将CTMP构建为感知到控制的优化问题，并用深度神经网络（DNN）解决。
AI.result: DCT在杂乱环境中与可移动障碍物一起实现了鲁棒且高效的导航，在仿真（Isaac Sim）和真实车形机器人上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DCT是一种创新的直接接触式运动规划方法，通过集成VLM解决了传统CTMP方法的局限性，在复杂环境中表现出优越的导航性能。

title: Hate Speech Detection using Large Language Models with Data Augmentation and Feature Enhancement
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 8th International Conference on Natural Language Processing (ICNLP 2026)
summary: This paper evaluates data augmentation and feature enhancement techniques for hate speech detection, comparing traditional classifiers, e.g., Delta Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (Delta TF-IDF), with transformer-based models (DistilBERT, RoBERTa, DeBERTa, Gemma-7B, gpt-oss-20b) across diverse datasets. It examines the impact of Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique (SMOTE), weighted loss determined by inverse class proportions, Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging, and text data augmentation on model performance. The open-source gpt-oss-20b consistently achieves the highest results. On the other hand, Delta TF-IDF responds strongly to data augmentation, reaching 98.2% accuracy on the Stormfront dataset. The study confirms that implicit hate speech is more difficult to detect than explicit hateful content and that enhancement effectiveness depends on dataset, model, and technique interaction. Our research informs the development of hate speech detection by highlighting how dataset properties, model architectures, and enhancement strategies interact, supporting more accurate and context-aware automated detection.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了数据增强和特征增强技术在仇恨言论检测中的作用，比较了传统模型和Transformer模型，发现gpt-oss-20b表现最佳，而Delta TF-IDF对数据增强反应良好。研究还指出隐性仇恨言论更难检测，增强效果取决于数据集、模型和技术的交互。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是为了改进仇恨言论检测的准确性和鲁棒性，探讨数据增强和特征增强技术对不同模型（包括传统模型和先进的Transformer模型）的影响，并了解这些技术与数据集特性、模型架构之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 研究采用了多种方法：1. 评估了Delta TF-IDF、DistilBERT、RoBERTa、DeBERTa、Gemma-7B和gpt-oss-20b等模型在多个仇恨言论检测数据集上的性能。2. 比较了SMOTE、逆类比例加权损失、词性标注（POS）和文本数据增强等技术的效果。3. 分析了隐性仇恨言论与显性仇恨言论的检测难度差异。
AI.result: gpt-oss-20b在大多数情况下表现最佳。Delta TF-IDF模型通过数据增强在Stormfront数据集上达到了98.2%的准确率。研究发现隐性仇恨言论比显性仇恨言论更难检测。数据增强和特征增强技术的有效性因数据集、模型和技术本身的交互而异。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了数据增强和特征增强技术在仇恨言论检测中的潜力，并强调了模型架构、数据集特性和所选增强策略之间复杂相互作用的重要性。研究结果为开发更准确、更具上下文感知能力的自动化仇恨言论检测系统提供了指导。

title: Mitigating Instance Entanglement in Instance-Dependent Partial Label Learning
summary: Partial label learning is a prominent weakly supervised classification task, where each training instance is ambiguously labeled with a set of candidate labels. In real-world scenarios, candidate labels are often influenced by instance features, leading to the emergence of instance-dependent PLL (ID-PLL), a setting that more accurately reflects this relationship. A significant challenge in ID-PLL is instance entanglement, where instances from similar classes share overlapping features and candidate labels, resulting in increased class confusion. To address this issue, we propose a novel Class-specific Augmentation based Disentanglement (CAD) framework, which tackles instance entanglement by both intra- and inter-class regulations. For intra-class regulation, CAD amplifies class-specific features to generate class-wise augmentations and aligns same-class augmentations across instances. For inter-class regulation, CAD introduces a weighted penalty loss function that applies stronger penalties to more ambiguous labels, encouraging larger inter-class distances. By jointly applying intra- and inter-class regulations, CAD improves the clarity of class boundaries and reduces class confusion caused by entanglement. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of CAD in mitigating the entanglement problem and enhancing ID-PLL performance. The code is available at https://github.com/RyanZhaoIc/CAD.git.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CAD（Class-specific Augmentation based Disentanglement）的框架，用于解决部分标签学习（Partial Label Learning, PLL）中实例依赖（instance-dependent PLL, ID-PLL）场景下的实例纠缠问题，通过类内和类间正则化来增强类边界清晰度和减少类混淆。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的部分标签学习（ID-PLL）场景中，候选标签与实例特征相关，容易导致来自相似类别的实例共享特征和候选标签，产生实例纠缠，增加类混淆。现有方法难以有效解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出CAD框架，包含：1. 类内正则化：通过放大类特异性特征生成类别增强样本，并将同类别的增强样本对齐；2. 类间正则化：引入加权惩罚损失函数，对更模糊的标签施加更强的惩罚，以增大类间距离。
AI.result: CAD框架通过联合应用类内和类间正则化，有效改善了类边界的清晰度，并减少了由实例纠缠引起的类混淆。实验结果表明CAD能有效缓解实例纠缠问题并提升ID-PLL的性能。
AI.conclusion: CAD框架能够有效解决ID-PLL中的实例纠缠问题，通过类内和类间正则化的协同作用，提升了模型性能。

title: Detection of Illicit Content on Online Marketplaces using Large Language Models
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 8th International Conference on Natural Language Processing (ICNLP 2026)
summary: Online marketplaces, while revolutionizing global commerce, have inadvertently facilitated the proliferation of illicit activities, including drug trafficking, counterfeit sales, and cybercrimes. Traditional content moderation methods such as manual reviews and rule-based automated systems struggle with scalability, dynamic obfuscation techniques, and multilingual content. Conventional machine learning models, though effective in simpler contexts, often falter when confronting the semantic complexities and linguistic nuances characteristic of illicit marketplace communications. This research investigates the efficacy of Large Language Models (LLMs), specifically Meta's Llama 3.2 and Google's Gemma 3, in detecting and classifying illicit online marketplace content using the multilingual DUTA10K dataset. Employing fine-tuning techniques such as Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) and quantization, these models were systematically benchmarked against a foundational transformer-based model (BERT) and traditional machine learning baselines (Support Vector Machines and Naive Bayes). Experimental results reveal a task-dependent advantage for LLMs. In binary classification (illicit vs. non-illicit), Llama 3.2 demonstrated performance comparable to traditional methods. However, for complex, imbalanced multi-class classification involving 40 specific illicit categories, Llama 3.2 significantly surpassed all baseline models. These findings offer substantial practical implications for enhancing online safety, equipping law enforcement agencies, e-commerce platforms, and cybersecurity specialists with more effective, scalable, and adaptive tools for illicit content detection and moderation.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了大型语言模型（LLM），特别是 Llama 3.2 和 Gemma 3，在检测和分类非法在线市场内容方面的有效性。结果表明，LLM 在处理复杂、不平衡的多类别非法内容分类任务时，优于传统的机器学习模型。
AI.motivation: 传统的在线市场内容审核方法在处理可扩展性、动态模糊技术和多语言内容方面存在局限性，而机器学习模型在处理语义复杂性和语言细微差别方面也面临挑战。因此，需要更有效、更具适应性的方法来检测非法内容。
AI.method: 研究使用了 Meta 的 Llama 3.2 和 Google 的 Gemma 3，并结合参数高效微调（PEFT）和量化等技术。通过多语言 DUTA10K 数据集，将这些 LLM 与基础 transformer 模型（BERT）和传统机器学习基线（SVM 和 Naive Bayes）进行了基准测试。
AI.result: 在二元分类（非法 vs. 非非法）任务中，Llama 3.2 的表现与传统方法相当。然而，在涉及 40 个特定非法类别的复杂、不平衡的多类别分类任务中，Llama 3.2 的性能显著优于所有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: LLM 在检测和分类非法在线市场内容方面，尤其是在处理复杂和不平衡的多类别场景时，展现出显著的优势。这为提升在线安全、辅助执法机构、电子商务平台和网络安全专家提供了更强大、可扩展且适应性强的工具。

title: VinePT-Map: Pole-Trunk Semantic Mapping for Resilient Autonomous Robotics in Vineyards
summary: Reliable long-term deployment of autonomous robots in agricultural environments remains challenging due to perceptual aliasing, seasonal variability, and the dynamic nature of crop canopies. Vineyards, characterized by repetitive row structures and significant visual changes across phenological stages, represent a pivotal field challenge, limiting the robustness of conventional feature-based localization and mapping approaches. This paper introduces VinePT-Map, a semantic mapping framework that leverages vine trunks and support poles as persistent structural landmarks to enable season-agnostic and resilient robot localization. The proposed method formulates the mapping problem as a factor graph, integrating GPS, IMU, and RGB-D observations through robust geometrical constraints that exploit vineyard structure. An efficient perception pipeline based on instance segmentation and tracking, combined with a clustering filter for outlier rejection and pose refinement, enables accurate landmark detection using low-cost sensors and onboard computation. To validate the pipeline, we present a multi-season dataset for trunk and pole segmentation and tracking. Extensive field experiments conducted across diverse seasons demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of the proposed approach, highlighting its suitability for long-term autonomous operation in agricultural environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VinePT-Map的语义建图框架，利用葡萄藤和支撑杆作为持久的结构性地标，以实现不受季节影响且鲁棒的机器人定位，解决了农业环境中长期部署机器人面临的感知混淆、季节性变化和动态作物冠层等挑战。
AI.motivation: 在农业环境中，特别是葡萄园，由于感知混淆、季节性变化和动态的作物冠层，可靠的长期自主机器人部署仍然是一个挑战。传统的基于特征的定位和建图方法难以应对葡萄园重复的行结构和跨物候期的显著视觉变化。
AI.method: 该方法将建图问题构建为因子图，通过利用葡萄园结构的鲁棒几何约束，整合GPS、IMU和RGB-D观测。采用基于实例分割和跟踪的高效感知流程，结合聚类滤波器进行离群值剔除和姿态精炼，以实现低成本传感器和板载计算的精确地标检测。
AI.result: 该研究构建了一个包含跨季节的葡萄藤和支撑杆分割与跟踪的多季数据集。在不同季节进行的广泛实地实验证明了所提方法的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: VinePT-Map框架能够实现不受季节影响且鲁棒的机器人定位，适用于农业环境的长期自主运行。

title: K-Gen: A Multimodal Language-Conditioned Approach for Interpretable Keypoint-Guided Trajectory Generation
summary: Generating realistic and diverse trajectories is a critical challenge in autonomous driving simulation. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, existing methods often rely on structured data like vectorized maps, which fail to capture the rich, unstructured visual context of a scene. To address this, we propose K-Gen, an interpretable keypoint-guided multimodal framework that leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to unify rasterized BEV map inputs with textual scene descriptions. Instead of directly predicting full trajectories, K-Gen generates interpretable keypoints along with reasoning that reflects agent intentions, which are subsequently refined into accurate trajectories by a refinement module. To further enhance keypoint generation, we apply T-DAPO, a trajectory-aware reinforcement fine-tuning algorithm. Experiments on WOMD and nuPlan demonstrate that K-Gen outperforms existing baselines, highlighting the effectiveness of combining multimodal reasoning with keypoint-guided trajectory generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 K-Gen 的新框架，它使用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）来生成更真实、更多样的自动驾驶轨迹。K-Gen 结合了 BEV 地图和文本描述，生成中间的关键点和推理，然后由一个模块将其完善为轨迹，并在 WOMD 和 nuPlan 数据集上取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动驾驶轨迹生成方法依赖结构化数据，未能充分利用场景的视觉信息。因此，需要一种能够整合视觉和文本信息，并生成更真实、更多样轨迹的方法。
AI.method: K-Gen 是一个基于关键点的多模态框架。它使用 MLLMs 将栅格化 BEV 地图和文本场景描述结合起来，生成表示代理意图的可解释关键点和推理。然后，一个细化模块将这些关键点转化为精确的轨迹。此外，还使用了 T-DAPO（轨迹感知强化微调算法）来增强关键点生成。
AI.result: 在 WOMD 和 nuPlan 数据集上的实验表明，K-Gen 的性能优于现有的基线方法。这证明了多模态推理与基于关键点的轨迹生成相结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: K-Gen 通过结合多模态推理和关键点引导的轨迹生成，有效地解决了生成真实和多样化自动驾驶轨迹的挑战，展现出超越现有方法的潜力。

title: AIM-SLAM: Dense Monocular SLAM via Adaptive and Informative Multi-View Keyframe Prioritization with Foundation Model
summary: Recent advances in geometric foundation models have emerged as a promising alternative for addressing the challenge of dense reconstruction in monocular visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). Although geometric foundation models enable SLAM to leverage variable input views, the previous methods remain confined to two-view pairs or fixed-length inputs without sufficient deliberation of geometric context for view selection. To tackle this problem, we propose AIM-SLAM, a dense monocular SLAM framework that exploits an adaptive and informative multi-view keyframe prioritization with dense pointmap predictions from visual geometry grounded transformer (VGGT). Specifically, we introduce the selective information- and geometric-aware multi-view adaptation (SIGMA) module, which employs voxel overlap and information gain to retrieve a candidate set of keyframes and adaptively determine its size. Furthermore, we formulate a joint multi-view Sim(3) optimization that enforces consistent alignment across selected views, substantially improving pose estimation accuracy. The effectiveness of AIM-SLAM is demonstrated on real-world datasets, where it achieves state-of-the-art performance in both pose estimation and dense reconstruction. Our system supports ROS integration, with code is available at https://aimslam.github.io/.

AI.tldr: AIM-SLAM 是一个创新的密集单目 SLAM 框架，通过自适应和信息丰富的多视图关键帧选择（SIGMA 模块）以及联合多视图 Sim(3) 优化，显著提高了姿态估计和密集重建的准确性，并在真实数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于几何基础模型的单目密集 SLAM 方法在利用多视图信息时存在局限，仅限于双视图或固定长度输入，未能充分考虑几何上下文以进行视图选择。
AI.method: 提出 AIM-SLAM 框架，包含 SIGMA 模块，该模块利用体素重叠和信息增益来检索关键帧候选集并自适应确定其大小；同时，通过联合多视图 Sim(3) 优化来强制对齐选定的视图，以提高姿态估计精度。
AI.result: AIM-SLAM 在真实数据集上的姿态估计和密集重建方面均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: AIM-SLAM 框架通过创新的多视图关键帧选择和联合优化策略，有效克服了现有方法的不足，显著提升了单目密集 SLAM 的性能。

title: Towards Highly Transferable Vision-Language Attack via Semantic-Augmented Dynamic Contrastive Interaction
summary: With the rapid advancement and widespread application of vision-language pre-training (VLP) models, their vulnerability to adversarial attacks has become a critical concern. In general, the adversarial examples can typically be designed to exhibit transferable power, attacking not only different models but also across diverse tasks. However, existing attacks on language-vision models mainly rely on static cross-modal interactions and focus solely on disrupting positive image-text pairs, resulting in limited cross-modal disruption and poor transferability. To address this issue, we propose a Semantic-Augmented Dynamic Contrastive Attack (SADCA) that enhances adversarial transferability through progressive and semantically guided perturbation. SADCA progressively disrupts cross-modal alignment through dynamic interactions between adversarial images and texts. This is accomplished by SADCA establishing a contrastive learning mechanism involving adversarial, positive and negative samples, to reinforce the semantic inconsistency of the obtained perturbations. Moreover, we empirically find that input transformations commonly used in traditional transfer-based attacks also benefit VLPs, which motivates a semantic augmentation module that increases the diversity and generalization of adversarial examples. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets and models demonstrate that SADCA significantly improves adversarial transferability and consistently surpasses state-of-the-art methods. The code is released at https://github.com/LiYuanBoJNU/SADCA.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SADCA（语义增强动态对比攻击）的新型攻击方法，通过动态交互和语义引导来增强视觉-语言预训练（VLP）模型对抗性攻击的迁移能力，并在实验中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有针对视觉-语言模型（VLP）的对抗性攻击方法主要依赖静态跨模态交互，并且只关注破坏正例对，导致跨模态干扰有限且迁移能力较差。因此，需要一种能够增强对抗性迁移能力的方法。
AI.method: SADCA通过引入对比学习机制，利用对抗样本、正样本和负样本来加剧跨模态对齐的语义不一致性。该方法逐步破坏对抗图像和文本之间的跨模态对齐，并通过语义增强模块增加对抗样本的多样性和泛化能力，以提升攻击的迁移性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和模型上的广泛实验表明，SADCA显著提高了对抗性攻击的迁移能力，并且性能持续优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: SADCA是一种有效的提升视觉-语言模型对抗性攻击迁移能力的攻击方法，通过动态交互和语义引导，能够更有效地生成具有更强跨模态干扰和更好迁移性的对抗样本。

title: Multi-Paradigm Collaborative Adversarial Attack Against Multi-Modal Large Language Models
summary: The rapid progress of Multi-Modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has significantly advanced downstream applications. However, this progress also exposes serious transferable adversarial vulnerabilities. In general, existing adversarial attacks against MLLMs typically rely on surrogate models trained within a single learning paradigm and perform independent optimisation in their respective feature spaces. This straightforward setting naturally restricts the richness of feature representations, delivering limits on the search space and thus impeding the diversity of adversarial perturbations. To address this, we propose a novel Multi-Paradigm Collaborative Attack (MPCAttack) framework to boost the transferability of adversarial examples against MLLMs. In principle, MPCAttack aggregates semantic representations, from both visual images and language texts, to facilitate joint adversarial optimisation on the aggregated features through a Multi-Paradigm Collaborative Optimisation (MPCO) strategy. By performing contrastive matching on multi-paradigm features, MPCO adaptively balances the importance of different paradigm representations and guides the global perturbation optimisation, effectively alleviating the representation bias. Extensive experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of MPCAttack, indicating that our solution consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both targeted and untargeted attacks on open-source and closed-source MLLMs. The code is released at https://github.com/LiYuanBoJNU/MPCAttack.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为MPCAttack的多范式协同攻击框架，通过聚合图像和文本的语义表示并进行联合优化，以增强对抗样本的迁移性，从而有效提升了对多模态大语言模型的攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有针对多模态大语言模型的对抗攻击通常依赖单一学习范式且独立优化特征空间，这限制了特征表示的丰富性，阻碍了对抗扰动的多样性，从而限制了攻击效果的提升。
AI.method: MPCAttack框架通过多范式协同优化（MPCO）策略，聚合视觉图像和文本的语义表示，并在聚合特征上进行联合对抗优化。MPCO通过对比匹配多范式特征，自适应地平衡不同范式表示的重要性，并指导全局扰动优化，以缓解表示偏差。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行的广泛实验表明，MPCAttack在针对开源和闭源多模态大语言模型的定向和非定向攻击中，其性能一致优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: MPCAttack框架能够通过聚合和协同优化多模态表示来显著提升对抗样本的迁移性，从而实现对多模态大语言模型更强的攻击效果。

title: AI-Assisted Moot Courts: Simulating Justice-Specific Questioning in Oral Arguments
summary: In oral arguments, judges probe attorneys with questions about the factual record, legal claims, and the strength of their arguments. To prepare for this questioning, both law schools and practicing attorneys rely on moot courts: practice simulations of appellate hearings. Leveraging a dataset of U.S. Supreme Court oral argument transcripts, we examine whether AI models can effectively simulate justice-specific questioning for moot court-style training. Evaluating oral argument simulation is challenging because there is no single correct question for any given turn. Instead, effective questioning should reflect a combination of desirable qualities, such as anticipating substantive legal issues, detecting logical weaknesses, and maintaining an appropriately adversarial tone. We introduce a two-layer evaluation framework that assesses both the realism and pedagogical usefulness of simulated questions using complementary proxy metrics. We construct and evaluate both prompt-based and agentic oral argument simulators. We find that simulated questions are often perceived as realistic by human annotators and achieve high recall of ground truth substantive legal issues. However, models still face substantial shortcomings, including low diversity in question types and sycophancy. Importantly, these shortcomings would remain undetected under naive evaluation approaches.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了人工智能模型模拟美国最高法院口头辩论提问以用于模拟法庭训练的有效性。研究人员开发了一个评估框架，并发现尽管模型能生成现实且涵盖实质性法律问题的提问，但在问题多样性和攻击性方面仍存在不足。
AI.motivation: 为了提升模拟法庭训练的效果，研究人员旨在探索人工智能模型是否能有效模拟特定法官的提问，以帮助法律从业者和学生为真实的法庭质询做准备。
AI.method: 研究人员利用美国最高法院的口头辩论转录文本数据集，构建并评估了基于提示（prompt-based）和基于代理（agentic）的口头辩论模拟器。采用一个两层评估框架，结合代理指标来衡量模拟提问的真实性和教学效用，并让真人标注者进行评估。
AI.result: 人工智能模型生成的模拟提问在感知真实性和对地面真实实质性法律问题的覆盖率方面表现良好。然而，在问题类型多样性方面表现不足，并且存在“谄媚”现象（sycophancy），即提问过于迎合，缺乏实质性的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能模型在模拟法官提问方面展现出潜力，能够生成与真实案例相符的问题，并涵盖重要的法律议题。然而，模型在生成多样化且具有批判性的提问方面仍需改进，且需要更精细的评估方法来发现这些不足。

title: IF-RewardBench: Benchmarking Judge Models for Instruction-Following Evaluation
summary: Instruction-following is a foundational capability of large language models (LLMs), with its improvement hinging on scalable and accurate feedback from judge models. However, the reliability of current judge models in instruction-following remains underexplored due to several deficiencies of existing meta-evaluation benchmarks, such as their insufficient data coverage and oversimplified pairwise evaluation paradigms that misalign with model optimization scenarios. To this end, we propose IF-RewardBench, a comprehensive meta-evaluation benchmark for instruction-following that covers diverse instruction and constraint types. For each instruction, we construct a preference graph containing all pairwise preferences among multiple responses based on instruction-following quality. This design enables a listwise evaluation paradigm that assesses the capabilities of judge models to rank multiple responses, which is essential in guiding model alignment. Extensive experiments on IF-RewardBench reveal significant deficiencies in current judge models and demonstrate that our benchmark achieves a stronger positive correlation with downstream task performance compared to existing benchmarks. Our codes and data are available at https://github.com/thu-coai/IF-RewardBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了IF-RewardBench，一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）指令遵循能力的元评估基准。该基准克服了现有基准数据覆盖不足和评估范式过于简化的缺点，采用了基于偏好图的多项式评估方法，并显示出比现有基准更强的下游任务性能相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有用于评估LLM指令遵循能力的元评估基准存在数据覆盖不足和评估范式（如成对评估）与模型优化场景不匹配等问题，导致对当前 judge 模型的可靠性评估不足。因此，需要一个更全面、更符合实际优化需求的评估基准。
AI.method: 提出IF-RewardBench基准，该基准包含多种指令和约束类型。对于每个指令，构建一个包含多响应之间所有成对偏好的偏好图，从而实现列表式评估范式，评估 judge 模型对多个响应进行排名的能力。
AI.result: 在IF-RewardBench上的广泛实验揭示了当前 judge 模型存在的显著缺陷。与现有基准相比，IF-RewardBench与下游任务性能表现出更强的正相关性。
AI.conclusion: IF-RewardBench是一个更全面、更有效的LLM指令遵循能力元评估基准，能够更准确地评估 judge 模型的能力，并为模型对齐提供更好的指导。现有 judge 模型在该基准上面临挑战，表明了进一步改进的必要性。

title: SEA-TS: Self-Evolving Agent for Autonomous Code Generation of Time Series Forecasting Algorithms
summary: Accurate time series forecasting underpins decision-making across domains, yet conventional ML development suffers from data scarcity in new deployments, poor adaptability under distribution shift, and diminishing returns from manual iteration. We propose Self-Evolving Agent for Time Series Algorithms (SEA-TS), a framework that autonomously generates, validates, and optimizes forecasting code via an iterative self-evolution loop. Our framework introduces three key innovations: (1) Metric-Advantage Monte Carlo Tree Search (MA-MCTS), which replaces fixed rewards with a normalized advantage score for discriminative search guidance; (2) Code Review with running prompt refinement, where each executed solution undergoes automated review followed by prompt updates that encode corrective patterns, preventing recurrence of similar errors; and (3) Global Steerable Reasoning, which compares each node against global best and worst solutions, enabling cross-trajectory knowledge transfer. We adopt a MAP-Elites archive for architectural diversity. On the public Solar-Energy benchmark, SEA-TS generated code achieves a 40% MAE reduction relative to TimeMixer, surpassing state-of-the-art methods. On proprietary datasets, SEA-TS generated code reduces WAPE by 8.6% on solar PV forecasting and 7.7% on residential load forecasting compared to human-engineered baselines, and achieves 26.17% MAPE on load forecasting versus 29.34% by TimeMixer. Notably, the evolved models discover novel architectural patterns--including physics-informed monotonic decay heads encoding solar irradiance constraints, per-station learned diurnal cycle profiles, and learnable hourly bias correction--demonstrating that autonomous ML engineering can generate genuinely novel algorithmic ideas beyond manual design.

AI.tldr: SEA-TS 是一个自主生成、验证和优化时间序列预测代码的框架，通过创新的 MA-MCTS、代码审查和全局可引导推理，实现了比现有方法更优越的预测性能，并发现了新颖的算法模式。
AI.motivation: 传统的机器学习在时间序列预测中面临数据稀缺、分布变化适应性差以及手动迭代回报递减等挑战。
AI.method: SEA-TS 框架包含三个创新：1) 度量优势蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MA-MCTS) 用于指导搜索；2) 带有运行提示细化的代码审查，通过自动审查和更新提示来纠正错误；3) 全局可引导推理，通过比较全局最优和最差解决方案来促进知识转移。框架采用 MAP-Elites 存档以实现架构多样性。
AI.result: 在 Solar-Energy 基准测试中，SEA-TS 生成的代码比 TimeMixer 提高了 40% 的 MAE 减少量。在专有数据集上，SEA-TS 生成的代码在太阳能光伏预测上将 WAPE 降低了 8.6%，在住宅负荷预测上降低了 7.7%，在负荷预测上的 MAPE 为 26.17%，优于 TimeMixer 的 29.34%。
AI.conclusion: SEA-TS 框架能够自主生成性能优越的时间序列预测模型，并发现超越手动设计的、真正新颖的算法模式，例如包含物理信息的单调衰减头、每站学习的昼夜循环曲线以及可学习的每小时偏差校正。

title: Bounded State in an Infinite Horizon: Proactive Hierarchical Memory for Ad-Hoc Recall over Streaming Dialogues
summary: Real-world dialogue usually unfolds as an infinite stream. It thus requires bounded-state memory mechanisms to operate within an infinite horizon. However, existing read-then-think memory is fundamentally misaligned with this setting, as it cannot support ad-hoc memory recall while streams unfold. To explore this challenge, we introduce \textbf{STEM-Bench}, the first benchmark for \textbf{ST}reaming \textbf{E}valuation of \textbf{M}emory. It comprises over 14K QA pairs in dialogue streams that assess perception fidelity, temporal reasoning, and global awareness under infinite-horizon constraints. The preliminary analysis on STEM-Bench indicates a critical \textit{fidelity-efficiency dilemma}: retrieval-based methods use fragment context, while full-context models incur unbounded latency. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{ProStream}, a proactive hierarchical memory framework for streaming dialogues. It enables ad-hoc memory recall on demand by reasoning over continuous streams with multi-granular distillation. Moreover, it employs Adaptive Spatiotemporal Optimization to dynamically optimize retention based on expected utility. It enables a bounded knowledge state for lower inference latency without sacrificing reasoning fidelity. Experiments show that ProStream outperforms baselines in both accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了STEM-Bench基准测试，用于评估对话记忆在流式和无限时间跨度下的表现，并引入了ProStream模型，一种主动式分层记忆框架，旨在解决现有方法在准确性和效率之间的权衡问题，实现了在有界状态下低延迟和高准确率的流式对话记忆。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的对话是无限流动的，需要有界的记忆机制来处理无限的时间跨度。现有方法在记忆检索方面存在局限性，无法在流式对话中进行即时记忆回忆。因此，需要新的基准测试和模型来解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 作者首先提出了STEM-Bench，一个包含14K+ QA对的基准测试，用于评估对话中记忆的感知保真度、时间推理和全局意识。然后，为了解决流式对话中的保真度-效率困境，作者提出了ProStream，一个主动式分层记忆框架，通过多粒度蒸馏实现按需记忆回忆，并利用自适应时空优化动态调整记忆保留策略，以达到有界知识状态和低推理延迟。
AI.result: STEM-Bench的初步分析揭示了检索方法上下文碎片化和全上下文模型延迟过大的问题。ProStream实验结果表明，与基线方法相比，ProStream在准确性和效率方面都取得了更好的表现。
AI.conclusion: ProStream是一个有效的流式对话记忆框架，能够在保持高推理保真度的同时，实现有界知识状态和低推理延迟，解决了现实世界流式对话中记忆机制面临的挑战。

title: GloSplat: Joint Pose-Appearance Optimization for Faster and More Accurate 3D Reconstruction
summary: Feature extraction, matching, structure from motion (SfM), and novel view synthesis (NVS) have traditionally been treated as separate problems with independent optimization objectives. We present GloSplat, a framework that performs \emph{joint pose-appearance optimization} during 3D Gaussian Splatting training. Unlike prior joint optimization methods (BARF, NeRF--, 3RGS) that rely purely on photometric gradients for pose refinement, GloSplat preserves \emph{explicit SfM feature tracks} as first-class entities throughout training: track 3D points are maintained as separate optimizable parameters from Gaussian primitives, providing persistent geometric anchors via a reprojection loss that operates alongside photometric supervision. This architectural choice prevents early-stage pose drift while enabling fine-grained refinement -- a capability absent in photometric-only approaches. We introduce two pipeline variants: (1) \textbf{GloSplat-F}, a COLMAP-free variant using retrieval-based pair selection for efficient reconstruction, and (2) \textbf{GloSplat-A}, an exhaustive matching variant for maximum quality. Both employ global SfM initialization followed by joint photometric-geometric optimization during 3DGS training. Experiments demonstrate that GloSplat-F achieves state-of-the-art among COLMAP-free methods while GloSplat-A surpasses all COLMAP-based baselines.

AI.tldr: GloSplat 是一个框架，在训练 3D 高斯泼溅时进行联合姿态-外观优化。它通过保留显式的 SfM 特征轨迹作为优化参数，并引入重投影损失，从而避免了早期姿态漂移，并实现了细粒度细化。GloSplat-F 和 GloSplat-A 变体分别在无 COLMAP 和有 COLMAP 的情况下取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的 3D 重建方法将特征提取、匹配、运动恢复结构 (SfM) 和新视图合成 (NVS) 作为独立问题处理，优化目标也各不相同。本文旨在解决联合优化姿态和外观的问题，并克服现有方法（如 BARF、NeRF--、3RGS）仅依赖光度梯度进行姿态精炼而导致的早期姿态漂移问题。
AI.method: GloSplat 框架在 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 训练过程中进行联合姿态-外观优化。它保留了显式的 SfM 特征轨迹作为独立的优化参数，并引入了与光度监督并行的重投影损失，以提供持久的几何约束。本文提出了两种变体：GloSplat-F（无 COLMAP，使用检索式对选择）和 GloSplat-A（穷举匹配，最大化质量）。两种变体都采用全局 SfM 初始化，并在 3DGS 训练期间进行联合光度-几何优化。
AI.result: GloSplat-F 在无 COLMAP 的方法中达到了最先进的性能。GloSplat-A 超越了所有基于 COLMAP 的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GloSplat 通过联合姿态-外观优化，并结合显式的 SfM 特征轨迹和重投影损失，有效地解决了 3D 重建中的姿态漂移问题，实现了更精确的 3D 重建和新视图合成。其两种变体在不同设置下均取得了优异的性能。

title: Stacked from One: Multi-Scale Self-Injection for Context Window Extension
summary: The limited context window of contemporary large language models (LLMs) remains a primary bottleneck for their broader application across diverse domains. Although continual pre-training on long-context data offers a straightforward solution, it incurs prohibitive data acquisition and computational costs. To address this challenge, we propose~\modelname, a novel framework based on multi-grained context compression and query-aware information acquisition. SharedLLM comprises two stacked short-context LLMs: a lower model serving as a compressor and an upper model acting as a decoder. The lower model compresses long inputs into compact, multi-grained representations, which are then forwarded to the upper model for context-aware processing. To maximize efficiency, this information transfer occurs exclusively at the lowest layers, bypassing lengthy forward passes and redundant cross-attention operations. This entire process, wherein the upper and lower models are derived from the same underlying LLM layers, is termed~\textit{self-injection}. To support this architecture, a specialized tree-based data structure enables the efficient encoding and query-aware retrieval of contextual information. Despite being trained on sequences of only 8K tokens, \modelname~effectively generalizes to inputs exceeding 128K tokens. Across a comprehensive suite of long-context modeling and understanding benchmarks, \modelname~achieves performance superior or comparable to strong baselines, striking an optimal balance between efficiency and accuracy. Furthermore, these design choices allow \modelname~to substantially reduce the memory footprint and yield notable inference speedups ($2\times$ over streaming and $3\times$ over encoder-decoder architectures).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SharedLLM 的新框架，通过多粒度上下文压缩和查询感知信息获取来扩展大型语言模型的上下文窗口。该框架使用两个堆叠的短上下文 LLM，一个用于压缩，一个用于解码，并将信息传输限制在底层，从而提高了效率并减少了内存占用和推理时间。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型（LLMs）有限的上下文窗口限制了它们在不同领域的广泛应用。虽然在长上下文数据上进行持续预训练是一种解决方案，但成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 SharedLLM 的新框架，该框架由两个堆叠的短上下文 LLM 组成：一个较低的模型作为压缩器，一个较高的模型作为解码器。它采用多粒度上下文压缩和查询感知信息获取。信息传输仅发生在最低层，并通过“自注入”实现，其中上下模型派生自同一基础 LLM 层。使用基于树的数据结构来编码和检索上下文信息。
AI.result: 在仅使用 8K 令牌的序列上进行训练，SharedLLM 在超过 128K 令牌的输入上表现良好。在长上下文建模和理解基准测试中，其性能优于或媲美强基线。内存占用和推理时间也得到显著改善（比流式传输快 2 倍，比编码器-解码器架构快 3 倍）。
AI.conclusion: SharedLLM 框架通过有效的上下文压缩和信息获取，在效率和准确性之间取得了最佳平衡，能够处理比训练数据长得多的上下文，同时降低了计算成本和推理时间。

title: GaussTwin: Unified Simulation and Correction with Gaussian Splatting for Robotic Digital Twins
summary: Digital twins promise to enhance robotic manipulation by maintaining a consistent link between real-world perception and simulation. However, most existing systems struggle with the lack of a unified model, complex dynamic interactions, and the real-to-sim gap, which limits downstream applications such as model predictive control. Thus, we propose GaussTwin, a real-time digital twin that combines position-based dynamics with discrete Cosserat rod formulations for physically grounded simulation, and Gaussian splatting for efficient rendering and visual correction. By anchoring Gaussians to physical primitives and enforcing coherent SE(3) updates driven by photometric error and segmentation masks, GaussTwin achieves stable prediction-correction while preserving physical fidelity. Through experiments in both simulation and on a Franka Research 3 platform, we show that GaussTwin consistently improves tracking accuracy and robustness compared to shape-matching and rigid-only baselines, while also enabling downstream tasks such as push-based planning. These results highlight GaussTwin as a step toward unified, physically meaningful digital twins that can support closed-loop robotic interaction and learning.

AI.tldr: GaussTwin 是一个实时的数字孪生系统，它结合了基于位置的动力学、离散的 Cosserat 杆公式和高斯溅射技术，用于机器人操作。该系统通过位置和外观的融合，提高了跟踪精度和鲁棒性，并支持下游任务如基于推的规划。
AI.motivation: 现有数字孪生系统在统一模型、复杂动力学交互和真实-模拟差距方面存在不足，限制了模型预测控制等下游应用。因此，需要一个能弥合这些差距的系统。
AI.method: 提出 GaussTwin，一个结合了基于位置的动力学和离散 Cosserat 杆公式（用于物理模拟）以及高斯溅射（用于高效渲染和视觉校正）的实时数字孪生。通过将高斯点锚定到物理原语，并强制执行由光度误差和分割掩码驱动的连贯 SE(3) 更新，实现了稳定且物理保真的预测-校正。
AI.result: 在仿真和 Franka Research 3 机器人平台上的实验表明，与仅基于形状匹配或刚体的基线相比，GaussTwin 持续提高了跟踪精度和鲁棒性。此外，它还能支持推和抓取等任务。
AI.conclusion: GaussTwin 是实现统一、具有物理意义的数字孪生系统的重要一步，该系统能够支持闭环机器人交互和学习，克服了现有系统的局限性。

title: TSEmbed: Unlocking Task Scaling in Universal Multimodal Embeddings
summary: Despite the exceptional reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), their adaptation into universal embedding models is significantly impeded by task conflict. To address this, we propose TSEmbed, a universal multimodal embedding framework that synergizes Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to explicitly disentangle conflicting task objectives. Moreover, we introduce Expert-Aware Negative Sampling (EANS), a novel strategy that leverages expert routing distributions as an intrinsic proxy for semantic similarity. By dynamically prioritizing informative hard negatives that share expert activation patterns with the query, EANS effectively sharpens the model's discriminative power and refines embedding boundaries. To ensure training stability, we further devise a two-stage learning paradigm that solidifies expert specialization before optimizing representations via EANS. TSEmbed achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the Massive Multimodal Embedding Benchmark (MMEB) and real-world industrial production datasets, laying a foundation for task-level scaling in universal multimodal embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 TSEmbed 的通用多模态嵌入框架，该框架结合了专家混合（MoE）和低秩适配（LoRA）技术，以解决多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在适应通用嵌入模型时面临的任务冲突问题。同时，引入了专家感知负采样（EANS）策略，利用专家路由分布作为语义相似度的代理，优化了模型的区分能力。通过两阶段学习范式，TSEmbed 在 MMEB 和实际工业数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLMs 在通用嵌入模型上的适配受到任务冲突的严重阻碍。研究旨在解决这一问题，使 MLLMs 能够更好地适应通用嵌入模型。
AI.method:
1. 提出 TSEmbed 框架，结合 MoE 和 LoRA 来解耦冲突的任务目标。
2. 引入专家感知负采样（EANS）策略，利用专家路由分布作为语义相似度的代理，优先选择具有相似专家激活模式的硬负样本。
3. 设计两阶段学习范式，首先实现专家专业化，然后通过 EANS 优化表示。
AI.result: TSEmbed 在 Massive Multimodal Embedding Benchmark (MMEB) 和实际工业生产数据集上均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: TSEmbed 框架成功地解决了 MLLMs 在通用嵌入模型上的任务冲突问题，并通过 EANS 策略有效提升了模型的区分能力，为通用多模态嵌入的任务级扩展奠定了基础。

title: Authorize-on-Demand: Dynamic Authorization with Legality-Aware Intellectual Property Protection for VLMs
summary: The rapid adoption of vision-language models (VLMs) has heightened the demand for robust intellectual property (IP) protection of these high-value pretrained models. Effective IP protection should proactively confine model deployment within authorized domains and prevent unauthorized transfers. However, existing methods rely on static training-time definitions, limiting flexibility in dynamic environments and often producing opaque responses to unauthorized inputs. To address these limitations, we propose a novel dynamic authorization with legality-aware intellectual property protection (AoD-IP) for VLMs, a framework that supports authorize-on-demand and legality-aware assessment. AoD-IP introduces a lightweight dynamic authorization module that enables flexible, user-controlled authorization, allowing users to actively specify or switch authorized domains on demand at deployment time. This enables the model to adapt seamlessly as application scenarios evolve and provides substantially greater extensibility than existing static-domain approaches. In addition, AoD-IP incorporates a dual-path inference mechanism that jointly predicts input legality-aware and task-specific outputs. Comprehensive experimental results on multiple cross-domain benchmarks demonstrate that AoD-IP maintains strong authorized-domain performance and reliable unauthorized detection, while supporting user-controlled authorization for adaptive deployment in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为AoD-IP的动态授权框架，用于保护视觉语言模型（VLM）的知识产权（IP）。该框架支持按需授权和合法性感知评估，能够在部署时灵活地控制模型的使用范围，并能检测非法输入。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM的IP保护方法依赖于静态的训练时定义，灵活性差，且对非法输入的响应不透明。研究旨在解决这些限制，提供一种更灵活、可控且能识别非法输入的IP保护方案。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为AoD-IP的框架，包含一个轻量级的动态授权模块，允许用户在部署时按需指定或切换授权领域。此外，引入了一个双路径推理机制，同时预测输入的合法性感知和任务特定输出。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AoD-IP在保持授权领域内良好性能的同时，能够可靠地检测未经授权的使用。该框架支持用户控制的授权，适用于动态环境下的自适应部署。
AI.conclusion: AoD-IP框架为VLM提供了有效的IP保护，通过动态授权和合法性感知能力，增强了模型的灵活性、可扩展性和安全性，能够适应不断变化的应用场景。

title: Differentially Private Multimodal In-Context Learning
summary: Vision-language models are increasingly applied to sensitive domains such as medical imaging and personal photographs, yet existing differentially private methods for in-context learning are limited to few-shot, text-only settings because privacy cost scales with the number of tokens processed. We present Differentially Private Multimodal Task Vectors (DP-MTV), the first framework enabling many-shot multimodal in-context learning with formal $(\varepsilon, δ)$-differential privacy by aggregating hundreds of demonstrations into compact task vectors in activation space. DP-MTV partitions private data into disjoint chunks, applies per-layer clipping to bound sensitivity, and adds calibrated noise to the aggregate, requiring only a single noise addition that enables unlimited inference queries. We evaluate on eight benchmarks across three VLM architectures, supporting deployment with or without auxiliary data. At $\varepsilon=1.0$, DP-MTV achieves 50% on VizWiz compared to 55% non-private and 35% zero-shot, preserving most of the gain from in-context learning under meaningful privacy constraints.

title: SeedPolicy: Horizon Scaling via Self-Evolving Diffusion Policy for Robot Manipulation
summary: Imitation Learning (IL) enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from expert demonstrations. Diffusion Policy (DP) models multi-modal expert behaviors but suffers performance degradation as observation horizons increase, limiting long-horizon manipulation. We propose Self-Evolving Gated Attention (SEGA), a temporal module that maintains a time-evolving latent state via gated attention, enabling efficient recurrent updates that compress long-horizon observations into a fixed-size representation while filtering irrelevant temporal information. Integrating SEGA into DP yields Self-Evolving Diffusion Policy (SeedPolicy), which resolves the temporal modeling bottleneck and enables scalable horizon extension with moderate overhead. On the RoboTwin 2.0 benchmark with 50 manipulation tasks, SeedPolicy outperforms DP and other IL baselines. Averaged across both CNN and Transformer backbones, SeedPolicy achieves 36.8% relative improvement in clean settings and 169% relative improvement in randomized challenging settings over the DP. Compared to vision-language-action models such as RDT with 1.2B parameters, SeedPolicy achieves competitive performance with one to two orders of magnitude fewer parameters, demonstrating strong efficiency and scalability. These results establish SeedPolicy as a state-of-the-art imitation learning method for long-horizon robotic manipulation. Code is available at: https://github.com/Youqiang-Gui/SeedPolicy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SeedPolicy 的新型模仿学习方法，通过引入 Self-Evolving Gated Attention (SEGA) 模块，有效解决了现有 Diffusion Policy (DP) 模型在处理长序列操作时性能下降的问题，实现了高效且可扩展的长时序机器人操作。
AI.motivation: 现有的模仿学习方法（如 Diffusion Policy）在处理长序列机器人操作时，由于观测时间跨度增加会导致性能下降，限制了其应用范围。因此，需要一种能够有效处理长时序信息并保持性能的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 Self-Evolving Gated Attention (SEGA) 的时间模块，它通过门控注意力机制维护一个随时间演变的状态，实现高效的递归更新，将长时序观测压缩为固定大小的表示，并过滤无关信息。将 SEGA 集成到 Diffusion Policy 中，形成 SeedPolicy。
AI.result: 在 RoboTwin 2.0 50 个操作任务基准上，SeedPolicy 相较于 DP 和其他模仿学习方法取得了更好的性能。在干净设置下，SeedPolicy 相较于 DP 提高了 36.8%；在具有挑战性的随机设置下，提高了 169%。与参数量更大的 vision-language-action 模型（如 RDT）相比，SeedPolicy 以更少的参数实现了相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: SeedPolicy 是一种先进的模仿学习方法，能够有效解决长时序机器人操作中的时间建模瓶颈，并实现高效、可扩展的性能提升，适用于复杂的操作任务。

title: SPIRIT: Perceptive Shared Autonomy for Robust Robotic Manipulation under Deep Learning Uncertainty
summary: Deep learning (DL) has enabled impressive advances in robotic perception, yet its limited robustness and lack of interpretability hinder reliable deployment in safety critical applications. We propose a concept termed perceptive shared autonomy, in which uncertainty estimates from DL based perception are used to regulate the level of autonomy. Specifically, when the robot's perception is confident, semi-autonomous manipulation is enabled to improve performance; when uncertainty increases, control transitions to haptic teleoperation for maintaining robustness. In this way, high-performing but uninterpretable DL methods can be integrated safely into robotic systems. A key technical enabler is an uncertainty aware DL based point cloud registration approach based on the so called Neural Tangent Kernels (NTK). We evaluate perceptive shared autonomy on challenging aerial manipulation tasks through a user study of 15 participants and realization of mock-up industrial scenarios, demonstrating reliable robotic manipulation despite failures in DL based perception. The resulting system, named SPIRIT, improves both manipulation performance and system reliability. SPIRIT was selected as a finalist of a major industrial innovation award.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为“感知共享自主”的概念，利用深度学习（DL）模型的感知不确定性来动态调整机器人的自主水平。当DL模型自信时，机器人可以半自主操作以提高性能；当不确定性增加时，则切换到触觉遥操作以确保鲁棒性。该方法通过基于神经切线核（NTK）的不确定性感知DL点云配准技术实现，并在空中抓取任务中进行了用户研究和工业场景演示，证明了其在DL感知失败时仍能保持可靠的机器人操作能力，并提升了性能和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前的深度学习（DL）在机器人感知方面取得了显著进步，但其鲁棒性有限和缺乏可解释性阻碍了其在安全关键应用中的可靠部署。需要一种方法来整合高性能但不可解释的DL方法，同时确保系统的安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出“感知共享自主”概念，利用DL模型的感知不确定性来调节自主水平。当DL模型感知置信度高时，启用半自主操作；当感知不确定性增加时，切换到触觉遥操作。关键技术是基于神经切线核（NTK）的不确定性感知DL点云配准方法。实现了一个名为SPIRIT的系统。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的空中抓取任务中，通过15名参与者的用户研究和工业场景模拟，证明了感知共享自主系统SPIRIT即使在DL感知失败的情况下也能实现可靠的机器人操作。SPIRIT提高了操作性能和系统可靠性，并入围了重要的工业创新奖。
AI.conclusion: 感知共享自主是一种将不可解释但高性能的DL感知方法安全集成到机器人系统中的有效策略，通过动态调整自主水平来平衡性能和鲁棒性，从而在实际应用中实现可靠的机器人操作。

title: Attention's Gravitational Field:A Power-Law Interpretation of Positional Correlation
summary: This paper explores the underlying principles of positional relationships and encodings within Large Language Models (LLMs) and introduces the concept of the Attention Gravitational Field (AGF). By decoupling positional encodings from semantic embeddings, we optimize the model architecture and achieve superior accuracy compared to prevailing encoding methods. Furthermore, we provide an in-depth analysis of AGF, demonstrating its intrinsic consistency with learning and stability curves, as well as its empirical alignment with Newton's Law of Universal Gravitation. By offering a rigorous theoretical exploration of these phenomena, this work represents a significant step toward interpreting the Attention mechanism and unlocks new possibilities for future research in model optimization and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了注意力引力场（AGF）概念，通过解耦位置编码与语义嵌入来优化LLM架构，提高了模型准确性，并验证了AGF与学习曲线、牛顿万有引力定律的一致性。
AI.motivation: 为了优化大型语言模型（LLMs）的架构，提高模型准确性，并对注意力机制进行更深入的理论解释。
AI.method: 提出注意力引力场（AGF）概念，解耦位置编码和语义嵌入，分析AGF与学习曲线和牛顿万有引力定律的内在和经验一致性。
AI.result: AGF相较于现有编码方法在模型准确性上取得了优越表现，并证明了AGF与学习曲线和牛顿万有引力定律的对齐。
AI.conclusion: AGF为理解注意力机制提供了理论基础，并为模型优化和可解释性研究开辟了新方向。

title: Scalable Injury-Risk Screening in Baseball Pitching From Broadcast Video
summary: Injury prediction in pitching depends on precise biomechanical signals, yet gold-standard measurements come from expensive, stadium-installed multi-camera systems that are unavailable outside professional venues. We present a monocular video pipeline that recovers 18 clinically relevant biomechanics metrics from broadcast footage, positioning pose-derived kinematics as a scalable source for injury-risk modeling. Built on DreamPose3D, our approach introduces a drift-controlled global lifting module that recovers pelvis trajectory via velocity-based parameterization and sliding-window inference, lifting pelvis-rooted poses into global space. To address motion blur, compression artifacts, and extreme pitching poses, we incorporate a kinematics refinement pipeline with bone-length constraints, joint-limited inverse kinematics, smoothing, and symmetry constraints to ensure temporally stable and physically plausible kinematics. On 13 professional pitchers (156 paired pitches), 16/18 metrics achieve sub-degree agreement (MAE $< 1^{\circ}$). Using these metrics for injury prediction, an automated screening model achieves AUC 0.811 for Tommy John surgery and 0.825 for significant arm injuries on 7,348 pitchers. The resulting pose-derived metrics support scalable injury-risk screening, establishing monocular broadcast video as a viable alternative to stadium-scale motion capture for biomechanics.

title: SURE: Semi-dense Uncertainty-REfined Feature Matching
summary: Establishing reliable image correspondences is essential for many robotic vision problems. However, existing methods often struggle in challenging scenarios with large viewpoint changes or textureless regions, where incorrect cor- respondences may still receive high similarity scores. This is mainly because conventional models rely solely on fea- ture similarity, lacking an explicit mechanism to estimate the reliability of predicted matches, leading to overconfident errors. To address this issue, we propose SURE, a Semi- dense Uncertainty-REfined matching framework that jointly predicts correspondences and their confidence by modeling both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties. Our approach in- troduces a novel evidential head for trustworthy coordinate regression, along with a lightweight spatial fusion module that enhances local feature precision with minimal overhead. We evaluated our method on multiple standard benchmarks, where it consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art semi-dense matching models in both accuracy and efficiency. our code will be available on https://github.com/LSC-ALAN/SURE.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SURE的半稠密不确定性精炼匹配框架，该框架通过同时预测对应关系及其置信度来解决现有方法在具有挑战性的场景中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视图变化大或纹理缺失的区域容易产生错误的对应关系，并且对错误的匹配会给出过高的相似度分数，这是因为它们仅依赖特征相似度，缺乏对匹配可靠性的显式估计。
AI.method: SURE框架通过模拟偶然不确定性和认知不确定性来同时预测对应关系和置信度。它引入了一个新颖的证据头来进行可信坐标回归，并集成了一个轻量级的空间融合模块来提高局部特征精度。
AI.result: 在多个标准基准测试中，SURE在准确性和效率方面均优于现有的最先进的半稠密匹配模型。
AI.conclusion: SURE框架能够可靠地估计匹配的置信度，并在各种具有挑战性的场景下提高图像对应关系的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: Diffusion-Based sRGB Real Noise Generation via Prompt-Driven Noise Representation Learning
summary: Denoising in the sRGB image space is challenging due to noise variability. Although end-to-end methods perform well, their effectiveness in real-world scenarios is limited by the scarcity of real noisy-clean image pairs, which are expensive and difficult to collect. To address this limitation, several generative methods have been developed to synthesize realistic noisy images from limited data. These generative approaches often rely on camera metadata during both training and testing to synthesize real-world noise. However, the lack of metadata or inconsistencies between devices restricts their usability. Therefore, we propose a novel framework called Prompt-Driven Noise Generation (PNG). This model is capable of acquiring high-dimensional prompt features that capture the characteristics of real-world input noise and creating a variety of realistic noisy images consistent with the distribution of the input noise. By eliminating the dependency on explicit camera metadata, our approach significantly enhances the generalizability and applicability of noise synthesis. Comprehensive experiments reveal that our model effectively produces realistic noisy images and show the successful application of these generated images in removing real-world noise across various benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为PNG（Prompt-Driven Noise Generation）的新框架，用于生成真实感噪声图像，无需相机元数据，并成功将其应用于实际噪声去除任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端去噪方法在真实世界应用中受限于真实噪声-干净图像对的稀缺性。现有的生成方法依赖相机元数据，但元数据的缺乏或设备不一致限制了其可用性。
AI.method: 提出PNG框架，该模型能够获取捕捉真实世界输入噪声特征的高维提示特征，并生成与输入噪声分布一致的各种真实感噪声图像，从而摆脱对相机元数据的依赖。
AI.result: PNG模型能够有效地生成逼真的噪声图像，并且这些生成的图像成功应用于各种基准数据集上的真实世界噪声去除任务。
AI.conclusion: PNG框架通过消除对相机元数据的依赖，显著提高了噪声合成的泛化性和适用性，为去噪研究提供了更灵活的数据增强方法。

title: Beyond the Context Window: A Cost-Performance Analysis of Fact-Based Memory vs. Long-Context LLMs for Persistent Agents
summary: Persistent conversational AI systems face a choice between passing full conversation histories to a long-context large language model (LLM) and maintaining a dedicated memory system that extracts and retrieves structured facts.
