Hardware results of the default ROScopter behavior are presented, showing that ROScopter achieves similar performance to another state-of-the-art autopilot for basic waypoint-following maneuvers, but with a significantly reduced and more modular code-base.

AI.tldr: ROScopter 是一个为研究人员设计的轻量级多旋翼自动驾驶仪，旨在通过易于理解和修改的架构加速仿真和硬件测试，并提供与 ROSflight 2.0 的接口，利用 ROS 2 的模块化特性。
AI.motivation: 加速研究代码在仿真和硬件中的测试，提供一个易于理解和修改的平台。
AI.method: 设计了 ROScopter 的架构，使其能够与 ROSflight 2.0 接口，并在板载飞行计算机上运行，利用 ROS 2 的模块化特性。在仿真和硬件环境中测试了应用程序代码。
AI.result: ROScopter 在基本航点跟随任务中表现出与现有先进自动驾驶仪相似的性能，同时代码库更小、模块化程度更高。
AI.conclusion: ROScopter 提供了一个性能良好、代码库精简且高度模块化的自动驾驶仪解决方案，非常适合研究应用，可以有效加速仿真和硬件测试。

title: AILS-NTUA at SemEval-2026 Task 3: Efficient Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
summary: In this paper, we present AILS-NTUA system for Track-A of SemEval-2026 Task 3 on Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (DimABSA), which encompasses three complementary problems: Dimensional Aspect Sentiment Regression (DimASR), Dimensional Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (DimASTE), and Dimensional Aspect Sentiment Quadruplet Prediction (DimASQP) within a multilingual and multi-domain framework. Our methodology combines fine-tuning of language-appropriate encoder backbones for continuous aspect-level sentiment prediction with language-specific instruction tuning of large language models using LoRA for structured triplet and quadruplet extraction. This unified yet task-adaptive design emphasizes parameter-efficient specialization across languages and domains, enabling reduced training and inference requirements while maintaining strong effectiveness. Empirical results demonstrate that the proposed models achieve competitive performance and consistently surpass the provided baselines across most evaluation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AILS-NTUA系统，用于SemEval-2026 Task 3的Track-A（多语言、多领域维度方面情感分析），该系统结合了连续情感回归和结构化三元组/四元组提取，并通过参数高效的语言特定微调方法取得了有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是为了解决多语言、多领域维度方面情感分析（DimABSA）中的三个互补性问题：维度方面情感回归（DimASR）、维度方面情感三元组提取（DimASTE）和维度方面情感四元组预测（DimASQP）。
AI.method: 该方法结合了针对连续方面情感预测的语言适配编码器骨干的微调，以及使用LoRA对大型语言模型进行特定语言指令微调，以进行结构化三元组和四元组提取。这种统一但任务自适应的设计强调了跨语言和跨领域的参数高效专业化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的模型在大多数评估设置下均取得了有竞争力的性能，并持续超越提供的基线。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种参数高效的AILS-NTUA系统，能够有效地处理多语言、多领域维度方面情感分析的三个子任务，并在实验中展现出优于基线的性能。

title: The Trilingual Triad Framework: Integrating Design, AI, and Domain Knowledge in No-code AI Smart City Course
summary: This paper introduces the "Trilingual Triad" framework, a model that explains how students learn to design with generative artificial intelligence (AI) through the integration of Design, AI, and Domain Knowledge. As generative AI rapidly enters higher education, students often engage with these systems as passive users of generated outputs rather than active creators of AI-enabled knowledge tools. This study investigates how students can transition from using AI as a tool to designing AI as a collaborative teammate. The research examines a graduate course, Creating the Frontier of No-code Smart Cities at the Singapore University of Technology and Design (SUTD), in which students developed domain-specific custom GPT systems without coding. Using a qualitative multi-case study approach, three projects - the Interview Companion GPT, the Urban Observer GPT, and Buddy Buddy - were analyzed across three dimensions: design, AI architecture, and domain expertise. The findings show that effective human-AI collaboration emerges when these three "languages" are orchestrated together: domain knowledge structures the AI's logic, design mediates human-AI interaction, and AI extends learners' cognitive capacity. The Trilingual Triad framework highlights how building AI systems can serve as a constructionist learning process that strengthens AI literacy, metacognition, and learner agency.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了“三语三元组”框架，解释了学生如何通过整合设计、人工智能和领域知识来学习使用生成式人工智能进行设计，从而将学生从AI的被动使用者转变为AI知识工具的积极创造者。
AI.motivation: 生成式人工智能迅速进入高等教育，学生往往被动使用AI输出，而不是主动创造AI赋能的知识工具。研究旨在探索学生如何从使用AI的工具转变为设计AI作为协作伙伴。
AI.method: 研究采用定性多案例研究方法，分析了新加坡科技设计大学（SUTD）一个研究生课程（“无代码智慧城市前沿创造”）中三个未编码定制GPT系统的开发项目：面试伴侣GPT、城市观察者GPT和Buddy Buddy。分析维度包括设计、AI架构和领域专业知识。
AI.result: 研究发现，当领域知识构建AI逻辑、设计媒介化人机交互、AI扩展学习者认知能力这三种“语言”协同工作时，有效的人机协作就会出现。
AI.conclusion: “三语三元组”框架强调，构建AI系统可以作为一种建构主义学习过程，从而增强AI素养、元认知和学习者自主性。

title: Adaptive Prototype-based Interpretable Grading of Prostate Cancer
summary: Prostate cancer being one of the frequently diagnosed malignancy in men, the rising demand for biopsies places a severe workload on pathologists. The grading procedure is tedious and subjective, motivating the development of automated systems. Although deep learning has made inroads in terms of performance, its limited interpretability poses challenges for widespread adoption in high-stake applications like medicine. Existing interpretability techniques for prostate cancer classifiers provide a coarse explanation but do not reveal why the highlighted regions matter. In this scenario, we propose a novel prototype-based weakly-supervised framework for an interpretable grading of prostate cancer from histopathology images. These networks can prove to be more trustworthy since their explicit reasoning procedure mirrors the workflow of a pathologist in comparing suspicious regions with clinically validated examples. The network is initially pre-trained at patch-level to learn robust prototypical features associated with each grade. In order to adapt it to a weakly-supervised setup for prostate cancer grading, the network is fine-tuned with a new prototype-aware loss function. Finally, a new attention-based dynamic pruning mechanism is introduced to handle inter-sample heterogeneity, while selectively emphasizing relevant prototypes for optimal performance. Extensive validation on the benchmark PANDA and SICAP datasets confirms that the framework can serve as a reliable assistive tool for pathologists in their routine diagnostic workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于原型的弱监督学习框架，用于可解释的前列腺癌组织病理图像分级，通过模仿病理学家的工作流程来提高模型的可信度。
AI.motivation: 病理学家诊断前列腺癌的工作量日益增加，且现有深度学习模型的可解释性不足，阻碍了其在医学中的广泛应用。
AI.method: 该框架首先在图像块级别进行预训练以学习与各级别相关的原型特征，然后引入原型感知损失函数进行弱监督微调，并使用基于注意力的动态剪枝机制来处理样本异质性并强调相关原型。
AI.result: 在PANDA和SICAP数据集上的广泛验证表明，该框架可以作为病理学家常规诊断流程的可靠辅助工具。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的原型驱动的弱监督框架能够提供可信赖且可解释的前列腺癌分级，通过显式推理过程来支持病理学家的诊断。

title: VisionPangu: A Compact and Fine-Grained Multimodal Assistant with 1.7B Parameters
summary: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved strong performance in vision-language understanding, yet many existing approaches rely on large-scale architectures and coarse supervision, which limits their ability to generate detailed image captions. In this work, we present VisionPangu, a compact 1.7B-parameter multimodal model designed to improve detailed image captioning through efficient multimodal alignment and high-quality supervision. Our model combines an InternVL-derived vision encoder with the OpenPangu-Embedded language backbone via a lightweight MLP projector and adopts an instruction-tuning pipeline inspired by LLaVA. By incorporating dense human-authored descriptions from the DOCCI dataset, VisionPangu improves semantic coherence and descriptive richness without relying on aggressive model scaling. Experimental results demonstrate that compact multimodal models can achieve competitive performance while producing more structured and detailed captions. The code and model weights will be publicly available at https://www.modelscope.cn/models/asdfgh007/visionpangu.

AI.tldr: VisionPangu是一个1.7B参数的紧凑型多模态模型，通过高效的多模态对齐和高质量的监督，旨在提升图像的详细描述生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型多模态模型在生成精细图像描述方面存在局限，主要是因为它们依赖于庞大的模型架构和粗粒度的监督信号。
AI.method: VisionPangu结合了InternVL视觉编码器和OpenPangu语言骨干，通过轻量级MLP投影仪进行连接，并采用受LLaVA启发的指令微调流程。模型利用DOCCI数据集中的密集人工描述进行训练。
AI.result: 实验证明，VisionPangu在不依赖激进的模型扩展的情况下，能够生成更具语义连贯性和描述丰富性的图像描述，且性能具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑型多模态模型能够实现具有竞争力的性能，并生成更结构化、更详细的图像描述。

title: AegisUI: Behavioral Anomaly Detection for Structured User Interface Protocols in AI Agent Systems
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Behavioral anomaly detection framework for security analysis of AI agent-generated UI protocol payloads
summary:
AI agents that build user interfaces on the fly assembling buttons, forms, and data displays from structured protocol payloads are becoming common in production systems. The trouble is that a payload can pass every schema check and still trick a user: a button might say "View invoice" while its hidden action wipes an account, or a display widget might quietly bind to an internal salary field. Current defenses stop at syntax; they were never built to catch this kind of behavioral mismatch.
  We built AegisUI to study exactly this gap. The framework generates structured UI payloads, injects realistic attacks into them, extracts numeric features, and benchmarks anomaly detectors end-to-end. We produced 4000 labeled payloads (3000 benign, 1000 malicious) spanning five application domains and five attack families: phishing interfaces, data leakage, layout abuse, manipulative UI, and workflow anomalies.
  From each payload we extracted 18 features covering structural, semantic, binding, and session dimensions, then compared three detectors: Isolation Forest (unsupervised), a benign-trained autoencoder (semi-supervised), and Random Forest (supervised). On a stratified 80/20 split, Random Forest scored best overall (accuracy 0.931, precision 0.980, recall 0.740, F1 0.843, ROC-AUC 0.952). The autoencoder came second (F1 0.762, ROC-AUC 0.863) and needs no malicious labels at training time, which matters when deploying a new system that lacks attack history. Per-attack-type analysis showed that layout abuse is easiest to catch while manipulative UI payloads are hardest. All code, data, and configurations are released for full reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了一个名为 AegisUI 的框架，用于检测 AI 生成的用户界面（UI）协议中的恶意行为，该框架通过生成和测试大量 UI 载荷，并使用三种不同的异常检测算法（Isolation Forest、自编码器和随机森林）来识别 UI 行为与预期不符的情况，其中随机森林在准确性方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 现有的 UI 生成框架虽然能确保协议的语法正确，但无法检测到 UI 行为上的不匹配（例如，按钮的文字描述与其隐藏功能不符），这可能导致用户被欺骗。研究旨在弥合这一行为检测的差距。
AI.method: 研究人员构建了 AegisUI 框架，该框架能够生成结构化的 UI 协议载荷，注入包含五种攻击类型（网络钓鱼、数据泄露、布局滥用、操纵性 UI、工作流程异常）的真实攻击，提取 18 种覆盖结构、语义、绑定和会话维度的数值特征，并对三种异常检测器（Isolation Forest、自编码器、随机森林）进行了端到端基准测试。最终生成了 4000 个标记的载荷（3000 个良性，1000 个恶意）。
AI.result: 在 80/20 的数据划分下，随机森林模型表现最佳，准确率达到 0.931，精确率 0.980，召回率 0.740，F1 分数 0.843，ROC-AUC 0.952。自编码器模型次之（F1 分数 0.762，ROC-AUC 0.863），并且不需要恶意样本进行训练。研究还发现，布局滥用攻击最容易被检测到，而操纵性 UI 攻击最难。
AI.conclusion: AegisUI 框架能够有效地检测 AI 生成 UI 协议中的行为不匹配问题。监督学习模型（如随机森林）在检测准确性上表现最佳，而半监督学习模型（如自编码器）在缺乏恶意样本的情况下仍能提供有价值的检测能力，这对于新部署的系统尤为重要。

title: Location-Aware Pretraining for Medical Difference Visual Question Answering
summary: Unlike conventional single-image models, differential medical VQA frameworks process multiple images to identify differences, mirroring the comparative diagnostic workflow of radiologists. However, standard vision encoders trained on contrastive or classification objectives often fail to capture the subtle visual variations necessary for distinguishing disease progression from acquisition differences. To address this limitation, we introduce a pretraining framework that incorporates location-aware tasks, including automatic referring expressions (AREF), grounded captioning (GCAP), and conditional automatic referring expressions (CAREF). These specific tasks enable the vision encoder to learn fine-grained, spatially grounded visual representations that are often overlooked by traditional pre-training methods. We subsequently integrate this enhanced vision encoder with a language model to perform medical difference VQA. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in detecting and reasoning about clinically relevant changes in chest X-ray images.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合位置感知任务（AREF, GCAP, CAREF）的预训练框架，用于增强视觉编码器，以解决当前医学 VQA 模型在区分细微视觉差异方面的不足，并在胸部 X 光图像的差异检测和推理方面取得了 SOTA 性能。
AI.motivation: 标准的视觉编码器在对比或分类任务上的训练不足以捕捉区分疾病进展与采集差异所需的细微视觉变化，这限制了差分医学 VQA 框架的性能。
AI.method: 引入了一个包含自动引用表达式（AREF）、基础字幕（GCAP）和条件自动引用表达式（CAREF）的位置感知预训练任务，以训练一个能学习细粒度、空间定位视觉表征的视觉编码器。然后将该编码器与语言模型结合，用于医学差分 VQA。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在检测和推理胸部 X 光图像中的临床相关变化方面取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合位置感知预训练任务，可以显著提高视觉编码器捕捉细微视觉差异的能力，从而提升差分医学 VQA 模型的性能，使其能更好地模拟放射科医生的比较诊断流程。

title: Federated Heterogeneous Language Model Optimization for Hybrid Automatic Speech Recognition
summary: Training automatic speech recognition (ASR) models increasingly relies on decentralized federated learning to ensure data privacy and accessibility, producing multiple local models that require effective merging. In hybrid ASR systems, while acoustic models can be merged using established methods, the language model (LM) for rescoring the N-best speech recognition list faces challenges due to the heterogeneity of non-neural n-gram models and neural network models. This paper proposes a heterogeneous LM optimization task and introduces a match-and-merge paradigm with two algorithms: the Genetic Match-and-Merge Algorithm (GMMA), using genetic operations to evolve and pair LMs, and the Reinforced Match-and-Merge Algorithm (RMMA), leveraging reinforcement learning for efficient convergence. Experiments on seven OpenSLR datasets show RMMA achieves the lowest average Character Error Rate and better generalization than baselines, converging up to seven times faster than GMMA, highlighting the paradigm's potential for scalable, privacy-preserving ASR systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于异构语言模型（LM）匹配和合并的范式，并通过遗传算法（GMMA）和强化学习算法（RMMA）进行了实现，以解决联邦学习中ASR系统语言模型合并的挑战。RMMA在准确性和收敛速度上均优于基线和GMMA。
AI.motivation: 在去中心化的联邦学习ASR系统中，由于本地模型（特别是n-gram和神经网络LM）的异质性，有效地合并语言模型是一个挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种异构LM优化任务，并引入了“匹配和合并”（Match-and-Merge）范式。该范式包含两种算法：遗传匹配和合并算法（GMMA），利用遗传操作进行LM的演化和配对；强化学习匹配和合并算法（RMMA），利用强化学习实现高效收敛。
AI.result: 在七个OpenSLR数据集上的实验表明，RMMA取得了最低的平均字符错误率（CER），并展现出比基线模型更好的泛化能力。RMMA的收敛速度比GMMA快七倍。
AI.conclusion: “匹配和合并”范式为解决联邦学习ASR系统中异构语言模型的合并问题提供了一种有效且可扩展的方法，特别是RMMA在性能和效率上均表现出色，有潜力构建可扩展、注重隐私的ASR系统。

title: PhysiFlow: Physics-Aware Humanoid Whole-Body VLA via Multi-Brain Latent Flow Matching and Robust Tracking
summary: In the domain of humanoid robot control, the fusion of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) with whole-body control is essential for semantically guided execution of real-world tasks. However, existing methods encounter challenges in terms of low VLA inference efficiency or an absence of effective semantic guidance for whole-body control, resulting in instability in dynamic limb-coordinated tasks. To bridge this gap, we present a semantic-motion intent guided, physics-aware multi-brain VLA framework for humanoid whole-body control. A series of experiments was conducted to evaluate the performance of the proposed framework. The experimental results demonstrated that the framework enabled reliable vision-language-guided full-body coordination for humanoid robots.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的语义-运动意图引导、物理感知多大脑VLA框架，用于人形机器人全身控制，解决了现有方法VLA推理效率低和语义引导不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的人形机器人全身控制方法在VLA推理效率和语义引导方面存在不足，导致动态协调任务不稳定。
AI.method: 提出了一种语义-运动意图引导、物理感知多大脑VLA框架。
AI.result: 实验证明，该框架能够实现可靠的视觉-语言引导下的人形机器人全身协调。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效解决人形机器人全身控制中的VLA效率和语义引导问题，实现稳定的全身协调。

title: Revisiting an Old Perspective Projection for Monocular 3D Morphable Models Regression
summary:
We introduce a novel camera model for monocular 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) regression methods that effectively captures the perspective distortion effect commonly seen in close-up facial images.
  Fitting 3D morphable models to video is a key technique in content creation. In particular, regression-based approaches have produced fast and accurate results by matching the rendered output of the morphable model to the target image. These methods typically achieve stable performance with orthographic projection, which eliminates the ambiguity between focal length and object distance. However, this simplification makes them unsuitable for close-up footage, such as that captured with head-mounted cameras.
  We extend orthographic projection with a new shrinkage parameter, incorporating a pseudo-perspective effect while preserving the stability of the original projection. We present several techniques that allow finetuning of existing models, and demonstrate the effectiveness of our modification through both quantitative and qualitative comparisons using a custom dataset recorded with head-mounted cameras.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的相机模型，用于单目 3D 可变形模型（3DMM）回归方法，该模型能有效捕捉特写面部图像中常见的透视畸变效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于回归的 3DMM 拟合方法通常使用正交投影，这消除了焦距和物体距离之间的歧义，从而实现了稳定性能。然而，这种简化使得它们不适用于特写镜头，例如使用头戴式摄像头拍摄的素材。
AI.method: 通过引入一个新的收缩参数来扩展正交投影，并结合伪透视效应，同时保持原始投影的稳定性。提出了多种微调现有模型的技术。
AI.result: 通过使用头戴式摄像头录制的自定义数据集进行定量和定性比较，证明了所提出修改的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新颖的相机模型能够有效处理特写面部图像中的透视畸变，并且可以通过微调现有模型来应用，从而提高了 3DMM 回归方法的性能。

title: LocalSUG: Geography-Aware LLM for Query Suggestion in Local-Life Services
summary: In local-life service platforms, the query suggestion module plays a crucial role in enhancing user experience by generating candidate queries based on user input prefixes, thus reducing user effort and accelerating search. Traditional multi-stage cascading systems rely heavily on historical top queries, limiting their ability to address long-tail demand. While LLMs offer strong semantic generalization, deploying them in local-life services introduces three key challenges: lack of geographic grounding, exposure bias in preference optimization, and online inference latency. To address these issues, we propose LocalSUG, an LLM-based query suggestion framework tailored for local-life service platforms. First, we introduce a city-aware candidate mining strategy based on term co-occurrence to inject geographic grounding into generation. Second, we propose a beam-search-driven GRPO algorithm that aligns training with inference-time decoding, reducing exposure bias in autoregressive generation. A multi-objective reward mechanism further optimizes both relevance and business-oriented metrics. Finally, we develop quality-aware beam acceleration and vocabulary pruning techniques that significantly reduce online latency while preserving generation quality. Extensive offline evaluations and large-scale online A/B testing demonstrate that LocalSUG improves click-through rate (CTR) by +0.35% and reduces the low/no-result rate by 2.56%, validating its effectiveness in real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为LocalSUG的基于LLM的查询建议框架，用于本地生活服务平台，解决了地理信息缺失、曝光偏差和推理延迟问题，并在在线A/B测试中显著提高了点击率和降低了无结果率。
AI.motivation: 传统查询建议系统依赖历史热门查询，难以满足长尾需求。LLM虽然语义泛化能力强，但在本地生活服务场景下面临地理信息缺失、偏好优化中的曝光偏差以及在线推理延迟等挑战。
AI.method: 1. 引入基于词语共现的城市感知候选挖掘策略，注入地理信息。2. 提出了一种梁搜索驱动的GRPO算法，使训练与推理时的解码对齐，减少自回归生成的曝光偏差。3. 采用多目标奖励机制，优化相关性和业务指标。4. 开发了质量感知的梁搜索加速和词汇剪枝技术，降低在线延迟并保持生成质量。
AI.result: LocalSUG在离线评估和大规模在线A/B测试中，点击率（CTR）提升了+0.35%，低/无结果率降低了2.56%。
AI.conclusion: LocalSUG成功解决了LLM在本地生活服务查询建议中的关键挑战，并在实际部署中证明了其有效性，显著提升了用户体验和业务指标。

title: When Weak LLMs Speak with Confidence, Preference Alignment Gets Stronger
comment: 32 pages, 8 figures, International Conference on Learning Representations 2026
summary: Preference alignment is an essential step in adapting large language models (LLMs) to human values, but existing approaches typically depend on costly human annotations or large-scale API-based models. We explore whether a weak LLM can instead act as an effective annotator. We surprisingly find that selecting only a subset of a weak LLM's highly confident samples leads to substantially better performance than using full human annotations. Building on this insight, we propose Confidence-Weighted Preference Optimization (CW-PO), a general framework that re-weights training samples by a weak LLM's confidence and can be applied across different preference optimization objectives. Notably, the model aligned by CW-PO with just 20% of human annotations outperforms the model trained with 100% of annotations under standard DPO. These results suggest that weak LLMs, when paired with confidence weighting, can dramatically reduce the cost of preference alignment while even outperforming methods trained on fully human-labeled data.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，使用弱大型语言模型（LLM）结合置信度加权，可以有效地进行偏好对齐，并且在仅使用少量人类标注数据的情况下，其性能优于使用全部人类标注数据的标准方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLM）偏好对齐方法依赖于昂贵的人类标注或大型API模型，研究目的是探索使用弱LLM作为标注器以降低成本。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为Confidence-Weighted Preference Optimization (CW-PO)的通用框架，该框架通过弱LLM的置信度对训练样本进行重加权，并可应用于不同的偏好优化目标。
AI.result: 研究发现，仅选择弱LLM的高度置信样本就能显著提升性能。使用CW-PO框架，在仅20%人类标注数据下训练的模型，其性能优于在100%人类标注数据下使用标准DPO方法训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: 弱LLM与置信度加权相结合，能够显著降低偏好对齐的成本，并可能超越使用全部人类标注数据的现有方法。

title: Enhancing Zero-shot Commonsense Reasoning by Integrating Visual Knowledge via Machine Imagination
summary: Recent advancements in zero-shot commonsense reasoning have empowered Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) to acquire extensive commonsense knowledge without requiring task-specific fine-tuning. Despite this progress, these models frequently suffer from limitations caused by human reporting biases inherent in textual knowledge, leading to understanding discrepancies between machines and humans. To bridge this gap, we introduce an additional modality to enrich the reasoning capabilities of PLMs. We propose Imagine (Machine Imagination-based Reasoning), a novel zero-shot commonsense reasoning framework that supplements textual inputs with visual signals from machine-generated images. Specifically, we enhance PLMs with the ability to imagine by embedding an image generator directly into the reasoning pipeline. To facilitate effective utilization of this imagined visual context, we construct synthetic datasets designed to emulate visual question-answering scenarios. Through comprehensive evaluations on multiple commonsense reasoning benchmarks, we demonstrate that Imagine substantially outperforms existing zero-shot approaches and even surpasses advanced large language models. These results underscore the capability of machine imagination to mitigate reporting bias and significantly enhance the generalization ability of commonsense reasoning models

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Imagine的新型零样本（zero-shot）常识推理框架，通过在文本输入中加入机器生成的图像，来克服预训练语言模型（PLMs）因人类报告偏差而产生的理解偏差，并在多个基准测试中取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的预训练语言模型（PLMs）在零样本常识推理方面取得了进展，但常受限于文本数据中的人类报告偏差，导致模型与人类的理解存在差异。研究旨在弥合这一差距，提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Imagine框架，该框架将图像生成器嵌入推理流程中，通过生成机器图像来丰富文本输入。此外，构建了模拟视觉问答场景的合成数据集，以促进对想象视觉上下文的有效利用。
AI.result: 在多个常识推理基准测试中，Imagine框架相比现有的零样本方法和先进的大型语言模型（LLMs）取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 机器的想象能力（通过生成图像）能够有效缓解报告偏差，并显著增强常识推理模型的泛化能力。

title: WebFactory: Automated Compression of Foundational Language Intelligence into Grounded Web Agents
summary: Current paradigms for training GUI agents are fundamentally limited by a reliance on either unsafe, non-reproducible live web interactions or costly, scarce human-crafted data and environments. We argue this focus on data volume overlooks a more critical factor: the efficiency of compressing a large language model's (LLM) latent knowledge into actionable agent behavior. We introduce WebFactory, a novel, fully automated closed-loop reinforcement learning pipeline for GUI agents, systematically compressing LLM-encoded internet intelligence into efficient, grounded actions. Our pipeline features a process of scalable environment synthesis, knowledge-aware task generation, LLM-powered trajectory collection, decomposed reward RL training, and systematic agent evaluation. Remarkably, our agent demonstrates exceptional data efficiency and generalization. Trained on synthetic data from only 10 websites within WebFactory, it achieves performance comparable to GUI agents trained on the same amount of human-annotated data from a much larger set of environments. This superior performance is consistent across our internal offline and online transfer benchmarks, where our agent also significantly outperforms the base foundation model. We further provide critical insights into the "embodiment potential" of different LLM foundations, offering a new axis for model evaluation. This work presents a scalable and cost-effective paradigm for transforming passive internet knowledge into active, grounded intelligence, marking a critical step towards general-purpose interactive agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为WebFactory的自动化闭环强化学习流水线，用于训练GUI代理。该方法通过合成环境、生成任务、利用LLM收集轨迹和分解奖励进行训练，显著提高了数据效率和泛化能力，并能将LLM的潜在知识转化为可操作的行为。
AI.motivation: 当前训练GUI代理的方法依赖于不安全且不可复现的在线交互或成本高昂的人工数据，这限制了其发展。研究者认为，关键在于提高LLM的潜在知识压缩成可操作代理行为的效率。
AI.method: 提出WebFactory流水线，包括：1. 可扩展的环境合成；2. 知识感知任务生成；3. LLM驱动的轨迹收集；4. 分解奖励的强化学习训练；5. 系统化代理评估。这是一个全自动的闭环强化学习流程。
AI.result: 在WebFactory中使用仅10个网站合成的数据训练的代理，在性能上可与在大量真实环境中用相同数量人工标注数据训练的代理相媲美。该代理在内部离线和在线迁移基准测试中表现出色，且显著优于基础模型。研究还揭示了不同LLM基础模型的“具身潜力”。
AI.conclusion: WebFactory提供了一种可扩展且经济高效的范式，能够将互联网的被动知识转化为主动、具身化的智能，是迈向量通用交互式代理的关键一步。

title: Replaying pre-training data improves fine-tuning
summary: To obtain a language model for a target domain (e.g. math), the current paradigm is to pre-train on a vast amount of generic web text and then fine-tune on the relatively limited amount of target data. Typically, generic data is only mixed in during fine-tuning to prevent catastrophic forgetting of the generic domain. We surprisingly find that replaying the generic data during fine-tuning can actually improve performance on the (less related) target task. Concretely, in a controlled pre-training environment with 4M target tokens, 4B total tokens, and 150M parameter models, generic replay increases target data efficiency by up to $1.87\times$ for fine-tuning and $2.06\times$ for mid-training. We further analyze data schedules that introduce target data during pre-training and find that replay helps more when there is less target data present in pre-training. We demonstrate the success of replay in practice for fine-tuning 8B parameter models, improving agentic web navigation success by $4.5\%$ and Basque question-answering accuracy by $2\%$.

AI.tldr: 在预训练-微调范式中，通过在微调阶段重新引入通用数据（通用数据回放）可以显著提高模型在目标任务上的数据效率和性能，尤其是在目标数据量较少的情况下。
AI.motivation: 探索在语言模型微调过程中，仅使用目标数据是否为最佳策略，以及通用数据回放对目标任务性能的影响。
AI.method: 在预训练环境中，使用150M参数模型，4M目标tokens，4B总tokens进行实验。比较了仅用目标数据微调和引入通用数据回放微调的性能。同时分析了在预训练阶段引入目标数据的策略，以及通用数据回放与目标数据量之间的关系。并在8B参数模型上验证了该方法在实际任务（网页导航和西班牙语问答）中的效果。
AI.result: 通用数据回放可以将微调目标数据效率提高高达$1.87	imes$，中途训练数据效率提高高达$2.06	imes$。当预训练阶段引入的目标数据较少时，通用数据回放效果更佳。在实际应用中，通用数据回放将智能网页导航成功率提高了4.5%，将西班牙语问答准确率提高了2%。
AI.conclusion: 通用数据回放是提高目标域语言模型性能的有效策略，可以显著提升数据效率，尤其是在目标数据有限的情况下。该方法在实际任务中也得到了验证。

title: Residual RL--MPC for Robust Microrobotic Cell Pushing Under Time-Varying Flow
summary: Contact-rich micromanipulation in microfluidic flow is challenging because small disturbances can break pushing contact and induce large lateral drift. We study planar cell pushing with a magnetic rolling microrobot that tracks a waypoint-sampled reference curve under time-varying Poiseuille flow. We propose a hybrid controller that augments a nominal MPC with a learned residual policy trained by SAC. The policy outputs a bounded 2D velocity correction that is contact-gated, so residual actions are applied only during robot--cell contact, preserving reliable approach behavior and stabilizing learning. All methods share the same actuation interface and speed envelope for fair comparisons. Experiments show improved robustness and tracking accuracy over pure MPC and PID under nonstationary flow, with generalization from a clover training curve to unseen circle and square trajectories. A residual-bound sweep identifies an intermediate correction limit as the best trade-off, which we use in all benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合控制器，将模型预测控制（MPC）与从强化学习（SAC）中学习到的残差策略相结合，用于在变时流体中进行磁性微机器人细胞推挤任务，实验证明该方法比纯MPC和PID更鲁棒且跟踪精度更高。
AI.motivation: 在微流体流动中进行接触式微操作具有挑战性，因为微小的干扰可能导致推挤接触中断并产生较大的横向漂移。因此，需要一种能够提高鲁棒性和跟踪精度的控制方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种混合控制器，它将名义上的模型预测控制（MPC）与由最优化策略（SAC）训练的学习到的残差策略相结合。该策略输出一个有界的二维速度修正，并且是接触门控的，即残差动作仅在机器人-细胞接触期间应用。所有方法使用相同的驱动接口和速度范围进行公平比较。
AI.result: 实验表明，与纯MPC和PID相比，该混合控制器在非稳态流动下具有更高的鲁棒性和跟踪精度。此外，它还能从训练用的三叶草轨迹泛化到未见过的圆形和方形轨迹。通过残差界限的扫描，确定了一个中间修正限度作为最佳权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该混合控制器有效地解决了在变时流体中进行磁性微机器人细胞推挤的挑战，提高了操作的稳定性和准确性，并展现了良好的泛化能力。

title: BiEvLight: Bi-level Learning of Task-Aware Event Refinement for Low-Light Image Enhancement
summary: Event cameras, with their high dynamic range, show great promise for Low-light Image Enhancement (LLIE). Existing works primarily focus on designing effective modal fusion strategies. However, a key challenge is the dual degradation from intrinsic background activity (BA) noise in events and low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) in images, which causes severe noise coupling during modal fusion, creating a critical performance bottleneck. We therefore posit that precise event denoising is the prerequisite to unlocking the full potential of event-based fusion. To this end, we propose BiEvLight, a hierarchical and task-aware framework that collaboratively optimizes enhancement and denoising by exploiting their intrinsic interdependence. Specifically, BiEvLight exploits the strong gradient correlation between images and events to build a gradient-guided event denoising prior that alleviates insufficient denoising in heavily noisy regions. Moreover, instead of treating event denoising as a static pre-processing stage-which inevitably incurs a trade-off between over- and under-denoising and cannot adapt to the requirements of a specific enhancement objective-we recast it as a bilevel optimization problem constrained by the enhancement task. Through cross-task interaction, the upper-level denoising problem learns event representations tailored to the lower-level enhancement objective, thereby substantially improving overall enhancement quality. Extensive experiments on the Real-world noise Dataset SDE demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) approaches, with average improvements of 1.30dB in PSNR, 2.03dB in PSNR* and 0.047 in SSIM, respectively. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/iijjlk/BiEvlight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 BiEvLight 的分层、任务感知框架，用于低光图像增强。该框架通过联合优化事件去噪和图像增强，并利用梯度相关性来指导事件去噪，有效解决了事件数据中的背景活动噪声与图像信噪比低导致噪声耦合的问题，显著提升了低光图像增强的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法主要关注模态融合策略，但未能有效解决事件数据中的背景活动噪声和图像低信噪比带来的双重退化问题，导致噪声耦合成为性能瓶颈。作者认为，精确的事件去噪是发挥事件-图像融合潜力的前提。
AI.method: 提出 BiEvLight 框架，采用分层和任务感知的方法联合优化增强和去噪。利用图像与事件之间的梯度相关性构建梯度引导的事件去噪先验，缓解了噪声密集区域的去噪不足。将事件去噪视为一个受增强任务约束的双层优化问题，通过跨任务交互，使去噪任务学习到的事件表示能够适应增强任务的需求。
AI.result: 在 SDE 数据集上的实验表明，BiEvLight 在 PSNR、PSNR* 和 SSIM 指标上分别取得了 1.30dB、2.03dB 和 0.047 的平均提升，显著优于现有 SOTA 方法。
AI.conclusion: 精确的事件去噪是实现高质量事件-图像融合增强的关键。BiEvLight 通过联合优化去噪和增强，并利用双层优化机制，有效解决了噪声耦合问题，显著提升了低光图像增强的性能。

title: 3D-RFT: Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Video-based 3D Scene Understanding
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards ( RLVR ) has emerged as a transformative paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models ( LLMs), yet its potential in 3D scene understanding remains under-explored. Existing approaches largely rely on Supervised Fine-Tuning ( SFT), where the token-level cross-entropy loss acts as an indirect proxy for optimization, leading to a misalignment between training objectives and task performances. To bridge this gap, we present Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Video-based 3D Scene Understanding (3D-RFT ), the first framework to extend RLVR to video-based 3D perception and reasoning. 3D-RFT shifts the paradigm by directly optimizing the model towards evaluation metrics. 3D-RFT first activates 3D-aware Multi-modal Large Language Models ( MLLM s) via SFT, followed by reinforcement fine-tuning using Group Relative Policy Optimization ( GRPO) with strictly verifiable reward functions. We design task-specific reward functions directly from metrics like 3D IoU and F1-Score to provide more effective signals to guide model training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 3D-RFT-4B achieves state-of-the-art performance on various video-based 3D scene understanding tasks. Notably, 3D-RFT-4B significantly outperforms larger models (e.g., VG LLM-8B) on 3D video detection, 3D visual grounding, and spatial reasoning benchmarks. We further reveal good properties of 3D-RFT such as robust efficacy, and valuable insights into training strategies and data impact. We hope 3D-RFT can serve as a robust and promising paradigm for future development of 3D scene understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了3D-RFT框架，将可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）应用于基于视频的3D场景理解，通过直接优化评估指标来提升LLM在3D感知和推理任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于监督微调（SFT）的方法使用token级别的交叉熵损失作为优化代理，导致训练目标与实际任务性能之间存在不匹配。RLVR在增强LLM推理能力方面展现了潜力，但其在3D场景理解方面的应用仍未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 3D-RFT框架首先通过SFT激活3D感知的多模态大语言模型（MLLM），然后使用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）算法进行强化微调，并结合从3D IoU和F1-Score等指标派生的严格可验证奖励函数。
AI.result: 3D-RFT-4B在多个视频3D场景理解任务上取得了最先进的性能，并且在3D视频检测、3D视觉基础和空间推理基准上显著优于更大的模型（如VG LLM-8B）。研究还揭示了3D-RFT的鲁棒性和对训练策略及数据影响的有价值见解。
AI.conclusion: 3D-RFT是首个将RLVR扩展到视频3D感知和推理的框架，通过直接优化评估指标，有效提升了模型的性能，并有望成为未来3D场景理解研究的强大范式。

title: Jagarin: A Three-Layer Architecture for Hibernating Personal Duty Agents on Mobile
summary: Personal AI agents face a fundamental deployment paradox on mobile: persistent background execution drains battery and violates platform sandboxing policies, yet purely reactive agents miss time-sensitive obligations until the user remembers to ask. We present Jagarin, a three-layer architecture that resolves this paradox through structured hibernation and demand-driven wake. The first layer, DAWN (Duty-Aware Wake Network), is an on-device heuristic engine that computes a composite urgency score from four signals: duty-typed optimal action windows, user behavioral engagement prediction, opportunity cost of inaction, and cross-duty batch resonance. It uses adaptive per-user thresholds to decide when a sleeping agent should nudge or escalate. The second layer, ARIA (Agent Relay Identity Architecture), is a commercial email identity proxy that routes the full commercial inbox -- obligations, promotional offers, loyalty rewards, and platform updates -- to appropriate DAWN handlers by message category, eliminating cold-start and removing manual data entry. The third layer, ACE (Agent-Centric Exchange), is a protocol framework for direct machine-readable communication from institutions to personal agents, replacing human-targeted email as the canonical channel. Together, these three layers form a complete stack from institutional signal to on-device action, without persistent cloud state, continuous background execution, or privacy compromise. A working Flutter prototype is demonstrated on Android, combining all three layers with an ephemeral cloud agent invoked only on user-initiated escalation.

AI.tldr: Jagarin 是一种解决移动端个人 AI 代理部署悖论的三层架构，通过结构化休眠和按需唤醒，在不牺牲电池续航和平台沙盒策略的情况下，实现及时响应。
AI.motivation: 个人 AI 代理在移动设备上的部署面临电池消耗和平台限制的挑战，而纯粹被动的代理会错过时效性任务。研究旨在解决这一部署悖论。
AI.method: Jagarin 采用三层架构：DAWN（任务感知唤醒网络）负责计算复合紧急度分数并决定唤醒时机；ARIA（代理中继身份架构）作为电子邮件代理，将收件箱内容分类并路由给 DAWN；ACE（代理中心交换）协议框架支持机构与个人代理之间的机器可读通信。该系统实现了从机构信号到设备端操作的完整流程，无需持续的云端状态或后台执行。
AI.result: 构建了一个在 Android 上运行的 Flutter 原型，并结合了这三个层。原型在用户主动升级时才调用一次性的云端代理，避免了持续的云端运行。
AI.conclusion: Jagarin 成功解决了移动端个人 AI 代理部署的挑战，通过其三层架构实现了高效、安全且低功耗的代理运行，无需持续的云端状态或后台执行，并且不会侵犯用户隐私。

title: VRM: Teaching Reward Models to Understand Authentic Human Preferences
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success across diverse natural language tasks, yet the reward models employed for aligning LLMs often encounter challenges of reward hacking, where the approaches predominantly rely on directly mapping prompt-response pairs to scalar scores, which may inadvertently capture spurious correlations rather than authentic human preferences. In contrast, human evaluation employs a sophisticated process that initially weighs the relative importance of multiple high-dimensional objectives according to the prompt context, subsequently evaluating response quality through low-dimensional semantic features such as logical coherence and contextual appropriateness. Motivated by this consideration, we propose VRM, i.e., Variational Reward Modeling, a novel framework that explicitly models the evaluation process of human preference judgments by incorporating both high-dimensional objective weights and low-dimensional semantic features as latent variables, which are inferred through variational inference techniques. Additionally, we provide a theoretical analysis showing that VRM can achieve a tighter generalization error bound compared to the traditional reward model. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that VRM significantly outperforms existing methods in capturing authentic human preferences.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为VRM（变分奖励建模）的新框架，通过将高维目标权重和低维语义特征作为潜在变量来模拟人类偏好判断的评估过程，以解决现有奖励模型中奖励劫持的问题，并在实验中证明了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有的用于对齐LLM的奖励模型常常面临奖励劫持的问题，因为它们主要依赖于将提示-响应对直接映射到标量分数，这可能捕捉到虚假的相关性而非真实的人类偏好。而人类评估则更为复杂，会根据提示上下文对多个高维目标的重要性进行加权，然后通过低维语义特征（如逻辑连贯性和上下文适宜性）来评估响应质量。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为VRM（变分奖励建模）的新框架，它通过将高维目标权重和低维语义特征作为潜在变量，并利用变分推断技术进行推断，从而显式地模拟人类偏好判断的评估过程。此外，还提供了理论分析，证明VRM可以获得比传统奖励模型更紧致的泛化误差界。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，VRM在捕捉真实人类偏好方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VRM通过显式建模人类评估过程中的高维目标权重和低维语义特征，有效解决了传统奖励模型的奖励劫持问题，并能更准确地捕捉人类偏好，在LLM对齐任务中展现出优越的性能。

title: cuRoboV2: Dynamics-Aware Motion Generation with Depth-Fused Distance Fields for High-DoF Robots
summary: Effective robot autonomy requires motion generation that is safe, feasible, and reactive. Current methods are fragmented: fast planners output physically unexecutable trajectories, reactive controllers struggle with high-fidelity perception, and existing solvers fail on high-DoF systems. We present cuRoboV2, a unified framework with three key innovations: (1) B-spline trajectory optimization that enforces smoothness and torque limits; (2) a GPU-native TSDF/ESDF perception pipeline that generates dense signed distance fields covering the full workspace, unlike existing methods that only provide distances within sparsely allocated blocks, up to 10x faster and in 8x less memory than the state-of-the-art at manipulation scale, with up to 99% collision recall; and (3) scalable GPU-native whole-body computation, namely topology-aware kinematics, differentiable inverse dynamics, and map-reduce self-collision, that achieves up to 61x speedup while also extending to high-DoF humanoids (where previous GPU implementations fail). On benchmarks, cuRoboV2 achieves 99.7% success under 3kg payload (where baselines achieve only 72--77%), 99.6% collision-free IK on a 48-DoF humanoid (where prior methods fail entirely), and 89.5% retargeting constraint satisfaction (vs. 61% for PyRoki); these collision-free motions yield locomotion policies with 21% lower tracking error than PyRoki and 12x lower cross-seed variance than mink. A ground-up codebase redesign for discoverability enabled LLM coding assistants to author up to 73% of new modules, including hand-optimized CUDA kernels, demonstrating that well-structured robotics code can unlock productive human--LLM collaboration. Together, these advances provide a unified, dynamics-aware motion generation stack that scales from single-arm manipulators to full humanoids.

AI.tldr: cuRoboV2 是一个统一的机器人运动生成框架，通过 B 样条轨迹优化、GPU 加速的感知流水线和可扩展的全身计算，实现了安全、可行和响应迅速的运动，特别是在高自由度机器人和高精度要求方面取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人运动生成方法在安全性、可行性和响应性方面存在碎片化问题，无法满足高自由度系统和高保真感知的需求。
AI.method:
1. 使用 B 样条轨迹优化来保证平滑性和力矩限制。
2. 采用 GPU 原生的 TSDF/ESDF 感知流水线，生成密集有符号距离场，速度更快、内存占用更少，碰撞检测召回率高。
3. 实现可扩展的 GPU 原生全身计算，包括拓扑感知运动学、可微分逆动力学和 MapReduce 自碰撞检测，实现了显著的加速，并支持高自由度人形机器人。
AI.result: cuRoboV2 在基准测试中取得了 99.7% 的成功率（有 3kg 载荷），碰撞检测无误的逆运动学成功率达 99.6%（在 48-DoF 人形机器人上，先前方法失败），重定向约束满足率达 89.5%。其生成的运动在追踪误差和跨种子方差方面优于其他方法。此外，代码库的设计促进了 LLM 辅助编程。
AI.conclusion: cuRoboV2 提供了一个统一的、考虑动力学的运动生成堆栈，能够从单臂机械臂扩展到完整的人形机器人，并能与 LLM 协作提高开发效率。

title: Safe-SAGE: Social-Semantic Adaptive Guidance for Safe Engagement through Laplace-Modulated Poisson Safety Functions
summary: Traditional safety-critical control methods, such as control barrier functions, suffer from semantic blindness, exhibiting the same behavior around obstacles regardless of contextual significance. This limitation leads to the uniform treatment of all obstacles, despite their differing semantic meanings. We present Safe-SAGE (Social-Semantic Adaptive Guidance for Safe Engagement), a unified framework that bridges the gap between high-level semantic understanding and low-level safety-critical control through a Poisson safety function (PSF) modulated using a Laplace guidance field. Our approach perceives the environment by fusing multi-sensor point clouds with vision-based instance segmentation and persistent object tracking to maintain up-to-date semantics beyond the camera's field of view. A multi-layer safety filter is then used to modulate system inputs to achieve safe navigation using this semantic understanding of the environment. This safety filter consists of both a model predictive control layer and a control barrier function layer. Both layers utilize the PSF and flux modulation of the guidance field to introduce varying levels of conservatism and multi-agent passing norms for different obstacles in the environment. Our framework enables legged robots to navigate semantically rich, dynamic environments with context-dependent safety margins while maintaining rigorous safety guarantees.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为 Safe-SAGE 的统一框架，通过结合语义理解和控制屏障函数来实现机器人安全导航，能够根据障碍物的语义重要性调整安全裕度。
AI.motivation: 传统安全关键控制方法（如控制屏障函数）在处理不同语义重要性的障碍物时存在“语义盲”问题，未能区分对待。这导致了对所有障碍物一视同仁的统一处理，而忽略了它们在环境中的实际意义。
AI.method: Safe-SAGE 框架通过融合多传感器点云、基于视觉的实例分割和持续对象跟踪来感知环境，并利用泊松安全函数 (PSF) 和拉普拉斯引导场来调制安全策略。该框架包含一个多层安全过滤器，结合了模型预测控制 (MPC) 和控制屏障函数 (CBF) 层。这两种层都使用 PSF 和引导场的通量调制来引入不同程度的保守性，并为不同障碍物实现多智能体避让规范。
AI.result: Safe-SAGE 框架使有腿机器人能够在语义丰富、动态变化的环境中导航，并根据上下文调整安全裕度，同时保持严格的安全保证。它能够实现区分对待不同语义重要性的障碍物。
AI.conclusion: Safe-SAGE 框架成功地将高层语义理解与低层安全关键控制联系起来，通过泊松安全函数和拉普拉斯引导场实现动态、语义感知和上下文相关的安全导航，有效解决了传统方法的局限性。

title: Bidirectional Curriculum Generation: A Multi-Agent Framework for Data-Efficient Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Enhancing mathematical reasoning in Large Language Models typically demands massive datasets, yet data efficiency remains a critical bottleneck. While Curriculum Learning attempts to structure this process, standard unidirectional approaches (simple-to-complex) suffer from inefficient sample utilization: they blindly escalate complexity even when foundational gaps persist, leading to wasted computation on unsolvable problems. To maximize the instructional value of every training sample, we introduce a novel Bidirectional Curriculum Generation framework. Unlike rigid trajectories, our multi-agent ecosystem mimics adaptive pedagogy to establish a closed feedback loop. It dynamically generates data by either complicating problems to challenge the model or, crucially, simplying them to repair specific reasoning failures. This mechanism ensures that the model consumes only the most effective data at any given stage. Grounded in the Optimal Pacing Theorem, our approach optimizes the learning trajectory, significantly outperforming baselines while achieving superior reasoning performance with substantially fewer instruction samples.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双向课程生成框架，通过动态地简化或复杂化问题来解决现有单向课程学习在数据效率和解决基础性推理故障方面的不足，从而在更少的数据下提升大语言模型的数学推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的通过大规模数据集增强大语言模型数学推理能力的方法面临数据效率瓶颈。标准的单向课程学习（从简单到复杂）存在样本利用效率低的问题，即在模型存在基础性推理缺陷时仍盲目增加难度，导致计算资源浪费。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的双向课程生成框架（Bidirectional Curriculum Generation）。该框架采用多智能体生态系统，模拟自适应教学，建立闭环反馈。它能够动态地生成数据，通过复杂化问题来挑战模型，或通过简化问题来修复特定的推理失败。该方法基于最优步调定理（Optimal Pacing Theorem）。
AI.result: 与基线方法相比，该方法在数学推理性能上表现更优，并且显著减少了所需的指令样本数量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的双向课程生成框架通过动态调整问题难度，确保模型在每个阶段都能接收到最有效的数据，从而实现了更高效的学习和更强的数学推理能力，解决了单向课程学习中数据效率低和推理故障修复不及时的问题。

title: MPCEval: A Benchmark for Multi-Party Conversation Generation
summary: Multi-party conversation generation, such as smart reply and collaborative assistants, is an increasingly important capability of generative AI, yet its evaluation remains a critical bottleneck. Compared to two-party dialogue, multi-party settings introduce distinct challenges, including complex turn-taking, role-dependent speaker behavior, long-range conversational structure, and multiple equally valid continuations. Accordingly, we introduce MPCEval, a task-aware evaluation and benchmarking suite for multi-party conversation generation. MPCEval decomposes generation quality into speaker modeling, content quality, and speaker--content consistency, and explicitly distinguishes local next-turn prediction from global full-conversation generation. It provides novel, quantitative, reference-free, and reproducible metrics that scale across datasets and models. We apply MPCEval to diverse public and real-world datasets and evaluate modern generation methods alongside human-authored conversations. The results reveal systematic, dimension-specific model characteristics in participation balance, content progression and novelty, and speaker--content consistency, demonstrating that evaluation objectives critically shape model assessment and that single-score evaluation obscures fundamental differences in multi-party conversational behavior. The implementation of MPCEval and the associated evaluation code are publicly available at https://github.com/Owen-Yang-18/MPCEval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为MPCEval的评估框架，用于解决多方对话生成任务的评估瓶颈。该框架将生成质量分解为说话人建模、内容质量和说话人-内容一致性，并区分局部下一轮预测和全局完整对话生成。MPCEval提供了新颖、量化、无参考且可复现的指标，并已应用于多个数据集和模型，揭示了现有生成方法在多方对话中的系统性特点。
AI.motivation: 现有的对话生成评估方法在处理复杂的多方对话场景时存在局限性，无法有效衡量多方对话的独特性质，如复杂的轮次切换、角色依赖的行为、长程结构以及多样的合理续写。因此，需要一个专门针对多方对话生成任务的评估框架。
AI.method: 本文引入了MPCEval，一个包含任务感知评估和基准测试的套件。MPCEval将评估分解为三个维度：说话人建模、内容质量和说话人-内容一致性。它区分了局部（下一轮预测）和全局（完整对话生成）的评估。MPCEval提供了新的、量化的、无需参考且可复现的指标，并可扩展到不同数据集和模型。
AI.result: 将MPCEval应用于多个数据集和现代生成方法，结果显示了模型在参与度平衡、内容进展和新颖性、以及说话人-内容一致性方面的系统性特点。评估结果表明，不同的评估目标会显著影响模型评估，单一分数评估会掩盖多方对话行为中的根本差异。
AI.conclusion: MPCEval提供了一个有效的、多维度的评估框架，能够更全面、细致地衡量多方对话生成模型的性能。研究结果强调了评估框架对模型分析的重要性，并指出了现有生成模型在多方对话中的具体优势和不足。

title: Think, Then Verify: A Hypothesis-Verification Multi-Agent Framework for Long Video Understanding
summary: Long video understanding is challenging due to dense visual redundancy, long-range temporal dependencies, and the tendency of chain-of-thought and retrieval-based agents to accumulate semantic drift and correlation-driven errors. We argue that long-video reasoning should begin not with reactive retrieval, but with deliberate task formulation: the model must first articulate what must be true in the video for each candidate answer to hold. This thinking-before-finding principle motivates VideoHV-Agent, a framework that reformulates video question answering as a structured hypothesis-verification process. Based on video summaries, a Thinker rewrites answer candidates into testable hypotheses, a Judge derives a discriminative clue specifying what evidence must be checked, a Verifier grounds and tests the clue using localized, fine-grained video content, and an Answer agent integrates validated evidence to produce the final answer. Experiments on three long-video understanding benchmarks show that VideoHV-Agent achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while providing enhanced interpretability, improved logical soundness, and lower computational cost. We make our code publicly available at: https://github.com/Haorane/VideoHV-Agent.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为VideoHV-Agent的框架，通过结构化的假设-验证过程来解决长视频问答中的挑战，在不牺牲准确性的情况下提高了可解释性和效率。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解面临视觉冗余、长程时序依赖以及现有方法易出现语义漂移和相关性驱动误差的问题。研究者认为，长视频推理应从明确的任务制定开始，而非被动的检索。
AI.method: VideoHV-Agent框架将视频问答重构为结构化的假设-验证过程。具体包括：1. Thinker根据视频摘要将答案候选重写为可检验的假设。2. Judge推导出区分性线索，明确需要检查的证据。3. Verifier利用局部、细粒度的视频内容定位并检验线索。4. Answer agent整合验证后的证据生成最终答案。
AI.result: 在三个长视频理解基准测试中，VideoHV-Agent达到了最先进的准确率，同时提高了可解释性、逻辑合理性，并降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: VideoHV-Agent通过“先思考后寻找”的原则，成功解决了长视频问答中的关键挑战，展示了其在准确性、可解释性和效率方面的优势。

title: A Simple Baseline for Unifying Understanding, Generation, and Editing via Vanilla Next-token Prediction
comment: Technical report. This work serves as a straightforward autoregressive baseline for unifying understanding, generation, and editing
summary: In this work, we introduce Wallaroo, a simple autoregressive baseline that leverages next-token prediction to unify multi-modal understanding, image generation, and editing at the same time. Moreover, Wallaroo supports multi-resolution image input and output, as well as bilingual support for both Chinese and English. We decouple the visual encoding into separate pathways and apply a four-stage training strategy to reshape the model's capabilities. Experiments are conducted on various benchmarks where Wallaroo produces competitive performance or exceeds other unified models, suggesting the great potential of autoregressive models in unifying multi-modality understanding and generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/JiePKU/Wallaroo.

AI.tldr: Wallaroo是一个简单的自回归基线模型，通过预测下一个token来统一多模态理解、图像生成和编辑，支持多分辨率输入输出及中英文，实验证明了其潜力。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于探索一种能够同时处理多模态理解、图像生成和编辑的统一模型，并证明自回归模型在此类任务中的潜力。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为Wallaroo的自回归模型，采用next-token prediction来统一多种多模态任务。模型支持多分辨率图像输入输出，并具备中英文双语能力。通过解耦视觉编码路径和采用四阶段训练策略来塑造模型能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，Wallaroo取得了与现有统一模型相比有竞争力的性能，甚至超越了其他模型。
AI.conclusion: Wallaroo模型展示了自回归模型在统一多模态理解和生成任务方面的巨大潜力，并实现了在多模态理解、图像生成和编辑上的统一。

title: MedCoRAG: Interpretable Hepatology Diagnosis via Hybrid Evidence Retrieval and Multispecialty Consensus
summary: Diagnosing hepatic diseases accurately and interpretably is critical, yet it remains challenging in real-world clinical settings. Existing AI approaches for clinical diagnosis often lack transparency, structured reasoning, and deployability. Recent efforts have leveraged large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and multi-agent collaboration. However, these approaches typically retrieve evidence from a single source and fail to support iterative, role-specialized deliberation grounded in structured clinical data. To address this, we propose MedCoRAG (i.e., Medical Collaborative RAG), an end-to-end framework that generates diagnostic hypotheses from standardized abnormal findings and constructs a patient-specific evidence package by jointly retrieving and pruning UMLS knowledge graph paths and clinical guidelines. It then performs Multi-Agent Collaborative Reasoning: a Router Agent dynamically dispatches Specialist Agents based on case complexity; these agents iteratively reason over the evidence and trigger targeted re-retrievals when needed, while a Generalist Agent synthesizes all deliberations into a traceable consensus diagnosis that emulates multidisciplinary consultation. Experimental results on hepatic disease cases from MIMIC-IV show that MedCoRAG outperforms existing methods and closed-source models in both diagnostic performance and reasoning interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 MedCoRAG，一个结合了检索增强生成（RAG）和多智能体协作的框架，用于从标准化的异常发现中生成肝脏疾病的诊断假设，并构建患者特定的证据包。该框架通过路由器智能体动态分配专科智能体进行迭代推理，并利用通用智能体综合各方意见，最终生成可追溯的共识诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有的 AI 诊断方法在临床实际中往往缺乏透明度、结构化推理和可部署性。虽然 LLM、RAG 和多智能体方法有所发展，但它们通常只从单一来源检索证据，并且未能支持基于结构化临床数据的迭代式、角色专业化审议。
AI.method: MedCoRAG 是一个端到端框架，它首先从标准化的异常发现生成诊断假设，然后通过联合检索和修剪 UMLS 知识图路径和临床指南来构建患者特定的证据包。接着，它采用多智能体协作推理：路由器智能体根据病例复杂性动态分配专科智能体；这些智能体在证据上迭代推理，并在需要时触发定向的重新检索；而通用智能体则将所有审议过程综合成一个可追溯的共识诊断。
AI.result: 在 MIMIC-IV 的肝脏疾病病例上进行实验，MedCoRAG 在诊断性能和推理可解释性方面均优于现有方法和闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: MedCoRAG 框架通过整合标准化异常发现、构建患者特定证据包以及实现多智能体协作推理，能够有效地生成肝脏疾病的诊断假设，并提供可追溯的共识诊断，优于现有方法。

title: Observing and Controlling Features in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action Models (VLAs) have shown remarkable progress towards embodied intelligence. While their architecture partially resembles that of Large Language Models (LLMs), VLAs exhibit higher complexity due to their multi-modal inputs/outputs and often hybrid nature of transformer and diffusion heads. This is part of the reason why insights from mechanistic interpretability in LLMs, which explain how the internal model representations relate to their output behavior, do not trivially transfer to VLA counterparts. In this work, we propose to close this gap by introducing and analyzing two main concepts: feature-observability and feature-controllability. In particular, we first study features that are linearly encoded in representation space, and show how they can be observed by means of a linear classifier. Then, we use a minimal linear intervention grounded in optimal control to accurately place internal representations and steer the VLA's output towards a desired region. Our results show that targeted, lightweight interventions can reliably steer a robot's behavior while preserving closed-loop capabilities. We demonstrate on different VLA architectures ($π_{0.5}$ and OpenVLA) through simulation experiments that VLAs possess interpretable internal structure amenable to online adaptation without fine-tuning, enabling real-time alignment with user preferences and task requirements.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出特征可观测性和特征可控性来增强对视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的理解和控制，并通过线性干预实现对机器人行为的实时调整。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLM）的可解释性研究成果难以直接应用于 VLA 模型，因为 VLA 模型结构更复杂，输入输出多模态且包含混合模块。
AI.method: 研究者提出了特征可观测性和特征可控性两个核心概念。通过线性分类器来观测线性编码在表示空间中的特征，并利用基于最优控制的最小线性干预来精确调整内部表示，以引导 VLA 的输出。实验在 π_{0.5} 和 OpenVLA 两种 VLA 架构上进行。
AI.result: 通过轻量级的、有针对性的干预，可以可靠地引导机器人的行为，同时保持其闭环能力。证明了 VLA 模型具有可解释的内部结构，并且可以进行在线适应，无需微调，从而实现与用户偏好和任务需求的实时对齐。
AI.conclusion: VLA 模型拥有可解释的内部结构，并且可以通过特征可观测性和特征可控性等方法进行有效的干预和控制，从而实现实时适应和对齐。

title: TAPFormer: Robust Arbitrary Point Tracking via Transient Asynchronous Fusion of Frames and Events
summary: Tracking any point (TAP) is a fundamental yet challenging task in computer vision, requiring high precision and long-term motion reasoning. Recent attempts to combine RGB frames and event streams have shown promise, yet they typically rely on synchronous or non-adaptive fusion, leading to temporal misalignment and severe degradation when one modality fails. We introduce TAPFormer, a transformer-based framework that performs asynchronous temporal-consistent fusion of frames and events for robust and high-frequency arbitrary point tracking. Our key innovation is a Transient Asynchronous Fusion (TAF) mechanism, which explicitly models the temporal evolution between discrete frames through continuous event updates, bridging the gap between low-rate frames and high-rate events. In addition, a Cross-modal Locally Weighted Fusion (CLWF) module adaptively adjusts spatial attention according to modality reliability, yielding stable and discriminative features even under blur or low light. To evaluate our approach under realistic conditions, we construct a novel real-world frame-event TAP dataset under diverse illumination and motion conditions. Our method outperforms existing point trackers, achieving a 28.2% improvement in average pixel error within threshold. Moreover, on standard point tracking benchmarks, our tracker consistently achieves the best performance. Project website: tapformer.github.io

AI.tldr: TAPFormer是一种基于Transformer的点跟踪框架，通过异步融合RGB帧和事件流，解决了传统方法中时序不对齐和单模态失效的问题，在各种光照和运动条件下均取得了优异的点跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的点跟踪方法在处理模态间时序错位和单模态失效时性能会显著下降。研究动机是开发一种能够进行异步、时序一致的模态融合的点跟踪方法，以提高鲁棒性和跟踪精度。
AI.method: TAPFormer框架采用Transformer架构，核心创新在于“瞬态异步融合（TAF）”机制，通过连续的事件更新来显式建模离散帧之间的时序演化。此外，引入“跨模态局部加权融合（CLWF）”模块，根据模态可靠性自适应调整空间注意力，以获得稳定且具有辨别力的特征。
AI.result: 在新的真实世界帧-事件点跟踪数据集上，TAPFormer的平均像素误差比现有方法提高了28.2%。在标准点跟踪基准测试中，TAPFormer也 consistently 取得了最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: TAPFormer通过创新的异步融合机制，有效地解决了帧和事件模态在时间上的不一致性问题，并能自适应地处理模态可靠性差异，实现了在复杂条件下的鲁棒且高精度的点跟踪。

title: RoboPocket: Improve Robot Policies Instantly with Your Phone
summary: Scaling imitation learning is fundamentally constrained by the efficiency of data collection. While handheld interfaces have emerged as a scalable solution for in-the-wild data acquisition, they predominantly operate in an open-loop manner: operators blindly collect demonstrations without knowing the underlying policy's weaknesses, leading to inefficient coverage of critical state distributions. Conversely, interactive methods like DAgger effectively address covariate shift but rely on physical robot execution, which is costly and difficult to scale. To reconcile this trade-off, we introduce RoboPocket, a portable system that enables Robot-Free Instant Policy Iteration using single consumer smartphones. Its core innovation is a Remote Inference framework that visualizes the policy's predicted trajectory via Augmented Reality (AR) Visual Foresight. This immersive feedback allows collectors to proactively identify potential failures and focus data collection on the policy's weak regions without requiring a physical robot. Furthermore, we implement an asynchronous Online Finetuning pipeline that continuously updates the policy with incoming data, effectively closing the learning loop in minutes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoboPocket adheres to data scaling laws and doubles the data efficiency compared to offline scaling strategies, overcoming their long-standing efficiency bottleneck. Moreover, our instant iteration loop also boosts sample efficiency by up to 2$\times$ in distributed environments a small number of interactive corrections per person. Project page and videos: https://robo-pocket.github.io.

AI.tldr: RoboPocket 是一种便携式系统，利用智能手机和增强现实 (AR) 进行无需物理机器人的即时策略迭代，通过可视化策略预测轨迹来指导数据收集，并异步在线微调策略，从而提高数据效率和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的模仿学习数据收集方法存在效率低下问题：手持接口（开放循环）无法识别策略弱点，而交互式方法（如 DAgger）依赖于昂贵的物理机器人执行。需要一种可扩展且高效的数据收集方法。
AI.method: RoboPocket 系统，核心是远程推理框架，通过 AR 进行视觉预测，让操作员识别策略的薄弱环节。此外，还实现了异步在线微调管道，持续更新策略。
AI.result: RoboPocket 提高了数据收集效率，是离线方法数据效率的两倍，并在分布式环境中将样本效率提高高达 2 倍，且每次交互修正成本低。
AI.conclusion: RoboPocket 成功解决了模仿学习数据收集的效率瓶颈，通过 AR 视觉反馈和即时策略迭代，实现了高效、可扩展的数据收集和策略优化，无需物理机器人。

title: HiFlow: Hierarchical Feedback-Driven Optimization for Constrained Long-Form Text Generation
summary: Large language models perform well in short text generation but still struggle with long text generation, particularly under complex constraints. Such tasks involve multiple tightly coupled objectives, including global structural consistency, local semantic coherence, and constraint feasibility, forming a challenging constrained optimization problem. Existing approaches mainly rely on static planning or offline supervision, limiting effective coordination between global and local objectives during generation. To address these challenges, we propose HiFlow, a hierarchical feedback-driven optimization framework for constrained long text generation. HiFlow formulates generation as a two-level optimization process, consisting of a planning layer for global structure and constraint modeling, and a generation layer for conditioned text generation. By incorporating constraint-aware plan screening and closed-loop feedback at both levels, HiFlow enables joint optimization of planning quality and generation behavior, progressively guiding the model toward high-quality, constraint-satisfying outputs. Experiments on multiple backbones confirm HiFlow's effectiveness over baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为HiFlow的框架，通过分层反馈优化来解决大型语言模型在生成长文本时遇到的复杂约束问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在生成短文本方面表现良好，但在生成长文本，尤其是在复杂约束条件下时存在困难。这些任务需要同时满足全局结构一致性、局部语义连贯性和约束可行性等多个耦合目标，构成了一个挑战性的约束优化问题。现有方法主要依赖静态规划或离线监督，限制了在生成过程中全局和局部目标的有效协调。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为HiFlow的分层反馈驱动优化框架。HiFlow将生成过程设计为两层优化：规划层负责全局结构和约束建模，生成层负责条件文本生成。通过在两个层面引入约束感知规划筛选和闭环反馈，HiFlow实现了规划质量和生成行为的联合优化，逐步引导模型生成高质量、满足约束的输出。
AI.result: 在多个骨干模型上的实验表明，HiFlow在解决约束长文本生成问题上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HiFlow框架能够有效地解决大型语言模型在生成长文本时的复杂约束问题，通过分层优化和反馈机制实现了规划与生成的协同，从而生成高质量且满足约束的文本。

title: CoIn3D: Revisiting Configuration-Invariant Multi-Camera 3D Object Detection
summary: Multi-camera 3D object detection (MC3D) has attracted increasing attention with the growing deployment of multi-sensor physical agents, such as robots and autonomous vehicles. However, MC3D models still struggle to generalize to unseen platforms with new multi-camera configurations. Current solutions simply employ a meta-camera for unified representation but lack comprehensive consideration. In this paper, we revisit this issue and identify that the devil lies in spatial prior discrepancies across source and target configurations, including different intrinsics, extrinsics, and array layouts. To address this, we propose CoIn3D, a generalizable MC3D framework that enables strong transferability from source configurations to unseen target ones. CoIn3D explicitly incorporates all identified spatial priors into both feature embedding and image observation through spatial-aware feature modulation (SFM) and camera-aware data augmentation (CDA), respectively. SFM enriches feature space by integrating four spatial representations, such as focal length, ground depth, ground gradient, and Plücker coordinate. CDA improves observation diversity under various configurations via a training-free dynamic novel-view image synthesis scheme. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoIn3D achieves strong cross-configuration performance on landmark datasets such as NuScenes, Waymo, and Lyft, under three dominant MC3D paradigms represented by BEVDepth, BEVFormer, and PETR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CoIn3D的通用多摄像头3D目标检测框架，通过空间感知特征调制（SFM）和摄像头感知数据增强（CDA）来解决不同相机配置下的泛化问题，并在多个数据集和模型上取得了良好效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的多摄像头3D目标检测模型难以泛化到具有新相机配置的未见平台，现有方法未能全面考虑相机配置差异。
AI.method: 提出CoIn3D框架，包含空间感知特征调制（SFM）和摄像头感知数据增强（CDA）。SFM通过整合焦距、地面深度、地面梯度和Plücker坐标等四种空间表示来丰富特征空间。CDA通过训练免费的动态新视图图像合成方案来提高不同配置下的观测多样性。
AI.result: CoIn3D在NuScenes、Waymo和Lyft等数据集上，针对BEVDepth、BEVFormer和PETR三种主流多摄像头3D目标检测范式，展现了强大的跨配置性能。
AI.conclusion: CoIn3D通过显式地将识别出的空间先验（包括内参、外参和阵列布局）整合到特征嵌入和图像观测中，有效地解决了多摄像头3D目标检测中的空间先验差异问题，实现了从源配置到目标配置的强大可迁移性。

title: ThaiSafetyBench: Assessing Language Model Safety in Thai Cultural Contexts
comment: ICLR 2026 Workshop on Principled Design for Trustworthy AI
summary:
The safety evaluation of large language models (LLMs) remains largely centered on English, leaving non-English languages and culturally grounded risks underexplored. In this work, we investigate LLM safety in the context of the Thai language and culture and introduce ThaiSafetyBench, an open-source benchmark comprising 1,954 malicious prompts written in Thai. The dataset covers both general harmful prompts and attacks that are explicitly grounded in Thai cultural, social, and contextual nuances.
  Using ThaiSafetyBench, we evaluate 24 LLMs, with GPT-4.1 and Gemini-2.5-Pro serving as LLM-as-a-judge evaluators. Our results show that closed-source models generally demonstrate stronger safety performance than open-source counterparts, raising important concerns regarding the robustness of openly available models. Moreover, we observe a consistently higher Attack Success Rate (ASR) for Thai-specific, culturally contextualized attacks compared to general Thai-language attacks, highlighting a critical vulnerability in current safety alignment methods.
  To improve reproducibility and cost efficiency, we further fine-tune a DeBERTa-based harmful response classifier, which we name ThaiSafetyClassifier. The model achieves a weighted F1 score of 84.4%, matching GPT-4.1 judgments. We publicly release the fine-tuning weights and training scripts to support reproducibility. Finally, we introduce the ThaiSafetyBench leaderboard to provide continuously updated safety evaluations and encourage community participation.
  - ThaiSafetyBench HuggingFace Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/typhoon-ai/ThaiSafetyBench
  - ThaiSafetyBench Github: https://github.com/trapoom555/ThaiSafetyBench
  - ThaiSafetyClassifier HuggingFace Model: https://huggingface.co/typhoon-ai/ThaiSafetyClassifier
  - ThaiSafetyBench Leaderboard: https://huggingface.co/spaces/typhoon-ai/ThaiSafetyBench-Leaderboard

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个名为 ThaiSafetyBench 的泰语大型语言模型（LLM）安全评估基准，包含 1954 个恶意泰语提示，其中一部分与泰国文化背景紧密相关。研究发现，闭源模型在安全性能上优于开源模型，且针对泰国文化背景的攻击成功率更高。研究还开发了一个名为 ThaiSafetyClassifier 的泰语有害回应分类器，并公开了相关资源和排行榜，以促进泰语 LLM 安全评估的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLM）安全评估主要集中在英语，对非英语语言和特定文化背景下的风险研究不足。本研究旨在填补泰语 LLM 安全评估的空白，并揭示泰国语言和文化背景下的独特安全风险。
AI.method:
1. 构建 ThaiSafetyBench 数据集：收集了 1954 个包含通用有害提示和泰国文化、社会、语境特有有害提示的泰语恶意提示。
2. LLM 安全评估：使用 ThaiSafetyBench 评估了 24 个 LLM，并采用 GPT-4.1 和 Gemini-2.5-Pro 作为 LLM-as-a-judge 进行评估。
3. 开发有害回应分类器：基于 DeBERTa 模型微调了 ThaiSafetyClassifier，用于自动化识别有害回应。
4. 公开资源：发布了 ThaiSafetyBench 数据集、ThaiSafetyClassifier 模型权重和训练脚本，以及 ThaiSafetyBench 排行榜。
AI.result:
1. 闭源 LLM 在安全性能上普遍优于开源 LLM。
2. 针对泰国文化特有攻击的成功率（ASR）显著高于通用泰语攻击。
3. ThaiSafetyClassifier 模型在泰语有害回应分类任务上达到了 84.4% 的加权 F1 分数，与 GPT-4.1 的判断一致。
4. 公开资源促进了泰语 LLM 安全评估的可复现性和社区参与。
AI.conclusion: 现有的 LLM 安全对策在应对特定语言和文化背景下的安全风险方面存在不足。本研究通过构建 ThaiSafetyBench 数据集和 ThaiSafetyClassifier 模型，揭示了泰语 LLM 在应对文化特有攻击时面临的挑战，并为后续泰语 LLM 的安全研究和评估提供了重要的基础资源和方法。

title: KARL: Knowledge Agents via Reinforcement Learning
summary: We present a system for training enterprise search agents via reinforcement learning that achieves state-of-the-art performance across a diverse suite of hard-to-verify agentic search tasks. Our work makes four core contributions. First, we introduce KARLBench, a multi-capability evaluation suite spanning six distinct search regimes, including constraint-driven entity search, cross-document report synthesis, tabular numerical reasoning, exhaustive entity retrieval, procedural reasoning over technical documentation, and fact aggregation over internal enterprise notes. Second, we show that models trained across heterogeneous search behaviors generalize substantially better than those optimized for any single benchmark. Third, we develop an agentic synthesis pipeline that employs long-horizon reasoning and tool use to generate diverse, grounded, and high-quality training data, with iterative bootstrapping from increasingly capable models. Fourth, we propose a new post-training paradigm based on iterative large-batch off-policy RL that is sample efficient, robust to train-inference engine discrepancies, and naturally extends to multi-task training with out-of-distribution generalization. Compared to Claude 4.6 and GPT 5.2, KARL is Pareto-optimal on KARLBench across cost-quality and latency-quality trade-offs, including tasks that were out-of-distribution during training. With sufficient test-time compute, it surpasses the strongest closed models. These results show that tailored synthetic data in combination with multi-task reinforcement learning enables cost-efficient and high-performing knowledge agents for grounded reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的企业搜索代理训练系统KARL，在多项搜索任务上取得了最先进的性能。该系统通过多任务训练、代理合成数据生成以及迭代式大规模离线强化学习进行优化。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在执行复杂、难以验证的企业搜索任务时表现不佳，需要一种能够实现更优性能和泛化能力的搜索代理训练方法。
AI.method: 1. 引入KARLBench，一个包含六种不同搜索任务的多能力评估套件。2. 训练模型在异构搜索行为上进行泛化，而非单一基准。3. 开发代理合成管道，利用长时推理和工具使用生成高质量训练数据。4. 提出一种新的迭代式大规模离线强化学习训练范式，以提高样本效率和鲁棒性。
AI.result: KARL在KARLBench上的表现优于Claude 4.6和GPT 5.2，在成本-质量和延迟-质量权衡方面均实现帕累托最优，并在训练中未出现的数据集上展现出良好的泛化能力。在充足的测试计算资源下，其性能甚至超过最强的闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: 定制化的合成数据结合多任务强化学习，能够有效地训练出成本效益高、性能优越的、能够进行可靠推理的知识代理。

title: AI+HW 2035: Shaping the Next Decade
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) and hardware (HW) are advancing at unprecedented rates, yet their trajectories have become inseparably intertwined. The global research community lacks a cohesive, long-term vision to strategically coordinate the development of AI and HW. This fragmentation constrains progress toward holistic, sustainable, and adaptive AI systems capable of learning, reasoning, and operating efficiently across cloud, edge, and physical environments. The future of AI depends not only on scaling intelligence, but on scaling efficiency, achieving exponential gains in intelligence per joule, rather than unbounded compute consumption. Addressing this grand challenge requires rethinking the entire computing stack. This vision paper lays out a 10-year roadmap for AI+HW co-design and co-development, spanning algorithms, architectures, systems, and sustainability. We articulate key insights that redefine scaling around energy efficiency, system-level integration, and cross-layer optimization. We identify key challenges and opportunities, candidly assess potential obstacles and pitfalls, and propose integrated solutions grounded in algorithmic innovation, hardware advances, and software abstraction. Looking ahead, we define what success means in 10 years: achieving a 1000x improvement in efficiency for AI training and inference; enabling energy-aware, self-optimizing systems that seamlessly span cloud, edge, and physical AI; democratizing access to advanced AI infrastructure; and embedding human-centric principles into the design of intelligent systems. Finally, we outline concrete action items for academia, industry, government, and the broader community, calling for coordinated national initiatives, shared infrastructure, workforce development, cross-agency collaboration, and sustained public-private partnerships to ensure that AI+HW co-design becomes a unifying long-term mission.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个为期10年的AI+HW协同设计和协同发展路线图，旨在克服当前AI和硬件发展碎片化的问题，实现AI效率的指数级提升，并构建可持续、自优化的AI系统。
AI.motivation: 全球研究界缺乏一个协调AI和硬件发展的长期愿景，这种碎片化阻碍了构建高效、可持续和适应性强的AI系统，未来AI的发展不仅需要智能的扩展，更需要效率的扩展，即在每焦耳能量下实现智能的指数级增长。
AI.method: 本文是一个愿景论文，提出了一个跨越算法、架构、系统和可持续性的10年路线图。通过重新思考整个计算堆栈，明确了围绕能效、系统级集成和跨层优化重新定义扩展的关键见解，并提出了基于算法创新、硬件进步和软件抽象的综合解决方案。
AI.result: 目标是在10年内实现AI训练和推理效率1000倍的提升，实现跨云、边缘和物理AI的能源感知、自优化系统，普及先进AI基础设施的访问，并将以人为本的原则融入智能系统设计。
AI.conclusion: 实现AI+HW协同设计需要学术界、工业界、政府和整个社区的共同努力，包括协调的国家倡议、共享基础设施、劳动力发展、跨机构合作以及持续的公私伙伴关系，以确保AI+HW协同设计成为一项统一的长期使命。

title: MultiGO++: Monocular 3D Clothed Human Reconstruction via Geometry-Texture Collaboration
summary: Monocular 3D clothed human reconstruction aims to generate a complete and realistic textured 3D avatar from a single image. Existing methods are commonly trained under multi-view supervision with annotated geometric priors, and during inference, these priors are estimated by the pre-trained network from the monocular input. These methods are constrained by three key limitations: texturally by unavailability of training data, geometrically by inaccurate external priors, and systematically by biased single-modality supervision, all leading to suboptimal reconstruction. To address these issues, we propose a novel reconstruction framework, named MultiGO++, which achieves effective systematic geometry-texture collaboration. It consists of three core parts: (1) A multi-source texture synthesis strategy that constructs 15,000+ 3D textured human scans to improve the performance on texture quality estimation in challenge scenarios; (2) A region-aware shape extraction module that extracts and interacts features of each body region to obtain geometry information and a Fourier geometry encoder that mitigates the modality gap to achieve effective geometry learning; (3) A dual reconstruction U-Net that leverages geometry-texture collaborative features to refine and generate high-fidelity textured 3D human meshes. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks and many in-the-wild cases show the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 MultiGO++ 的新方法，用于从单张图像重建高质量的 3D 纹理人体模型。该方法通过多源纹理合成、区域感知形状提取和傅立叶几何编码器等技术，克服了现有方法在纹理、几何和训练数据方面的限制，实现了更优的重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有单目 3D 衣服人体重建方法受限于训练数据不足、外部先验几何不准确以及单一模态监督的偏差，导致重建效果不理想。
AI.method: MultiGO++ 框架包含三个核心部分：1. 多源纹理合成策略，生成大量 3D 纹理扫描数据以提升纹理质量估计；2. 区域感知形状提取模块和傅立叶几何编码器，以提取并融合各身体区域的特征，并减小模态差距；3. 双重重建 U-Net，利用几何-纹理协同特征生成高保真 3D 人体网格。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集和大量实际场景的测试中，MultiGO++ 方法在重建性能上优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: MultiGO++ 框架通过创新的多源纹理合成、几何提取和协同重建机制，有效解决了单目 3D 衣服人体重建中的挑战，实现了卓越的几何和纹理重建质量。

title: NeuronMoE: Neuron-Guided Mixture-of-Experts for Efficient Multilingual LLM Extension
summary: Extending large language models to low-resource languages is essential for global accessibility, but training separate models per language is prohibitively expensive. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures address this by adding sparse language-specific parameters, but determining how many experts each layer needs remains an open question. Current approaches allocate experts based on layer-level similarity, yet language processing exhibits fine-grained specialization at individual neurons. We propose $\textbf{NeuronMoE}$, a method that analyzes language-specific neurons across all transformer components to guide expert allocation per layer based on empirically measured cross-lingual neuron diversity. Applied to Llama-3.2-3B for low-resource languages (Greek, Turkish, and Hungarian), this approach achieves approximately 40% average parameter reduction while matching the performance of the LayerMoE baseline. We find that low-resource language experts independently develop neuron specialization patterns mirroring the high-resource language, which are concentrated in early and late layers. This reveals potential universal architectural principles in how multilingual models organize linguistic knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 NeuronMoE 的新方法，通过分析特定语言的神经元来优化多语言大语言模型（LLM）中专家（expert）的分配，相比现有的基于层相似性的方法，能在保持性能的同时显著减少模型参数，并揭示了多语言模型中语言知识组织的一些普遍原则。
AI.motivation: 现有的多语言模型训练成本高昂，特别是在低资源语言方面。虽然 MoE 架构通过引入稀疏的语言特定参数有所缓解，但如何为每层分配专家数量仍是未解决的问题。现有方法基于层相似性，但忽略了神经元层面的精细化专业化。
AI.method: 提出 NeuronMoE 方法，分析 Transformer 所有组件中的语言特定神经元，基于经验测量的跨语言神经元多样性来指导每层的专家分配。在 Llama-3.2-3B 模型上，针对希腊语、土耳其语和匈牙利语进行实验。
AI.result: NeuronMoE 方法实现了约 40% 的平均参数缩减，同时性能与 LayerMoE 基线相当。研究发现，低资源语言的专家独立发展出的神经元专业化模式与高资源语言相似，并且这些模式集中在模型的早期和晚期层。
AI.conclusion: NeuronMoE 是一种更有效的专家分配方法，能够显著降低多语言 LLM 的参数量。研究结果表明，多语言模型在组织语言知识方面可能存在普遍的架构原则，低资源语言的专业化模式可以借鉴高资源语言的经验。

title: Act, Think or Abstain: Complexity-Aware Adaptive Inference for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Current research on Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predominantly focuses on enhancing generalization through established reasoning techniques. While effective, these improvements invariably increase computational complexity and inference latency. Furthermore, these mechanisms are typically applied indiscriminately, resulting in the inefficient allocation of resources for trivial tasks while simultaneously failing to provide the uncertainty estimation necessary to prevent catastrophic failure on out-of-distribution tasks. Inspired by human cognition, we propose an adaptive framework that dynamically routes VLA execution based on the complexity of the perceived state. Our approach transforms the VLA's vision-language backbone into an active detection tool by projecting latent embeddings into an ensemble of parametric and non-parametric estimators. This allows the system to execute known tasks immediately (Act), reason about ambiguous scenarios (Think), and preemptively halt execution when encountering significant physical or semantic anomalies (Abstain). In our empirical analysis, we observe a phenomenon where visual embeddings alone are superior for inferring task complexity due to the semantic invariance of language. Evaluated on the LIBERO and LIBERO-PRO benchmarks as well as on a real robot, our vision-only configuration achieves 80% F1-Score using as little as 5% of training data, establishing itself as a reliable and efficient task complexity detector.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型框架，该框架能根据感知状态的复杂性动态调整执行策略，通过将潜在嵌入投射到多种估计器来实现，从而提高效率并减少计算开销，尤其是在处理简单任务和异常情况时。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在泛化能力上依赖于增加计算复杂度和推理延迟的成熟推理技术，且资源分配效率低下，无法对不确定性进行估计以避免在分布外任务上发生灾难性故障。
AI.method: 设计了一个自适应框架，将VLA的视觉-语言主干转化为主动检测工具，通过将潜在嵌入投射到参数和非参数估计器集成中。这使得系统能够立即执行已知任务（Act）、推理模糊场景（Think）、并在遇到异常时暂停（Abstain）。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-PRO基准以及真实机器人上进行评估，仅使用视觉嵌入的配置在仅5%的训练数据下实现了80%的F1分数，证明了其作为可靠高效的任务复杂性检测器的能力。研究发现视觉嵌入比语言嵌入更能有效推断任务复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应VLA框架能够通过动态路由实现高效的VLA执行，特别是在复杂性检测方面，仅视觉信息就足以实现高效且可靠的性能，并且在资源受限的情况下表现出色。

title: Reclaiming Lost Text Layers for Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
summary: Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (SF-CDFSL) focuses on fine-tuning with limited training data from target domains (e.g., medical or satellite images), where CLIP has recently shown promising results due to its generalizability to downstream tasks. Current works indicate CLIP's text encoder is more suitable for cross-domain tasks, however, we find that \textbf{removing certain middle layers of the text encoder can effectively improve performance in SF-CDFSL}, which we call the Lost Layers. In this paper, we delve into this phenomenon for a deeper understanding. We discover that instead of being harmful for the SF-CDFSL task, the information in these layers is actually beneficial, but visual gaps prevent this useful information from being fully utilized, making these layers seem redundant. Based on this understanding, unlike current works that simply remove these layers, we propose a method to teachs the model to \textbf{re-utilize} information in these lost layers at both the layer and encoder levels, guiding the re-learning of the visual branch under domain shifts. Our approach effectively addresses the issue of underutilized information in the text encoder. Extensive experiments across various settings, backbones (CLIP, SigLip, PE-Core), and tasks (4 CDFSL datasets and 10 Meta-dataset datasets) demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/zhenyuZ-HUST/CVPR26-VtT.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现，移除CLIP文本编码器的一些中间层（“丢失的层”）可以提高源无关跨领域少样本学习（SF-CDFSL）的性能，但这些层的信息实际上是有益的，只是由于视觉差距未能被充分利用。研究提出了一种方法，在层和编码器层面重新利用这些丢失层的信息，以指导视觉分支在域偏移下的再学习。
AI.motivation: 现有研究认为CLIP的文本编码器更适合跨领域任务，但本研究发现移除其部分中间层可以提高SF-CDFSL性能。这促使研究人员深入理解这一现象，并探索如何重新利用这些看似冗余但实际上可能包含有益信息的层。
AI.method: 研究人员通过实验发现，CLIP文本编码器中的某些中间层（“丢失的层”）在SF-CDFSL任务中包含有益信息，但由于视觉差距未能被充分利用。基于此理解，提出了一种在层和编码器层面重新利用这些丢失层信息的方法，以指导视觉分支在域偏移下的再学习。
AI.result: 提出的方法在多个设置、骨干网络（CLIP, SigLip, PE-Core）和任务（4个CDFSL数据集和10个Meta-dataset数据集）上的大量实验表明，该方法能有效解决文本编码器中信息利用不足的问题，并显著提升了SF-CDFSL的性能。
AI.conclusion: 移除CLIP文本编码器的一些中间层能提高SF-CDFSL性能，但这些层的信息本身并非有害，而是由于视觉信息未能充分利用而显得冗余。通过在层和编码器层面重新利用这些“丢失的层”的信息，可以有效弥补这一不足，并提升模型在跨领域少样本学习任务中的表现。

title: Physics-consistent deep learning for blind aberration recovery in mobile optics
summary: Mobile photography is often limited by complex, lens-specific optical aberrations. While recent deep learning methods approach this as an end-to-end deblurring task, these "black-box" models lack explicit optical modeling and can hallucinate details. Conversely, classical blind deconvolution remains highly unstable. To bridge this gap, we present Lens2Zernike, a deep learning framework that blindly recovers physical optical parameters from a single blurred image. To the best of our knowledge, no prior work has simultaneously integrated supervision across three distinct optical domains. We introduce a novel physics-consistent strategy that explicitly minimizes errors via direct Zernike coefficient regression (z), differentiable physics constraints encompassing both wavefront and point spread function derivations (p), and auxiliary multi-task spatial map predictions (m). Through an ablation study on a ResNet-18 backbone, we demonstrate that our full multi-task framework (z+p+m) yields a 35% improvement over coefficient-only baselines. Crucially, comparative analysis reveals that our approach outperforms two established deep learning methods from previous literature, achieving significantly lower regression errors. Ultimately, we demonstrate that these recovered physical parameters enable stable non-blind deconvolution, providing substantial in-domain improvement on the patented Institute for Digital Molecular Analytics and Science (IDMxS) Mobile Camera Lens Database for restoring diffraction-limited details from severely aberrated mobile captures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Lens2Zernike的深度学习框架，用于从单个模糊图像中盲法恢复物理光学参数（Zernike系数），并通过结合显式Zernike回归、可微分物理约束和辅助空间图预测来实现。该框架在恢复光学参数方面优于现有方法，并能实现更稳定的非盲去模糊，提高手机摄影质量。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法将手机摄影的像差校正视为端到端的去模糊任务，缺乏物理光学模型，容易产生伪影。传统的盲去模糊方法不稳定。因此，需要一种能够显式恢复物理光学参数并实现稳定去模糊的方法。
AI.method: 提出Lens2Zernike深度学习框架，包含三个关键组成部分：1. 直接Zernike系数回归（z）；2. 可微分物理约束，包含波前和点扩散函数推导（p）；3. 辅助多任务空间图预测（m）。通过组合这些部分（z+p+m）进行端到端训练。
AI.result: Lens2Zernike的完整多任务框架（z+p+m）比仅回归系数的基线方法提高了35%。与现有深度学习方法相比，Lens2Zernike在回归误差方面表现更优。恢复的光学参数能够实现稳定的非盲去模糊，并在IDMxS手机相机镜头数据库上显著提升了恢复衍射极限细节的能力。
AI.conclusion: Lens2Zernike框架能够从单张模糊图像中盲法恢复物理光学参数，并通过结合多域监督实现了优于现有方法的性能。恢复的物理参数为实现稳定和高质量的非盲去模糊提供了基础，有望改善移动摄影的成像质量。

title: MUTEX: Leveraging Multilingual Transformers and Conditional Random Fields for Enhanced Urdu Toxic Span Detection
