summary: Urdu toxic span detection remains limited because most existing systems rely on sentence-level classification and fail to identify the specific toxic spans within those text. It is further exacerbated by the multiple factors i.e. lack of token-level annotated resources, linguistic complexity of Urdu, frequent code-switching, informal expressions, and rich morphological variations. In this research, we propose MUTEX: a multilingual transformer combined with conditional random fields (CRF) for Urdu toxic span detection framework that uses manually annotated token-level toxic span dataset to improve performance and interpretability. MUTEX uses XLM RoBERTa with CRF layer to perform sequence labeling and is tested on multi-domain data extracted from social media, online news, and YouTube reviews using token-level F1 to evaluate fine-grained span detection. The results indicate that MUTEX achieves 60% token-level F1 score that is the first supervised baseline for Urdu toxic span detection. Further examination reveals that transformer-based models are more effective at implicitly capturing the contextual toxicity and are able to address the issues of code-switching and morphological variation than other models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 MUTEX 的新框架，结合了多语言 Transformer 和条件随机场 (CRF)，用于检测乌尔都语文本中的有毒词语跨度，并取得了 60% 的 F1 分数，为该领域建立了首个监督基线。
AI.motivation: 现有乌尔都语有毒文本检测系统主要依赖句子级分类，无法准确定位有毒词语跨度。此外，缺乏令牌级标注资源、乌尔都语的语言复杂性、频繁的语码转换、非正式表达和丰富的形态变化等因素进一步加剧了这一挑战。
AI.method: 研究提出 MUTEX 框架，该框架结合了 XLM RoBERTa 多语言 Transformer 和条件随机场 (CRF) 层，用于进行序列标注。该模型在 manualmente annotiert 的令牌级有毒词语跨度数据集上进行训练和测试，以提高性能和可解释性。
AI.result: MUTEX 在来自社交媒体、在线新闻和 YouTube 评论的多领域数据上进行了测试，并达到了 60% 的令牌级 F1 分数。该分数是乌尔都语有毒词语跨度检测的首个监督基线。
AI.conclusion: 基于 Transformer 的 MUTEX 模型在隐式捕捉语境毒性方面表现出更高的有效性，并且比其他模型更能有效地解决语码转换和形态变化问题。这项研究为乌尔都语有毒词语跨度检测领域提供了一个重要的进展和基线。

title: How far have we gone in Generative Image Restoration? A study on its capability, limitations and evaluation practices
summary: Generative Image Restoration (GIR) has achieved impressive perceptual realism, but how far have its practical capabilities truly advanced compared with previous methods? To answer this, we present a large-scale study grounded in a new multi-dimensional evaluation pipeline that assesses models on detail, sharpness, semantic correctness, and overall quality. Our analysis covers diverse architectures, including diffusion-based, GAN-based, PSNR-oriented, and general-purpose generation models, revealing critical performance disparities. Furthermore, our analysis uncovers a key evolution in failure modes that signifies a paradigm shift for the perception-oriented low-level vision field. The central challenge is evolving from the previous problem of detail scarcity (under-generation) to the new frontier of detail quality and semantic control (preventing over-generation). We also leverage our benchmark to train a new IQA model that better aligns with human perceptual judgments. Ultimately, this work provides a systematic study of modern generative image restoration models, offering crucial insights that redefine our understanding of their true state and chart a course for future development.

AI.tldr: 本研究对当前生成式图像修复（GIR）方法进行了大规模、多维度的评估，发现了与早期方法相比的性能差异，并指出研究重点已从细节缺失转向细节质量和语义控制。
AI.motivation: 评估当前生成式图像修复（GIR）方法的实际能力，并与以往方法进行比较，以了解其进步程度。
AI.method: 提出一个多维度评估流程，从细节、清晰度、语义正确性和整体质量四个方面评估模型。研究涵盖了扩散模型、GAN、PSNR导向模型和通用生成模型等多种架构。
AI.result: 研究揭示了不同模型之间存在关键性能差异。失败模式发生了演变，从“细节稀缺”（欠生成）转向“细节质量和语义控制”（防止过生成）。基于评估结果训练了一个新的图像质量评估（IQA）模型，该模型与人类感知判断更吻合。
AI.conclusion: 现代生成式图像修复模型的研究重点已发生转变，研究人员需要关注细节质量和语义控制。本研究提供的系统性评估和新的IQA模型为理解GIR的真实状态和指导未来发展提供了重要见解。

title: GCAgent: Enhancing Group Chat Communication through Dialogue Agents System
summary: As a key form in online social platforms, group chat is a popular space for interest exchange or problem-solving, but its effectiveness is often hindered by inactivity and management challenges. While recent large language models (LLMs) have powered impressive one-to-one conversational agents, their seamlessly integration into multi-participant conversations remains unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce GCAgent, an LLM-driven system for enhancing group chats communication with both entertainment- and utility-oriented dialogue agents. The system comprises three tightly integrated modules: Agent Builder, which customizes agents to align with users' interests; Dialogue Manager, which coordinates dialogue states and manage agent invocations; and Interface Plugins, which reduce interaction barriers by three distinct tools. Through extensive experiment, GCAgent achieved an average score of 4.68 across various criteria and was preferred in 51.04\% of cases compared to its base model. Additionally, in real-world deployments over 350 days, it increased message volume by 28.80\%, significantly improving group activity and engagement. Overall, this work presents a practical blueprint for extending LLM-based dialogue agent from one-party chats to multi-party group scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GCAgent的基于LLM的系统，旨在增强群聊的沟通效率和用户参与度。GCAgent包含代理构建、对话管理和接口插件三个模块，通过定制化代理和优化的对话流程，成功地将LLM应用于多方群聊场景，并在实验和实际部署中均显示出积极效果。
AI.motivation: 当前在线社交平台中的群聊功能常因活跃度低和管理困难而影响其效用。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在单对单对话中表现出色，但其在多参与者对话中的集成方式尚未得到探索。
AI.method: 研究提出GCAgent系统，包含三个模块：1. Agent Builder，用于定制符合用户兴趣的代理；2. Dialogue Manager，用于协调对话状态和管理代理调用；3. Interface Plugins，通过三种工具降低交互障碍。通过实验评估了GCAgent的性能。
AI.result: GCAgent在实验中平均得分达到4.68，并在51.04%的情况下优于基线模型。在超过350天的实际部署中，GCAgent将消息量提高了28.80%，显著提升了群组的活跃度和参与度。
AI.conclusion: 本文为将基于LLM的对话代理从单方聊天扩展到多方群聊场景提供了一个实用的蓝图，证明了GCAgent在提升群聊沟通和用户参与度方面的有效性。

title: ARC-TGI: Human-Validated Task Generators with Reasoning Chain Templates for ARC-AGI
summary: The Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC-AGI) probes few-shot abstraction and rule induction on small visual grids, but progress is difficult to measure on static collections of hand-authored puzzles due to overfitting, dataset leakage, and memorisation. We introduce ARC-TGI (ARC Task Generators Inventory), an open-source framework for task-family generators: compact Python programs that sample diverse ARC-AGI tasks while preserving a latent rule. ARC-TGI is built around a solver-facing representation: each generated task is paired with natural-language input and transformation reasoning chains and partially evaluated Python code implementing sampling, transformation, and episode construction. Crucially, ARC-TGI supports task-level constraints so that training examples collectively expose the variations needed to infer the underlying rule, a requirement for human-solvable ARC tasks that independent per-example sampling often fails to guarantee. All generators undergo human refinement and local verification to keep both grids and reasoning traces natural and consistent under variation. We release 461 generators covering 180 ARC-Mini tasks, 215 ARC-AGI-1 tasks (200 train, 15 test), and 66 ARC-AGI-2 tasks (55 train, 11 test), enabling scalable dataset sampling and controlled benchmarking.

AI.tldr: ARC-TGI 是一个开源框架，包含用于生成 ARC-AGI 任务族的任务生成器，旨在克服现有 ARC-AGI 数据集在评估少量样本学习方面的挑战，通过生成具有清晰潜在规则、自然语言解释和部分代码实现的多元化任务，并支持任务级约束来确保训练示例充分暴露推断规则所需的变异性。
AI.motivation: 现有的 ARC-AGI 数据集难以准确衡量少量样本学习的进展，容易出现过拟合、数据泄露和记忆化等问题。
AI.method: 开发了 ARC-TGI 框架，该框架包含一系列任务生成器，这些生成器是紧凑的 Python 程序，能够生成多样化的 ARC-AGI 任务，并保留潜在规则。每个生成的任务都配有自然语言输入、推理链以及实现采样、转换和回合构建的部分评估 Python 代码。ARC-TGI 还支持任务级约束，以确保训练示例能够充分暴露推断规则所需的变异性。
AI.result: ARC-TGI 框架包含了 461 个任务生成器，涵盖了 180 个 ARC-Mini 任务、215 个 ARC-AGI-1 任务（200 个训练，15 个测试）以及 66 个 ARC-AGI-2 任务（55 个训练，11 个测试）。
AI.conclusion: ARC-TGI 框架为 ARC 任务的生成提供了一种可扩展且受控的方法，能够生成具有明确潜在规则、自然语言解释和部分代码实现的多元化任务，从而克服了静态数据集的局限性，为少量样本学习的基准测试提供了更可靠的评估手段。

title: Digital Twin Driven Textile Classification and Foreign Object Recognition in Automated Sorting Systems
comment: 10 pages,single column, 5 figures, preprint for Photomet Edumet 2026 (Klagenfurt, Austria)
summary: The increasing demand for sustainable textile recycling requires robust automation solutions capable of handling deformable garments and detecting foreign objects in cluttered environments. This work presents a digital twin driven robotic sorting system that integrates grasp prediction, multi modal perception, and semantic reasoning for real world textile classification. A dual arm robotic cell equipped with RGBD sensing, capacitive tactile feedback, and collision-aware motion planning autonomously separates garments from an unsorted basket, transfers them to an inspection zone, and classifies them using state of the art Visual Language Models (VLMs). We benchmark nine VLM s from five model families on a dataset of 223 inspection scenarios comprising shirts, socks, trousers, underwear, foreign objects (including garments outside of the aforementioned classes), and empty scenes. The evaluation assesses per class accuracy, hallucination behavior, and computational performance under practical hardware constraints. Results show that the Qwen model family achieves the highest overall accuracy (up to 87.9 %), with strong foreign object detection performance, while lighter models such as Gemma3 offer competitive speed accuracy trade offs for edge deployment. A digital twin combined with MoveIt enables collision aware path planning and integrates segmented 3D point clouds of inspected garments into the virtual environment for improved manipulation reliability. The presented system demonstrates the feasibility of combining semantic VLM reasoning with conventional grasp detection and digital twin technology for scalable, autonomous textile sorting in realistic industrial settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种由数字孪生驱动的机器人分拣系统，该系统利用抓取预测、多模态感知和语义推理来实现真实的纺织品分类。该系统使用双臂机器人、RGBD 传感器、电容式触觉反馈和视觉语言模型 (VLMs) 来自主地从杂乱的篮子中分拣、检查和分类服装。评估了九种 VLM，结果表明 Qwen 模型家族在准确性和外来物体检测方面表现最佳，而 Gemma3 在速度和准确性之间提供了良好的权衡。
AI.motivation: 日益增长的可持续纺织品回收需求，以及在杂乱环境中处理可变形服装和检测异物的自动化解决方案的不足。
AI.method: 构建了一个由数字孪生驱动的双臂机器人分拣系统，集成了抓取预测、多模态感知（RGBD、电容触觉）和语义推理。使用状态最先进的视觉语言模型 (VLMs) 进行纺织品分类。在包含各种服装、异物和空场景的数据集上对九种 VLM 进行了基准测试。数字孪生与 MoveIt 结合用于路径规划。
AI.result: Qwen 模型家族在准确性（高达 87.9%）和外来物体检测方面表现最佳。Gemma3 模型在速度-准确性权衡方面具有竞争力，适合边缘部署。数字孪生和 MoveIt 提高了机械臂操作的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统证明了将语义 VLM 推理、传统抓取检测和数字孪生技术相结合，可以实现可扩展、自动化的纺织品分拣，适用于真实的工业环境。

title: Planning in 8 Tokens: A Compact Discrete Tokenizer for Latent World Model
summary: World models provide a powerful framework for simulating environment dynamics conditioned on actions or instructions, enabling downstream tasks such as action planning or policy learning. Recent approaches leverage world models as learned simulators, but its application to decision-time planning remains computationally prohibitive for real-time control. A key bottleneck lies in latent representations: conventional tokenizers encode each observation into hundreds of tokens, making planning both slow and resource-intensive. To address this, we propose CompACT, a discrete tokenizer that compresses each observation into as few as 8 tokens, drastically reducing computational cost while preserving essential information for planning. An action-conditioned world model that occupies CompACT tokenizer achieves competitive planning performance with orders-of-magnitude faster planning, offering a practical step toward real-world deployment of world models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CompACT的离散令牌化方法，能将观测压缩成少量令牌（低至8个），大幅降低了世界模型进行决策规划的计算成本，同时保持了规划所需的核心信息，为在现实世界中应用世界模型迈出了重要一步。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于世界模型的决策规划方法在实时控制方面计算成本过高，主要瓶颈在于传统的令牌化方法将每个观测编码成大量令牌，导致规划缓慢且资源消耗大。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为CompACT的离散令牌化方法，该方法能够将每个观测压缩成尽可能少的令牌（低至8个），并在此基础上训练一个动作条件的世界模型。
AI.result: 与传统方法相比，使用CompACT令牌化器的动作条件世界模型在规划性能上具有竞争力，但规划速度却快了几个数量级。
AI.conclusion: CompACT令牌化器能够有效压缩观测信息，显著降低了世界模型进行决策规划的计算复杂性，使得实时控制成为可能，为世界模型在现实世界的部署提供了实际解决方案。

title: X-RAY: Mapping LLM Reasoning Capability via Formalized and Calibrated Probes
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve promising performance, yet their ability to reason remains poorly understood. Existing evaluations largely emphasize task-level accuracy, often conflating pattern matching with reasoning capability. We present X-RAY, an explainable reasoning analysis system that maps the LLM reasoning capability using calibrated, formally verified probes. We model reasoning capability as a function of extractable \textit{structure}, operationalized through formal properties such as constraint interaction, reasoning depth, and solution-space geometry. X-Ray generates probes via formal tools with controlled structural variations, enabling precise isolation of incremental structural information through formal calibration and verification. We evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs on problems ranging from junior-level to advanced in mathematics, physics, and chemistry. Our analysis reveals a systematic asymmetry in LLM reasoning: models are relatively robust to constraint refinement, where additional conditions shrink an existing solution space, but degrade sharply under solution-space restructuring, where modifications alter the underlying structural form of the solution manifold. Moreover, calibrated formal probes differentiate models that appear indistinguishable on standard benchmarks and reveal failure modes that are structurally interpretable rather than opaque. Beyond evaluation, our framework is contamination-free and supports the training and testing of reasoning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 X-RAY 的可解释推理分析系统，通过形式化验证的探针来评估大型语言模型 (LLM) 的推理能力，发现 LLM 在约束细化方面表现稳定，但在解空间重构方面表现急剧下降。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 评估方法主要关注任务级准确率，难以区分模式匹配和真正的推理能力。研究者希望深入理解 LLM 的推理机制。
AI.method: 提出 X-RAY 系统，将 LLM 的推理能力建模为可提取的“结构”函数，并通过形式化属性（如约束交互、推理深度、解空间几何）进行操作。X-RAY 利用形式化工具生成具有可控结构变化的探针，并通过形式化校准和验证来精确分离增量结构信息。对不同难度级别的数学、物理和化学问题上的 SOTA LLM 进行了评估。
AI.result: LLM 的推理能力存在系统性不对称：在约束细化（增加条件缩小解空间）方面表现稳健，但在解空间重构（修改解空间基本结构）方面表现急剧下降。形式化探针能够区分在标准基准上难以区分的模型，并揭示了可解释的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: X-RAY 提供了一个形式化、可验证的框架来分析 LLM 的推理能力，揭示了 LLM 推理中的结构性弱点，并可用于训练和测试推理模型。

title: Generalizable Multiscale Segmentation of Heterogeneous Map Collections
summary: Historical map collections are highly diverse in style, scale, and geographic focus, often consisting of many single-sheet documents. Yet most work in map recognition focuses on specialist models tailored to homogeneous map series. In contrast, this article aims to develop generalizable semantic segmentation models and ontology. First, we introduce Semap, a new open benchmark dataset comprising 1,439 manually annotated patches designed to reflect the variety of historical map documents. Second, we present a segmentation framework that combines procedural data synthesis with multiscale integration to improve robustness and transferability. This framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the HCMSSD and Semap datasets, showing that a diversity-driven approach to map recognition is not only viable but also beneficial. The results indicate that segmentation performance remains largely stable across map collections, scales, geographic regions, and publication contexts. By proposing benchmark datasets and methods for the generic segmentation of historical maps, this work opens the way to integrating the long tail of cartographic archives to historical geographic studies.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种通用的历史地图语义分割模型和本体，通过构建多样化的数据集（Semap）和结合程序化数据合成与多尺度集成的方法，显著提升了模型的鲁棒性和迁移能力，并在现有和新数据集上取得了先进性能，为整合历史地图档案以支持地理学研究奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 现有的地图识别研究大多集中在特定、同质化的地图系列，而历史地图集因其风格、比例尺和地理范围的多样性，难以直接应用现有方法。因此，作者旨在开发一个能够处理这种多样性的通用语义分割模型和本体。
AI.method: 1. 构建了Semap数据集，包含1,439个人工标注的地图图像块，以反映历史地图的多样性。 2. 提出了一种结合程序化数据合成（以增加数据多样性）和多尺度集成（以提升鲁棒性和迁移能力）的分割框架。
AI.result: 所提出的框架在HCMSSD和Semap数据集上均取得了最先进的性能。分割性能在不同地图集、比例尺、地理区域和出版背景下均保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建多样化的基准数据集和开发通用的分割方法，该研究证明了驱动多样性的方法在地图识别中的可行性和益处，并为将数量庞大的历史地图档案整合到地理学研究中开辟了道路。

title: Tell2Adapt: A Unified Framework for Source Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation via Vision Foundation Model
comment: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2026)
summary: Source Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SFUDA) is critical for deploying deep learning models across diverse clinical settings. However, existing methods are typically designed for low-gap, specific domain shifts and cannot generalize into a unified, multi-modalities, and multi-target framework, which presents a major barrier to real-world application. To overcome this issue, we introduce Tell2Adapt, a novel SFUDA framework that harnesses the vast, generalizable knowledge of the Vision Foundation Model (VFM). Our approach ensures high-fidelity VFM prompts through Context-Aware Prompts Regularization (CAPR), which robustly translates varied text prompts into canonical instructions. This enables the generation of high-quality pseudo-labels for efficiently adapting the lightweight student model to target domain. To guarantee clinical reliability, the framework incorporates Visual Plausibility Refinement (VPR), which leverages the VFM's anatomical knowledge to re-ground the adapted model's predictions in target image's low-level visual features, effectively removing noise and false positives. We conduct one of the most extensive SFUDA evaluations to date, validating our framework across 10 domain adaptation directions and 22 anatomical targets, including brain, cardiac, polyp, and abdominal targets. Our results demonstrate that Tell2Adapt consistently outperforms existing approaches, achieving SOTA for a unified SFUDA framework in medical image segmentation. Code are avaliable at https://github.com/derekshiii/Tell2Adapt.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Tell2Adapt的源无关无监督域适应（SFUDA）框架，利用视觉基础模型（VFM）和一种新颖的提示生成与校正方法，实现了在多模态、多目标医疗图像分割中的先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SFUDA方法在处理跨越不同数据模态、目标解剖结构以及较大领域差异时泛化能力不足，阻碍了其在实际临床应用中的部署。因此，需要一个统一的、能够处理多模态和多目标SFUDA的框架。
AI.method: Tell2Adapt框架的核心是利用视觉基础模型（VFM）。它包含两个关键组件：1. 上下文感知提示正则化（CAPR），用于生成高质量的VFM提示，将文本指令转化为标准化的指令，从而生成伪标签以适应学生模型。2. 视觉可信度精炼（VPR），利用VFM的解剖学知识，将学生模型的预测与目标图像的低层视觉特征重新关联，以去除噪声和假阳性。
AI.result: 在10个域适应方向和22个解剖目标（包括大脑、心脏、息肉和腹部）的广泛评估中，Tell2Adapt在医疗图像分割的统一SFUDA框架方面取得了最先进的性能，始终优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Tell2Adapt是一个新颖的SFUDA框架，通过结合VFM的通用知识和专门设计的提示生成与校正机制，能够有效地解决医疗图像分割中的域适应问题，并达到了领先的性能。

title: STRUCTUREDAGENT: Planning with AND/OR Trees for Long-Horizon Web Tasks
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agentic systems for sequential decision-making. Such agents must perceive their environment, reason across multiple time steps, and take actions that optimize long-term objectives. However, existing web agents struggle on complex, long-horizon tasks due to limited in-context memory for tracking history, weak planning abilities, and greedy behaviors that lead to premature termination. To address these challenges, we propose STRUCTUREDAGENT, a hierarchical planning framework with two core components: (1) an online hierarchical planner that uses dynamic AND/OR trees for efficient search and (2) a structured memory module that tracks and maintains candidate solutions to improve constraint satisfaction in information-seeking tasks. The framework also produces interpretable hierarchical plans, enabling easier debugging and facilitating human intervention when needed. Our results on WebVoyager, WebArena, and custom shopping benchmarks show that STRUCTUREDAGENT improves performance on long-horizon web-browsing tasks compared to standard LLM-based agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为STRUCTUREDAGENT的层次化规划框架，通过在线层次化规划器和结构化记忆模块，解决了现有网络代理在复杂长期任务中的局限性，并在多个基准测试中证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有网络代理在处理复杂、长时程任务时存在上下文记忆不足、规划能力弱和贪婪行为等问题，导致性能不佳。
AI.method: 提出STRUCTUREDAGENT框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 在线层次化规划器，使用动态AND/OR树进行高效搜索；2) 结构化记忆模块，用于跟踪和维护候选解决方案，以提高信息搜集任务中的约束满足能力。
AI.result: 在WebVoyager、WebArena和自定义购物基准测试中，STRUCTUREDAGENT在长时程网页浏览任务上的表现优于标准的基于LLM的网络代理。
AI.conclusion: STRUCTUREDAGENT框架通过引入层次化规划和结构化记忆，有效提升了网络代理在复杂长期任务上的性能，并且生成的层次化计划具有可解释性，便于调试和人工干预。

title: LBM: Hierarchical Large Auto-Bidding Model via Reasoning and Acting
summary: The growing scale of ad auctions on online advertising platforms has intensified competition, making manual bidding impractical and necessitating auto-bidding to help advertisers achieve their economic goals. Current auto-bidding methods have evolved to use offline reinforcement learning or generative methods to optimize bidding strategies, but they can sometimes behave counterintuitively due to the black-box training manner and limited mode coverage of datasets, leading to challenges in understanding task status and generalization in dynamic ad environments. Large language models (LLMs) offer a promising solution by leveraging prior human knowledge and reasoning abilities to improve auto-bidding performance. However, directly applying LLMs to auto-bidding faces difficulties due to the need for precise actions in competitive auctions and the lack of specialized auto-bidding knowledge, which can lead to hallucinations and suboptimal decisions. To address these challenges, we propose a hierarchical Large autoBidding Model (LBM) to leverage the reasoning capabilities of LLMs for developing a superior auto-bidding strategy. This includes a high-level LBM-Think model for reasoning and a low-level LBM-Act model for action generation. Specifically, we propose a dual embedding mechanism to efficiently fuse two modalities, including language and numerical inputs, for language-guided training of the LBM-Act; then, we propose an offline reinforcement fine-tuning technique termed GQPO for mitigating the LLM-Think's hallucinations and enhancing decision-making performance without simulation or real-world rollout like previous multi-turn LLM-based methods. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of a generative backbone based on our LBM, especially in an efficient training manner and generalization ability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LBM（Large autoBidding Model）的分层模型，结合了LLM的推理能力和数值输入的处理，以解决在线广告竞价中自动竞价策略的挑战，通过GQPO技术提升了模型性能和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动竞价方法由于黑盒训练和数据模式覆盖有限，表现可能与直觉不符，难以理解任务状态和在动态环境中泛化。直接应用LLM也面临需要精确操作和缺乏专业知识的问题。
AI.method: 提出分层LBM模型，包括高层的LBM-Think（用于推理）和低层的LBM-Act（用于生成动作）。采用双重嵌入机制融合语言和数值输入，并提出一种名为GQPO的离线强化微调技术，以减少LLM-Think的幻觉并提升决策性能。
AI.result: 基于LBM的生成式骨干模型在训练效率和泛化能力方面表现出优越性。
AI.conclusion: LBM模型成功地利用了LLM的推理能力，并通过独特的机制和训练方法，克服了现有自动竞价方法的局限性，提供了更优越的竞价策略。

title: Exploiting Intermediate Reconstructions in Optical Coherence Tomography for Test-Time Adaption of Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Primary health care frequently relies on low-cost imaging devices, which are commonly used for screening purposes. To ensure accurate diagnosis, these systems depend on advanced reconstruction algorithms designed to approximate the performance of high-quality counterparts. Such algorithms typically employ iterative reconstruction methods that incorporate domain-specific prior knowledge. However, downstream task performance is generally assessed using only the final reconstructed image, thereby disregarding the informative intermediate representations generated throughout the reconstruction process. In this work, we propose IRTTA to exploit these intermediate representations at test-time by adapting the normalization-layer parameters of a frozen downstream network via a modulator network that conditions on the current reconstruction timescale. The modulator network is learned during test-time using an averaged entropy loss across all individual timesteps. Variation among the timestep-wise segmentations additionally provides uncertainty estimates at no extra cost. This approach enhances segmentation performance and enables semantically meaningful uncertainty estimation, all without modifying either the reconstruction process or the downstream model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为IRTTA的方法，通过利用低成本成像设备重建过程中的中间表示来提高下游分割任务的性能，并在此过程中生成不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 现有的低成本成像设备依赖于迭代重建算法，但通常只使用最终重建图像评估下游任务性能，忽略了重建过程中的中间信息。这导致诊断准确性可能受影响，且无法获得不确定性估计。
AI.method: IRTTA通过一个调制器网络在测试时调整冻结的下游网络（例如分割网络）的归一化层参数。该调制器网络以当前重建时间尺度为条件，并通过平均交叉所有时间步的熵损失进行学习。同时，时间步长分割的变化被用来提供不确定性估计。
AI.result: IRTTA能够提高下游分割任务的性能，并能以零额外成本提供有意义的不确定性估计，而无需修改重建过程或下游模型。
AI.conclusion: IRTTA是一种有效的方法，可以利用迭代重建过程中的中间表示来提升下游任务性能并进行不确定性估计，这对于低成本成像设备在初级保健中的应用具有重要意义。

title: WebChain: A Large-Scale Human-Annotated Dataset of Real-World Web Interaction Traces
summary: We introduce WebChain, the largest open-source dataset of human-annotated trajectories on real-world websites, designed to accelerate reproducible research in web agents. It contains 31,725 trajectories and 318k steps, featuring a core Triple Alignment of visual, structural, and action data to provide rich, multi-modal supervision. The data is collected via a scalable pipeline that ensures coverage of complex, high-value tasks often missed by synthetic methods. Leveraging this dataset, we propose a Dual Mid-Training recipe that decouples spatial grounding from planning, achieving state-of-the-art performance on our proposed WebChainBench and other public GUI benchmarks. Our work provides the data and insights necessary to build and rigorously evaluate the next generation of scalable web agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了WebChain，一个包含31,725个人类标注轨迹的大型开源数据集，用于训练和评估网络代理。该数据集具有视觉、结构和动作数据的三重对齐，并提出了一个解耦空间定位与规划的双中期训练方法，在WebChainBench等基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有合成方法无法覆盖复杂、高价值的网络任务，且缺乏一个能够加速可复现研究的大型、开放数据集来推动网络代理的研究。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含31,725条轨迹、318k步的大型数据集WebChain，其中包含视觉、结构和动作数据的三重对齐。在此基础上，提出了一种名为“Dual Mid-Training”的方法，将空间定位与规划解耦。
AI.result: 在提出的WebChainBench以及其他公共GUI基准测试中，该方法取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: WebChain数据集和Dual Mid-Training方法为构建和严格评估下一代可扩展网络代理提供了必要的数据和见解。

title: Representation Fidelity:Auditing Algorithmic Decisions About Humans Using Self-Descriptions
summary: This paper introduces a new dimension for validating algorithmic decisions about humans by measuring the fidelity of their representations. Representation Fidelity measures if decisions about a person rest on reasonable grounds. We propose to operationalize this notion by measuring the distance between two representations of the same person: (1) an externally prescribed input representation on which the decision is based, and (2) a self-description provided by the human subject of the decision, used solely to validate the input representation. We examine the nature of discrepancies between these representations, how such discrepancies can be quantified, and derive a generic typology of representation mismatches that determine the degree of representation fidelity. We further present the first benchmark for evaluating representation fidelity based on a dataset of loan-granting decisions. Our Loan-Granting Self-Representations Corpus 2025 consists of a large corpus of 30 000 synthetic natural language self-descriptions derived from corresponding representations of applicants in the German Credit Dataset, along with expert annotations of representation mismatches between each pair of representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种衡量算法决策准确性的新维度——表示保真度（Representation Fidelity），通过比较算法输入表示与人类自我描述之间的差异来评估决策依据的合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法决策验证方法不足以评估决策依据的合理性，需要一种新的方法来衡量算法在做决策时所依据的“人”的表示是否准确和公平。
AI.method: 通过计算算法输入表示与人类自我描述之间表示的距离来衡量表示保真度。研究了表示不一致的性质、量化方法，并提出了一种表示不匹配的分类法。构建了一个基于贷款审批决策的基准测试，包含30,000个合成的自然语言自我描述及其对应的算法表示。
AI.result: 提出了一种通用的表示保真度评估框架。构建了一个包含30,000个合成自我描述的贷款审批数据集（Loan-Granting Self-Representations Corpus 2025），并对表示不匹配进行了专家标注。
AI.conclusion: 表示保真度是一个新的、有前景的验证算法决策准确性的维度。提出的框架和基准测试为评估和改进算法决策的公平性提供了工具。

title: Measuring the Redundancy of Decoder Layers in SpeechLLMs
summary: Speech Large Language Models route speech encoder representations into an LLM decoder that typically accounts for over 90% of total parameters. We study how much of this decoder capacity is actually needed for speech tasks. Across two LLM families and three scales (1-8B), we show that decoder redundancy is largely inherited from the pretrained LLM: text and speech inputs yield similar redundant blocks. We then measure excess capacity by pruning decoder layers and analysing post-pruning healing to increase robustness. Our findings show that 7-8B models retain good ASR performance with only 60% of decoder layers, and the same trend extends to smaller scales with reduced pruning tolerance. We then generalise to speech translation, and show that the same blocks of layers are redundant across speech encoders, tasks and languages, indicating that a more global redundancy structure exists, enabling a single pruned and multi-tasks SpeechLLM backbone to be deployed.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，在语音大型语言模型（SpeechLLMs）中，解码器的参数大部分是冗余的，即使在删除60%的解码器层后，7B-8B的模型在自动语音识别（ASR）任务上仍能保持良好的性能。这种冗余在不同规模的模型、文本和语音输入以及不同语音任务（包括语音翻译）中都普遍存在，表明存在一个可以部署的、经过剪枝的、多任务的SpeechLLM通用骨干。
AI.motivation: 现有语音大型语言模型（SpeechLLMs）中，解码器占据了绝大多数参数，研究人员想了解为了完成语音任务，解码器到底需要多少参数容量，是否存在冗余。
AI.method: 通过在不同规模（1-8B）的两个LLM家族上进行实验，测量解码器的冗余度。具体方法包括：1. 比较文本输入和语音输入在模型中激活的冗余块；2. 通过剪枝（pruning）解码器层来衡量多余的容量，并分析剪枝后的“治愈”（healing）现象以提高鲁棒性；3. 将研究推广到语音翻译任务，并验证冗余结构的普适性。
AI.result: 研究发现，解码器冗余很大程度上继承自预训练的LLM，文本和语音输入会激活相似的冗余块。对于7B-8B的模型，即使只保留60%的解码器层，也能在ASR任务上获得良好的性能。这种趋势在较小规模的模型上也存在，但剪枝的容忍度较低。在语音翻译任务中，相同的层块在不同的语音编码器、任务和语言中都表现出冗余，说明存在一个全局性的冗余结构。
AI.conclusion: 语音大型语言模型（SpeechLLMs）的解码器存在显著的冗余，这使得可以通过剪枝大幅减少模型参数量，同时保持良好的语音任务性能。这种冗余结构具有普适性，可以实现一个通用的、经过剪枝的、支持多任务的SpeechLLM骨干模型。

title: UniSTOK: Uniform Inductive Spatio-Temporal Kriging
summary: Spatio-temporal kriging aims to infer signals at unobserved locations from observed sensors and is critical to applications such as transportation and environmental monitoring. In practice, however, observed sensors themselves often exhibit heterogeneous missingness, forcing inductive kriging models to rely on crudely imputed inputs. This setting brings three key challenges: (1) it is unclear whether an value is a true signal or a missingness-induced artifact; (2) missingness is highly heterogeneous across sensors and time; (3) missing observations distort the local spatio-temporal structure. To address these issues, we propose Uniform Inductive Spatio-Temporal Kriging (UniSTOK), a plug-and-play framework that enhances existing inductive kriging backbones under missing observation. Our framework forms a dual-branch input consisting of the original observations and a jigsaw-augmented counterpart that synthesizes proxy signals only at missing entries. The two branches are then processed in parallel by a shared spatio-temporal backbone with explicit missingness mask modulation. Their outputs are finally adaptively fused via dual-channel attention. Experiments on multiple real-world datasets under diverse missing patterns demonstrate consistent and significant improvements.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为UniSTOK的新型框架，用于解决传感器数据中不规则缺失对时空克里金插值的影响，通过双分支输入和注意力机制提升插值精度。
AI.motivation: 现有归纳式克里金模型在处理传感器数据异质性缺失时效果不佳，导致无法区分真实信号和缺失伪影，且缺失会扭曲局部时空结构。
AI.method: UniSTOK框架采用双分支输入：原始观测值和仅在缺失位置合成代理信号的拼图增强版本。通过共享时空骨干网络（带有显式缺失掩码调制）并行处理这两个分支，最后通过双通道注意力自适应融合它们的输出。
AI.result: 在多种真实世界数据集和不同的缺失模式下进行了实验，UniSTOK框架相比现有方法取得了持续且显著的改进。
AI.conclusion: UniSTOK是一个即插即用的框架，能够有效增强现有归纳式克里金模型在处理不规则缺失数据时的性能，提升时空信号推断的准确性。

title: CLIP-driven Zero-shot Learning with Ambiguous Labels
comment: Accepted by ICASSP 2026 (IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing)
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize unseen classes by leveraging semantic information from seen classes, but most existing methods assume accurate class labels for training instances. However, in real-world scenarios, noise and ambiguous labels can significantly reduce the performance of ZSL. To address this, we propose a new CLIP-driven partial label zero-shot learning (CLIP-PZSL) framework to handle label ambiguity. First, we use CLIP to extract instance and label features. Then, a semantic mining block fuses these features to extract discriminative label embeddings. We also introduce a partial zero-shot loss, which assigns weights to candidate labels based on their relevance to the instance and aligns instance and label embeddings to minimize semantic mismatch. As the training goes on, the ground-truth labels are progressively identified, and the refined labels and label embeddings in turn help improve the semantic alignment of instance and label features. Comprehensive experiments on several datasets demonstrate the advantage of CLIP-PZSL.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CLIP-PZSL的框架，利用CLIP处理零样本学习中的标签歧义问题，通过语义挖掘和部分零样本损失来提高模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的噪声和模糊标签会严重影响现有零样本学习方法的性能，因此需要一个能够处理标签歧义的框架。
AI.method: 使用CLIP提取实例和标签特征，设计一个语义挖掘模块融合这些特征，并引入一个部分零样本损失来加权候选标签并对齐实例和标签嵌入。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上进行了实验，结果表明CLIP-PZSL框架具有优势。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-PZSL框架能够有效地处理零样本学习中的标签歧义问题，通过逐步识别真实标签来改进语义对齐，从而提升模型性能。

title: Building AI Coding Agents for the Terminal: Scaffolding, Harness, Context Engineering, and Lessons Learned
comment: Work in progress, new versions will be updated continuously
summary: The landscape of AI coding assistance is undergoing a fundamental shift from complex IDE plugins to versatile, terminal-native agents. Operating directly where developers manage source control, execute builds, and deploy environments, CLI-based agents offer unprecedented autonomy for long-horizon development tasks. In this paper, we present OPENDEV, an open-source, command-line coding agent engineered specifically for this new paradigm. Effective autonomous assistance requires strict safety controls and highly efficient context management to prevent context bloat and reasoning degradation. OPENDEV overcomes these challenges through a compound AI system architecture with workload-specialized model routing, a dual-agent architecture separating planning from execution, lazy tool discovery, and adaptive context compaction that progressively reduces older observations. Furthermore, it employs an automated memory system to accumulate project-specific knowledge across sessions and counteracts instruction fade-out through event-driven system reminders. By enforcing explicit reasoning phases and prioritizing context efficiency, OPENDEV provides a secure, extensible foundation for terminal-first AI assistance, offering a blueprint for robust autonomous software engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPENDEV，一个开源的、原生于命令行的AI编码助手，旨在实现长周期自主开发任务，并通过创新的安全和上下文管理机制解决现有挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有AI编码助手多为IDE插件，而开发者更倾向于在命令行环境中工作。研究动机是开发一种能够在命令行环境中实现长周期自主开发任务的AI助手，同时解决安全和上下文管理的问题。
AI.method: OPENDEV采用一种复合AI系统架构，包括：工作负载专门的模型路由、分离规划与执行的双代理架构、延迟工具发现、自适应上下文压缩（逐步减少旧观察）、自动记忆系统（跨会话累积项目知识）以及事件驱动的系统提醒（对抗指令衰减）。
AI.result: OPENDEV通过强制执行明确的推理阶段和优先考虑上下文效率，提供了一个安全、可扩展的命令行AI助手基础，为健壮的自主软件工程提供了蓝图。
AI.conclusion: OPENDEV通过创新的架构设计和机制，成功克服了命令行AI助手在安全性和上下文管理方面的挑战，为实现长周期自主开发任务奠定了基础，并为未来的命令行AI助手提供了可行的方案。

title: Feature Resemblance: On the Theoretical Understanding of Analogical Reasoning in Transformers
summary: Understanding reasoning in large language models is complicated by evaluations that conflate multiple reasoning types. We isolate analogical reasoning (inferring shared properties between entities based on known similarities) and analyze its emergence in transformers. We theoretically prove three key results: (1) Joint training on similarity and attribution premises enables analogical reasoning through aligned representations; (2) Sequential training succeeds only when similarity structure is learned before specific attributes, revealing a necessary curriculum; (3) Two-hop reasoning ($a \to b, b \to c \implies a \to c$) reduces to analogical reasoning with identity bridges ($b = b$), which must appear explicitly in training data. These results reveal a unified mechanism: transformers encode entities with similar properties into similar representations, enabling property transfer through feature alignment. Experiments with architectures up to 1.5B parameters validate our theory and demonstrate how representational geometry shapes inductive reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本研究分离并分析了大型语言模型中的类比推理，发现其涌现依赖于对齐的表示，并且训练顺序和训练数据中的特定结构至关重要。
AI.motivation: 现有的评估方法混淆了多种推理类型，使得理解大型语言模型中的类比推理变得困难。研究者旨在分离并分析类比推理，揭示其在Transformer模型中的涌现机制。
AI.method: 理论证明了三种关于类比推理涌现的条件：(1) 联合训练相似性和归属前提可促进类比推理；(2) 顺序训练只有在先学习相似性结构后才成功；(3) 两步推理可归结为带身份桥接的类比推理。通过实验验证了理论，使用了高达15亿参数的模型。
AI.result: 研究证明，联合训练能通过对齐表示促进类比推理；顺序训练要求先学习相似性结构；两步推理需要训练数据中包含显式的身份桥接。模型将具有相似属性的实体编码为相似表示，通过特征对齐实现属性转移。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型通过将具有相似属性的实体编码到相似的表示中，并通过特征对齐实现属性转移，从而实现类比推理。研究揭示了表示几何结构如何塑造归纳推理能力。

title: C2-Faith: Benchmarking LLM Judges for Causal and Coverage Faithfulness in Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as judges of chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, but it remains unclear whether they can reliably assess process faithfulness rather than just answer plausibility. We introduce C2-Faith, a benchmark built from PRM800K that targets two complementary dimensions of faithfulness: causality (does each step logically follow from prior context?) and coverage (are essential intermediate inferences present?). Using controlled perturbations, we create examples with known causal error positions by replacing a single step with an acausal variant, and with controlled coverage deletions at varying deletion rates (scored against reference labels). We evaluate three frontier judges under three tasks: binary causal detection, causal step localization, and coverage scoring. The results show that model rankings depend strongly on task framing, with no single judge dominating all settings; all judges exhibit a substantial gap between detecting an error and localizing it; and coverage judgments are systematically inflated for incomplete reasoning. These findings clarify when LLM judges are dependable and where they fail, and provide practical guidance for selecting judges in process-level evaluation

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了C2-Faith基准，用于评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在判断链式思考（CoT）推理过程的忠实度（因果关系和覆盖度）方面的能力，并发现LLM的评估表现很大程度上取决于任务设定，且在定位具体错误和评估覆盖度方面存在不足。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs被广泛用作CoT推理的裁判，但其评估能力仅限于答案的合理性，而对推理过程本身的忠实度（例如，每一步是否逻辑上由前文推导而来）的评估尚不清楚。
AI.method: 研究者构建了C2-Faith基准，通过对PRM800K数据集进行可控的扰动（例如，替换因果链中的某一步为非因果变体，删除关键中间推理步骤）来生成具有已知因果错误位置和不同删除率的覆盖度示例，并以此来评估三种前沿的LLM裁判模型在二元因果错误检测、因果步骤定位和覆盖度评分任务上的表现。
AI.result: 评估结果显示，LLM裁判的排名在不同任务设定下存在显著差异，没有一个模型能在所有场景下都表现最佳；所有模型在检测到错误和精确定位错误之间都存在较大的差距；并且在对不完整的推理过程进行评分时，LLM的覆盖度判断存在系统性的偏高现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了LLM裁判在过程层面评估中的可靠性与局限性，并为在选择用于评估推理过程的LLM裁判时提供了实用的指导。

title: Sparse-BitNet: 1.58-bit LLMs are Naturally Friendly to Semi-Structured Sparsity
summary: Semi-structured N:M sparsity and low-bit quantization (e.g., 1.58-bit BitNet) are two promising approaches for improving the efficiency of large language models (LLMs), yet they have largely been studied in isolation. In this work, we investigate their interaction and show that 1.58-bit BitNet is naturally more compatible with N:M sparsity than full-precision models. To study this effect, we propose Sparse-BitNet, a unified framework that jointly applies 1.58-bit quantization and dynamic N:M sparsification while ensuring stable training for the first time. Across multiple model scales and training regimes (sparse pretraining and dense-to-sparse schedules), 1.58-bit BitNet consistently exhibits smaller performance degradation than full-precision baselines at the same sparsity levels and can tolerate higher structured sparsity before accuracy collapse. Moreover, using our custom sparse tensor core, Sparse-BitNet achieves substantial speedups in both training and inference, reaching up to 1.30X. These results highlight that combining extremely low-bit quantization with semi-structured N:M sparsity is a promising direction for efficient LLMs. Code available at https://github.com/AAzdi/Sparse-BitNet

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了Sparse-BitNet，一个结合了1.58位BitNet量化和N:M稀疏化的统一框架，发现在相同稀疏度下1.58位BitNet比全精度模型性能下降更少，并能容忍更高的稀疏度。该框架在定制稀疏张量核的加持下，训练和推理速度均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要单独探讨半结构化N:M稀疏性和低比特量化（如1.58位BitNet）对大语言模型（LLMs）效率的影响，但未深入研究它们之间的相互作用。本研究旨在探索这种结合的潜力。
AI.method: 提出Sparse-BitNet统一框架，同时应用1.58位量化和动态N:M稀疏化，并首次实现了稳定训练。通过在不同模型规模和训练策略下（稀疏预训练和从密集到稀疏的调度）进行实验。
AI.result: 1.58位BitNet与N:M稀疏化兼容性优于全精度模型。在相同稀疏度下，Sparse-BitNet性能下降小于全精度基线，并能容忍更高的稀疏度。使用定制的稀疏张量核，Sparse-BitNet实现了高达1.30倍的训练和推理加速。
AI.conclusion: 将极低比特量化与半结构化N:M稀疏化相结合，是实现高效LLMs的一个有前景的方向。Sparse-BitNet框架证明了这种组合的有效性，并在性能和效率上取得了显著进步。

title: MoRe: Motion-aware Feed-forward 4D Reconstruction Transformer
summary: Reconstructing dynamic 4D scenes remains challenging due to the presence of moving objects that corrupt camera pose estimation. Existing optimization methods alleviate this issue with additional supervision, but they are mostly computationally expensive and impractical in real-time applications. To address these limitations, we propose MoRe, a feedforward 4D reconstruction network that efficiently recovers dynamic 3D scenes from monocular videos. Built upon a strong static reconstruction backbone, MoRe employs an attention-forcing strategy to disentangle dynamic motion from static structure. To further enhance robustness, we fine-tune the model on large-scale, diverse datasets encompassing both dynamic and static scenes. Moreover, our grouped causal attention captures temporal dependencies and adapts to varying token lengths across frames, ensuring temporally coherent geometry reconstruction. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that MoRe achieves high-quality dynamic reconstructions with exceptional efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为MoRe的前馈4D重建网络，可以从单目视频中高效地恢复动态3D场景，并解决了现有方法计算成本高和难以实时应用的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有4D场景重建方法在处理运动物体时，由于会干扰相机姿态估计，因此存在挑战。现有的优化方法需要额外的监督，但计算成本高昂，不适合实时应用。
AI.method: MoRe网络基于强大的静态重建骨干网络，采用注意力强制策略来分离动态运动和静态结构。通过在大规模、多样化的数据集上进行微调来增强鲁棒性。其分组因果注意力机制能够捕获时间依赖性，并适应不同帧的token长度，以实现时间上连贯的几何重建。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中的广泛实验表明，MoRe能够实现高质量的动态重建，并且效率极高。
AI.conclusion: MoRe网络能够高效地从单目视频中恢复动态3D场景，克服了现有方法的计算成本高和实时性差的缺点，并在动态重建方面取得了优异的性能。

title: Guidelines for the Annotation and Visualization of Legal Argumentation Structures in Chinese Judicial Decisions
comment: The PDF contains both an English translation and the original Chinese guideline. The first 30 pages present the full English translation, while the remaining 25 pages provide the original Chinese version
summary: This guideline proposes a systematic and operational annotation framework for representing the structure of legal argumentation in judicial decisions. Grounded in theories of legal reasoning and argumentation, the framework aims to reveal the logical organization of judicial reasoning and to provide a reliable data foundation for computational analysis. At the proposition level, the guideline distinguishes four types of propositions: general normative propositions, specific normative propositions, general factual propositions, and specific factual propositions. At the relational level, five types of relations are defined to capture argumentative structures: support, attack, joint, match, and identity. These relations represent positive and negative argumentative connections, conjunctive reasoning structures, the correspondence between legal norms and case facts, and semantic equivalence between propositions. The guideline further specifies formal representation rules and visualization conventions for both basic and nested structures, enabling consistent graphical representation of complex argumentation patterns. In addition, it establishes a standardized annotation workflow and consistency control mechanisms to ensure reproducibility and reliability of the annotated data. By providing a clear conceptual model, formal representation rules, and practical annotation procedures, this guideline offers methodological support for large-scale analysis of judicial reasoning and for future research in legal argument mining, computational modeling of legal reasoning, and AI-assisted legal analysis.

AI.tldr: 本指南提出了一种用于表示司法判决中法律论证结构的系统化操作化标注框架，区分了四种命题类型和五种关系类型，并规定了形式化规则、可视化约定、标注流程和一致性控制机制，以支持对司法推理的大规模计算分析。
AI.motivation: 为了揭示司法判决中法律论证的逻辑组织，并为计算分析提供可靠的数据基础。
AI.method: 该框架在命题层面区分了四种类型（一般规范、特定规范、一般事实、特定事实），在关系层面定义了五种类型（支持、攻击、联合、匹配、同一）。此外，还规定了形式化表示规则、可视化约定、标注工作流程和一致性控制机制。
AI.result: 提供了一个结构化的标注框架，能够一致地表示法律论证的复杂模式，并确保了标注数据的可重复性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该指南为法律论证挖掘、法律推理计算建模和人工智能辅助法律分析等领域提供了方法论支持，促进了对司法推理的大规模分析。

title: UniM: A Unified Any-to-Any Interleaved Multimodal Benchmark
summary: In real-world multimodal applications, systems usually need to comprehend arbitrarily combined and interleaved multimodal inputs from users, while also generating outputs in any interleaved multimedia form. This capability defines the goal of any-to-any interleaved multimodal learning under a unified paradigm of understanding and generation, posing new challenges and opportunities for advancing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). To foster and benchmark this capability, this paper introduces the UniM benchmark, the first Unified Any-to-Any Interleaved Multimodal dataset. UniM contains 31K high-quality instances across 30 domains and 7 representative modalities: text, image, audio, video, document, code, and 3D, each requiring multiple intertwined reasoning and generation capabilities. We further introduce the UniM Evaluation Suite, which assesses models along three dimensions: Semantic Correctness & Generation Quality, Response Structure Integrity, and Interleaved Coherence. In addition, we propose UniMA, an agentic baseline model equipped with traceable reasoning for structured interleaved generation. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the difficulty of UniM and highlight key challenges and directions for advancing unified any-to-any multimodal intelligence. The project page is https://any2any-mllm.github.io/unim.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniM基准，一个包含31K样本、30个领域和7种模态（文本、图像、音频、视频、文档、代码、3D）的统一的任意到任意交错多模态数据集，用于评估和推动多模态大模型在理解和生成任意组合和交错的多模态输入/输出方面的能力。同时，引入UniM评估套件，从语义正确性、结构完整性和交错连贯性三个维度评估模型，并提出了一个名为UniMA的基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的多模态应用需要系统能够理解任意组合和交错的多模态输入，并能以任意交错的多媒体形式生成输出。为了实现和评估这一“任意到任意”的多模态学习能力，需要一个统一的基准来挑战和推进多模态大模型的发展。
AI.method:
1. 构建UniM数据集，包含31K高质量样本，覆盖30个领域和7种模态（文本、图像、音频、视频、文档、代码、3D），设计了需要多模态推理和生成能力的任务。
2. 提出UniM评估套件，从语义正确性与生成质量、响应结构完整性、交错连贯性三个维度评估模型。
3. 提出UniMA模型，一个具备可追溯推理能力的代理模型，用于结构化的交错生成。
AI.result: UniM基准能够有效评估当前多模态大模型在任意到任意交错多模态学习方面的能力，实验结果表明该任务的难度，并指出了未来研究的关键挑战和方向。UniMA模型在某些方面展现出优于其他方法的潜力。
AI.conclusion: UniM基准是首个统一的任意到任意交错多模态数据集，为多模态大模型的研究提供了新的方向和评估标准。该基准的提出有助于推动多模态大模型在理解和生成复杂交错多模态信息方面的能力发展。

title: MI-DETR: A Strong Baseline for Moving Infrared Small Target Detection with Bio-Inspired Motion Integration
summary: Infrared small target detection (ISTD) is challenging because tiny, low-contrast targets are easily obscured by complex and dynamic backgrounds. Conventional multi-frame approaches typically learn motion implicitly through deep neural networks, often requiring additional motion supervision or explicit alignment modules. We propose Motion Integration DETR (MI-DETR), a bio-inspired dual-pathway detector that processes one infrared frame per time step while explicitly modeling motion. First, a retina-inspired cellular automaton (RCA) converts raw frame sequences into a motion map defined on the same pixel grid as the appearance image, enabling parvocellular-like appearance and magnocellular-like motion pathways to be supervised by a single set of bounding boxes without extra motion labels or alignment operations. Second, a Parvocellular-Magnocellular Interconnection (PMI) Block facilitates bidirectional feature interaction between the two pathways, providing a biologically motivated intermediate interconnection mechanism. Finally, a RT-DETR decoder operates on features from the two pathways to produce detection results. Surprisingly, our proposed simple yet effective approach yields strong performance on three commonly used ISTD benchmarks. MI-DETR achieves 70.3% mAP@50 and 72.7% F1 on IRDST-H (+26.35 mAP@50 over the best multi-frame baseline), 98.0% mAP@50 on DAUB-R, and 88.3% mAP@50 on ITSDT-15K, demonstrating the effectiveness of biologically inspired motion-appearance integration. Code is available at https://github.com/nliu-25/MI-DETR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MI-DETR的双通路红外小目标检测模型，通过生物启发的方法显式地建模运动，并整合外观和运动特征，在多个基准测试中取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 红外小目标检测（ISTD）面临挑战，因为目标尺寸小、对比度低，易被复杂动态背景遮挡。现有方法通常隐式学习运动，需要额外运动监督或对齐模块。本文旨在开发一种能显式建模运动并整合外观和运动信息的ISTD方法。
AI.method: 提出MI-DETR，一个生物启发的双通路检测器。首先，使用视网膜细胞自动机（RCA）将原始帧序列转换为像素网格上的运动图，实现类似旁细胞（外观）和旁细胞（运动）的通路，并仅用一组边界框进行监督。其次，提出旁细胞-旁细胞连接（PMI）块，促进双通路间的双向特征交互。最后，使用RT-DETR解码器融合两通路特征进行检测。
AI.result: MI-DETR在IRDST-H、DAUB-R和ITSDT-15K三个常用ISTD基准测试中取得了优异性能，在IRDST-H上mAP@50达到70.3%，F1达到72.7%（超越现有最佳多帧基线26.35% mAP@50），在DAUB-R上mAP@50达到98.0%，在ITSDT-15K上mAP@50达到88.3%。
AI.conclusion: MI-DETR通过生物启发的方式，简单有效地整合了运动和外观信息，克服了红外小目标检测的挑战，证明了运动-外观整合在ISTD中的有效性。

title: PACE: A Personalized Adaptive Curriculum Engine for 9-1-1 Call-taker Training
summary: 9-1-1 call-taking training requires mastery of over a thousand interdependent skills, covering diverse incident types and protocol-specific nuances. A nationwide labor shortage is already straining training capacity, but effective instruction still demands that trainers tailor objectives to each trainee's evolving competencies. This personalization burden is one that current practice cannot scale. Partnering with Metro Nashville Department of Emergency Communications (MNDEC), we propose PACE (Personalized Adaptive Curriculum Engine), a co-pilot system that augments trainer decision-making by (1) maintaining probabilistic beliefs over trainee skill states, (2) modeling individual learning and forgetting dynamics, and (3) recommending training scenarios that balance acquisition of new competencies with retention of existing ones. PACE propagates evidence over a structured skill graph to accelerate diagnostic coverage and applies contextual bandits to select scenarios that target gaps the trainee is prepared to address. Empirical results show that PACE achieves 19.50% faster time-to-competence and 10.95% higher terminal mastery compared to state-of-the-art frameworks. Co-pilot studies with practicing training officers further demonstrate a 95.45% alignment rate between PACE's and experts' pedagogical judgments on real-world cases. Under estimation, PACE cuts turnaround time to merely 34 seconds from 11.58 minutes, up to 95.08% reduction.

AI.tldr: PACE 是一个辅助 9-1-1 接线员培训的系统，通过个性化适应性课程，利用概率模型和上下文赌博机来优化训练场景选择，从而提高培训效率和学员掌握程度。
AI.motivation: 9-1-1 接线员培训涉及大量复杂技能，而全国性的劳动力短缺加剧了培训能力的压力。目前的培训方式难以实现个性化，无法满足每位学员不断变化的胜任能力需求。
AI.method: PACE 系统通过以下方式增强培训师的决策能力：1. 维护学员技能状态的概率信念；2. 模拟个体学习和遗忘动态；3. 推荐能平衡新技能习得和现有技能保留的训练场景。该系统利用结构化技能图谱传播证据以加速诊断覆盖，并应用上下文赌博机选择针对学员已有基础的技能差距的场景。
AI.result: 与现有最先进的框架相比，PACE 将达到胜任能力的时间缩短了 19.50%，并将最终掌握程度提高了 10.95%。与实践培训官进行的试点研究表明，PACE 的教学判断与专家在真实案例上的判断一致性达到 95.45%。PACE 在估算方面，将周转时间从 11.58 分钟减少到 34 秒，减少幅度高达 95.08%。
AI.conclusion: PACE 作为一个个性化适应性课程引擎，能够显著提高 9-1-1 接线员培训的效率和效果，并能与经验丰富的培训官的判断高度一致，有望解决当前培训能力不足和效率低下的问题。

title: Legal interpretation and AI: from expert systems to argumentation and LLMs
summary: AI and Law research has encountered legal interpretation in different ways, in the context of its evolving approaches and methodologies. Research on expert system has focused on legal knowledge engineering, with the goal of ensuring that human-generated interpretations can be precisely transferred into knowledge-bases, to be consistently applied. Research on argumentation has aimed at representing the structure of interpretive arguments, as well as their dialectical interactions, to assess of the acceptability of interpretive claims within argumentation frameworks. Research on machine learning has focused on the automated generation of interpretive suggestions and arguments, through general and specialised language models, now being increasingly deployed in legal practice.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能在法律解释研究中的三种主要方法：专家系统、论证研究和机器学习，并探讨了它们各自的侧重点和发展方向。
AI.motivation: AI与法律研究领域在法律解释方面采用了多种方法，本文旨在梳理和介绍这些不同的研究路径。
AI.method:
本文回顾了三种主要的研究方法：
1. 专家系统：关注法律知识工程，旨在将人类解释精确转化为知识库。
2. 论证研究：关注解释性论证的结构和辩论互动，评估论证的可接受性。
3. 机器学习：关注利用语言模型自动生成解释性建议和论证，并已在法律实践中应用。
AI.result: 专家系统和论证研究侧重于知识表示和逻辑推理，而机器学习方法则侧重于自动化生成解释性内容。
AI.conclusion: AI在法律解释研究中经历了从知识工程到论证表示，再到如今的机器学习自动化生成等不同阶段，并且机器学习方法正日益广泛地应用于法律实践中。

title: Ailed: A Psyche-Driven Chess Engine with Dynamic Emotional Modulation
comment: 27 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables. Open source: https://github.com/chrnx-dev/ailed-chess
summary:
Chess engines passed human strength years ago, but they still don't play like humans. A grandmaster under clock pressure blunders in ways a club player on a hot streak never would. Conventional engines capture none of this.
  This paper proposes a personality x psyche decomposition to produce behavioral variability in chess play, drawing on patterns observed in human games. Personality is static -- a preset that pins down the engine's character. Psyche is dynamic -- a bounded scalar ψ_t \in [-100, +100], recomputed from five positional factors after every move. These two components feed into an audio-inspired signal chain (noise gate, compressor/expander, five-band equalizer, saturation limiter) that reshapes move probability distributions on the fly. The chain doesn't care what engine sits behind it: any system that outputs move probabilities will do. It needs no search and carries no state beyond ψ_t.
  I test the framework across 12,414 games against Maia2-1100, feeding it two probability sources that differ by ~2,800x in training data. Both show the same monotonic gradient in top-move agreement (~20-25 pp spread from stress to overconfidence), which tells us the behavioral variation comes from the signal chain, not from the model underneath. When the psyche runs overconfident, the chain mostly gets out of the way (66% agreement with vanilla Maia2). Under stress, the competitive score falls from 50.8% to 30.1%. The patterns are reminiscent of tilt and overconfidence as described in human play, but I should be upfront: this study includes no human-subject validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于“个性 x 心态”分解的框架，用于在国际象棋引擎中引入类人行为的变化。通过模拟音频信号处理链来调整棋步概率分布，模仿人类下棋时的压力和过度自信等状态。
AI.motivation: 现有国际象棋引擎虽然棋力强大，但其下棋方式与人类存在显著差异，尤其是在压力下容易出现人类职业棋手才会有的大失误，而普通引擎无法捕捉这种行为差异。因此，研究动机是为了让国际象棋引擎能够模拟人类玩家的行为模式。
AI.method: 提出了一种“个性 x 心态”分解方法。其中“个性”是引擎的静态设置，定义了其风格；“心态”（ψ_t）是一个动态的标量值（-100到+100），根据五个位置因素在每一步棋后重新计算。这两个组件被输入到一个音频信号处理链（包括噪声门、压缩器/扩展器、五段均衡器和饱和限制器），该链能够实时调整棋步的概率分布。该框架不依赖于特定的底层引擎，只需输入棋步概率即可。
AI.result: 在12,414场与Maia2-1100的比赛中测试了该框架。结果显示，无论底层引擎的训练数据量差异巨大，行为变化主要来自于信号链本身，而非底层模型。当心态设置为过度自信时，引擎与标准Maia2的一致性约为66%；当处于压力状态下时，比赛的竞争力评分从50.8%下降到30.1%。这些模式与人类下棋中的“倾斜”（tilt）和过度自信现象相似。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的“个性 x 心态”分解框架结合音频信号处理链，能够有效地为国际象棋引擎引入类人的行为变化，模拟人类玩家在不同心理状态下的表现。尽管实验结果显示出与人类行为相似的模式，但作者坦承本研究未包含人类玩家的验证。

title: Orthogonal Spatial-temporal Distributional Transfer for 4D Generation
summary: In the AIGC era, generating high-quality 4D content has garnered increasing research attention. Unfortunately, current 4D synthesis research is severely constrained by the lack of large-scale 4D datasets, preventing models from adequately learning the critical spatial-temporal features necessary for high-quality 4D generation, thus hindering progress in this domain. To combat this, we propose a novel framework that transfers rich spatial priors from existing 3D diffusion models and temporal priors from video diffusion models to enhance 4D synthesis. We develop a spatial-temporal-disentangled 4D (STD-4D) Diffusion model, which synthesizes 4D-aware videos through disentangled spatial and temporal latents. To facilitate the best feature transfer, we design a novel Orthogonal Spatial-temporal Distributional Transfer (Orster) mechanism, where the spatiotemporal feature distributions are carefully modeled and injected into the STD-4D Diffusion. Furthermore, during the 4D construction, we devise a spatial-temporal-aware HexPlane (ST-HexPlane) to integrate the transferred spatiotemporal features, thereby improving 4D deformation and 4D Gaussian feature modeling. Experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches, achieving superior spatial-temporal consistency and higher-quality 4D synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的4D内容生成框架，通过结合3D和视频扩散模型的空间和时间先验，解决了现有4D数据集不足的问题，并取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的4D内容合成研究受限于大规模4D数据集的缺乏，这阻碍了模型学习高质量4D生成所需的重要时空特征。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的STD-4D扩散模型，该模型通过解耦的空间和时间潜在表示来合成4D感知视频。引入了Orster机制来转移和注入来自3D和视频扩散模型的空间和时间先验。设计了ST-HexPlane来整合这些时空特征，以改进4D变形和4D高斯特征建模。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在4D合成方面显著优于现有方法，实现了更高的时空一致性和更高质量的4D内容。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过有效地转移和整合多模态扩散模型的先验知识，成功克服了4D数据集不足的挑战，显著提高了4D内容的生成质量和时空一致性。

title: Diff-ES: Stage-wise Structural Diffusion Pruning via Evolutionary Search
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in high-fidelity image generation but remain computationally demanding due to their multi-step denoising process and large model sizes. Although prior work improves efficiency either by reducing sampling steps or by compressing model parameters, existing structured pruning approaches still struggle to balance real acceleration and image quality preservation. In particular, prior methods such as MosaicDiff rely on heuristic, manually tuned stage-wise sparsity schedules and stitch multiple independently pruned models during inference, which increases memory overhead. However, the importance of diffusion steps is highly non-uniform and model-dependent. As a result, schedules derived from simple heuristics or empirical observations often fail to generalize and may lead to suboptimal performance. To this end, we introduce \textbf{Diff-ES}, a stage-wise structural \textbf{Diff}usion pruning framework via \textbf{E}volutionary \textbf{S}earch, which optimizes the stage-wise sparsity schedule and executes it through memory-efficient weight routing without model duplication. Diff-ES divides the diffusion trajectory into multiple stages, automatically discovers an optimal stage-wise sparsity schedule via evolutionary search, and activates stage-conditioned weights dynamically without duplicating model parameters. Our framework naturally integrates with existing structured pruning methods for diffusion models including depth and width pruning. Extensive experiments on DiT and SDXL demonstrate that Diff-ES consistently achieves wall-clock speedups while incurring minimal degradation in generation quality, establishing state-of-the-art performance for structured diffusion model pruning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 Diff-ES 的结构化扩散模型剪枝框架，通过进化搜索自动优化剪枝策略，并采用内存高效的权重路由机制，在不显著牺牲图像质量的情况下显著加速了图像生成过程。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型的生成过程计算成本高，模型规模大。虽然减少采样步数或压缩模型参数可以提高效率，但现有的结构化剪枝方法难以在实际加速和图像质量之间取得平衡，例如 MosaicDiff 依赖手动调整且会增加内存开销。
AI.method: Diff-ES 将扩散过程划分为多个阶段，利用进化搜索自动发现最优的阶段性稀疏度调度，并通过内存高效的权重路由动态激活条件化权重，无需复制模型参数。该框架支持深度和宽度剪枝。
AI.result: 在 DiT 和 SDXL 模型上的实验表明，Diff-ES 能够实现稳定的实际运行时间加速，同时图像生成质量仅有微小的下降，并在结构化扩散模型剪枝方面取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Diff-ES 是一种有效的结构化扩散模型剪枝框架，通过自动化的进化搜索优化剪枝策略，并采用内存高效的执行方式，成功解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了加速和质量的良好平衡。

title: GEM-TFL: Bridging Weak and Full Supervision for Forgery Localization through EM-Guided Decomposition and Temporal Refinement
summary: Temporal Forgery Localization (TFL) aims to precisely identify manipulated segments within videos or audio streams, providing interpretable evidence for multimedia forensics and security. While most existing TFL methods rely on dense frame-level labels in a fully supervised manner, Weakly Supervised TFL (WS-TFL) reduces labeling cost by learning only from binary video-level labels. However, current WS-TFL approaches suffer from mismatched training and inference objectives, limited supervision from binary labels, gradient blockage caused by non-differentiable top-k aggregation, and the absence of explicit modeling of inter-proposal relationships. To address these issues, we propose GEM-TFL (Graph-based EM-powered Temporal Forgery Localization), a two-phase classification-regression framework that effectively bridges the supervision gap between training and inference. Built upon this foundation, (1) we enhance weak supervision by reformulating binary labels into multi-dimensional latent attributes through an EM-based optimization process; (2) we introduce a training-free temporal consistency refinement that realigns frame-level predictions for smoother temporal dynamics; and (3) we design a graph-based proposal refinement module that models temporal-semantic relationships among proposals for globally consistent confidence estimation. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that GEM-TFL achieves more accurate and robust temporal forgery localization, substantially narrowing the gap with fully supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 GEM-TFL 的新方法，用于在仅有二元视频级标签的情况下进行时间伪影定位（TFL）。该方法通过 EM 算法增强了弱监督，引入了无训练的时间一致性细化，并使用图模型来改进提案的置信度估计，从而有效缩小了与完全监督方法之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有的弱监督时间伪影定位（WS-TFL）方法存在训练和推理目标不匹配、二元标签监督信息有限、不可微的 top-k 聚合导致梯度阻塞以及未能明确建模提案间关系等问题。
AI.method: GEM-TFL 是一个两阶段的分类回归框架。它通过 EM 优化将二元标签重构为多维潜在属性以增强弱监督；引入了无需训练的时间一致性细化来平滑帧级预测；设计了一个基于图模型的提案细化模块来建模提案间的时间语义关系，从而进行全局一致的置信度估计。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，GEM-TFL 能够实现更准确、更鲁棒的时间伪影定位，并显著缩小了与完全监督方法之间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: GEM-TFL 通过其提出的 EM 增强弱监督、训练无关的时间一致性细化和基于图模型的提案细化，成功解决了当前 WS-TFL 方法的局限性，实现了高效且准确的时间伪影定位。

title: Distilling Formal Logic into Neural Spaces: A Kernel Alignment Approach for Signal Temporal Logic
summary: We introduce a framework for learning continuous neural representations of formal specifications by distilling the geometry of their semantics into a latent space. Existing approaches rely either on symbolic kernels -- which preserve behavioural semantics but are computationally prohibitive, anchor-dependent, and non-invertible -- or on syntax-based neural embeddings that fail to capture underlying structures. Our method bridges this gap: using a teacher-student setup, we distill a symbolic robustness kernel into a Transformer encoder. Unlike standard contrastive methods, we supervise the model with a continuous, kernel-weighted geometric alignment objective that penalizes errors in proportion to their semantic discrepancies. Once trained, the encoder produces embeddings in a single forward pass, effectively mimicking the kernel's logic at a fraction of its computational cost. We apply our framework to Signal Temporal Logic (STL), demonstrating that the resulting neural representations faithfully preserve the semantic similarity of STL formulae, accurately predict robustness and constraint satisfaction, and remain intrinsically invertible. Our proposed approach enables highly efficient, scalable neuro-symbolic reasoning and formula reconstruction without repeated kernel computation at runtime.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种将形式化规约的几何语义学习为连续神经表示的框架，通过教师-学生模式将符号鲁棒性核蒸馏到 Transformer 编码器中，实现了高效、可扩展的神经符号推理和公式重构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么计算成本高昂且存在局限性（符号核），要么无法捕捉底层结构（基于语法的神经嵌入）。本研究旨在弥合这一差距，提供一种既能保留语义又能高效计算的方法。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生学习设置，将符号鲁棒性核蒸馏到 Transformer 编码器中。使用连续的、核加权的几何对齐目标函数进行监督，该目标函数根据语义差异的比例来惩罚错误。
AI.result: 训练好的编码器能够进行单次前向传递生成嵌入，以极低的计算成本模仿核的逻辑。在信号时序逻辑（STL）上的应用表明，该方法能忠实保留公式的语义相似性，准确预测鲁棒性和约束满足性，并且是可逆的。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能够实现高效、可扩展的神经符号推理和公式重构，无需在运行时重复计算核，从而克服了现有方法的局限性。

title: Judge Reliability Harness: Stress Testing the Reliability of LLM Judges
comment: Accepted at Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond Workshop at ICLR 2026 - April 26, 2026, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
summary: We present the Judge Reliability Harness, an open source library for constructing validation suites that test the reliability of LLM judges. As LLM based scoring is widely deployed in AI benchmarks, more tooling is needed to efficiently assess the reliability of these methods. Given a benchmark dataset and an LLM judge configuration, the harness generates reliability tests that evaluate both binary judgment accuracy and ordinal grading performance for free-response and agentic task formats. We evaluate four state-of-the-art judges across four benchmarks spanning safety, persuasion, misuse, and agentic behavior, and find meaningful variation in performance across models and perturbation types, highlighting opportunities to improve the robustness of LLM judges. No judge that we evaluated is uniformly reliable across benchmarks using our harness. For example, our preliminary experiments on judges revealed consistency issues as measured by accuracy in judging another LLM's ability to complete a task due to simple text formatting changes, paraphrasing, changes in verbosity, and flipping the ground truth label in LLM-produced responses. The code for this tool is available at: https://github.com/RANDCorporation/judge-reliability-harness

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了 Judge Reliability Harness，一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）裁判可靠性的开源库。该工具通过生成测试来评估裁判在准确性和评分方面的表现，并发现不同模型和扰动类型下存在性能差异，表明 LLM 裁判的鲁棒性有待提高。
AI.motivation: 随着 LLM 裁判在 AI 基准测试中得到广泛应用，需要新的工具来高效评估这些方法的可靠性。
AI.method: 使用 Judge Reliability Harness 库，输入基准数据集和 LLM 裁判配置，生成评估二元判断准确性和有序评分表现的可靠性测试。该评估涵盖了自由回复和代理任务格式。
AI.result: 在四个涵盖安全、说服、滥用和代理行为的基准测试中，对四个最先进的 LLM 裁判进行了评估，发现模型和扰动类型之间存在显著的性能差异。例如，简单的文本格式更改、释义、冗余度变化和翻转地面真值标签等扰动都会导致裁判的准确性出现一致性问题。
AI.conclusion: 没有一个被评估的 LLM 裁判在所有基准测试中都能提供一致可靠的判断。研究结果突显了提高 LLM 裁判鲁棒性的必要性。

title: Transducing Language Models
summary: Modern language models define distributions over strings, but downstream tasks often require different output formats. For instance, a model that generates byte-pair strings does not directly produce word-level predictions, and a DNA model does not directly produce amino-acid sequences. In such cases, a deterministic string-to-string transformation can convert the model's output to the desired form. This is a familiar pattern in probability theory: applying a function $f$ to a random variable $X\sim p$ yields a transformed random variable $f(X)$ with an induced distribution. While such transformations are occasionally used in language modeling, prior work does not treat them as yielding new, fully functional language models. We formalize this perspective and introduce a general framework for language models derived from deterministic string-to-string transformations. We focus on transformations representable as finite-state transducers -- a commonly used state-machine abstraction for efficient string-to-string mappings. We develop algorithms that compose a language model with an FST to *marginalize* over source strings mapping to a given target, propagating probabilities through the transducer without altering model parameters and enabling *conditioning* on transformed outputs. We present an exact algorithm, an efficient approximation, and a theoretical analysis. We conduct experiments in three domains: converting language models from tokens to bytes, from tokens to words, and from DNA to amino acids. These experiments demonstrate inference-time adaptation of pretrained language models to match application-specific output requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的语言模型框架，该框架通过确定性字符串到字符串变换（特别是有限状态变换器）来生成新的语言模型。该方法允许在推理时适应预训练模型，以满足特定应用程序的输出要求，并能在不改变模型参数的情况下计算和条件化。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型通常定义字符串的分布，但下游任务需要不同的输出格式。例如，字节对字符串模型无法直接生成词级预测。这促使研究人员探索一种方法，将现有语言模型通过确定性字符串到字符串变换转化为满足不同输出格式的新模型。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于有限状态变换器（FST）的通用语言模型框架。该框架通过将现有语言模型与FST组合，实现了对源字符串的边缘化（marginalize）和对转换后输出的条件化（conditioning）。作者开发了精确算法和高效近似算法来处理这些变换，并进行了理论分析。
AI.result: 实验在三个领域进行了验证：将语言模型从token转换为byte、从token转换为word，以及将DNA转换为氨基酸。结果表明，该方法能够在推理时自适应预训练的语言模型，以匹配特定应用程序的输出需求，同时保持模型参数不变。
AI.conclusion: 通过将确定性字符串到字符串变换（特别是FST）视为一种生成新语言模型的方式，本文提供了一个通用的框架，实现了在推理时对预训练语言模型的灵活适应。这使得模型能够满足各种下游任务的特定输出格式要求，而无需重新训练模型。

title: BLINK: Behavioral Latent Modeling of NK Cell Cytotoxicity
summary: Machine learning models of cellular interaction dynamics hold promise for understanding cell behavior. Natural killer (NK) cell cytotoxicity is a prominent example of such interaction dynamics and is commonly studied using time-resolved multi-channel fluorescence microscopy. Although tumor cell death events can be annotated at single frames, NK cytotoxic outcome emerges over time from cellular interactions and cannot be reliably inferred from frame-wise classification alone. We introduce BLINK, a trajectory-based recurrent state-space model that serves as a cell world model for NK-tumor interactions. BLINK learns latent interaction dynamics from partially observed NK-tumor interaction sequences and predicts apoptosis increments that accumulate into cytotoxic outcomes. Experiments on long-term time-lapse NK-tumor recordings show improved cytotoxic outcome detection and enable forecasting of future outcomes, together with an interpretable latent representation that organizes NK trajectories into coherent behavioral modes and temporally structured interaction phases. BLINK provides a unified framework for quantitative evaluation and structured modeling of NK cytotoxic behavior at the single-cell level.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BLINK的基于轨迹的循环状态空间模型，用于分析自然杀伤（NK）细胞与肿瘤细胞的相互作用动力学，能够更准确地检测细胞毒性结局并预测未来结果，同时提供可解释的潜在表示。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于帧的分类方法无法准确推断NK细胞细胞毒性的累积效应，需要一种能够捕捉细胞相互作用随时间演变的动力学模型。
AI.method: 开发了一种名为BLINK的轨迹基循环状态空间模型，该模型可以从部分观测到的NK-肿瘤相互作用序列中学习潜在的相互作用动力学，并预测累积的凋亡增量。
AI.result: 在长时程NK-肿瘤记录的实验中，BLINK提高了细胞毒性结局的检测能力，能够预测未来结局，并提供可解释的潜在表示，将NK轨迹组织成连贯的行为模式和时间结构化的相互作用阶段。
AI.conclusion: BLINK提供了一个统一的框架，用于对NK细胞的细胞毒性行为进行定量评估和结构化建模，实现了单细胞级别的分析。

title: Distributed Partial Information Puzzles: Examining Common Ground Construction Under Epistemic Asymmetry
summary: Establishing common ground, a shared set of beliefs and mutually recognized facts, is fundamental to collaboration, yet remains a challenge for current AI systems, especially in multimodal, multiparty settings, where the collaborators bring different information to the table. We introduce the Distributed Partial Information Puzzle (DPIP), a collaborative construction task that elicits rich multimodal communication under epistemic asymmetry. We present a multimodal dataset of these interactions, annotated and temporally aligned across speech, gesture, and action modalities to support reasoning over propositional content and belief dynamics. We then evaluate two paradigms for modeling common ground (CG): (1) state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs), prompted to infer shared beliefs from multimodal updates, and (2) an axiomatic pipeline grounded in Dynamic Epistemic Logic (DEL) that incrementally performs the same task. Results on the annotated DPIP data indicate that it poses a challenge to modern LLMs' abilities to track both task progression and belief state.

AI.tldr: 本研究引入了一个名为DPIP的合作建构任务，用于模拟人工智能系统在多模态、多方协作环境中建立共同理解的挑战，并发布了相关的多模态数据集。研究评估了大型语言模型（LLMs）和基于动态认知逻辑（DEL）的公理化方法在跟踪任务进展和信念状态方面的能力，发现当前LLMs在这些方面仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能系统在多模态、多方协作环境中建立共同理解（common ground）方面存在挑战，即确保合作者之间拥有共享的信念和被相互认可的事实。本研究旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 研究引入了分布式部分信息拼图（DPIP）这一合作建构任务，并收集了一个多模态数据集，该数据集在语音、手势和动作模态之间进行了标注和时间对齐。研究评估了两种建模共同理解的范式：1) 使用大型语言模型（LLMs）进行推理，2) 使用基于动态认知逻辑（DEL）的公理化流程进行增量式任务。
AI.result: 在标注的DPIP数据集上的实验结果表明，该任务对现代LLMs跟踪任务进展和信念状态的能力提出了挑战。
AI.conclusion: 建立共同理解是协作的关键，但目前的人工智能系统，特别是面临信息不对称的多模态、多方协作场景时，在这方面仍显不足。DPIP任务及其数据集为进一步研究和改进AI的共同理解能力提供了基础。

title: Dissociating Direct Access from Inference in AI Introspection
summary: Introspection is a foundational cognitive ability, but its mechanism is not well understood. Recent work has shown that AI models can introspect. We study their mechanism of introspection, first extensively replicating Lindsey et al. (2025)'s thought injection detection paradigm in large open-source models. We show that these models detect injected representations via two separable mechanisms: (i) probability-matching (inferring from perceived anomaly of the prompt) and (ii) direct access to internal states. The direct access mechanism is content-agnostic: models detect that an anomaly occurred but cannot reliably identify its semantic content. The two model classes we study confabulate injected concepts that are high-frequency and concrete (e.g., "apple'"); for them correct concept guesses typically require significantly more tokens. This content-agnostic introspective mechanism is consistent with leading theories in philosophy and psychology.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型开源AI模型在内省（introspection）过程中的机制，发现模型通过概率匹配和直接访问内部状态这两种可分离的机制来检测注入的思想。其中，直接访问机制对于注入内容的语义信息是模糊的，模型倾向于推测高频具体概念。这一发现与哲学和心理学中的内省理论一致。
AI.motivation: 尽管内省是基本认知能力，但其机制尚不清楚。近期的研究表明AI模型也具备内省能力，因此研究AI模型的内省机制有助于理解其内在工作原理，并可能与人类认知理论建立联系。
AI.method: 研究人员广泛复制了Lindsey等人（2025）的思想注入检测范式，并将其应用于大型开源模型。通过分析模型检测注入表示的方式，研究者识别出两种可分离的机制：概率匹配和直接访问内部状态。
AI.result: 研究发现，AI模型通过概率匹配（从提示的异常感知推断）和直接访问内部状态来检测注入的表示。直接访问机制对注入内容的语义信息是内容无关的，模型只能检测到异常但无法准确识别具体内容。模型倾向于“臆想”出高频且具体（如“苹果”）的注入概念，并且正确猜测概念需要更多的token。
AI.conclusion: AI模型（特别是研究中的两类模型）的内容无关的内省机制，即检测到异常但难以识别具体语义，与哲学和心理学中关于内省的主流理论是一致的。这表明AI模型在某些方面可能模拟了人类的内省过程。

title: Balancing Coverage and Draft Latency in Vocabulary Trimming for Faster Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates inference for Large Language Models by using a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens that are verified in parallel by a larger target model. Prior work shows that the draft model often dominates speculative decoding latency, since it generates tokens sequentially and incurs high cost from its language modeling head as vocabulary size grows. This exposes a fundamental trade-off in draft model design: larger vocabularies improve token coverage and agreement with the target model, but incur higher draft latency, while smaller vocabularies reduce latency at the risk of missing tokens required for accurate draft generation. We address this trade-off through vocabulary trimming for draft models, motivated by the observation that domain-specific workloads use only a small fraction of the full vocabulary. We cast draft vocabulary selection as a constrained optimization problem that balances token coverage and draft latency. Coverage is computed over assistant responses in the training data, while latency is estimated using architecture-aware FLOPs that capture the cost of the language modeling head as a function of vocabulary size. We optimize a utility function with a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator to efficiently explore the coverage-latency Pareto frontier under a minimum coverage constraint. Experiments show improved speculative decoding throughput while reducing draft vocabularies by up to 97% with high coverage. On domain-specific tasks, we achieve up to 16% latency reduction and 20% throughput improvement, and up to 6.7% throughput gains on diverse out-of-distribution tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种通过修剪草稿模型词汇表来加速大型语言模型（LLM）的推断的技术，以解决现有投机解码方法中草稿模型主导延迟的问题，并在保持高覆盖率的同时显著提高了吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有投机解码方法中，草稿模型产生的延迟过高，因为它需要顺序生成 token，并且语言模型头的成本会随着词汇量的增大而增加。这暴露了草稿模型设计中的一个基本权衡：大词汇量能提高 token 覆盖率和与目标模型的匹配度，但会增加延迟；小词汇量可以降低延迟，但可能无法生成准确草稿所需的 token。
AI.method: 提出了一种针对草稿模型的词汇表修剪方法，将草稿词汇表选择视为一个约束优化问题，平衡 token 覆盖率和草稿延迟。覆盖率在训练数据的助手响应上计算，延迟则使用架构感知的 FLOPs 进行估计，该 FLOPs 捕获语言模型头成本与词汇量大小的关系。使用 Tree-structured Parzen Estimator 优化了一个效用函数，在最小覆盖率约束下有效探索覆盖率-延迟的帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 通过将草稿词汇量最多减少 97%，并在保持高覆盖率的情况下，实现了更高的投机解码吞吐量。在特定领域任务上，延迟降低了高达 16%，吞吐量提高了 20%。在多样化的分布外任务上，吞吐量提高了高达 6.7%。
AI.conclusion: 词汇表修剪是一种有效的方法，可以解决投机解码中草稿模型延迟过高的问题，通过优化词汇表大小，可以在保持足够 token 覆盖率的同时，显著提高 LLM 的推断速度，尤其在特定领域任务和分布外任务上表现出色。

title: Diffusion LLMs can think EoS-by-EoS
summary: Diffusion LLMs have been proposed as an alternative to autoregressive LLMs, excelling especially at complex reasoning tasks with interdependent sub-goals. Curiously, this is particularly true if the generation length, i.e., the number of tokens the model has to output, is set to a much higher value than is required for providing the correct answer to the task, and the model pads its answer with end-of-sequence (EoS) tokens. We hypothesize that diffusion models think EoS-by-EoS, that is, they use the representations of EoS tokens as a hidden scratchpad, which allows them to solve harder reasoning problems. We experiment with the diffusion models LLaDA1.5, LLaDA2.0-mini, and Dream-v0 on the tasks Addition, Entity Tracking, and Sudoku. In a controlled prompting experiment, we confirm that adding EoS tokens improves the LLMs' reasoning capabilities. To further verify whether they serve as space for hidden computations, we patch the hidden states of the EoS tokens with those of a counterfactual generation, which frequently changes the generated output to the counterfactual. The success of the causal intervention underscores that the EoS tokens, which one may expect to be devoid of meaning, carry information on the problem to solve. The behavioral experiments and the causal interventions indicate that diffusion LLMs can indeed think EoS-by-EoS.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，扩散型语言模型（Diffusion LLMs）在处理具有相互依赖子目标的长序列推理任务时表现更佳，尤其是在生成长度远超实际需求时。作者提出并验证了“EoS-by-EoS”（End-of-Sequence by End-of-Sequence）假设，即模型利用 EoS 标记的隐藏表征作为计算的“草稿纸”，从而提升了推理能力。通过实验和因果干预，证实了 EoS 标记在扩散型语言模型解决复杂推理问题中的重要作用。
AI.motivation: 扩散型语言模型在处理复杂推理任务时，如果生成长度远超实际需求，并填充了 EoS 标记，反而表现更好。研究者想探究这种现象背后的原因，特别是 EoS 标记是否在模型推理过程中扮演了特殊角色。
AI.method: 作者提出了“EoS-by-EoS”的假设，即 EoS 标记的隐藏表征被用作计算的“草稿纸”。通过在 Addition、Entity Tracking 和 Sudoku 等任务上，使用 LLaDA1.5、LLaDA2.0-mini 和 Dream-v0 模型进行受控提示实验，来验证添加 EoS 标记是否能提升模型的推理能力。此外，还进行了因果干预实验，通过修改 EoS 标记的隐藏状态来观察是否会影响生成结果，以进一步验证 EoS 标记是否承载了计算信息。
AI.result: 实验结果证实了“EoS-by-EoS”的假设。在添加 EoS 标记后，扩散型语言模型在推理任务上的表现得到提升。因果干预实验表明，修改 EoS 标记的隐藏状态确实会改变模型的生成输出，证明了 EoS 标记携带着关于问题求解的信息。
AI.conclusion: 扩散型语言模型确实能够“EoS-by-EoS”地思考，即利用 EoS 标记的隐藏表征作为计算的中间过程（草稿纸），这有助于它们解决更复杂的推理任务。EoS 标记并非无意义的填充，而是模型进行推理的关键组成部分。

title: SSR-GS: Separating Specular Reflection in Gaussian Splatting for Glossy Surface Reconstruction
summary:
In recent years, 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) has achieved remarkable progress in novel view synthesis. However, accurately reconstructing glossy surfaces under complex illumination remains challenging, particularly in scenes with strong specular reflections and multi-surface interreflections. To address this issue, we propose SSR-GS, a specular reflection modeling framework for glossy surface reconstruction. Specifically, we introduce a prefiltered Mip-Cubemap to model direct specular reflections efficiently, and propose an IndiASG module to capture indirect specular reflections.
  Furthermore, we design Visual Geometry Priors (VGP) that couple a reflection-aware visual prior via a reflection score (RS) to downweight the photometric loss contribution of reflection-dominated regions, with geometry priors derived from VGGT, including progressively decayed depth supervision and transformed normal constraints. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that SSR-GS achieves state-of-the-art performance in glossy surface reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SSR-GS的框架，用于改善3D高斯泼溅在复杂光照下（尤其是镜面反射和多表面相互反射）重建光泽表面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅技术在重建具有强烈镜面反射和多表面相互反射等复杂光照下的光泽表面时存在挑战。
AI.method: 引入了预过滤的Mip-Cubemap来高效建模直接镜面反射，以及IndiASG模块来捕获间接镜面反射。设计了视觉几何先验（VGP），包括基于镜面得分（RS）的反射感知视觉先验和来自VGGT的几何先验（如深度监督和法线约束）。
AI.result: SSR-GS在合成和真实世界数据集上取得了最先进的光泽表面重建性能。
AI.conclusion: SSR-GS框架有效地解决了3D高斯泼溅在处理复杂光照下的光泽表面重建问题，并在多个评估指标上表现出色。

title: The Spike, the Sparse and the Sink: Anatomy of Massive Activations and Attention Sinks
summary: We study two recurring phenomena in Transformer language models: massive activations, in which a small number of tokens exhibit extreme outliers in a few channels, and attention sinks, in which certain tokens attract disproportionate attention mass regardless of semantic relevance. Prior work observes that these phenomena frequently co-occur and often involve the same tokens, but their functional roles and causal relationship remain unclear. Through systematic experiments, we show that the co-occurrence is largely an architectural artifact of modern Transformer design, and that the two phenomena serve related but distinct functions. Massive activations operate globally: they induce near-constant hidden representations that persist across layers, effectively functioning as implicit parameters of the model. Attention sinks operate locally: they modulate attention outputs across heads and bias individual heads toward short-range dependencies. We identify the pre-norm configuration as the key choice that enables the co-occurrence, and show that ablating it causes the two phenomena to decouple.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了 Transformer 模型中大规模激活和注意力汇聚现象的共现并非完全由语义驱动，而是与模型的预范数（pre-norm）架构密切相关。大规模激活充当全局的隐式参数，而注意力汇聚则局部地调制注意力输出。
AI.motivation: prior work 观察到 Transformer 模型中的大规模激活（massive activations）和注意力汇聚（attention sinks）现象经常同时出现，但其功能作用和因果关系尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过系统性的实验，研究者们探究了这两种现象的共现机制，并验证了预范数（pre-norm）配置在其中扮演的关键角色。他们还通过移除预范数配置来观察两种现象是否会解耦。
AI.result: 研究表明，大规模激活和注意力汇聚的共现很大程度上是现代 Transformer 设计的架构产物。大规模激活主要在全局范围内运作，产生跨层的近乎恒定的隐藏表示，充当模型的隐式参数。注意力汇聚则在局部范围内运作，调制注意力输出，并将某些注意力头偏向于短程依赖。
AI.conclusion: 预范数配置是导致大规模激活和注意力汇聚现象共现的关键架构选择。移除预范数配置可以使这两种现象发生解耦，表明它们虽然功能相关但各自独立。

title: UniPAR: A Unified Framework for Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
