summary: Pedestrian Attribute Recognition is a foundational computer vision task that provides essential support for downstream applications, including person retrieval in video surveillance and intelligent retail analytics. However, existing research is frequently constrained by the ``one-model-per-dataset" paradigm and struggles to handle significant discrepancies across domains in terms of modalities, attribute definitions, and environmental scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose UniPAR, a unified Transformer-based framework for PAR. By incorporating a unified data scheduling strategy and a dynamic classification head, UniPAR enables a single model to simultaneously process diverse datasets from heterogeneous modalities, including RGB images, video sequences, and event streams. We also introduce an innovative phased fusion encoder that explicitly aligns visual features with textual attribute queries through a late deep fusion strategy. Experimental results on the widely used benchmark datasets, including MSP60K, DukeMTMC, and EventPAR, demonstrate that UniPAR achieves performance comparable to specialized SOTA methods. Furthermore, multi-dataset joint training significantly enhances the model's cross-domain generalization and recognition robustness in extreme environments characterized by low light and motion blur. The source code of this paper will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenPAR

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UniPAR的统一Transformer框架，用于行人属性识别（PAR）。该框架通过统一的数据调度策略和动态分类头，能够处理来自不同模态（RGB、视频、事件流）的数据集，并通过分阶段融合编码器实现视觉特征与文本属性查询的对齐。UniPAR在多个数据集上表现优异，并能有效提升模型在跨领域和极端环境下的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有行人属性识别研究受限于“一模型一数据集”的范式，难以处理跨领域（模态、属性定义、环境场景）的巨大差异。
AI.method: 提出UniPAR统一Transformer框架，包含：1. 统一数据调度策略；2. 动态分类头；3. 分阶段融合编码器，通过晚期深度融合策略对齐视觉特征和文本属性查询。
AI.result: UniPAR在MSP60K、DukeMTMC和EventPAR等基准数据集上取得了与专用SOTA方法相当的性能。多数据集联合训练显著提升了模型在跨领域、低光照和运动模糊等极端环境下的泛化能力和识别鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: UniPAR是一个灵活且强大的统一框架，能够有效地处理异构模态的行人属性识别任务，并显著提升模型的跨领域泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: SRasP: Self-Reorientation Adversarial Style Perturbation for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
summary: Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL) aims to transfer knowledge from a seen source domain to unseen target domains, serving as a key benchmark for evaluating the robustness and transferability of models. Existing style-based perturbation methods mitigate domain shift but often suffer from gradient instability and convergence to sharp minima.To address these limitations, we propose a novel crop-global style perturbation network, termed Self-Reorientation Adversarial \underline{S}tyle \underline{P}erturbation (SRasP). Specifically, SRasP leverages global semantic guidance to identify incoherent crops, followed by reorienting and aggregating the style gradients of these crops with the global style gradients within one image. Furthermore, we propose a novel multi-objective optimization function to maximize visual discrepancy while enforcing semantic consistency among global, crop, and adversarial features. Applying the stabilized perturbations during training encourages convergence toward flatter and more transferable solutions, improving generalization to unseen domains. Extensive experiments are conducted on multiple CD-FSL benchmarks, demonstrating consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SRasP的自重定向对抗风格扰动网络，通过全局语义指导识别和重新定向图像中的不一致区域，并结合全局风格梯度进行优化，以提高跨领域小样本学习的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于风格扰动的方法在缓解领域偏移方面存在梯度不稳定和收敛到尖锐最小值的问题，需要更鲁棒的跨领域小样本学习方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种自重定向对抗风格扰动网络（SRasP），它利用全局语义指导识别不一致的图像块，然后对这些图像块的风格梯度进行重定向和聚合，并与全局风格梯度在同一图像内进行融合。同时，提出了一种新的多目标优化函数，以最大化视觉差异并强制全局、图像块和对抗性特征之间的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在多个跨领域小样本学习基准测试中进行了广泛的实验，结果表明SRasP能够稳定训练过程，促进模型收敛到更平坦、更具迁移性的解决方案，并在未见过的数据域上实现一致的性能提升，优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: SRasP通过创新的全局语义指导和多目标优化，有效解决了现有风格扰动方法的局限性，显著提高了跨领域小样本学习任务中的模型泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: VietJobs: A Vietnamese Job Advertisement Dataset
summary: VietJobs is the first large-scale, publicly available corpus of Vietnamese job advertisements, comprising 48,092 postings and over 15 million words collected from all 34 provinces and municipalities across Vietnam. The dataset provides extensive linguistic and structured information, including job titles, categories, salaries, skills, and employment conditions, covering 16 occupational domains and multiple employment types (full-time, part-time, and internship). Designed to support research in natural language processing and labour market analytics, VietJobs captures substantial linguistic, regional, and socio-economic diversity. We benchmark several generative large language models (LLMs) on two core tasks: job category classification and salary estimation. Instruction-tuned models such as Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct and Llama-SEA-LION-v3-8B-IT demonstrate notable gains under few-shot and fine-tuned settings, while highlighting challenges in multilingual and Vietnamese-specific modelling for structured labour market prediction. VietJobs establishes a new benchmark for Vietnamese NLP and offers a valuable foundation for future research on recruitment language, socio-economic representation, and AI-driven labour market analysis. All code and resources are available at: https://github.com/VinNLP/VietJobs.

AI.tldr: VietJobs是一个大规模、公开可用的越南语招聘广告语料库，包含48,092个职位和超过1500万个词汇，旨在支持越南语NLP和劳动力市场分析研究。研究人员使用该语料库对LLM在职位分类和薪资估算任务上的表现进行了基准测试，发现指令微调模型表现出显著优势，但也指出了多语言和越南语特定模型在结构化劳动力市场预测方面面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于创建一个大规模、公开可用的越南语招聘广告语料库，以支持自然语言处理（NLP）和劳动力市场分析的研究，填补现有研究在越南语数据和劳动力市场分析方面的空白。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含48,092个职位和超过1500万个词汇的VietJobs语料库，涵盖了越南34个省市的16个职业领域。然后，使用该语料库对几个生成式大型语言模型（LLMs）进行了基准测试，重点关注职位类别分类和薪资估算两个核心任务，并在少样本（few-shot）和微调（fine-tuned）设置下评估了模型的性能。
AI.result: 指令微调模型（如Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct和Llama-SEA-LION-v3-8B-IT）在职位类别分类和薪资估算任务上表现出显著的性能提升。研究还揭示了在处理多语言和越南语特定数据进行结构化劳动力市场预测时，LLMs面临的挑战。
AI.conclusion: VietJobs语料库为越南语NLP领域设立了新的基准，并为未来在招聘语言、社会经济表征和人工智能驱动的劳动力市场分析方面的研究奠定了宝贵的基础。该语料库及其支持的代码和资源已公开可用。

title: Generic Camera Calibration using Blurry Images
summary: Camera calibration is the foundation of 3D vision. Generic camera calibration can yield more accurate results than parametric cam era calibration. However, calibrating a generic camera model using printed calibration boards requires far more images than parametric calibration, making motion blur practically unavoidable for individual users. As a f irst attempt to address this problem, we draw on geometric constraints and a local parametric illumination model to simultaneously estimate feature locations and spatially varying point spread functions, while re solving the translational ambiguity that need not be considered in con ventional image deblurring tasks. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新的相机标定方法，能够从包含运动模糊的图像中同时估计特征点位置和空间变化的点扩展函数，以提高通用相机模型的标定精度。
AI.motivation: 通用相机模型比参数化相机模型能获得更精确的标定结果，但需要更多图像，容易产生运动模糊，给用户带来不便。现有方法无法处理此问题。
AI.method: 利用几何约束和局部参数化光照模型，同时估计特征点位置和空间变化的点扩展函数（PSF），并解决传统图像去模糊任务中无需考虑的平移模糊问题。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够有效地处理运动模糊图像，并提高通用相机模型的标定精度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地解决了在包含运动模糊的图像中进行通用相机标定的挑战，为用户提供了更便捷、更精确的相机标定方案。

title: Med-V1: Small Language Models for Zero-shot and Scalable Biomedical Evidence Attribution
summary: Assessing whether an article supports an assertion is essential for hallucination detection and claim verification. While large language models (LLMs) have the potential to automate this task, achieving strong performance requires frontier models such as GPT-5 that are prohibitively expensive to deploy at scale. To efficiently perform biomedical evidence attribution, we present Med-V1, a family of small language models with only three billion parameters. Trained on high-quality synthetic data newly developed in this study, Med-V1 substantially outperforms (+27.0% to +71.3%) its base models on five biomedical benchmarks unified into a verification format. Despite its smaller size, Med-V1 performs comparably to frontier LLMs such as GPT-5, along with high-quality explanations for its predictions. We use Med-V1 to conduct a first-of-its-kind use case study that quantifies hallucinations in LLM-generated answers under different citation instructions. Results show that the format instruction strongly affects citation validity and hallucination, with GPT-5 generating more claims but exhibiting hallucination rates similar to GPT-4o. Additionally, we present a second use case showing that Med-V1 can automatically identify high-stakes evidence misattributions in clinical practice guidelines, revealing potentially negative public health impacts that are otherwise challenging to identify at scale. Overall, Med-V1 provides an efficient and accurate lightweight alternative to frontier LLMs for practical and real-world applications in biomedical evidence attribution and verification tasks. Med-V1 is available at https://github.com/ncbi-nlp/Med-V1.

AI.tldr: Med-V1是一个只有30亿参数的小型语言模型系列，在生物医学证据归因方面表现出色，其性能可与GPT-5等大型模型媲美，但成本更低。研究还量化了不同引用指令下LLM生成答案的幻觉情况，并展示了Med-V1在识别临床实践指南中高风险证据错配方面的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLMs）在进行文章支持断言的任务时性能强大，但需要GPT-5等前沿模型，成本高昂。因此，需要一种能够高效、准确地进行生物医学证据归因的轻量级模型。
AI.method: 开发了一个名为Med-V1的小型语言模型系列（30亿参数），并在新开发的高质量合成数据上进行训练。对Med-V1在五个生物医学基准上的表现进行了评估，并将其与前沿LLMs（如GPT-5）进行了比较。此外，还进行了两个用例研究：一是量化不同引用指令下LLM生成答案的幻觉情况，二是展示Med-V1在识别临床实践指南中证据错配的能力。
AI.result: Med-V1在五个生物医学基准上显著优于其基础模型（+27.0% 至 +71.3%），并且其性能与GPT-5等前沿LLMs相当，同时提供高质量的解释。用例研究表明，格式指令对引用有效性和幻觉有显著影响，GPT-5生成更多声明但幻觉率与GPT-4o相似。Med-V1还能自动识别临床实践指南中的高风险证据错配。
AI.conclusion: Med-V1为生物医学证据归因和验证任务提供了一种高效、准确且轻量级的替代方案，可以取代成本高昂的前沿LLMs，并可用于实际应用，包括量化LLM的幻觉和识别临床实践中的潜在公共卫生风险。

title: Oral to Web: Digitizing 'Zero Resource'Languages of Bangladesh
summary: We present the Multilingual Cloud Corpus, the first national-scale, parallel, multimodal linguistic dataset of Bangladesh's ethnic and indigenous languages. Despite being home to approximately 40 minority languages spanning four language families, Bangladesh has lacked a systematic, cross-family digital corpus for these predominantly oral, computationally "zero resource" varieties, 14 of which are classified as endangered. Our corpus comprises 85792 structured textual entries, each containing a Bengali stimulus text, an English translation, and an IPA transcription, together with approximately 107 hours of transcribed audio recordings, covering 42 language varieties from the Tibeto-Burman, Indo-European, Austro-Asiatic, and Dravidian families, plus two genetically unclassified languages. The data were collected through systematic fieldwork over 90 days across nine districts of Bangladesh, involving 16 data collectors, 77 speakers, and 43 validators, following a predefined elicitation template of 2224 unique items organized at three levels of linguistic granularity: isolated lexical items (475 words across 22 semantic domains), grammatical constructions (887 sentences across 21 categories including verbal conjugation paradigms), and directed speech (862 prompts across 46 conversational scenarios). Post-field processing included IPA transcription by 10 linguists with independent adjudication by 6 reviewers. The complete dataset is publicly accessible through the Multilingual Cloud platform (multiling.cloud), providing searchable access to annotated audio and textual data for all documented varieties. We describe the corpus design, fieldwork methodology, dataset structure, and per-language coverage, and discuss implications for endangered language documentation, low-resource NLP, and digital preservation in linguistically diverse developing countries.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了孟加拉国首个国家级、多模态、平行语言数据集——多语言云语料库，包含85792条文本条目和约107小时的音频，涵盖42种孟加拉国少数民族和土著语言，旨在支持濒危语言记录、低资源自然语言处理和数字保存。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉国拥有约40种少数民族语言，但缺乏系统性的、跨语系的数字语料库，尤其是对于这些以口语为主、计算资源匮乏的语言，其中14种已被列为濒危语言。因此，创建这样一个数据集以支持相关研究和保护工作。
AI.method: 通过为期90天的实地考察，在孟加拉国九个地区，利用16名数据收集者、77名发言者和43名验证者，遵循预定义的2224个条目（包括孤立词汇、语法结构和定向对话）的引发模板，收集了结构化的文本条目和转录的音频录音。文本条目包含孟加拉语、英语翻译和IPA转录。音频录音经过10名语言学家转录，并由6名审阅者独立审查。
AI.result: 创建了一个包含85792条文本条目和约107小时转录音频的多语言云语料库，覆盖了42种语言（包括藏缅语族、印欧语系、南亚语系和达罗毗荼语系，以及两种未分类语言）。数据集可以通过多语言云平台公开访问。
AI.conclusion: 多语言云语料库是孟加拉国少数民族和土著语言的首个全国性、平行、多模态数据集，它为濒危语言记录、低资源自然语言处理以及在语言多样性发展中国家的数字保存提供了重要资源，并已通过公共平台发布。

title: Towards Provably Unbiased LLM Judges via Bias-Bounded Evaluation
summary: As AI models progress beyond simple chatbots into more complex workflows, we draw ever closer to the event horizon beyond which AI systems will be utilized in autonomous, self-maintaining feedback loops. Any autonomous AI system will depend on automated, verifiable rewards and feedback; in settings where ground truth is sparse or non-deterministic, one practical source of such rewards is an LLM-as-a-Judge. Although LLM judges continue to improve, the literature has yet to introduce systems capable of enforcing standards with strong guarantees, particularly when bias vectors are unknown or adversarially discovered. To remedy this issue, we propose average bias-boundedness (A-BB), an algorithmic framework which formally guarantees reductions of harm/impact as a result of any measurable bias in an LLM judge. Evaluating on Arena-Hard-Auto with four LLM judges, we achieve (tau=0.5, delta=0.01) bias-bounded guarantees while retaining 61-99% correlation with original rankings across formatting and schematic bias settings, with most judge-bias combinations exceeding 80%. The code to reproduce our findings is available at https://github.com/penfever/bias-bounded-evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为“平均偏差有界”（A-BB）的算法框架，用于在评估过程中限制大型语言模型（LLM）作为裁判时的偏见影响，以期在AI系统自主化过程中提供更可靠的反馈机制。
AI.motivation: 随着AI模型向更复杂的自主反馈循环发展，对自动化、可验证的奖励和反馈机制的需求日益增长，特别是在地面真实数据稀疏或不确定的情况下。现有的LLM裁判尽管在改进，但在面对未知或对抗性偏见时，缺乏强有力的保证来强制执行标准。
AI.method: 研究人员提出了一种名为“平均偏差有界”（A-BB）的算法框架。该框架旨在为LLM裁判引入偏差有界保证，即在任何可测量的偏差存在的情况下，能够形式化地保证对伤害/影响的减少。
AI.result: 在Arena-Hard-Auto数据集上，使用四种不同的LLM裁判进行评估，A-BB框架成功实现了（tau=0.5, delta=0.01）的偏差有界保证。同时，该方法在格式和模式偏差设置下，保留了与原始排名61%-99%的相关性，其中大多数偏差组合的相关性超过了80%。
AI.conclusion: 平均偏差有界（A-BB）框架能够为LLM裁判提供强有力的偏差有界保证，有效减少因模型偏差带来的负面影响，并在保留大部分评估准确性的同时，为AI自主系统的开发提供更可靠的评估手段。

title: PersianPunc: A Large-Scale Dataset and BERT-Based Approach for Persian Punctuation Restoration
summary: Punctuation restoration is essential for improving the readability and downstream utility of automatic speech recognition (ASR) outputs, yet remains underexplored for Persian despite its importance. We introduce PersianPunc, a large-scale, high-quality dataset of 17 million samples for Persian punctuation restoration, constructed through systematic aggregation and filtering of existing textual resources. We formulate punctuation restoration as a token-level sequence labeling task and fine-tune ParsBERT to achieve strong performance. Through comparative evaluation, we demonstrate that while large language models can perform punctuation restoration, they suffer from critical limitations: over-correction tendencies that introduce undesired edits beyond punctuation insertion (particularly problematic for speech-to-text pipelines) and substantially higher computational requirements. Our lightweight BERT-based approach achieves a macro-averaged F1 score of 91.33% on our test set while maintaining efficiency suitable for real-time applications. We make our dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/MohammadJRanjbar/persian-punctuation-restoration) and model (https://huggingface.co/MohammadJRanjbar/parsbert-persian-punctuation) publicly available to facilitate future research in Persian NLP and provide a scalable framework applicable to other morphologically rich, low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个名为PersianPunc的大规模数据集，用于波斯语标点恢复，并提出了一种基于ParsBERT的轻量级模型，在性能和效率上优于大型语言模型，适合实时应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管标点恢复对于提高ASR输出的可读性和可用性至关重要，但波斯语的标点恢复研究却鲜有涉及。
AI.method: 研究者构建了一个包含1700万个样本的波斯语标点恢复数据集PersianPunc。他们将标点恢复视为一个token级别的序列标注任务，并对ParsBERT模型进行了微调。
AI.result: 基于ParsBERT的模型在测试集上取得了91.33%的宏平均F1分数。与大型语言模型相比，该模型在纠正过度编辑和计算效率方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PersianPunc数据集和轻量级BERT模型为波斯语标点恢复提供了一个高效且高性能的解决方案，并且该框架可推广应用于其他形态丰富、资源匮乏的语言。

title: Logi-PAR: Logic-Infused Patient Activity Recognition via Differentiable Rule
summary: Patient Activity Recognition (PAR) in clinical settings uses activity data to improve safety and quality of care. Although significant progress has been made, current models mainly identify which activity is occurring. They often spatially compose sub-sparse visual cues using global and local attention mechanisms, yet only learn logically implicit patterns due to their neural-pipeline. Advancing clinical safety requires methods that can infer why a set of visual cues implies a risk, and how these can be compositionally reasoned through explicit logic beyond mere classification. To address this, we proposed Logi-PAR, the first Logic-Infused Patient Activity Recognition Framework that integrates contextual fact fusion as a multi-view primitive extractor and injects neural-guided differentiable rules. Our method automatically learns rules from visual cues, optimizing them end-to-end while enabling the implicit emergence patterns to be explicitly labelled during training. To the best of our knowledge, Logi-PAR is the first framework to recognize patient activity by applying learnable logic rules to symbolic mappings. It produces auditable why explanations as rule traces and supports counterfactual interventions (e.g., risk would decrease by 65% if assistance were present). Extensive evaluation on clinical benchmarks (VAST and OmniFall) demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming Vision-Language Models and transformer baselines. The code is available via: https://github.com/zararkhan985/Logi-PAR.git}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Logi-PAR 的新框架，用于临床环境中的患者活动识别。该框架通过整合上下文事实融合和神经引导的可微分规则，实现了对活动原因的推理和可审计的解释，并在临床基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有患者活动识别模型主要关注识别活动本身，缺乏对活动原因的推理能力，无法提供明确的逻辑解释，这限制了在提高临床安全方面的应用。研究动机是开发一种能够显式推理活动原因并提供可审计解释的患者活动识别方法。
AI.method: Logi-PAR 框架通过以下方式解决上述问题：1. 引入上下文事实融合作为多视图原始特征提取器；2. 注入神经引导的可微分规则，实现从视觉线索中自动学习和优化逻辑规则；3. 框架能够实现隐式模式的显式化标记；4. 采用可学习的逻辑规则应用于符号映射。
AI.result: Logi-PAR 在 VAST 和 OmniFall 临床基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，显著优于现有的 Vision-Language Models 和 Transformer 基线模型。该框架能够生成可审计的“为什么”解释（通过规则追踪），并支持反事实干预（例如，如果存在辅助，风险将降低 65%）。
AI.conclusion: Logi-PAR 是首个将可学习的逻辑规则应用于符号映射以识别患者活动的框架。它不仅提高了患者活动识别的准确性，还提供了可解释性和可审计性，能够深入理解活动原因并支持干预策略，从而为提高临床安全性提供了新的途径。

title: Exploring the potential and limitations of Model Merging for Multi-Domain Adaptation in ASR
comment: submitted for review for INTERSPEECH2026 conference
summary: Model merging is a scalable alternative to multi-task training that combines the capabilities of multiple specialised models into a single model. This is particularly attractive for large speech foundation models, which are typically adapted through domain-specific fine-tuning, resulting in multiple customised checkpoints, for which repeating full fine-tuning when new data becomes available is computationally prohibitive. In this work, we study model merging for multi-domain ASR and benchmark 11 merging algorithms for 10 European Portuguese domains, evaluating in-domain accuracy, robustness under distribution shift, as well as English and multilingual performance. We further propose BoostedTSV-M, a new merging algorithm based on TSV-M that mitigates rank collapse via singular-value boosting and improves numerical stability. Overall, our approach outperforms full fine-tuning on European Portuguese while preserving out-of-distribution generalisation in a single model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模型合并技术在多领域自动语音识别 (ASR) 中的应用，并提出了一种新的合并算法 BoostedTSV-M。
AI.motivation: 多任务训练成本高昂，特别是对于大型语音基础模型，每次新数据可用时都进行全面微调是不可持续的。模型合并提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，可以将多个专业化模型的性能合并到一个模型中。
AI.method: 作者对 11 种模型合并算法进行了基准测试，应用于 10 个欧洲葡萄牙语领域的 ASR 模型。他们评估了模型的域内准确性、分布外泛化能力以及英语和多语言性能。此外，他们还提出了一种新的合并算法 BoostedTSV-M，该算法通过奇异值提升来缓解秩崩溃并提高数值稳定性。
AI.result: BoostedTSV-M 在欧洲葡萄牙语的性能上优于完全微调，同时在单个模型中保持了分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 模型合并是多领域 ASR 的一种可行且高效的方法，BoostedTSV-M 算法在性能和稳定性方面取得了改进，能够在一个模型中融合多个领域的 ASR 能力，并保持良好的泛化能力。

title: DiSCTT: Consensus-Guided Self-Curriculum for Efficient Test-Time Adaptation in Reasoning
summary: Test-time adaptation offers a promising avenue for improving reasoning performance in large language models without additional supervision, but existing approaches often apply a uniform optimization objective across all inputs, leading to inefficient or unstable adaptation on heterogeneous reasoning problems. We propose DiSCTT, a difficulty-aware, consensus-guided self-curriculum framework that dynamically allocates test-time optimization strategies based on instance-level epistemic uncertainty estimated from agreement among sampled reasoning trajectories. Inputs with high consensus are consolidated via supervised fine-tuning using majority-agreed solutions as pseudo-labels, while low-consensus inputs are optimized via reinforcement learning with a consensus-regularized objective that encourages diversity under relevance constraints. Across a broad suite of mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks, DiSCTT consistently outperforms strong test-time adaptation baselines, achieving higher accuracy with reduced variance and substantially lower computation and wall-clock training times. These results demonstrate that explicitly accounting for instance difficulty and uncertainty enables more stable, efficient, and effective test-time adaptation for reasoning models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DiSCTT的自适应测试时学习框架，它能根据输入问题对大型语言模型推理能力的难度和不确定性进行动态调整，从而提高准确性并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的测试时自适应方法通常对所有输入采用统一的优化目标，这在处理复杂的、异构的推理问题时效率低下且不稳定。
AI.method: DiSCTT是一个难度感知、共识指导的自课程框架。它通过评估采样推理轨迹的一致性来估计实例级别的认知不确定性，并据此动态分配优化策略。对于高共识的输入，采用监督微调；对于低共识的输入，采用强化学习并结合一个鼓励多样性的共识正则化目标。
AI.result: 在多个数学和通用推理基准测试中，DiSCTT的表现优于现有的测试时自适应方法，在提高准确性的同时降低了方差、计算量和训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 显式地考虑实例难度和不确定性可以实现更稳定、高效和有效的推理模型测试时自适应。

title: Semantic Class Distribution Learning for Debiasing Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is critical for computer-aided diagnosis. However, dense pixel-level annotation is time-consuming and expensive, and medical datasets often exhibit severe class imbalance. Such imbalance causes minority structures to be overwhelmed by dominant classes in feature representations, hindering the learning of discriminative features and making reliable segmentation particularly challenging. To address this, we propose the Semantic Class Distribution Learning (SCDL) framework, a plug-and-play module that mitigates supervision and representation biases by learning structured class-conditional feature distributions. SCDL integrates Class Distribution Bidirectional Alignment (CDBA) to align embeddings with learnable class proxies and leverages Semantic Anchor Constraints (SAC) to guide proxies using labeled data. Experiments on the Synapse and AMOS datasets demonstrate that SCDL significantly improves segmentation performance across both overall and class-level metrics, with particularly strong gains on minority classes, achieving state-of-the-art results. Our code is released at https://github.com/Zyh55555/SCDL.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SCDL的即插即用框架，通过学习结构化的类别条件特征分布，解决了医学图像分割中密集标注的挑战和类别不平衡问题，并在多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能，尤其是在少数类分割方面。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要密集像素级标注，耗时且昂贵。同时，医学数据集常存在严重的类别不平衡问题，导致少数类别的特征学习困难，影响分割的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出SCDL框架，一个即插即用的模块，通过学习结构化的类别条件特征分布来减轻监督和表示偏差。SCDL包含两个关键组件：类别分布双向对齐（CDBA），用于将嵌入与可学习的类别代理对齐；以及语义锚点约束（SAC），利用标记数据指导代理的学习。
AI.result: 在Synapse和AMOS数据集上的实验表明，SCDL显著提高了分割性能，包括整体和类别级别的指标。特别是在少数类别上的性能提升尤为显著，达到了最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: SCDL框架能够有效解决医学图像分割中的类别不平衡问题，通过学习结构化的类别分布来提升分割性能，尤其是在分割少数类别方面表现出色，是解决此类问题的有效方法。

title: SPyCer: Semi-Supervised Physics-Guided Contextual Attention for Near-Surface Air Temperature Estimation from Satellite Imagery
summary: Modern Earth observation relies on satellites to capture detailed surface properties. Yet, many phenomena that affect humans and ecosystems unfold in the atmosphere close to the surface. Near-ground sensors provide accurate measurements of certain environmental characteristics, such as near-surface air temperature (NSAT). However, they remain sparse and unevenly distributed, limiting their ability to provide continuous spatial measurements. To bridge this gap, we introduce SPyCer, a semi-supervised physics-guided network that can leverage pixel information and physical modeling to guide the learning process through meaningful physical properties. It is designed for continuous estimation of NSAT by proxy using satellite imagery. SPyCer frames NSAT prediction as a pixel-wise vision problem, where each near-ground sensor is projected onto satellite image coordinates and positioned at the center of a local image patch. The corresponding sensor pixel is supervised using both observed NSAT and physics-based constraints, while surrounding pixels contribute through physics-guided regularization derived from the surface energy balance and advection-diffusion-reaction partial differential equations. To capture the physical influence of neighboring pixels, SPyCer employs a multi-head attention guided by land cover characteristics and modulated with Gaussian distance weighting. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that SPyCer produces spatially coherent and physically consistent NSAT estimates, outperforming existing baselines in terms of accuracy, generalization, and alignment with underlying physical processes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SPyCer的半监督物理引导网络，利用卫星图像和物理模型来估算近地面气温（NSAT），解决了地面传感器稀疏的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有地面传感器稀疏且分布不均，无法提供连续的空间近地面气温（NSAT）测量，而NSAT对人类和生态系统至关重要。
AI.method: SPyCer将NSAT预测视为一个像素级视觉问题。每个地面传感器被投影到卫星图像坐标，并作为局部图像块的中心。传感器像素使用观测NSAT和物理约束进行监督，周围像素通过基于表面能量平衡和对流-扩散-反应偏微分方程的物理引导正则化进行约束。利用受土地覆盖和高斯距离加权引导的多头注意力来捕捉邻近像素的物理影响。
AI.result: SPyCer能够生成空间连贯且物理上一致的NSAT估计，在准确性、泛化能力以及与物理过程的一致性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SPyCer是一种有效的半监督物理引导方法，可以利用卫星图像和物理模型来准确、连续地估算近地面气温（NSAT），解决了传统地面传感器数据稀疏的局限性。

title: Mario: Multimodal Graph Reasoning with Large Language Models
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened new avenues for multimodal reasoning. Yet, most existing methods still rely on pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) to encode image-text pairs in isolation, ignoring the relational structure that real-world multimodal data naturally form. This motivates reasoning on multimodal graphs (MMGs), where each node has textual and visual attributes and edges provide structural cues. Enabling LLM-based reasoning on such heterogeneous multimodal signals while preserving graph topology introduces two key challenges: resolving weak cross-modal consistency and handling heterogeneous modality preference. To address this, we propose Mario, a unified framework that simultaneously resolves the two above challenges and enables effective LLM-based reasoning over MMGs. Mario consists of two innovative stages. Firstly, a graph-conditioned VLM design that jointly refines textual and visual features through fine-grained cross-modal contrastive learning guided by graph topology. Secondly, a modality-adaptive graph instruction tuning mechanism that organizes aligned multimodal features into graph-aware instruction views and employs a learnable router to surface, for each node and its neighborhood, the most informative modality configuration to the LLM. Extensive experiments across diverse MMG benchmarks demonstrate that Mario consistently outperforms state-of-the-art graph models in both supervised and zero-shot scenarios for node classification and link prediction. The code will be made available at https://github.com/sunyuanfu/Mario.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Mario 的新框架，用于在多模态图（MMG）上进行基于大型语言模型（LLM）的推理。Mario 通过图条件视觉语言模型（VLM）和模态自适应图指令调优来解决跨模态一致性和模态偏好问题，并在节点分类和链接预测任务上取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多模态数据时，通常将图像和文本单独编码，忽略了现实世界数据中固有的关系结构。这促使研究者探索在多模态图（MMG）上进行推理，其中节点包含文本和视觉属性，边提供结构信息。然而，在 MMG 上进行 LLM 推理面临着解决弱跨模态一致性和处理异构模态偏好的挑战。
AI.method: Mario 框架包含两个主要阶段：1. 图条件 VLM：通过受图拓扑引导的细粒度跨模态对比学习，联合优化文本和视觉特征。2. 模态自适应图指令调优：将对齐的多模态特征组织成图感知指令视图，并使用可学习的路由器来为 LLM 选择最相关和信息丰富的模态配置。
AI.result: 在多个 MMG 基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Mario 在节点分类和链接预测的监督和零样本场景下，性能始终优于最先进的图模型。
AI.conclusion: Mario 是一个统一的框架，能够有效解决在多模态图上进行 LLM 推理时遇到的跨模态一致性和模态偏好挑战，并在各种下游任务中展现出优越的性能。

title: CATNet: Collaborative Alignment and Transformation Network for Cooperative Perception
summary: Cooperative perception significantly enhances scene understanding by integrating complementary information from diverse agents. However, existing research often overlooks critical challenges inherent in real-world multi-source data integration, specifically high temporal latency and multi-source noise. To address these practical limitations, we propose Collaborative Alignment and Transformation Network (CATNet), an adaptive compensation framework that resolves temporal latency and noise interference in multi-agent systems. Our key innovations can be summarized in three aspects. First, we introduce a Spatio-Temporal Recurrent Synchronization (STSync) that aligns asynchronous feature streams via adjacent-frame differential modeling, establishing a temporal-spatially unified representation space. Second, we design a Dual-Branch Wavelet Enhanced Denoiser (WTDen) that suppresses global noise and reconstructs localized feature distortions within aligned representations. Third, we construct an Adaptive Feature Selector (AdpSel) that dynamically focuses on critical perceptual features for robust fusion. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that CATNet consistently outperforms existing methods under complex traffic conditions, proving its superior robustness and adaptability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CATNet的协作感知框架，用于解决多源数据集成中的时间延迟和噪声问题，通过时空同步、小波增强去噪和自适应特征选择来提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有合作感知研究忽视了真实世界多源数据集成中的时间延迟和多源噪声问题。
AI.method: 提出CATNet框架，包含三个关键创新：1. Spatio-Temporal Recurrent Synchronization (STSync)通过相邻帧差分建模对齐异步特征流。2. Dual-Branch Wavelet Enhanced Denoiser (WTDen)抑制全局噪声并重建局部特征畸变。3. Adaptive Feature Selector (AdpSel)动态聚焦关键感知特征以实现鲁棒融合。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，CATNet在复杂交通条件下持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CATNet是一个适应性补偿框架，能够解决多智能体系统中的时间延迟和噪声干扰，展现出优越的鲁棒性和适应性。

title: A Multilingual Human Annotated Corpus of Original and Easy-to-Read Texts to Support Access to Democratic Participatory Processes
summary: Being able to understand information is a key factor for a self-determined life and society. It is also very important for participating in democratic processes. The study of automatic text simplification is often limited by the availability of high quality material for the training and evaluation on automatic simplifiers. This is true for English, but more so for less resourced languages like Spanish, Catalan and Italian. In order to fill this gap, we present a corpus of original texts for these 3 languages, with high quality simplification produced by human experts in text simplification. It was developed within the iDEM project to assess the impact of Easy-to-Read (E2R) language for democratic participation. The original texts were compiled from domains related to this topic. The corpus includes different text types, selected based on relevance, copyright availability, and ethical standards. All texts were simplified to E2R level. The corpus is particularity valuable because it includes the first annotated corpus of its kind for the Catalan language. It also represents a noteworthy contribution for Spanish and Italian, offering high-quality, human-annotated language resources that are rarely available in these domains. The corpus will be made freely accessible to the public.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了一个包含西班牙语、加泰罗尼亚语和意大利语的文本简化语料库，其中简化文本由人类专家标注，旨在支持低资源语言的自动文本简化研究，并评估易读语言对民主参与的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有自动文本简化研究受高质量训练和评估材料的限制，尤其是在英语以外的低资源语言（如西班牙语、加泰罗尼亚语和意大利语）中。本研究旨在填补这一空白，并评估易读语言在促进民主参与方面的作用。
AI.method: 收集了与民主参与主题相关的原创文本，并由文本简化专家将其简化至易读（E2R）级别。语料库包含不同类型的文本，并遵循相关性、版权可用性和伦理标准进行选择。该语料库是加泰罗尼亚语首个此类标注语料库，对西班牙语和意大利语也是一项重要贡献。
AI.result: 构建了一个包含西班牙语、加泰罗尼亚语和意大利语的、由人类专家制作的高质量文本简化语料库。该语料库为低资源语言的自动文本简化研究提供了宝贵的资源。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的文本简化语料库为西班牙语、加泰罗尼亚语和意大利语的自动文本简化研究提供了急需的高质量资源，特别是为加泰罗尼亚语填补了空白。该语料库将免费开放，有望促进相关领域的研究和易读语言在民主参与中的应用。

title: MobileFetalCLIP: Selective Repulsive Knowledge Distillation for Mobile Fetal Ultrasound Analysis
summary: Fetal ultrasound AI could transform prenatal care in low-resource settings, yet current foundation models exceed 300M visual parameters, precluding deployment on point-of-care devices. Standard knowledge distillation fails under such extreme capacity gaps (~26x), as compact students waste capacity mimicking architectural artifacts of oversized teachers. We introduce Selective Repulsive Knowledge Distillation, which decomposes contrastive KD into diagonal and off-diagonal components: matched pair alignment is preserved while the off-diagonal weight decays into negative values, repelling the student from the teacher's inter-class confusions and forcing discovery of architecturally native features. Our 11.4M parameter student surpasses the 304M-parameter FetalCLIP teacher on zero-shot HC18 biometry validity (88.6% vs. 83.5%) and brain sub-plane F1 (0.784 vs. 0.702), while running at 1.6 ms on iPhone 16 Pro, enabling real-time assistive AI on handheld ultrasound devices. Our code, models, and app are publicly available at https://github.com/numanai/MobileFetalCLIP.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为“选择性排斥知识蒸馏”（Selective Repulsive Knowledge Distillation）的新方法，用于训练小型（11.4M参数）AI模型，使其在胎儿超声应用中性能优于大型（304M参数）模型，并且可以在手机等便携式设备上实现实时运行。
AI.motivation: 现有胎儿超声AI模型参数量过大，无法部署在资源受限的低成本环境中（如发展中国家的基层医疗点）。传统的知识蒸馏方法在这种巨大的模型容量差距下效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出“选择性排斥知识蒸馏”，将对比学习蒸馏分解为对角线和非对角线分量。对角线分量保持匹配对齐，而非对角线分量则衰减为负值，迫使学生模型远离教师模型的类别混淆，并学习其自身架构的原生特征。
AI.result: 在零样本超声生物特征（HC18 biometry validity）和脑部子平面分割（brain sub-plane F1）任务上，11.4M参数的学生模型性能优于304M参数的FetalCLIP教师模型（分别为88.6% vs. 83.5% 和 0.784 vs. 0.702）。该小型模型能在iPhone 16 Pro上实现1.6毫秒的实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的选择性排斥知识蒸馏方法能够有效地训练出参数量小但性能强大的胎儿超声AI模型，使其能够在便携式设备上实现实时辅助诊断，从而有望改善低资源地区产前护理的质量。

title: Progressive Residual Warmup for Language Model Pretraining
summary: Transformer architectures serve as the backbone for most modern Large Language Models, therefore their pretraining stability and convergence speed are of central concern. Motivated by the logical dependency of sequentially stacked layers, we propose Progressive Residual Warmup (ProRes) for language model pretraining. ProRes implements an "early layer learns first" philosophy by multiplying each layer's residual with a scalar that gradually warms up from 0 to 1, with deeper layers taking longer warmup steps. In this way, deeper layers wait for early layers to settle into a more stable regime before contributing to learning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of ProRes through pretraining experiments across various model scales, as well as normalization and initialization schemes. Comprehensive analysis shows that ProRes not only stabilizes pretraining but also introduces a unique optimization trajectory, leading to faster convergence, stronger generalization and better downstream performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/dandingsky/ProRes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ProRes（Progressive Residual Warmup）的预训练稳定技术，通过逐步增加深层残差连接的权重，加速并稳定了大型语言模型的预训练过程。
AI.motivation: Transformer架构是大型语言模型的基础，其预训练的稳定性和收敛速度至关重要。现有的方法在处理层间依赖性方面存在不足。
AI.method: ProRes通过逐层引入一个从0逐渐增加到1的残差连接权重（warmup），并让深层层数的warmup时间更长。这种“先学层先稳定”的策略，确保了深层在早期层稳定后再开始学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，ProRes在不同模型规模、归一化和初始化方案下都有效。它不仅稳定了预训练，还带来了独特的优化轨迹，实现了更快的收敛速度、更强的泛化能力和更好的下游任务表现。
AI.conclusion: ProRes是一种有效的技术，可以提高大型语言模型预训练的稳定性、收敛速度和最终性能。

title: Wiki-R1: Incentivizing Multimodal Reasoning for Knowledge-based VQA via Data and Sampling Curriculum
comment: Accepted by ICLR 26, code and weights are publicly available
summary: Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) requires models to answer questions about an image by integrating external knowledge, posing significant challenges due to noisy retrieval and the structured, encyclopedic nature of the knowledge base. These characteristics create a distributional gap from pretrained multimodal large language models (MLLMs), making effective reasoning and domain adaptation difficult in the post-training stage. In this work, we propose \textit{Wiki-R1}, a data-generation-based curriculum reinforcement learning framework that systematically incentivizes reasoning in MLLMs for KB-VQA. Wiki-R1 constructs a sequence of training distributions aligned with the model's evolving capability, bridging the gap from pretraining to the KB-VQA target distribution. We introduce \textit{controllable curriculum data generation}, which manipulates the retriever to produce samples at desired difficulty levels, and a \textit{curriculum sampling strategy} that selects informative samples likely to yield non-zero advantages during RL updates. Sample difficulty is estimated using observed rewards and propagated to unobserved samples to guide learning. Experiments on two KB-VQA benchmarks, Encyclopedic VQA and InfoSeek, demonstrate that Wiki-R1 achieves new state-of-the-art results, improving accuracy from 35.5\% to 37.1\% on Encyclopedic VQA and from 40.1\% to 44.1\% on InfoSeek. The project page is available at https://artanic30.github.io/project_pages/WikiR1/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Wiki-R1 的新框架，它利用基于数据的课程强化学习来提高多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在知识库视觉问答（KB-VQA）任务上的推理能力，通过可控的数据生成和课程采样策略，有效缩小了模型预训练与 KB-VQA 目标分布之间的差距，并在两个基准测试上取得了 SOTA 结果。
AI.motivation: 现有的 KB-VQA 模型在处理知识库的噪声和结构化特性时面临挑战，这导致了预训练的 MLLM 与 KB-VQA 任务之间存在分布差异，难以进行有效的领域适应和推理。因此，需要一种方法来弥合这种差距并增强 MLLM 的推理能力。
AI.method: 作者提出了 Wiki-R1 框架，一个基于数据生成和课程强化学习的方法。该框架包括：1) 可控的课程数据生成，通过操纵检索器来产生不同难度级别的样本；2) 课程采样策略，选择在强化学习更新中可能带来非零优势的信息样本；3) 基于观察到的奖励来估计样本难度，并将其传播给未观察到的样本以指导学习。
AI.result: 在 Encyclopedic VQA 和 InfoSeek 两个 KB-VQA 基准测试上，Wiki-R1 均取得了新的 SOTA 结果，将 Encyclopedic VQA 的准确率从 35.5% 提高到 37.1%，将 InfoSeek 的准确率从 40.1% 提高到 44.1%。
AI.conclusion: Wiki-R1 框架通过系统地激励 MLLM 进行 KB-VQA 推理，有效解决了预训练 MLLM 在 KB-VQA 任务上的挑战，通过课程学习策略缩小了分布差距，并显著提升了模型性能。

title: SAIL: Similarity-Aware Guidance and Inter-Caption Augmentation-based Learning for Weakly-Supervised Dense Video Captioning
summary: Weakly-Supervised Dense Video Captioning aims to localize and describe events in videos trained only on caption annotations, without temporal boundaries. Prior work introduced an implicit supervision paradigm based on Gaussian masking and complementary captioning. However, existing method focuses merely on generating non-overlapping masks without considering their semantic relationship to corresponding events, resulting in simplistic, uniformly distributed masks that fail to capture semantically meaningful regions. Moreover, relying solely on ground-truth captions leads to sub-optimal performance due to the inherent sparsity of existing datasets. In this work, we propose SAIL, which constructs semantically-aware masks through cross-modal alignment. Our similarity aware training objective guides masks to emphasize video regions with high similarity to their corresponding event captions. Furthermore, to guide more accurate mask generation under sparse annotation settings, we introduce an LLM-based augmentation strategy that generates synthetic captions to provide additional alignment signals. These synthetic captions are incorporated through an inter-mask mechanism, providing auxiliary guidance for precise temporal localization without degrading the main objective. Experiments on ActivityNet Captions and YouCook2 demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both captioning and localization metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAIL的方法，通过跨模态对齐构建语义感知掩码，以解决弱监督密集视频字幕生成中的掩码生成不准确和标注稀疏问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的掩码缺乏语义相关性且分布单一，无法捕捉事件的关键区域。同时，仅依赖稀疏的真实字幕会导致性能欠佳。
AI.method: SAIL方法通过跨模态对齐构建语义感知掩码。引入了相似度感知训练目标，使掩码更侧重于与事件字幕高度相似的视频区域。此外，利用基于LLM的增强策略生成合成字幕，提供额外的对齐信号，以应对标注稀疏的问题，并通过掩码间机制进行整合。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Captions和YouCook2数据集上，SAIL在字幕生成和时序定位指标上均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SAIL通过引入语义感知掩码和LLM增强的字幕生成策略，有效地提升了弱监督密集视频字幕生成的效果，尤其是在标注稀疏的情况下。

title: An Exploration-Analysis-Disambiguation Reasoning Framework for Word Sense Disambiguation with Low-Parameter LLMs
summary: Word Sense Disambiguation (WSD) remains a key challenge in Natural Language Processing (NLP), especially when dealing with rare or domain-specific senses that are often misinterpreted. While modern high-parameter Large Language Models (LLMs) such as GPT-4-Turbo have shown state-of-the-art WSD performance, their computational and energy demands limit scalability. This study investigates whether low-parameter LLMs (<4B parameters) can achieve comparable results through fine-tuning strategies that emphasize reasoning-driven sense identification. Using the FEWS dataset augmented with semi-automated, rationale-rich annotations, we fine-tune eight small-scale open-source LLMs (e.g. Gemma and Qwen). Our results reveal that Chain-of-Thought (CoT)-based reasoning combined with neighbour-word analysis achieves performance comparable to GPT-4-Turbo in zero-shot settings. Importantly, Gemma-3-4B and Qwen-3-4B models consistently outperform all medium-parameter baselines and state-of-the-art models on FEWS, with robust generalization to unseen senses. Furthermore, evaluation on the unseen "Fool Me If You Can'' dataset confirms strong cross-domain adaptability without task-specific fine-tuning. This work demonstrates that with carefully crafted reasoning-centric fine-tuning, low-parameter LLMs can deliver accurate WSD while substantially reducing computational and energy demands.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，通过链式思维（CoT）推理和邻近词分析的精细化微调策略，低参数语言模型（<4B参数）在词义消歧（WSD）任务上可以达到与GPT-4-Turbo相当的性能，同时显著降低计算和能源成本。
AI.motivation: 现代大型语言模型（LLMs）在词义消歧（WSD）方面表现出色，但其巨大的计算和能源消耗限制了可扩展性。研究旨在探索低参数LLMs是否能通过有效的微调策略实现可比的WSD性能。
AI.method: 使用FEWS数据集，结合半自动生成的、包含丰富推理过程的标注，对八个小型开源LLMs（如Gemma和Qwen）进行微调。重点研究了基于链式思维（CoT）的推理和邻近词分析的策略。
AI.result: 链式思维（CoT）推理结合邻近词分析，在零样本设置下，小型LLMs的性能可与GPT-4-Turbo媲美。Gemma-3-4B和Qwen-3-4B模型在FEWS数据集上持续优于所有中等参数基线模型和现有最先进模型，并对未见过（unseen）的词义具有鲁棒的泛化能力。在“Fool Me If You Can”数据集上的评估也证实了模型在跨领域适应性上的强大能力，无需进行任务特定的微调。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的、以推理为中心的微调，低参数LLMs能够实现准确的词义消歧，并大幅减少计算和能源消耗，证明了其在WSD任务上的可行性和效率。

title: RelaxFlow: Text-Driven Amodal 3D Generation
summary: Image-to-3D generation faces inherent semantic ambiguity under occlusion, where partial observation alone is often insufficient to determine object category. In this work, we formalize text-driven amodal 3D generation, where text prompts steer the completion of unseen regions while strictly preserving input observation. Crucially, we identify that these objectives demand distinct control granularities: rigid control for the observation versus relaxed structural control for the prompt. To this end, we propose RelaxFlow, a training-free dual-branch framework that decouples control granularity via a Multi-Prior Consensus Module and a Relaxation Mechanism. Theoretically, we prove that our relaxation is equivalent to applying a low-pass filter on the generative vector field, which suppresses high-frequency instance details to isolate geometric structure that accommodates the observation. To facilitate evaluation, we introduce two diagnostic benchmarks, ExtremeOcc-3D and AmbiSem-3D. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RelaxFlow successfully steers the generation of unseen regions to match the prompt intent without compromising visual fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RelaxFlow的文本驱动的非模态3D生成框架，用于解决图像到3D生成中的遮挡问题。该框架通过解耦控制粒度来严格保留观测数据，并引导文本提示补全未知区域。同时，引入了两个新的评估基准ExtremeOcc-3D和AmbiSem-3D。
AI.motivation: 图像到3D生成在遮挡情况下存在固有的语义歧义，因为部分观测不足以确定物体类别。研究动机是开发一种能够利用文本提示来补全未知区域，同时严格保留可见部分的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为RelaxFlow的训练无关的双分支框架。该框架通过多先验共识模块（Multi-Prior Consensus Module）和松弛机制（Relaxation Mechanism）来解耦控制粒度，实现对观测数据的刚性控制和对文本提示的结构性松弛控制。理论上证明了这种松弛等同于在生成向量场上应用低通滤波器。
AI.result: RelaxFlow成功地引导了未知区域的生成，使其符合文本提示的意图，并且没有损害视觉保真度。在新的诊断基准ExtremeOcc-3D和AmbiSem-3D上的广泛实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RelaxFlow是一种有效的文本驱动的非模态3D生成方法，能够解决遮挡问题，并在生成过程中保持观测数据的完整性，同时准确遵循文本提示的意图。提出的两个基准也为评估此类方法提供了新的工具。

title: Ensembling Language Models with Sequential Monte Carlo
summary: Practitioners have access to an abundance of language models and prompting strategies for solving many language modeling tasks; yet prior work shows that modeling performance is highly sensitive to both choices. Classical machine learning ensembling techniques offer a principled approach: aggregate predictions from multiple sources to achieve better performance than any single one. However, applying ensembling to language models during decoding is challenging: naively aggregating next-token probabilities yields samples from a locally normalized, biased approximation of the generally intractable ensemble distribution over strings. In this work, we introduce a unified framework for composing $K$ language models into $f$-ensemble distributions for a wide range of functions $f\colon\mathbb{R}_{\geq 0}^{K}\to\mathbb{R}_{\geq 0}$. To sample from these distributions, we propose a byte-level sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) algorithm that operates in a shared character space, enabling ensembles of models with mismatching vocabularies and consistent sampling in the limit. We evaluate a family of $f$-ensembles across prompt and model combinations for various structured text generation tasks, highlighting the benefits of alternative aggregation strategies over traditional probability averaging, and showing that better posterior approximations can yield better ensemble performance.

AI.tldr: 解析错误
AI.motivation: 解析错误
AI.method: 解析错误
AI.result: 解析错误
AI.conclusion: 解析错误

title: Layer by layer, module by module: Choose both for optimal OOD probing of ViT
summary: Recent studies have observed that intermediate layers of foundation models often yield more discriminative representations than the final layer. While initially attributed to autoregressive pretraining, this phenomenon has also been identified in models trained via supervised and discriminative self-supervised objectives. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive study to analyze the behavior of intermediate layers in pretrained vision transformers. Through extensive linear probing experiments across a diverse set of image classification benchmarks, we find that distribution shift between pretraining and downstream data is the primary cause of performance degradation in deeper layers. Furthermore, we perform a fine-grained analysis at the module level. Our findings reveal that standard probing of transformer block outputs is suboptimal; instead, probing the activation within the feedforward network yields the best performance under significant distribution shift, whereas the normalized output of the multi-head self-attention module is optimal when the shift is weak.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现，预训练视觉Transformer模型中层表示的性能下降主要是由于预训练和下游任务数据之间的分布偏移。在不同分布偏移程度下，前馈网络（FFN）内部的激活或多头自注意力（MHSA）的归一化输出是最佳的探测点。
AI.motivation: 观察到基础模型中间层比最终层产生更具区分度的表示，并且这种现象在不同训练目标下均存在，因此研究的动机是深入分析预训练视觉Transformer模型中间层的行为，并找出性能下降的原因和优化探测策略。
AI.method: 研究者进行了广泛的线性探测实验，跨多个图像分类基准，并对Transformer模块进行了细粒度的分析，包括探测Transformer块输出以及MHSA和FFN模块的内部激活。
AI.result: 研究发现，预训练和下游数据之间的分布偏移是导致更深层模型性能下降的主要原因。在分布偏移显著时，探测FFN内部的激活能获得最佳性能；而在分布偏移较弱时，探测MHSA的归一化输出则表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 分布偏移是预训练视觉Transformer模型中间层性能下降的关键因素。针对不同程度的分布偏移，选择FFN内部激活或MHSA的归一化输出作为探测点，可以更有效地利用中间层表示。

title: Fusion4CA: Boosting 3D Object Detection via Comprehensive Image Exploitation
summary: Nowadays, an increasing number of works fuse LiDAR and RGB data in the bird's-eye view (BEV) space for 3D object detection in autonomous driving systems. However, existing methods suffer from over-reliance on the LiDAR branch, with insufficient exploration of RGB information. To tackle this issue, we propose Fusion4CA, which is built upon the classic BEVFusion framework and dedicated to fully exploiting visual input with plug-and-play components. Specifically, a contrastive alignment module is designed to calibrate image features with 3D geometry, and a camera auxiliary branch is introduced to mine RGB information sufficiently during training. For further performance enhancement, we leverage an off-the-shelf cognitive adapter to make the most of pretrained image weights, and integrate a standard coordinate attention module into the fusion stage as a supplementary boost. Experiments on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our method achieves 69.7% mAP with only 6 training epochs and a mere 3.48% increase in inference parameters, yielding a 1.2% improvement over the baseline which is fully trained for 20 epochs. Extensive experiments in a simulated lunar environment further validate the effectiveness and generalization of our method. Our code will be released through Fusion4CA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Fusion4CA的即插即用模块，用于增强基于BEV的LiDAR-RGB融合3D目标检测方法，特别侧重于更有效地利用RGB信息，并在nuScenes数据集上取得了显著的性能提升，同时减少了训练时间和参数增加。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于BEV的LiDAR-RGB融合方法过度依赖LiDAR分支，对RGB信息的利用不足。
AI.method: 提出Fusion4CA，其核心是一个对比学习对齐模块，用于校准图像特征和3D几何信息；引入一个相机辅助分支，用于在训练期间充分挖掘RGB信息；利用一个即用的认知适配器来最大化利用预训练的图像权重；并在融合阶段集成了一个标准的坐标注意力模块。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，Fusion4CA在仅6个训练epoch的情况下取得了69.7%的mAP，参数量仅增加了3.48%，性能比完全训练20个epoch的基线提升了1.2%。在模拟月球环境中也验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Fusion4CA通过引入对比学习对齐、相机辅助分支和认知适配器等即插即用组件，能够有效地增强LiDAR-RGB融合3D目标检测中RGB信息的利用，从而在更短的训练时间内获得更好的性能。

title: DEBISS: a Corpus of Individual, Semi-structured and Spoken Debates
summary: The process of debating is essential in our daily lives, whether in studying, work activities, simple everyday discussions, political debates on TV, or online discussions on social networks. The range of uses for debates is broad. Due to the diverse applications, structures, and formats of debates, developing corpora that account for these variations can be challenging, and the scarcity of debate corpora in the state of the art is notable. For this reason, the current research proposes the DEBISS corpus: a collection of spoken and individual debates with semi-structured features. With a broad range of NLP task annotations, such as speech-to-text, speaker diarization, argument mining, and debater quality assessment.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了DEBISS语料库，一个包含口语和个体辩论的半结构化数据集，并带有多种自然语言处理任务的标注，以解决当前辩论语料库稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 辩论在日常生活中的广泛应用，但目前缺乏能够涵盖其多样化应用、结构和格式的辩论语料库。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含口语和个体辩论的半结构化语料库（DEBISS），并对其进行了多种自然语言处理任务的标注，包括语音转文本、说话人日志、论点挖掘和辩手质量评估。
AI.result: 创建了一个具有丰富NLP任务标注的辩论语料库。
AI.conclusion: DEBISS语料库的建立将有助于推动自然语言处理在辩论分析和理解领域的研究和应用。

title: FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling
summary: Attention, as a core layer of the ubiquitous Transformer architecture, is the bottleneck for large language models and long-context applications. While FlashAttention-3 optimized attention for Hopper GPUs through asynchronous execution and warp specialization, it primarily targets the H100 architecture. The AI industry has rapidly transitioned to deploying Blackwell-based systems such as the B200 and GB200, which exhibit fundamentally different performance characteristics due to asymmetric hardware scaling: tensor core throughput doubles while other functional units (shared memory bandwidth, exponential units) scale more slowly or remain unchanged. We develop several techniques to address these shifting bottlenecks on Blackwell GPUs: (1) redesigned pipelines that exploit fully asynchronous MMA operations and larger tile sizes, (2) software-emulated exponential and conditional softmax rescaling that reduces non-matmul operations, and (3) leveraging tensor memory and the 2-CTA MMA mode to reduce shared memory traffic and atomic adds in the backward pass. We demonstrate that our method, FlashAttention-4, achieves up to 1.3$\times$ speedup over cuDNN 9.13 and 2.7$\times$ over Triton on B200 GPUs with BF16, reaching up to 1613 TFLOPs/s (71% utilization). Beyond algorithmic innovations, we implement FlashAttention-4 entirely in CuTe-DSL embedded in Python, achieving 20-30$\times$ faster compile times compared to traditional C++ template-based approaches while maintaining full expressivity.

AI.tldr: FlashAttention-4 是一种新的注意力算法，针对 Blackwell GPU（如 B200）进行了优化，通过改进流水线、软件模拟指数和 softmax 重缩放以及利用张量内存等技术，实现了比 cuDNN 和 Triton 更快的性能，同时编译速度也得到了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有 FlashAttention-3 主要针对 Hopper GPU，但 AI 行业已转向 Blackwell GPU。Blackwell GPU 的不对称硬件扩展（张量核吞吐量加倍，而其他单元扩展较慢）导致了新的性能瓶颈，需要新的优化方法。
AI.method: 开发了几种技术来解决 Blackwell GPU 上的性能瓶颈：(1) 重新设计的流水线，利用全异步 MMA 操作和更大的瓦片大小；(2) 软件模拟的指数和 softmax 重缩放，以减少非矩阵乘法操作；(3) 利用张量内存和 2-CTA MMA 模式，以减少共享内存流量和后向传播中的原子加法。此外，FlashAttention-4 完全使用 CuTe-DSL 嵌入 Python 实现，以提高编译速度。
AI.result: 在 B200 GPU 上使用 BF16 时，FlashAttention-4 相较于 cuDNN 9.13 和 Triton 分别实现了最高 1.3 倍和 2.7 倍的加速，达到 1613 TFLOPs/s（71% 的利用率）。使用 CuTe-DSL 实现了 20-30 倍更快的编译时间。
AI.conclusion: FlashAttention-4 成功地优化了注意力机制在 Blackwell GPU 上的性能，解决了其特有的硬件瓶颈，并在性能和编译效率上取得了显著进展，为大型语言模型和长上下文应用提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: RealWonder: Real-Time Physical Action-Conditioned Video Generation
comment: The first two authors contributed equally. The last two authors advised equally. Project website: https://liuwei283.github.io/RealWonder/
summary: Current video generation models cannot simulate physical consequences of 3D actions like forces and robotic manipulations, as they lack structural understanding of how actions affect 3D scenes. We present RealWonder, the first real-time system for action-conditioned video generation from a single image. Our key insight is using physics simulation as an intermediate bridge: instead of directly encoding continuous actions, we translate them through physics simulation into visual representations (optical flow and RGB) that video models can process. RealWonder integrates three components: 3D reconstruction from single images, physics simulation, and a distilled video generator requiring only 4 diffusion steps. Our system achieves 13.2 FPS at 480x832 resolution, enabling interactive exploration of forces, robot actions, and camera controls on rigid objects, deformable bodies, fluids, and granular materials. We envision RealWonder opens new opportunities to apply video models in immersive experiences, AR/VR, and robot learning. Our code and model weights are publicly available in our project website: https://liuwei283.github.io/RealWonder/

AI.tldr: RealWonder是一个实时、动作驱动的视频生成系统，它利用物理模拟作为桥梁，将动作转化为视觉信息，从而在单张图像的基础上生成视频，并支持与刚性物体、可变形物体、流体和颗粒物进行交互。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频生成模型缺乏对3D场景中动作如何产生物理后果（如力、机械臂操作）的结构性理解，无法生成逼真的物理模拟效果。
AI.method: RealWonder将动作直接映射到视频生成，而是先通过物理模拟将其转化为视频模型可以理解的视觉表示（光流和RGB）。该系统包含三个主要部分：单图像3D重建、物理模拟和一个经过蒸馏、仅需4步扩散的视频生成器。
AI.result: RealWonder在480x832分辨率下实现了13.2 FPS的实时性能，能够对刚性物体、可变形体、流体和颗粒物上的力、机械臂动作和相机控制进行交互式探索。
AI.conclusion: RealWonder是首个实现动作驱动的、基于单图像的实时视频生成系统，它通过物理模拟解决了现有模型的局限性，并在多个物理场景中展示了交互式视频生成的潜力，为沉浸式体验、AR/VR和机器人学习等领域开辟了新的可能性。

title: Frequency-Aware Error-Bounded Caching for Accelerating Diffusion Transformers
summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have emerged as the dominant architecture for high-quality image and video generation, yet their iterative denoising process incurs substantial computational cost during inference. Existing caching methods accelerate DiTs by reusing intermediate computations across timesteps, but they share a common limitation: treating the denoising process as uniform across time,depth, and feature dimensions. In this work, we identify three orthogonal axes of non-uniformity in DiT denoising: (1) temporal -- sensitivity to caching errors varies dramatically across the denoising trajectory; (2) depth -- consecutive caching decisions lead to cascading approximation errors; and (3) feature -- different components of the hidden state exhibit heterogeneous temporal dynamics. Based on these observations, we propose SpectralCache, a unified caching framework comprising Timestep-Aware Dynamic Scheduling (TADS), Cumulative Error Budgets (CEB), and Frequency-Decomposed Caching (FDC). On FLUX.1-schnell at 512x512 resolution, SpectralCache achieves 2.46x speedup with LPIPS 0.217 and SSIM 0.727, outperforming TeaCache (2.12x, LPIPS 0.215, SSIM 0.734) by 16% in speed while maintaining comparable quality (LPIPS difference < 1%). Our approach is training-free, plug-and-play, and compatible with existing DiT architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SpectralCache 的新颖缓存框架，用于加速扩散 Transformer (DiT) 的推理过程，通过识别并利用去噪过程中的非均匀性，实现了比现有方法更快的速度和相当的图像质量。
AI.motivation: 当前的 DiT 模型在生成高质量图像和视频时计算成本高昂，尽管现有缓存方法有所加速，但它们未能充分利用去噪过程在时间、深度和特征维度上的非均匀性。
AI.method: SpectralCache 框架包含三个核心组件：1. 时间步感知动态调度 (TADS)，根据去噪轨迹对缓存错误的敏感度变化进行调度；2. 累积误差预算 (CEB)，管理连续缓存决策导致的误差累积；3. 频域分解缓存 (FDC)，处理隐藏状态中不同特征的异质性时间动力学。
AI.result: 在 FLUX.1-schnell 数据集（512x512 分辨率）上，SpectralCache 实现了 2.46 倍的速度提升，LPIPS 为 0.217，SSIM 为 0.727。与 TeaCache（2.12 倍速度，LPIPS 0.215，SSIM 0.734）相比，SpectralCache 在速度上提升了 16%，同时保持了相当的图像质量。
AI.conclusion: SpectralCache 是一种无需训练、即插即用且兼容现有 DiT 架构的缓存框架，它通过识别并利用 DiT 去噪过程中的非均匀性，有效地加速了推理，并为未来的 DiT 加速研究提供了一个新的方向。

title: ORMOT: A Dataset and Framework for Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is a fundamental task in computer vision, aiming to track targets across video frames. Existing MOT methods perform well in general visual scenes, but face significant challenges and limitations when extended to visual-language settings. To bridge this gap, the task of Referring Multi-Object Tracking (RMOT) has recently been proposed, which aims to track objects that correspond to language descriptions. However, current RMOT methods are primarily developed on datasets captured by conventional cameras, which suffer from limited field of view. This constraint often causes targets to move out of the frame, leading to fragmented tracking and loss of contextual information. In this work, we propose a novel task, called Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking (ORMOT), which extends RMOT to omnidirectional imagery, aiming to overcome the field-of-view (FoV) limitation of conventional datasets and improve the model's ability to understand long-horizon language descriptions. To advance the ORMOT task, we construct ORSet, an Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking dataset, which contains 27 diverse omnidirectional scenes, 848 language descriptions, and 3,401 annotated objects, providing rich visual, temporal, and language information. Furthermore, we propose ORTrack, a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM)-driven framework tailored for Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking. Extensive experiments on the ORSet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our ORTrack framework. The dataset and code will be open-sourced at https://github.com/chen-si-jia/ORMOT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了全景图像下的指代式多目标跟踪（ORMOT）新任务，并构建了ORSet数据集和ORMOT框架ORTrack，以解决传统RMOT因视野限制导致跟踪不完整的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有指代式多目标跟踪（RMOT）方法主要基于传统摄像机图像，存在视野有限的问题，导致跟踪中断和上下文信息丢失。作者旨在通过全景图像扩展RMOT，克服视野限制，提升模型理解长时序语言描述的能力。
AI.method: 提出全景指代式多目标跟踪（ORMOT）任务，构建了ORSet数据集（包含全景场景、语言描述和标注对象），并提出了一个基于大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）的ORMOT框架ORTrack。
AI.result: 在ORSet数据集上进行了广泛的实验，证明了ORTrack框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ORMOT任务和ORTrack框架能够有效解决全景图像下的指代式多目标跟踪问题，克服了传统RMOT在视野限制方面的不足。

title: NCTB-QA: A Large-Scale Bangla Educational Question Answering Dataset and Benchmarking Performance
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables. Dataset contains 87,805 Bangla QA pairs from NCTB textbooks
summary: Reading comprehension systems for low-resource languages face significant challenges in handling unanswerable questions. These systems tend to produce unreliable responses when correct answers are absent from context. To solve this problem, we introduce NCTB-QA, a large-scale Bangla question answering dataset comprising 87,805 question-answer pairs extracted from 50 textbooks published by Bangladesh's National Curriculum and Textbook Board. Unlike existing Bangla datasets, NCTB-QA maintains a balanced distribution of answerable (57.25%) and unanswerable (42.75%) questions. NCTB-QA also includes adversarially designed instances containing plausible distractors. We benchmark three transformer-based models (BERT, RoBERTa, ELECTRA) and demonstrate substantial improvements through fine-tuning. BERT achieves 313% relative improvement in F1 score (0.150 to 0.620). Semantic answer quality measured by BERTScore also increases significantly across all models. Our results establish NCTB-QA as a challenging benchmark for Bangla educational question answering. This study demonstrates that domain-specific fine-tuning is critical for robust performance in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个大规模孟加拉语问答数据集NCTB-QA，用于解决低资源语言在处理无法回答问题时的挑战。该数据集包含可回答和无法回答的问题，并引入了对抗性设计的干扰项。通过对Transformer模型的微调，结果显示性能显著提升。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言的阅读理解系统在处理无法回答的问题时表现不佳，容易产生不可靠的答案。需要一个专门的数据集来解决这个问题，并推动相关模型的改进。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含87,805个问答对的大规模孟加拉语数据集NCTB-QA，该数据集从孟加拉国国家课程与教材委员会出版的50本教科书中提取。数据集包含可回答和无法回答的问题，并引入了包含合理干扰项的对抗性设计实例。在NCTB-QA上对BERT、RoBERTa和ELECTRA三个Transformer模型进行了基准测试和微调。
AI.result: 通过在NCTB-QA数据集上进行微调，BERT模型的F1分数相对提高了313%（从0.150提升到0.620）。所有模型的BERTScore（衡量语义答案质量）也显著提高。NCTB-QA被确立为一个具有挑战性的孟加拉语教育问答基准。
AI.conclusion: NCTB-QA数据集为低资源语言（特别是孟加拉语）的教育问答研究提供了一个重要的基准。研究表明，领域特定的微调对于在低资源环境下实现鲁棒的问答性能至关重要。

title: Dark3R: Learning Structure from Motion in the Dark
summary: We introduce Dark3R, a framework for structure from motion in the dark that operates directly on raw images with signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) below $-4$ dB -- a regime where conventional feature- and learning-based methods break down. Our key insight is to adapt large-scale 3D foundation models to extreme low-light conditions through a teacher--student distillation process, enabling robust feature matching and camera pose estimation in low light. Dark3R requires no 3D supervision; it is trained solely on noisy--clean raw image pairs, which can be either captured directly or synthesized using a simple Poisson--Gaussian noise model applied to well-exposed raw images. To train and evaluate our approach, we introduce a new, exposure-bracketed dataset that includes $\sim$42,000 multi-view raw images with ground-truth 3D annotations, and we demonstrate that Dark3R achieves state-of-the-art structure from motion in the low-SNR regime. Further, we demonstrate state-of-the-art novel view synthesis in the dark using Dark3R's predicted poses and a coarse-to-fine radiance field optimization procedure.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Dark3R的框架，用于在极低光照（信噪比低于-4dB）条件下进行运动恢复（SfM），该框架通过教师-学生蒸馏过程，将大型3D基础模型适配到低光环境，从而实现鲁棒的特征匹配和相机姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在极低光照条件下（信噪比低于-4dB）的运动恢复性能不佳，需要一种能够直接处理原始图像并克服低光照挑战的框架。
AI.method: Dark3R框架的核心思想是将大型3D基础模型通过教师-学生蒸馏过程适配到极低光照条件。训练数据仅需噪声-干净的原始图像对，可通过直接捕获或合成生成。同时，引入了一个包含约42,000张多视图原始图像和3D真值标注的新数据集。
AI.result: Dark3R在极低信噪比的运动恢复任务上达到了最先进的性能。此外，结合其预测的姿态和粗到精的辐射场优化，在黑暗中的新视角合成也取得了最先进的效果。
AI.conclusion: Dark3R成功地将先进的3D基础模型应用于极低光照下的运动恢复和新视角合成，证明了其在恶劣光照条件下的有效性，并且不需要3D监督。

title: Video-based Locomotion Analysis for Fish Health Monitoring
summary: Monitoring the health conditions of fish is essential, as it enables the early detection of disease, safeguards animal welfare, and contributes to sustainable aquaculture practices. Physiological and pathological conditions of cultivated fish can be inferred by analyzing locomotion activities. In this paper, we present a system that estimates the locomotion activities from videos using multi object tracking. The core of our approach is a YOLOv11 detector embedded in a tracking-by-detection framework. We investigate various configurations of the YOLOv11-architecture as well as extensions that incorporate multiple frames to improve detection accuracy. Our system is evaluated on a manually annotated dataset of Sulawesi ricefish recorded in a home-aquarium-like setup, demonstrating its ability to reliably measure swimming direction and speed for fish health monitoring. The dataset will be made publicly available upon publication.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于YOLOv11检测器和多目标跟踪的系统，用于从视频中分析鱼类活动，以监测鱼类健康状况，并能在家庭水族箱环境中准确测量游动方向和速度。
AI.motivation: 监测鱼类健康状况对于早期疾病检测、保障动物福利和促进可持续水产养殖至关重要，而鱼类的活动行为可以反映其生理和病理状况。
AI.method: 使用YOLOv11作为目标检测器，并结合跟踪-检测框架（tracking-by-detection）来实现多目标跟踪，从而从视频中提取鱼类的活动信息。研究了YOLOv11的不同配置和多帧集成方法以提高检测精度。
AI.result: 该系统能够可靠地测量鱼类的游动方向和速度，适用于鱼类健康监测。在手动标注的 Sulawesi ricefish 数据集上进行了评估。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于YOLOv11和多目标跟踪的系统能够有效地从视频中估计鱼类的活动，为鱼类健康监测提供了一种可靠的方法，并将在发表后公开数据集。

title: Fusion-CAM: Integrating Gradient and Region-Based Class Activation Maps for Robust Visual Explanations
summary: Interpreting the decision-making process of deep convolutional neural networks remains a central challenge in achieving trustworthy and transparent artificial intelligence. Explainable AI (XAI) techniques, particularly Class Activation Map (CAM) methods, are widely adopted to visualize the input regions influencing model predictions. Gradient-based approaches (e.g. Grad-CAM) provide highly discriminative, fine-grained details by computing gradients of class activations but often yield noisy and incomplete maps that emphasize only the most salient regions rather than the complete objects. Region-based approaches (e.g. Score-CAM) aggregate information over larger areas, capturing broader object coverage at the cost of over-smoothing and reduced sensitivity to subtle features. We introduce Fusion-CAM, a novel framework that bridges this explanatory gap by unifying both paradigms through a dedicated fusion mechanism to produce robust and highly discriminative visual explanations. Our method first denoises gradient-based maps, yielding cleaner and more focused activations. It then combines the refined gradient map with region-based maps using contribution weights to enhance class coverage. Finally, we propose an adaptive similarity-based pixel-level fusion that evaluates the agreement between both paradigms and dynamically adjusts the fusion strength. This adaptive mechanism reinforces consistent activations while softly blending conflicting regions, resulting in richer, context-aware, and input-adaptive visual explanations. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks show that Fusion-CAM consistently outperforms existing CAM variants in both qualitative visualization and quantitative evaluation, providing a robust and flexible tool for interpreting deep neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Fusion-CAM 的新框架，通过融合基于梯度的方法和基于区域的方法，来生成更鲁棒、更具区分性的类激活图（CAM），以提高深度卷积神经网络的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有的 XAI 方法，特别是 CAM 类方法，在生成可视化解释时存在两难：基于梯度的方法（如 Grad-CAM）可以生成精细但可能不完整或嘈杂的图，而基于区域的方法（如 Score-CAM）可以覆盖更广但可能过于平滑。这种“解释鸿沟”阻碍了对深度神经网络的信任和透明度。
AI.method: Fusion-CAM 框架首先对基于梯度的方法生成的图进行去噪，使其更清晰。然后，将去噪后的梯度图与基于区域的方法生成的图通过贡献权重进行融合，以增强类别覆盖。最后，引入一种自适应的、基于像素的相似度融合机制，评估两种方法的 agreement，并动态调整融合强度，以实现更丰富、更具上下文感知和输入自适应的可视化解释。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试上的大量实验表明，Fusion-CAM 在定性和定量评估方面都优于现有的 CAM 变体，生成了更鲁棒、更灵活的视觉解释。
AI.conclusion: Fusion-CAM 通过一种新颖的融合机制，成功地弥合了基于梯度和基于区域的 CAM 方法之间的解释鸿沟，能够生成更全面、更准确的视觉解释，为理解和信任深度神经网络提供了一个强大的工具。

title: NaiLIA: Multimodal Nail Design Retrieval Based on Dense Intent Descriptions and Palette Queries
summary: We focus on the task of retrieving nail design images based on dense intent descriptions, which represent multi-layered user intent for nail designs. This is challenging because such descriptions specify unconstrained painted elements and pre-manufactured embellishments as well as visual characteristics, themes, and overall impressions. In addition to these descriptions, we assume that users provide palette queries by specifying zero or more colors via a color picker, enabling the expression of subtle and continuous color nuances. Existing vision-language foundation models often struggle to incorporate such descriptions and palettes. To address this, we propose NaiLIA, a multimodal retrieval method for nail design images, which comprehensively aligns with dense intent descriptions and palette queries during retrieval. Our approach introduces a relaxed loss based on confidence scores for unlabeled images that can align with the descriptions. To evaluate NaiLIA, we constructed a benchmark consisting of 10,625 images collected from people with diverse cultural backgrounds. The images were annotated with long and dense intent descriptions given by over 200 annotators. Experimental results demonstrate that NaiLIA outperforms standard methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NaiLIA的多模态检索方法，用于根据详细的用户意图描述和颜色查询来检索美甲设计图像，并在构建的基准测试上表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言基础模型难以处理包含多层用户意图（如绘画元素、装饰品、主题、整体印象）以及用户通过颜色选择器指定的细微颜色细微差别的稠密意图描述和调色板查询。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为NaiLIA的多模态检索方法，该方法通过引入基于置信分数的宽松损失来处理未标记图像，以与稠密意图描述和调色板查询进行全面对齐。
AI.result: 在包含10,625张来自不同文化背景的图像的基准测试上，NaiLIA的实验结果显示其性能优于标准方法。
AI.conclusion: NaiLIA是一种有效的美甲设计图像检索方法，能够全面匹配用户详细的意图描述和调色板查询，解决了现有模型的局限性。

title: Leveraging LLM Parametric Knowledge for Fact Checking without Retrieval
summary: Trustworthiness is a core research challenge for agentic AI systems built on Large Language Models (LLMs). To enhance trust, natural language claims from diverse sources, including human-written text, web content, and model outputs, are commonly checked for factuality by retrieving external knowledge and using an LLM to verify the faithfulness of claims to the retrieved evidence. As a result, such methods are constrained by retrieval errors and external data availability, while leaving the models intrinsic fact-verification capabilities largely unused. We propose the task of fact-checking without retrieval, focusing on the verification of arbitrary natural language claims, independent of their source. To study this setting, we introduce a comprehensive evaluation framework focused on generalization, testing robustness to (i) long-tail knowledge, (ii) variation in claim sources, (iii) multilinguality, and (iv) long-form generation. Across 9 datasets, 18 methods and 3 models, our experiments indicate that logit-based approaches often underperform compared to those that leverage internal model representations. Building on this finding, we introduce INTRA, a method that exploits interactions between internal representations and achieves state-of-the-art performance with strong generalization. More broadly, our work establishes fact-checking without retrieval as a promising research direction that can complement retrieval-based frameworks, improve scalability, and enable the use of such systems as reward signals during training or as components integrated into the generation process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不依赖外部检索的内部事实核查方法（INTRA），以解决当前事实核查方法对检索的依赖和外部数据可用性的限制，并在多项测试中取得了领先的性能，展示了其在泛化性、鲁棒性方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于LLM的事实核查方法依赖于外部检索，易受检索错误和数据可用性限制，且未充分利用LLM自身的内在事实核查能力。研究旨在探索不依赖检索的事实核查方法，以克服现有方法的局限性。
AI.method: 提出“无检索事实核查”任务，并构建了一个全面的评估框架，重点测试模型在长尾知识、来源变化、多语言和长文本生成等方面的泛化能力和鲁棒性。在此基础上，提出INTRA方法，利用内部模型表征的交互来提升事实核查性能。
AI.result: 通过在9个数据集、18种方法和3种模型上的实验发现，基于Logit的方法通常不如利用模型内部表征的方法。INTRA方法通过利用内部表征交互，取得了当前最优的性能，并展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 无检索事实核查是一个有前景的研究方向，可以作为检索式框架的补充，提高可扩展性，并有望用于模型训练中的奖励信号或集成到生成过程中，从而增强AI系统的可信度。

title: Reasoning Theater: Disentangling Model Beliefs from Chain-of-Thought
summary: We provide evidence of performative chain-of-thought (CoT) in reasoning models, where a model becomes strongly confident in its final answer, but continues generating tokens without revealing its internal belief. Our analysis compares activation probing, early forced answering, and a CoT monitor across two large models (DeepSeek-R1 671B & GPT-OSS 120B) and find task difficulty-specific differences: The model's final answer is decodable from activations far earlier in CoT than a monitor is able to say, especially for easy recall-based MMLU questions. We contrast this with genuine reasoning in difficult multihop GPQA-Diamond questions. Despite this, inflection points (e.g., backtracking, 'aha' moments) occur almost exclusively in responses where probes show large belief shifts, suggesting these behaviors track genuine uncertainty rather than learned "reasoning theater." Finally, probe-guided early exit reduces tokens by up to 80% on MMLU and 30% on GPQA-Diamond with similar accuracy, positioning attention probing as an efficient tool for detecting performative reasoning and enabling adaptive computation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型存在“表演性思维链”（performative CoT），模型在生成答案时表现出过度的自信，但实际上其内部信念可能在更早的阶段就已经确定。通过激活探测、强制早期回答和CoT监控等方法，研究表明在易于回忆的任务中，模型早期就能确定答案，而CoT监控的判断则滞后。反之，在困难的多跳推理任务中，激活探测到的信念变化与模型“顿悟”时刻高度相关，表明这是真实的推理过程。通过探测引导模型提前退出，可以在MMLU和GPQA-Diamond任务上显著减少生成Token数量，同时保持准确率，证明了激活探测在识别表演性推理和实现自适应计算方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 研究者观察到大型语言模型在生成思考过程（CoT）时，往往表现出对最终答案的高度自信，但这种自信是否真实反映了模型的内部思考过程，还是仅仅一种“表演”？为了探究这一点，以及模型在不同任务难度下推理行为的差异，并探索如何通过技术手段提高效率。
AI.method: 研究采用了激活探测（activation probing）、早期强制回答（early forced answering）和CoT监控（CoT monitor）三种分析方法，并对比了两种大型模型（DeepSeek-R1 671B & GPT-OSS 120B）。研究通过对比模型在MMLU（易于回忆）和GPQA-Diamond（困难多跳推理）任务上的表现，分析了模型内部信念变化与任务难度、特定行为（如回溯、“顿悟”）之间的关系。最后，通过引导模型提前退出（early exit）来评估激活探测在效率提升方面的潜力。
AI.result: 1. 模型在易于回忆的任务（如MMLU）中，其最终答案可以从非常早期的激活中解码，远早于CoT监控能够判断的时刻，表明存在“表演性CoT”。 2. 在困难的多跳推理任务（如GPQA-Diamond）中，模型激活中的信念变化与“顿悟”或回溯等行为高度相关，提示这些是真实的推理过程。 3. 通过激活探测引导模型提前退出，可以在MMLU任务上减少高达80%的Token生成，在GPQA-Diamond任务上减少30%，同时保持相似的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型存在“表演性思维链”，即模型可能在较早阶段就已确定答案，但仍继续生成Token以表现出推理过程。激活探测是一种有效的工具，可以识别这种表演性推理，并能通过引导模型提前退出，显著提高计算效率，尤其是在易于回忆的任务中。同时，激活探测到的信念变化能区分真实的推理不确定性和表演性行为。

title: Towards Multimodal Lifelong Understanding: A Dataset and Agentic Baseline
summary: While datasets for video understanding have scaled to hour-long durations, they typically consist of densely concatenated clips that differ from natural, unscripted daily life. To bridge this gap, we introduce MM-Lifelong, a dataset designed for Multimodal Lifelong Understanding. Comprising 181.1 hours of footage, it is structured across Day, Week, and Month scales to capture varying temporal densities. Extensive evaluations reveal two critical failure modes in current paradigms: end-to-end MLLMs suffer from a Working Memory Bottleneck due to context saturation, while representative agentic baselines experience Global Localization Collapse when navigating sparse, month-long timelines. To address this, we propose the Recursive Multimodal Agent (ReMA), which employs dynamic memory management to iteratively update a recursive belief state, significantly outperforming existing methods. Finally, we establish dataset splits designed to isolate temporal and domain biases, providing a rigorous foundation for future research in supervised learning and out-of-distribution generalization.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了MM-Lifelong数据集，用于解决现有视频理解数据集与真实生活时间密度差异的问题。并针对现有方法在处理长时间、稀疏数据时的局限性，提出了递归多模态代理（ReMA）模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解数据集通常由密集连接的片段组成，与自然、非脚本化的日常生活存在差异。需要能够捕捉不同时间密度（日、周、月）的真实生活视频数据。
AI.method: 构建了MM-Lifelong数据集，包含181.1小时的视频，按日、周、月尺度划分。设计并评估了端到端多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）和代表性代理基线，发现它们在处理长时间、稀疏数据时存在工作记忆瓶颈和全局定位崩溃的问题。提出了递归多模态代理（ReMA）模型，采用动态内存管理和递归信念状态更新。
AI.result: MM-Lifelong数据集揭示了现有MLLMs和代理基线在处理长时间、稀疏视频数据时的两大失败模式。ReMA模型显著优于现有方法。数据集分割有助于隔离时间和领域偏差。
AI.conclusion: MM-Lifelong数据集为多模态终身理解提供了新的资源。提出的ReMA模型通过动态内存管理有效解决了长时间、稀疏时间轴上的理解和导航问题，为未来的研究奠定了基础。

title: EdgeDAM: Real-time Object Tracking for Mobile Devices
summary: Single-object tracking (SOT) on edge devices is a critical computer vision task, requiring accurate and continuous target localization across video frames under occlusion, distractor interference, and fast motion. However, recent state-of-the-art distractor-aware memory mechanisms are largely built on segmentation-based trackers and rely on mask prediction and attention-driven memory updates, which introduce substantial computational overhead and limit real-time deployment on resource-constrained hardware; meanwhile, lightweight trackers sustain high throughput but are prone to drift when visually similar distractors appear. To address these challenges, we propose EdgeDAM, a lightweight detection-guided tracking framework that reformulates distractor-aware memory for bounding-box tracking under strict edge constraints. EdgeDAM introduces two key strategies: (1) Dual-Buffer Distractor-Aware Memory (DAM), which integrates a Recent-Aware Memory to preserve temporally consistent target hypotheses and a Distractor-Resolving Memory to explicitly store hard negative candidates and penalize their re-selection during recovery; and (2) Confidence-Driven Switching with Held-Box Stabilization, where tracker reliability and temporal consistency criteria adaptively activate detection and memory-guided re-identification during occlusion, while a held-box mechanism temporarily freezes and expands the estimate to suppress distractor contamination. Extensive experiments on five benchmarks, including the distractor-focused DiDi dataset, demonstrate improved robustness under occlusion and fast motion while maintaining real-time performance on mobile devices, achieving 88.2% accuracy on DiDi and 25 FPS on an iPhone 15. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 EdgeDAM 的轻量级、检测引导的单目标跟踪框架，用于在计算资源受限的边缘设备上进行跟踪。它引入了一种双缓冲区干扰感知内存机制和一种置信度驱动的切换与持盒稳定机制，以提高在遮挡和快速运动下的鲁棒性，同时保持实时性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的先进干扰感知内存机制通常基于分割跟踪器，计算开销大，不适合资源受限的边缘设备。轻量级跟踪器虽然速度快，但在出现视觉相似的干扰物时容易漂移。因此，需要一种轻量级、检测引导的跟踪框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: EdgeDAM 提出两种关键策略：（1）双缓冲区干扰感知内存（DAM）：包含近期感知内存（保存目标假设）和干扰物解决内存（存储难识别的负样本并惩罚其重新选择）；（2）置信度驱动切换与持盒稳定：自适应激活检测和内存引导的重新识别，并使用临时冻结和扩展估计的持盒机制来抑制干扰物。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试（包括 DiDi 数据集）上进行了广泛的实验。EdgeDAM 在遮挡和快速运动下表现出更高的鲁棒性，同时保持了移动设备的实时性能。在 DiDi 数据集上达到了 88.2% 的准确率，在 iPhone 15 上实现了 25 FPS。
AI.conclusion: EdgeDAM 是一种有效的轻量级单目标跟踪框架，适用于边缘设备。通过其创新的双缓冲区干扰感知内存和置信度驱动的切换与持盒稳定机制，该方法在保持实时性能的同时，显著提高了在存在遮挡和干扰物时的跟踪鲁棒性。

title: HALP: Detecting Hallucinations in Vision-Language Models without Generating a Single Token
summary: Hallucinations remain a persistent challenge for vision-language models (VLMs), which often describe nonexistent objects or fabricate facts. Existing detection methods typically operate after text generation, making intervention both costly and untimely. We investigate whether hallucination risk can instead be predicted before any token is generated by probing a model's internal representations in a single forward pass. Across a diverse set of vision-language tasks and eight modern VLMs, including Llama-3.2-Vision, Gemma-3, Phi-4-VL, and Qwen2.5-VL, we examine three families of internal representations: (i) visual-only features without multimodal fusion, (ii) vision-token representations within the text decoder, and (iii) query-token representations that integrate visual and textual information before generation. Probes trained on these representations achieve strong hallucination-detection performance without decoding, reaching up to 0.93 AUROC on Gemma-3-12B, Phi-4-VL 5.6B, and Molmo 7B. Late query-token states are the most predictive for most models, while visual or mid-layer features dominate in a few architectures (e.g., ~0.79 AUROC for Qwen2.5-VL-7B using visual-only features). These results demonstrate that (1) hallucination risk is detectable pre-generation, (2) the most informative layer and modality vary across architectures, and (3) lightweight probes have the potential to enable early abstention, selective routing, and adaptive decoding to improve both safety and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种在视觉语言模型（VLMs）生成文本前预测幻觉风险的方法，通过分析模型的内部表征，无需生成任何文本即可实现高精度的幻觉检测。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型存在幻觉问题（描述不存在的物体或捏造事实），且检测方法通常在文本生成后进行，导致干预成本高且不及时。因此，研究者希望在生成阶段之前预测幻觉风险，实现更早、更有效的干预。
AI.method: 研究者探索了三种内部表征，包括：(i) 纯视觉特征（无多模态融合），(ii) 文本解码器内的视觉-token表征，以及 (iii) 集成视觉和文本信息后的query-token表征。利用这些表征训练轻量级探针（probes）模型，以预测幻觉的发生。
AI.result: 在多种视觉语言任务和八种现代VLM模型上，基于内部表征训练的探针模型在无需解码的情况下，展现出强大的幻觉检测能力，最高AUROC可达0.93。研究发现， late query-token states 对大多数模型最具预测性，但某些模型（如Qwen2.5-VL-7B）则以纯视觉特征表现最佳（AUROC约0.79）。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了在文本生成前即可检测到幻觉风险，并且最有效的信息层和模态因模型架构而异。轻量级探针有潜力实现早期弃权、选择性路由和自适应解码，从而提高模型的安全性和效率。

title: Towards 3D Scene Understanding of Gas Plumes in LWIR Hyperspectral Images Using Neural Radiance Fields
comment: This manuscript was submitted to SPIE JARS and is under review. Code and Data can be found at https://github.com/lanl/HSI-Nerfstudio and https://zenodo.org/records/18626884 respectively. Video 1 and Video 2 can be found at https://github.com/lanl/HSI-Nerfstudio/blob/main/renders/paper/grid_Falsecolor.mp4 and https://github.com/lanl/HSI-Nerfstudio/blob/main/renders/paper/grid_ACE.mp4 respectively
summary: Hyperspectral images (HSI) have many applications, ranging from environmental monitoring to national security, and can be used for material detection and identification. Longwave infrared (LWIR) HSI can be used for gas plume detection and analysis. Oftentimes, only a few images of a scene of interest are available and are analyzed individually. The ability to combine information from multiple images into a single, cohesive representation could enhance analysis by providing more context on the scene's geometry and spectral properties. Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) create a latent neural representation of volumetric scene properties that enable novel-view rendering and geometry reconstruction, offering a promising avenue for hyperspectral 3D scene reconstruction.
